_schema: Cada arquetipo actúa como diff sobre su clase base. Solo incluye campos que CAMBIAN respecto a classes.json. Campos ausentes = usar valor de la clase base. class_skills_add/remove para cambios parciales, class_skills para reemplazo completo.

invulnerable_rager.name: Invulnerable Rager
invulnerable_rager.description_es: Sustituye esquiva sobrenatural y RD por Resistencia Invulnerable (RD/— igual a la mitad del nivel) y resistencia a un entorno natural. Énfasis en absorber daño directo.
invulnerable_rager.description_en: Replaces uncanny dodge and DR with Invulnerable Resistance (DR/— equal to half the barbarian's level) and resistance to a natural environment. Emphasis on absorbing direct damage.

features_gained.name: Invulnerability
features_gained.description_es: RD/— igual a la mitad del nivel del bárbaro. Mitad de esta RD aplica contra ataques mágicos.
features_gained.description_en: DR/— equal to half the barbarian's level. Half this DR applies against magical attacks.

features_gained.name: Extreme Endurance
features_gained.description_es: Resistencia a un tipo de entorno: calor, frío, electricidad o fuego. Escala con el nivel.
features_gained.description_en: Resistance to one environment type: heat, cold, electricity, or fire. Scales with level.

titan_mauler.name: Titan Mauler
titan_mauler.description_es: Puede blandir armas diseñadas para criaturas de una categoría mayor con penalizador reducido. Sus poderes de furia incluyen capacidades para armas gigantescas.
titan_mauler.description_en: Can wield weapons designed for creatures one size category larger with reduced penalty. Its rage powers include capabilities for giant-sized weapons.

features_gained.name: Big Game Hunter
features_gained.description_es: +1 a daño cuerpo a cuerpo contra criaturas de mayor tamaño.
features_gained.description_en: +1 to melee damage against creatures of larger size.

features_gained.name: Massive Weapons
features_gained.description_es: Penalizador reducido por usar armas de una categoría mayor. A nivel 3 puede usarlas sin penalizador de ataque.
features_gained.description_en: Reduced penalty for using weapons one size category larger. At level 3 can use them without attack penalty.

features_gained.name: Titanic Rage
features_gained.description_es: En furia puede aumentar su tamaño una categoría (como Agrandar Persona).
features_gained.description_en: While raging can increase size by one category (as Enlarge Person).

archaeologist.name: Archaeologist
archaeologist.description_es: Cambia las actuaciones musicales por suerte personal (Archaeologist's Luck, +1 escalable a ataque/daño/salvaciones/habilidades). Más explorador solitario que apoyo de grupo.
archaeologist.description_en: Trades musical performances for personal luck (Archaeologist's Luck, a scaling +1 to attack/damage/saves/skills). More of a solo explorer than a party supporter.

features_gained.name: Archaeologist's Luck (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Rondas por día igual a 4 + mod CARs. Otorga bonificación de suerte +1 (escala a +4 a nivel 19) a tiradas de ataque, daño, salvaciones y habilidades.
features_gained.description_en: Rounds per day equal to 4 + CHA mod. Grants a +1 luck bonus (scaling to +4 at level 19) on attack rolls, damage, saves, and skills.

features_gained.name: Trap Sense (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Bonificación de +1 por cada 3 niveles a CA y salvaciones contra trampas.
features_gained.description_en: +1 bonus per 3 levels to AC and saves against traps.

features_gained.name: Rogue Talent
features_gained.description_es: Gana talentos de pícaro en lugar de actuaciones adicionales.
features_gained.description_en: Gains rogue talents in place of additional performances.

features_gained.name: Uncanny Dodge / Evasion
features_gained.description_es: Obtiene esquiva sobrenatural a nivel 2 y Evasión a nivel 6.
features_gained.description_en: Gains uncanny dodge at level 2 and Evasion at level 6.

court_bard.name: Court Bard
court_bard.description_es: Cambia actuaciones inspiradoras por ridículo social y sátira que imponen penalizadores a enemigos en lugar de bonificar aliados. Maestro de la intriga cortesana.
court_bard.description_en: Trades inspiring performances for social mockery and satire that impose penalties on enemies rather than buffing allies. A master of courtly intrigue.

features_gained.name: Satire (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Penalizador –1 (escala a –4) a tiradas de ataque, salvaciones y verificaciones de habilidad de todos los enemigos que puedan oír.
features_gained.description_en: –1 penalty (scaling to –4) to attack rolls, saves, and skill checks for all enemies who can hear.

features_gained.name: Mockery (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Penalizador de moral –2 al atributo de un objetivo individual.
features_gained.description_en: –2 morale penalty to an ability score of a single target.

features_gained.name: Scandal (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Penalizador a verificaciones de Carisma de un objetivo durante 24 horas.
features_gained.description_en: Penalty to the target's Charisma-based checks for 24 hours.

features_gained.name: Heraldic Expertise
features_gained.description_es: +2 a verificaciones de Conocimiento (historia, nobleza, local) y Diplomacia.
features_gained.description_en: +2 to Knowledge (history, nobility, local) and Diplomacy checks.

crusader.name: Crusader
crusader.description_es: Intercambia canalización de energía y parte de la magia por dones de combate adicionales y capacidad de compartir efectos de conjuro con múltiples aliados.
crusader.description_en: Trades channel energy and part of their magic for additional combat feats and the ability to share spell effects with multiple allies.

features_gained.name: Bonus Feats
features_gained.description_es: Gana dones de combate adicionales a niveles 1, 3, 5, 7... en lugar de los dones de dominio estándar.
features_gained.description_en: Gains additional combat feats at levels 1, 3, 5, 7... instead of standard domain feats.

features_gained.name: Legion's Blessing (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Puede lanzar conjuros de toque beneficiosos sobre múltiples aliados con una acción de asalto completo.
features_gained.description_en: Can cast beneficial touch spells on multiple allies as a full-round action.

ecclesitheurge.name: Ecclesitheurge
ecclesitheurge.description_es: Renuncia a toda armadura por maestría divina ampliada: dominio secundario intercambiable diariamente y símbolo sagrado vinculado que potencia conjuros.
ecclesitheurge.description_en: Gives up all armor for expanded divine mastery: a daily-swappable secondary domain and a bonded holy symbol that empowers spells.

features_gained.name: Powerful Domain (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Dominio primario otorga un uso adicional de poderes de dominio por día.
features_gained.description_en: Primary domain grants an additional use of domain powers per day.

features_gained.name: Bonded Holy Symbol (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Su símbolo sagrado actúa como objeto vinculado que puede aumentar el DC de sus conjuros o recuperar un conjuro por día.
features_gained.description_en: Their holy symbol acts as a bonded item that can raise their spell DCs or recover one spell per day.

features_gained.name: Wandering Domain
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 puede cambiar su dominio secundario diariamente al preparar conjuros.
features_gained.description_en: At level 4 can change their secondary domain daily when preparing spells.

blight_druid.name: Blight Druid
blight_druid.description_es: Druida de la corrupción. Empatía con alimañas (vermin) en lugar de animales, inmunidad a enfermedades y poder para difundir plagas. Acompañante de criatura plaga o corrupta.
blight_druid.description_en: Druid of corruption. Empathy with vermin instead of animals, disease immunity, and the power to spread plagues. Companion is a blighted or corrupted creature.

features_gained.name: Vermin Empathy (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Funciona como Wild Empathy pero con insectos, arañas y otras alimañas.
features_gained.description_en: Functions like Wild Empathy but with insects, spiders, and other vermin.

features_gained.name: Miasma (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Aura de enfermedad con alcance escalable. Criaturas que fallen contra ella contraen una enfermedad.
features_gained.description_en: Disease aura with scaling range. Creatures that fail against it contract a disease.

features_gained.name: Plagued (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Inmunidad a enfermedades. Puede transmitir enfermedades mediante el toque.
features_gained.description_en: Immunity to diseases. Can transmit diseases by touch.

urban_druid.name: Urban Druid
urban_druid.description_es: Druida de ciudades y civilización. Terrenos favorecidos urbanos, detección de trampas, lista de conjuros con magia social. Sin forma animal, con forma urbana alternativa.
urban_druid.description_en: Druid of cities and civilization. Urban favored terrains, trap detection, a spell list with social magic. No wild shape, but an alternative urban form.

features_gained.name: Spontaneous Casting
features_gained.description_es: Lanza conjuros de encantamiento espontáneamente en lugar de Llamar a la Naturaleza.
features_gained.description_en: Spontaneously casts enchantment spells instead of Summon Nature's Ally.

features_gained.name: Mental Strength (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Bonificación de +2 a salvaciones contra encantamientos y efectos de miedo.
features_gained.description_en: +2 bonus on saves against enchantments and fear effects.

features_gained.name: Lorekeeper (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede usar Conocimiento (local) como habilidad de clase para identificar monstruos humanoides.
features_gained.description_en: Can use Knowledge (local) as a class skill to identify humanoid monsters.

two_handed_fighter.name: Two-Handed Fighter
two_handed_fighter.description_es: Especialista en armas a dos manos. Shattering Strike destruye armaduras, Backswing añade doble bonificador de FUE al daño en el 2º ataque. Sin entrenamiento en armadura.
two_handed_fighter.description_en: Specialist in two-handed weapons. Shattering Strike destroys armor; Backswing adds double STR bonus to damage on the 2nd attack. No armor training.

features_gained.name: Shattering Strike (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: +1 por cada 4 niveles a tiradas de ataque y daño para destrozar (sunder) objetos.
features_gained.description_en: +1 per 4 levels to attack and damage rolls for sundering objects.

features_gained.name: Backswing (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: En el 2º ataque de asalto completo añade doble bonificador de FUE al daño.
features_gained.description_en: On the 2nd attack of a full-attack, adds double STR bonus to damage.

features_gained.name: Piledriver (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede hacer empuje o derribo como maniobra libre después de un golpe.
features_gained.description_en: Can make a bull rush or trip as a free maneuver after a hit.

features_gained.name: Overhand Chop (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Con ataques estándar (no asalto completo) añade doble bonificador de FUE al daño.
features_gained.description_en: With standard attacks (not full-attack) adds double STR bonus to damage.

two_weapon_warrior.name: Two-Weapon Warrior
two_weapon_warrior.description_es: Especialista en lucha con dos armas. Ataques con ambas armas como acción estándar, ataques de oportunidad simultáneos y bonificaciones escalables a dos armas.
two_weapon_warrior.description_en: Two-weapon fighting specialist. Strikes with both weapons as a standard action, simultaneous attacks of opportunity, and scaling two-weapon bonuses.

features_gained.name: Doublestrike (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Como acción estándar puede atacar una vez con cada arma.
features_gained.description_en: As a standard action, attack once with each weapon.

features_gained.name: Improved Balance (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Reduce penalizador de ataque con arma secundaria en –1 adicional.
features_gained.description_en: Reduces off-hand attack penalty by an additional –1.

features_gained.name: Equal Opportunity (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Cuando hace un ataque de oportunidad, puede atacar con ambas armas.
features_gained.description_en: When making an attack of opportunity, can attack with both weapons.

features_gained.name: Deft Doublestrike (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Cuando golpea al mismo objetivo con ambas armas en el mismo turno puede intentar desarmar o aturdir sin acción adicional.
features_gained.description_en: When hitting the same target with both weapons in the same turn, can attempt to disarm or stun without an extra action.

qinggong_monk.name: Qinggong Monk
qinggong_monk.description_es: Reemplaza habilidades estándar del monje por poderes ki personalizables elegidos de una lista. Máxima flexibilidad táctica para adaptar el monje a cualquier concepto.
qinggong_monk.description_en: Replaces standard monk abilities with customizable ki powers chosen from a list. Maximum tactical flexibility to tailor the monk to any concept.

features_gained.name: Ki Powers (Su/Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Cada habilidad eliminada se reemplaza por un poder ki elegido de la lista de qinggong según el nivel requerido. Incluye conjuros como habilidades, poderes defensivos y ofensivos.
features_gained.description_en: Each removed ability is replaced with a ki power chosen from the qinggong list based on the required level. Includes spells as abilities, defensive and offensive powers.

master_of_many_styles.name: Master of Many Styles
master_of_many_styles.description_es: Puede adoptar múltiples posturas de estilo marcial simultáneamente. A nivel 6 inicia dos estilos a la vez; a nivel alto combina hasta cinco estilos activos.
master_of_many_styles.description_en: Can adopt multiple martial style stances simultaneously. At level 6 enters two styles at once; at high levels combines up to five active styles.

features_gained.name: Fuse Style (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede estar en dos estilos marciales simultáneamente. Los beneficios de ambos estilos se aplican a la vez.
features_gained.description_en: Can be in two martial styles at once. The benefits of both styles apply simultaneously.

features_gained.name: Maneuver Training (modified)
features_gained.description_es: Bonus feats deben ser dones de estilo marcial o sus prerrequisitos.
features_gained.description_en: Bonus feats must be style feats or their prerequisites.

holy_gun.name: Holy Gun
holy_gun.description_es: Sustituye Smite Evil cuerpo a cuerpo por Smite Evil con armas de fuego a distancia. Divine Bond mejora el arma de fuego en lugar de la montura o espada.
holy_gun.description_en: Replaces melee Smite Evil with ranged firearm Smite Evil. Divine Bond enhances the firearm instead of mount or sword.

features_gained.name: Smite Evil (ranged)
features_gained.description_es: Smite Evil funciona con ataques de arma de fuego. +CARs a ataque, +nivel a daño contra el objetivo.
features_gained.description_en: Smite Evil works with firearm attacks. +CHA mod to attack, +level to damage against the target.

features_gained.name: Divine Bond (firearm)
features_gained.description_es: Mejora el arma de fuego con propiedades sagradas en lugar de montura o espada.
features_gained.description_en: Enhances the firearm with holy properties instead of a mount or sword.

features_gained.name: Holy Grit
features_gained.description_es: Usa Carisma para recuperar grit (si multiclase con pistolero) en lugar de Sabiduría.
features_gained.description_en: Uses Charisma to recover grit (if multiclassed with gunslinger) instead of Wisdom.

sacred_servant.name: Sacred Servant
sacred_servant.description_es: Obtiene acceso a un dominio de su deidad y puede convocar aliados celestiales. Divine Bond llama criaturas sagradas en lugar de mejorar armas.
sacred_servant.description_en: Gains access to one of their deity's domains and can summon celestial allies. Divine Bond calls holy creatures instead of enhancing weapons.

features_gained.name: Domain
features_gained.description_es: Obtiene un dominio de su deidad con sus poderes otorgados (como clérigo de mitad de nivel).
features_gained.description_en: Gains a domain from their deity with its granted powers (as a cleric of half their level).

features_gained.name: Divine Bond (celestial ally)
features_gained.description_es: Convoca archon, ángel u otra criatura sagrada como aliado temporal en lugar de potenciar un arma.
features_gained.description_en: Summons an archon, angel, or other holy creature as a temporary ally instead of empowering a weapon.

urban_ranger.name: Urban Ranger
urban_ranger.description_es: Versión urbana del explorador. Terreno favorecido solo urbano/subterráneo, detección de trampas, habilidades de sigilo en ciudades.
urban_ranger.description_en: Urban version of the ranger. Favored terrain only urban/underground, trap detection, stealth skills in cities.

features_gained.name: Disable Device (class skill)
features_gained.description_es: Añade Desactivar Artefacto a habilidades de clase.
features_gained.description_en: Adds Disable Device to class skills.

features_gained.name: Trapfinding
features_gained.description_es: Gana Trapfinding como el pícaro a nivel 3.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Trapfinding as the rogue at level 3.

features_gained.name: Blend In
features_gained.description_es: Puede usar Sigilo en áreas concurridas (sustituye Hide in Plain Sight pero solo en ciudades).
features_gained.description_en: Can use Stealth in crowded areas (replaces Hide in Plain Sight but only in cities).

beast_master.name: Beast Master
beast_master.description_es: Puede tener múltiples compañeros animales, repartiendo niveles de explorador entre ellos. Sacrifica el vínculo con el grupo por tener una manada propia.
beast_master.description_en: Can have multiple animal companions, splitting ranger levels among them. Trades the party bond for having a personal pack.

features_gained.name: Animal Companions (multiple)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 puede tener un segundo compañero animal. Los niveles de explorador se reparten entre todos los compañeros activos.
features_gained.description_en: At level 4 can have a second animal companion. Ranger levels are divided among all active companions.

knife_master.name: Knife Master
knife_master.description_es: Ataque furtivo con dagas y armas similares usa d8 en lugar de d6. Blade Sense: bonificación de esquiva escalable a la CA contra armas cortantes.
knife_master.description_en: Sneak attack with daggers and similar weapons uses d8 instead of d6. Blade Sense: scaling dodge AC bonus against slashing weapons.

features_gained.name: Hidden Blade
features_gained.description_es: +1 a verificaciones de Prestidigitación para ocultar dagas y navajas. Gana Conceal Spell-Like Ability como don adicional.
features_gained.description_en: +1 to Sleight of Hand checks to conceal daggers and knives. Gains Conceal Spell-Like Ability as a bonus feat.

features_gained.name: Sneak Stab (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Ataque furtivo con dagas/navajas/armas similares usa d8 en lugar de d6; con cualquier otra arma usa d4.
features_gained.description_en: Sneak attack with daggers/knives/similar weapons uses d8 instead of d6; with any other weapon uses d4.

features_gained.name: Blade Sense (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: +1 de esquiva a la CA por cada 3 niveles de pícaro contra ataques de armas cortantes.
features_gained.description_en: +1 dodge to AC per 3 rogue levels against slashing weapon attacks.

scout.name: Scout
scout.description_es: Puede aplicar ataque furtivo en carga si se ha movido 10+ pies. A nivel 8, cualquier round donde se mueva 10+ pies aplica ataque furtivo.
scout.description_en: Can apply sneak attack on a charge if moved 10+ feet. At level 8, any round they move 10+ feet they apply sneak attack.

features_gained.name: Scout's Charge (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Siempre que el explorador carga, aplica ataque furtivo como si el objetivo estuviera flanqueado, si se ha movido al menos 10 pies antes de atacar.
features_gained.description_en: Whenever the scout charges, they apply sneak attack as if the target were flanked, if they moved at least 10 feet before attacking.

features_gained.name: Skirmisher (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 8, cualquier round en que se mueva más de 10 pies aplica ataque furtivo en su primer ataque.
features_gained.description_en: At level 8, any round they move more than 10 feet they apply sneak attack on their first attack.

crossblooded.name: Crossblooded
crossblooded.description_es: Selecciona dos linajes distintos y obtiene poderes/dones de ambos, pero con un conjuro conocido menos por nivel y penalizador –2 a Voluntad. Gran versatilidad a alto coste.
crossblooded.description_en: Selects two different bloodlines and gains powers/feats from both, but with one less spell known per level and a –2 penalty on Will saves. Great versatility at a high cost.

features_gained.name: Two Bloodlines
features_gained.description_es: Selecciona poderes de linaje, dones de linaje y arcanas de dos linajes distintos de forma alternada por nivel.
features_gained.description_en: Selects bloodline powers, bloodline feats, and arcanas from two different bloodlines, alternating by level.

wildblooded.name: Wildblooded
wildblooded.description_es: Aplica una variante mutada a un linaje existente, modificando la arcana y ciertos poderes de linaje. Ej: variante Sage usa INT en lugar de CARs.
wildblooded.description_en: Applies a mutated variant to an existing bloodline, modifying the arcana and certain bloodline powers. Ex: the Sage variant uses INT instead of CHA.

features_gained.name: Bloodline Mutation
features_gained.description_es: La arcana de linaje y uno o más poderes de linaje son reemplazados por versiones mutadas que cambian el funcionamiento fundamental del linaje.
features_gained.description_en: The bloodline arcana and one or more bloodline powers are replaced by mutated versions that change the fundamental function of the bloodline.

exploiter_wizard.name: Exploiter Wizard
exploiter_wizard.description_es: Cambia el vínculo arcano y la escuela arcana por la reserva arcana y las explotaciones del Arcanista. Niveles de mago determinan los puntos de reserva.
exploiter_wizard.description_en: Trades arcane bond and arcane school for the Arcanist's arcane reservoir and exploits. Wizard levels determine reservoir points.

features_gained.name: Arcane Reservoir
features_gained.description_es: Reserva arcana como el Arcanista (3 + la mitad del nivel). Puede gastar puntos para mejorar conjuros.
features_gained.description_en: Arcane reservoir as the Arcanist (3 + half level). Can spend points to enhance spells.

features_gained.name: Arcanist Exploit
features_gained.description_es: Obtiene explotaciones de arcanista a nivel 1 y cada 4 niveles. Nivel efectivo = nivel de mago.
features_gained.description_en: Gains arcanist exploits at level 1 and every 4 levels. Effective level = wizard level.

spellslinger.name: Spellslinger
spellslinger.description_es: Canaliza conjuros a través de un arma de fuego arcana como ataques de toque a distancia. Sin trucos ni herramientas tradicionales del mago.
spellslinger.description_en: Channels spells through an arcane firearm as ranged touch attacks. No cantrips or traditional wizard tools.

features_gained.name: Arcane Gun (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Arma de fuego especial que puede canalizar conjuros de toque como ataques de toque a distancia. El alcance del conjuro pasa a ser el del arma.
features_gained.description_en: Special firearm that can channel touch spells as ranged touch attacks. The spell's range becomes the weapon's range.

features_gained.name: Mage Bullets (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Puede usar componentes de conjuro para crear munición mágica especial.
features_gained.description_en: Can use spell components to create special magical ammunition.

vivisectionist.name: Vivisectionist
vivisectionist.description_es: Reemplaza bombas por ataque furtivo con progresión de pícaro. Accede a talentos de pícaro como descubrimientos. Combate cuerpo a cuerpo con pociones.
vivisectionist.description_en: Replaces bombs with sneak attack on rogue progression. Accesses rogue talents as discoveries. Melee combat with potions.

features_gained.name: Sneak Attack
features_gained.description_es: Ataque furtivo que progresa como pícaro (1d6 a nivel 1, +1d6 cada 2 niveles).
features_gained.description_en: Sneak attack that progresses as a rogue (1d6 at level 1, +1d6 every 2 levels).

features_gained.name: Rogue Talents
features_gained.description_es: Puede seleccionar talentos de pícaro como descubrimientos adicionales de alquimista.
features_gained.description_en: Can select rogue talents as additional alchemist discoveries.

grenadier.name: Grenadier
grenadier.description_es: Sacrifica el dominio del veneno por lanzamiento de bombas mejorado, infusión de arma alquímica y explosiones dirigidas.
grenadier.description_en: Sacrifices poison mastery for enhanced bomb throwing, alchemical weapon infusion, and directed blasts.

features_gained.name: Martial Weapon Proficiency
features_gained.description_es: Gana competencia con todas las armas marciales.
features_gained.description_en: Gains proficiency with all martial weapons.

features_gained.name: Alchemical Weapon (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Como acción rápida infunde un arma con un extracto de alquimista, añadiendo sus efectos al próximo golpe.
features_gained.description_en: As a swift action, infuse a weapon with an alchemist extract, adding its effects to the next hit.

features_gained.name: Directed Blast (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Puede detonar una bomba para que afecte un cono de 6 m en lugar de área de explosión estándar.
features_gained.description_en: Can detonate a bomb to affect a 20-ft cone instead of the standard splash area.

beast_rider.name: Beast Rider
beast_rider.description_es: Puede montar criaturas exóticas (osos, dinosaurios, tiburones...) en lugar del caballo estándar, con el entrenamiento adecuado.
beast_rider.description_en: Can mount exotic creatures (bears, dinosaurs, sharks...) instead of the standard horse, with the proper training.

features_gained.name: Exotic Mount
features_gained.description_es: Puede seleccionar criaturas exóticas como montura. La lista varía por tamaño del caballero y nivel.
features_gained.description_en: Can select exotic creatures as a mount. The list varies by cavalier's size and level.

standard_bearer.name: Standard Bearer
standard_bearer.description_es: Su enseña otorga mayores bonificaciones morales a aliados. El estandarte puede inspirar cargas, valentía y devoción. Rol de líder de campo de batalla.
standard_bearer.description_en: Their banner grants greater morale bonuses to allies. The standard can inspire charges, courage, and devotion. A battlefield leader role.

features_gained.name: Banner (enhanced)
features_gained.description_es: El estandarte otorga +2 moral a salvaciones contra miedo y +1 moral a ataques en carga (en lugar de +1/+0). Escala más rápido.
features_gained.description_en: The banner grants +2 morale to saves against fear and +1 morale to charge attacks (instead of +1/+0). Scales faster.

features_gained.name: Inspire Courage
features_gained.description_es: Puede usar su estandarte para otorgar bonificación de actuación a aliados cercanos, como bardo de la mitad de su nivel.
features_gained.description_en: Can use their banner to grant a performance bonus to nearby allies, as a bard of half their level.

pistolero.name: Pistolero
pistolero.description_es: Especializado exclusivamente en pistolas. Puede ocultarlas y usarlas en cuerpo a cuerpo sin provocar ataques de oportunidad. Daño mejorado a corta distancia.
pistolero.description_en: Specialized exclusively in pistols. Can conceal them and use them in melee without provoking attacks of opportunity. Improved damage at short range.

features_gained.name: Pistol Training (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Gun Training solo aplica a pistolas. Puede añadir mod DES al daño de pistola a cualquier alcance.
features_gained.description_en: Gun Training only applies to pistols. Can add DEX mod to pistol damage at any range.

features_gained.name: Up Close and Deadly (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Gasta 1 Grit para añadir daño adicional en ataques con pistola a bocajarro (distancia cuerpo a cuerpo).
features_gained.description_en: Spend 1 Grit to add extra damage on point-blank pistol attacks (melee range).

mysterious_stranger.name: Mysterious Stranger
mysterious_stranger.description_es: Usa Carisma en lugar de Sabiduría para Grit y sus hazañas. A nivel 11 añade CARs al daño de pistola. El pistolero dramático y carismático.
mysterious_stranger.description_en: Uses Charisma instead of Wisdom for Grit and its deeds. At level 11 adds CHA mod to pistol damage. The dramatic, charismatic gunslinger.

features_gained.name: Grit (CHA-based)
features_gained.description_es: Reserva de Grit basada en Carisma en lugar de Sabiduría.
features_gained.description_en: Grit pool based on Charisma instead of Wisdom.

features_gained.name: Luck of the Devil (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede gastar 1 Grit para añadir CARs a cualquier tirada de salvación.
features_gained.description_en: Can spend 1 Grit to add CHA mod to any saving throw.

features_gained.name: Focused Aim (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11, puede gastar 1 Grit para añadir CARs al daño de todas las pistolas ese turno.
features_gained.description_en: At level 11, can spend 1 Grit to add CHA mod to damage of all pistol shots that turn.

sanctified_slayer.name: Sanctified Slayer
sanctified_slayer.description_es: Combina mecánicas del Matador con el Inquisidor. Objetivo Estudiado y talentos de matador en lugar de tácticas de grupo. Asesino solitario y preciso.
sanctified_slayer.description_en: Combines Slayer mechanics with the Inquisitor. Studied Target and slayer talents in place of team tactics. A solitary, precise assassin.

features_gained.name: Studied Target (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Como el Matador: bonificador escalonado a ataque, daño y habilidades contra un objetivo estudiado con acción de movimiento.
features_gained.description_en: As the Slayer: scaling bonus to attack, damage, and skills against a studied target with a move action.

features_gained.name: Slayer Talents
features_gained.description_es: Obtiene talentos de matador a niveles 4, 8, 12, 16, 20 en lugar de dones de trabajo en equipo.
features_gained.description_en: Gains slayer talents at levels 4, 8, 12, 16, 20 instead of teamwork feats.

spellbreaker.name: Spellbreaker
spellbreaker.description_es: Especializado en destruir lanzadores de conjuros. Bonificaciones contra magia activa, Disruptive mejorado y capacidad de negar conjuros específicos.
spellbreaker.description_en: Specialized in destroying spellcasters. Bonuses against active magic, improved Disruptive, and the ability to negate specific spells.

features_gained.name: Foil Casting (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: El inquisidor puede negar la concentración de un lanzador de conjuros con una acción inmediata (tirada de ataque vs DC de concentración).
features_gained.description_en: The inquisitor can negate a spellcaster's concentration with an immediate action (attack roll vs. concentration DC).

features_gained.name: Disruptive (bonus feat)
features_gained.description_es: Obtiene Disruptive como don adicional, aumentando la DC de concentración para lanzadores adyacentes.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Disruptive as a bonus feat, increasing the concentration DC for adjacent spellcasters.

features_gained.name: Fighter Training
features_gained.description_es: Cuenta como guerrero de la mitad de su nivel para requisitos de dones de combate.
features_gained.description_en: Counts as a fighter of half their level for combat feat prerequisites.

eldritch_archer.name: Eldritch Archer
eldritch_archer.description_es: Combate mágico a distancia con arcos y ballestas. Ranged Spellstrike canaliza conjuros de toque a través de flechas disparadas.
eldritch_archer.description_en: Ranged spell combat with bows and crossbows. Ranged Spellstrike channels touch spells through fired arrows.

features_gained.name: Ranged Spell Combat (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede usar Combate Mágico con arcos/ballestas en lugar de solo cuerpo a cuerpo. Penalizador de –2 a ataques de arco al hacerlo.
features_gained.description_en: Can use Spell Combat with bows/crossbows instead of only melee. –2 penalty to bow attacks when doing so.

features_gained.name: Ranged Spellstrike (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Puede canalizar conjuros de toque a través de una flecha disparada. El alcance del conjuro pasa a ser el del arma.
features_gained.description_en: Can channel touch spells through a fired arrow. The spell's range becomes the weapon's range.

hexcrafter.name: Hexcrafter
hexcrafter.description_es: Permite seleccionar maleficios de bruja como arcanas de magus. Puede aplicar maleficios mediante Spellstrike. Acceso parcial a la lista de conjuros de bruja.
hexcrafter.description_en: Allows selecting witch hexes as magus arcana. Can apply hexes via Spellstrike. Partial access to the witch spell list.

features_gained.name: Hex Arcana
features_gained.description_es: Puede seleccionar maleficios de bruja como arcanas de magus. El mago utiliza su nivel de magus para el DC y la duración de los maleficios.
features_gained.description_en: Can select witch hexes as magus arcana. The magus uses their magus level for hex DC and duration.

features_gained.name: Hex Magus (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Puede aplicar maleficios mediante Spellstrike en lugar de un conjuro. El maleficio afecta al objetivo golpeado.
features_gained.description_en: Can apply hexes via Spellstrike instead of a spell. The hex affects the struck target.

features_gained.name: Accursed Strike (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Puede aplicar maleficios de forma diferida a través de ataques preparados.
features_gained.description_en: Can apply hexes delayed through prepared attacks.

seeker.name: Seeker
seeker.description_es: Sacrifica dos revelaciones por capacidades de explorador de ruinas: Trapfinding a nivel 2 y Trap Sense a nivel 7. Oráculo orientado a la exploración.
seeker.description_en: Sacrifices two revelations for ruin-delving abilities: Trapfinding at level 2 and Trap Sense at level 7. An exploration-oriented oracle.

features_gained.name: Trapfinding
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2, gana Trapfinding como el pícaro para detectar y desactivar trampas mágicas.
features_gained.description_en: At level 2, gains Trapfinding as the rogue to detect and disable magic traps.

features_gained.name: Trap Sense (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7, gana bonificación de +2 a CA y salvaciones contra trampas.
features_gained.description_en: At level 7, gains +2 to AC and saves against traps.

ancient_lorekeeper.name: Ancient Lorekeeper
ancient_lorekeeper.description_es: Solo para elfos. Reemplaza la revelación de nivel 5 por acceso a conjuros arcanos de la lista de mago/hechicero como conjuros adicionales conocidos.
ancient_lorekeeper.description_en: Elves only. Replaces the 5th-level revelation with access to arcane spells from the wizard/sorcerer list as additional known spells.

features_gained.name: Arcane Archivist (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5, puede aprender un número de conjuros arcanos de mago/hechicero igual a su mod CARs, añadiéndolos como conjuros adicionales conocidos del oráculo.
features_gained.description_en: At level 5, can learn a number of wizard/sorcerer arcane spells equal to their CHA mod, adding them as additional known oracle spells.

synthesist.name: Synthesist
synthesist.description_es: Fusiona la esencia del eidolón en su propio cuerpo. Obtiene habilidades físicas del eidolón como PG temporales. Sin eidolón externo.
synthesist.description_en: Fuses the eidolon's essence into their own body. Gains physical abilities from the eidolon as temporary HP. No external eidolon.

features_gained.name: Fused Eidolon
features_gained.description_es: El eidolón se fusiona con el convocador. Gana las habilidades físicas (FUE, DES, CON, armadura natural, ataques) como capa sobre sus propias estadísticas mentales.
features_gained.description_en: The eidolon fuses with the summoner. Gains physical abilities (STR, DEX, CON, natural armor, attacks) as a layer over their own mental stats.

features_gained.name: Fused Link (Su)
features_gained.description_es: La conexión con el eidolón fundido cura PG del convocador cuando el eidolón recibiría daño letal.
features_gained.description_en: The link with the fused eidolon heals the summoner's HP when the eidolon would take lethal damage.

master_summoner.name: Master Summoner
master_summoner.description_es: Intercambia un eidolón poderoso por múltiples criaturas convocadas simultáneas. Eidolón más débil (Lesser Eidolon) pero convocaciones múltiples activas.
master_summoner.description_en: Trades a powerful eidolon for multiple simultaneous summoned creatures. Weaker eidolon (Lesser Eidolon) but multiple active summons.

features_gained.name: Lesser Eidolon
features_gained.description_es: Su eidolón es más débil: pool de evolución reducido a la mitad.
features_gained.description_en: Their eidolon is weaker: evolution pool reduced by half.

features_gained.name: Multiple Summons
features_gained.description_es: Puede mantener múltiples Summon Monster activos simultáneamente cuando el eidolón no está desplegado. Sin límite normal de una sola convocación activa.
features_gained.description_en: Can maintain multiple Summon Monster active simultaneously when the eidolon is not deployed. Without the normal limit of one active summon.

hedge_witch.name: Hedge Witch
hedge_witch.description_es: Enfocada en curación rural. Lanzamiento espontáneo de conjuros de curación y capacidad de absorber veneno o enfermedad de otros mediante conjuro.
hedge_witch.description_en: Focused on rural healing. Spontaneous casting of cure spells and the ability to absorb poison or disease from others via spell.

features_gained.name: Spontaneous Healing
features_gained.description_es: Puede convertir conjuros preparados en conjuros de curación espontáneamente (como clérigo con curación).
features_gained.description_en: Can convert prepared spells into cure spells spontaneously (as a cleric with cure).

features_gained.name: Empathic Healing (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Puede absorber veneno o enfermedad de otro ser al tocarlo, transfiriéndolo a sí misma.
features_gained.description_en: Can absorb poison or disease from another being by touch, transferring it to herself.

winter_witch.name: Winter Witch
winter_witch.description_es: Especializada en magia de frío. DC de conjuros de frío aumentado, resistencia al frío escalable. No puede lanzar conjuros de fuego. Familiar de animal ártico.
winter_witch.description_en: Specialized in cold magic. Increased DC for cold spells, scaling cold resistance. Cannot cast fire spells. Arctic animal familiar.

features_gained.name: Cold Flesh (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Resistencia al frío 5 a nivel 1, aumenta a 10 a nivel 5, 20 a nivel 10, e inmunidad a nivel 15.
features_gained.description_en: Cold resistance 5 at level 1, increases to 10 at level 5, 20 at level 10, and immunity at level 15.

features_gained.name: Icy Stare (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Su mal de ojo aplica la condición de entumecimiento en lugar del penalizador normal.
features_gained.description_en: Her evil eye applies the numbed condition instead of the normal penalty.

features_gained.name: Frozen Caress (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Añade 1d4 de daño por frío a ataques de toque y conjuros de toque.
features_gained.description_en: Adds 1d4 cold damage to touch attacks and touch spells.

blade_adept.name: Blade Adept
blade_adept.description_es: Combina lanzamiento de conjuros con combate cuerpo a cuerpo mediante espada inteligente vinculada. Accede a explotaciones de magus y Spellstrike.
blade_adept.description_en: Combines spellcasting with melee combat via a bonded intelligent sword. Accesses magus arcana and Spellstrike.

features_gained.name: Black Blade (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Espada inteligente vinculada que usa la reserva arcana del arcanista. Gana capacidades de Magus Black Blade.
features_gained.description_en: Bonded intelligent sword that uses the arcanist's arcane reservoir. Gains Magus Black Blade abilities.

features_gained.name: Spell Strike
features_gained.description_es: Puede canalizar conjuros de toque a través de su espada negra.
features_gained.description_en: Can channel touch spells through their black blade.

features_gained.name: Magus Arcana
features_gained.description_es: Puede seleccionar arcanas de magus en lugar de explotaciones en ciertos niveles.
features_gained.description_en: Can select magus arcana instead of exploits at certain levels.

brown_fur_transmuter.name: Brown-Fur Transmuter
brown_fur_transmuter.description_es: Especialista en transmutación. Amplifica bonificadores de atributos para aliados, comparte conjuros de transmutación personal, y transformación permanente a nivel 20.
brown_fur_transmuter.description_en: Transmutation specialist. Amplifies ability score bonuses for allies, shares personal transmutation spells, and permanent transformation at level 20.

features_gained.name: Transform (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Puede amplificar bonificaciones de mejora de atributo hasta +6 (de +2/+4 estándar) al lanzar sobre aliados, gastando 1 punto de reserva.
features_gained.description_en: Can amplify enhancement bonuses to ability scores up to +6 (from the standard +2/+4) when casting on allies, spending 1 reservoir point.

features_gained.name: Share Transmutation
features_gained.description_es: Puede lanzar conjuros de transmutación personal (rango personal) sobre otros mediante toque.
features_gained.description_en: Can cast personal-range transmutation spells on others via touch.

features_gained.name: Greater Transmuter (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 20, se transforma permanentemente en una forma transmutada poderosa de su elección.
features_gained.description_en: At level 20, permanently transforms into a powerful transmuted form of their choice.

steelblood.name: Steelblood
steelblood.description_es: Especialista en armadura pesada. Blood Deflection gasta conjuros para CA. Formación progresiva en armadura. Sacrifica velocidad y esquiva sobrenatural.
steelblood.description_en: Heavy armor specialist. Blood Deflection spends spells for AC. Progressive armor training. Sacrifices speed and uncanny dodge.

features_gained.name: Armor Training (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Gana Formación en Armadura como el guerrero, reduciendo penalizadores y aumentando DES máxima en armadura.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Armor Training as the fighter, reducing penalties and increasing max DEX in armor.

features_gained.name: Blood Deflection (Su)
features_gained.description_es: En furia puede gastar un conjuro preparado para obtener un bonificador de escudo a la CA igual al nivel del conjuro durante 1 minuto.
features_gained.description_en: While raging can spend a prepared spell to gain a shield bonus to AC equal to the spell's level for 1 minute.

features_gained.name: Inured to Armor (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: No aplica la reducción de velocidad por armadura pesada.
features_gained.description_en: Does not suffer the speed reduction from heavy armor.

primalist.name: Primalist
primalist.description_es: Permite incorporar poderes de furia de bárbaro en lugar de poderes de linaje de sangre a niveles 4+. Cada reemplazo otorga 2 poderes de furia.
primalist.description_en: Allows incorporating barbarian rage powers in place of bloodline powers at levels 4+. Each replacement grants 2 rage powers.

features_gained.name: Rage Powers
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 y cada 4 niveles puede reemplazar un poder de linaje de sangre por 2 poderes de furia de bárbaro. No puede seleccionar poderes que requieran furia de bárbaro estándar.
features_gained.description_en: At level 4 and every 4 levels can replace a bloodline power with 2 barbarian rage powers. Cannot select powers that require standard barbarian rage.

exemplar.name: Exemplar
exemplar.description_es: Líder inspirador. Sus aliados cercanos no quedan sorprendidos. Gana actuaciones de inspiración y otorga dones de trabajo en equipo temporales mediante displays marciales.
exemplar.description_en: Inspiring leader. Their nearby allies aren't surprised. Gains inspiring performances and grants temporary teamwork feats through martial displays.

features_gained.name: Inspiring Prowess (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Todos los aliados en 9 m no quedan sorprendidos mientras el Ejemplar esté consciente al inicio del combate.
features_gained.description_en: All allies within 30 ft are not surprised as long as the Exemplar is conscious at the start of combat.

features_gained.name: Exemplar Arts
features_gained.description_es: Puede otorgar temporalmente un don de trabajo en equipo que conozca a los aliados dentro de su alcance como acción de movimiento.
features_gained.description_en: Can temporarily grant a teamwork feat they know to allies within reach as a move action.

steel_breaker.name: Steel-Breaker
steel_breaker.description_es: Analiza debilidades de criaturas para ignorar defensas. Sunder Training especializado. Bonificaciones de ataque basadas en el tipo de criatura.
steel_breaker.description_en: Analyzes creature weaknesses to ignore defenses. Specialized Sunder Training. Attack bonuses based on creature type.

features_gained.name: Sunder Training (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Maneuver Training se aplica solo a Sunder. Bonificador adicional a tiradas de destrozar y para ignorar dureza.
features_gained.description_en: Maneuver Training applies only to Sunder. Additional bonus to sunder rolls and to ignore hardness.

features_gained.name: Weakness Finder (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede analizar las debilidades de tipo de criatura para obtener bonificadores de ataque y penetración contra ese tipo específico.
features_gained.description_en: Can analyze a creature type's weaknesses to gain attack and penetration bonuses against that specific type.

feral_hunter.name: Feral Hunter
feral_hunter.description_es: Sin compañero animal: el cazador adopta formas animales permanentes. Gana Wild Shape y puede invocar manadas de animales temporales.
feral_hunter.description_en: No animal companion: the hunter adopts permanent animal forms. Gains Wild Shape and can summon temporary animal packs.

features_gained.name: Feral Focus (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede aplicar Animal Focus directamente a sí mismo permanentemente sin depender de un compañero. El número de enfoques activos escala con el nivel.
features_gained.description_en: Can apply Animal Focus directly to themself permanently without relying on a companion. The number of active foci scales with level.

features_gained.name: Wild Shape (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 gana Wild Shape como druida del mismo nivel.
features_gained.description_en: At level 4 gains Wild Shape as a druid of the same level.

features_gained.name: Summon Feral Kin (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A niveles altos puede invocar una manada de animales como Llamar a la Naturaleza.
features_gained.description_en: At high levels can summon a pack of animals as Summon Nature's Ally.

divine_hunter.name: Divine Hunter
divine_hunter.description_es: Canaliza poder divino eligiendo un dominio de deidad. El compañero animal gana la plantilla celestial o infernal.
divine_hunter.description_en: Channels divine power by choosing a deity's domain. The animal companion gains the celestial or infernal template.

features_gained.name: Domain
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, selecciona un dominio de su deidad (como clérigo de nivel equivalente). Obtiene los poderes de dominio pero no los conjuros de ranura de dominio adicionales.
features_gained.description_en: At level 3, selects a domain from their deity (as a cleric of equivalent level). Gains the domain powers but not the additional domain spell slots.

features_gained.name: Sanctified Animal
features_gained.description_es: Su compañero animal gana la plantilla Celestial (bien) o Infernal (mal) según el alineamiento del cazador.
features_gained.description_en: Their animal companion gains the Celestial (good) or Infernal (evil) template based on the hunter's alignment.

sleuth.name: Sleuth
sleuth.description_es: Sustituye la alquimia por un sistema de suerte basado en CARs. Gana hazañas de pistolero adaptadas: movilidad, evasión y tiradas adicionales.
sleuth.description_en: Replaces alchemy with a CHA-based luck system. Gains adapted gunslinger deeds: mobility, evasion, and extra rolls.

features_gained.name: Luck Pool (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Pool de suerte igual a mod CARs (mínimo 1). Se recupera al descansar. Alimenta sus hazañas.
features_gained.description_en: Luck pool equal to CHA mod (minimum 1). Recovers on rest. Fuels their deeds.

features_gained.name: Deeds (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Gana hazañas similares al pistolero (Uncanny Initiative, Unflinching, Quick Thinking) alimentadas por el Pool de Suerte.
features_gained.description_en: Gains deeds similar to the gunslinger (Uncanny Initiative, Unflinching, Quick Thinking) fueled by the Luck Pool.

empiricist.name: Empiricist
empiricist.description_es: Usa Inteligencia para todas las habilidades. Bonificaciones de perspicacia contra ilusiones y posesión. Master Intellect final: mejora ilimitada de habilidades.
empiricist.description_en: Uses Intelligence for all skills. Insight bonuses against illusions and possession. Master Intellect capstone: unlimited skill enhancement.

features_gained.name: Ceaseless Observation (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Usa el modificador de INT en lugar del modificador habitual para todas las habilidades (Percepción, Desactivar Artefacto, Engañar, etc.).
features_gained.description_en: Uses INT modifier instead of the usual modifier for all skills (Perception, Disable Device, Bluff, etc.).

features_gained.name: Unfailing Logic (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Bonificación de perspicacia escalable a salvaciones contra ilusiones (tipo [phantasm] y [figment]) y posesión.
features_gained.description_en: Scaling insight bonus to saves against illusions ([phantasm] and [figment] types) and possession.

features_gained.name: Master Intellect (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 20, puede gastar Inspiración en cualquier verificación de habilidad sin límite de usos.
features_gained.description_en: At level 20, can spend Inspiration on any skill check without limit of uses.

spirit_guide.name: Spirit Guide
spirit_guide.description_es: Accede a Revelaciones de Oráculo a través de su espíritu vagante. Puente entre la tradición del chamán y del oráculo.
spirit_guide.description_en: Accesses Oracle Revelations through their wandering spirit. Bridges the shaman and oracle traditions.

features_gained.name: Oracle Revelations
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 y 8, puede usar su espíritu vagante para acceder a revelaciones del misterio de oráculo asociado a ese espíritu en lugar de un maleficio.
features_gained.description_en: At levels 4 and 8, can use their wandering spirit to access revelations from the oracle mystery tied to that spirit instead of a hex.

unsworn_shaman.name: Unsworn Shaman
unsworn_shaman.description_es: Sin espíritu primario. Solo espíritu vagante pero puede cambiar entre múltiples espíritus vagantes distintos cada día. Enorme versatilidad, sin profundidad.
unsworn_shaman.description_en: No primary spirit. Only wandering spirits, but can swap between multiple distinct wandering spirits each day. Huge versatility, no depth.

features_gained.name: Multiple Wandering Spirits
features_gained.description_es: Puede tener un número de espíritus vagantes distintos por día igual a 1 + 1 por cada 6 niveles. Elige cuál está activo al preparar conjuros.
features_gained.description_en: Can have a number of distinct wandering spirits per day equal to 1 + 1 per 6 levels. Chooses which is active when preparing spells.

totemic_skald.name: Totemic Skald
totemic_skald.description_es: Su canción de furia solo otorga poderes de furia de un único tótem elegido al principio. Más profundo en su tótem pero sin versatilidad de otros poderes.
totemic_skald.description_en: Their raging song only grants rage powers from a single totem chosen at the start. Deeper in their totem, but without the versatility of other powers.

features_gained.name: Totem Song (Su)
features_gained.description_es: La canción de furia solo puede conceder poderes de furia del tótem elegido (oso, espíritu, piel). Los aliados afectados por la canción solo reciben poderes de ese tótem específico.
features_gained.description_en: The raging song can only grant rage powers of the chosen totem (beast, spirit, fiend). Allies affected by the song only receive powers from that specific totem.

court_poet.name: Court Poet
court_poet.description_es: Más bardo que bárbaro. Reemplaza la furia inspirada por actuaciones sociales que bonifican aliados en entornos cortesanos y debilitan enemigos.
court_poet.description_en: More bard than barbarian. Replaces inspired rage with social performances that buff allies in courtly settings and weaken enemies.

features_gained.name: Hymn of Valor (Su)
features_gained.description_es: En lugar de inducir furia, su actuación otorga bonificadores de moral a salvaciones y habilidades sociales a aliados en zonas cortesanas.
features_gained.description_en: Instead of inducing rage, their performance grants morale bonuses to saves and social skills for allies in courtly areas.

features_gained.name: Stinging Verse (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Actuación que impone penalizadores de moral a las tiradas de Diplomacia y Persuasión del objetivo.
features_gained.description_en: Performance that imposes morale penalties to the target's Diplomacy and Persuasion checks.

bounty_hunter.name: Bounty Hunter
bounty_hunter.description_es: Especializado en capturar objetivos con vida. Ataques furtivos otorgan bonificadores a agarres. Puede noquear objetivos estudiados en lugar de matarlos.
bounty_hunter.description_en: Specialized in capturing targets alive. Sneak attacks grant grapple bonuses. Can knock out studied targets instead of killing them.

features_gained.name: Grappling Strike (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede comenzar un agarre como parte del ataque furtivo que active la condición sin provocar ataque de oportunidad.
features_gained.description_en: Can start a grapple as part of a sneak attack that triggers the condition without provoking an attack of opportunity.

features_gained.name: Target of Opportunity (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede usar ataque furtivo de daño no letal contra su objetivo estudiado para intentar dejarlo inconsciente.
features_gained.description_en: Can use nonlethal sneak attack against their studied target to try to knock them unconscious.

sniper.name: Sniper
sniper.description_es: Gana Hide in Plain Sight para permanecer oculto tras disparos. Aplica ataque furtivo a largo alcance. Studied Target funciona a distancia máxima del arma.
sniper.description_en: Gains Hide in Plain Sight to remain hidden after shots. Applies sneak attack at long range. Studied Target works out to the weapon's maximum range.

features_gained.name: Sniper Training (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede aplicar ataque furtivo a cualquier distancia siempre que el objetivo esté a distancia de arma.
features_gained.description_en: Can apply sneak attack at any distance as long as the target is within weapon range.

features_gained.name: Hide in Plain Sight (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede ocultarse incluso bajo observación directa mientras no esté en combate cuerpo a cuerpo.
features_gained.description_en: Can hide even while being observed, as long as they are not in melee combat.

inspired_blade.name: Inspired Blade
inspired_blade.description_es: Solo para rapier. Recupera Panache de CHA e INT combinados. Weapon Finesse automático con rapier. Rango de amenaza mejorado a nivel alto.
inspired_blade.description_en: Rapier only. Recovers Panache from combined CHA and INT. Automatic Weapon Finesse with rapier. Improved threat range at high levels.

features_gained.name: Inspired Panache
features_gained.description_es: Pool de Panache igual a CHA + INT modificadores (mínimo 1). Recupera Panache al confirmar críticos con rapier además del modo estándar.
features_gained.description_en: Panache pool equal to CHA + INT modifiers (minimum 1). Recovers Panache on confirmed crits with rapier in addition to the standard means.

features_gained.name: Inspired Finesse
features_gained.description_es: Obtiene Weapon Finesse con rapier automáticamente a nivel 1. A nivel 5, puede añadir INT al daño con rapier además de FUE o DES.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Weapon Finesse with rapier automatically at level 1. At level 5, can add INT to rapier damage in addition to STR or DEX.

daring_champion.name: Daring Champion
daring_champion.description_es: Combina espadachín con caballero. Reemplaza algunas hazañas por Desafío de caballero y Orden. Duelo con honor y código caballeresco.
daring_champion.description_en: Combines swashbuckler with cavalier. Replaces some deeds with cavalier Challenge and Order. Honorable dueling with a knightly code.

features_gained.name: Challenge (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Obtiene la capacidad de Desafío del Caballero (1/día a nivel 1, +1 por cada 3 niveles). El objetivo del desafío recibe daño extra igual al nivel.
features_gained.description_en: Gains the Cavalier's Challenge ability (1/day at level 1, +1 per 3 levels). The challenge target takes extra damage equal to the level.

features_gained.name: Order (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Pertenece a una orden de caballería, obteniendo sus beneficios de habilidad, edictos y capacidades de orden.
features_gained.description_en: Belongs to a knightly order, gaining its skill benefits, edicts, and order abilities.

sacred_fist.name: Sacred Fist
sacred_fist.description_es: Luchador desarmado sagrado. Flurry of Blows, bonificación de CA de SAB, reserva de ki y dones de estilo marcial. Las manos son el arma sagrada.
sacred_fist.description_en: Holy unarmed fighter. Flurry of Blows, WIS AC bonus, ki pool, and martial style feats. The hands are the sacred weapon.

features_gained.name: Flurry of Blows (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede realizar Lluvia de Golpes con armas desarmadas como monje de su nivel de sacerdote de guerra.
features_gained.description_en: Can perform Flurry of Blows with unarmed strikes as a monk of their warpriest level.

features_gained.name: AC Bonus (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Cuando sin armadura y sin escudo, añade mod SAB a la CA como monje.
features_gained.description_en: When unarmored and unshielded, adds WIS mod to AC as a monk.

features_gained.name: Ki Pool (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Reserva de ki igual a ½ nivel + mod SAB. Puede gastarla para ataques adicionales, velocidad o CA.
features_gained.description_en: Ki pool equal to 1/2 level + WIS mod. Can spend it for extra attacks, speed, or AC.

features_gained.name: Style Feats
features_gained.description_es: Los dones adicionales de nivel 6, 12 y 18 deben ser dones de Estilo Marcial.
features_gained.description_en: The bonus feats at levels 6, 12, and 18 must be Martial Style feats.

arsenal_chaplain.name: Arsenal Chaplain
arsenal_chaplain.description_es: Reemplaza la restricción de arma sagrada enfocada por Formación en Armas de guerrero progresiva. Puede tratar cualquier arma como sagrada.
arsenal_chaplain.description_en: Replaces the focused sacred weapon restriction with progressive fighter Weapon Training. Can treat any weapon as sacred.

features_gained.name: Weapon Training (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Gana Formación en Armas como el guerrero, progresivamente con un grupo de armas adicional cada 6 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Weapon Training as the fighter, progressively with an additional weapon group every 6 levels.

features_gained.name: Versatile Sacred Weapon
features_gained.description_es: Puede aplicar el dado de daño sagrado a cualquier arma del grupo de entrenamiento, no solo al arma de enfoque.
features_gained.description_en: Can apply the sacred weapon damage die to any weapon in the training group, not only the focus weapon.

kinetic_knight.name: Kinetic Knight
kinetic_knight.description_es: Guerrero acorazado cinético. Hoja Elemental obligatoria (cuerpo a cuerpo). CON califica para requisitos de dones. Armadura y escudo sintonizados con su magia.
kinetic_knight.description_en: Armored kineticist warrior. Mandatory Kinetic Blade (melee). CON qualifies for feat prerequisites. Armor and shield attuned to their magic.

features_gained.name: Kinetic Blade (mandatory)
features_gained.description_es: La única forma de Kinetic Blast disponible es el Kinetic Blade (cuerpo a cuerpo). Todas las infusiones de blast deben ser de sustancia.
features_gained.description_en: The only form of Kinetic Blast available is the Kinetic Blade (melee). All blast infusions must be substance infusions.

features_gained.name: Armor Channel (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Puede usar Gatherpower mientras lleva armadura y escudo sin penalizador al lanzamiento.
features_gained.description_en: Can use Gather Power while wearing armor and a shield without casting penalty.

features_gained.name: Resolve (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Gana Resolución como el samurái: puede estabilizarse automáticamente y gastar reserva de resolución para continuar luchando herido.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Resolve as the samurai: can automatically stabilize and spend the resolve pool to keep fighting while wounded.

overwhelming_soul.name: Overwhelming Soul
overwhelming_soul.description_es: Elimina el Burn (daño no letal). Usa Carisma en lugar de Constitución para poderes salvajes. Sin autosacrificio pero con menor poder bruto.
overwhelming_soul.description_en: Eliminates Burn (nonlethal damage). Uses Charisma instead of Constitution for wild powers. No self-sacrifice but lower raw power.

features_gained.name: CHA-based Powers
features_gained.description_es: Usa CARs en lugar de CON para el DC de los poderes salvajes, la bonificación de Kinetic Blast y el límite de Burn.
features_gained.description_en: Uses CHA mod instead of CON for the DC of wild powers, Kinetic Blast bonus, and Burn limit.

features_gained.name: No-Burn Gather Power
features_gained.description_es: Puede acumular poder sin tomar puntos de Burn, pero con una límite de poder acumulado menor que el cinético estándar.
features_gained.description_en: Can accumulate power without taking Burn points, but with a lower accumulated power limit than the standard kineticist.

storyteller.name: Storyteller
storyteller.description_es: Cambia la canalización espiritual por narrativa mágica. Actuación bárdica a través de historias con bonificaciones a conocimiento. Puede atrapar objetivos en relatos.
storyteller.description_en: Trades spirit channeling for magical storytelling. Bardic performance through stories with Knowledge bonuses. Can trap targets within tales.

features_gained.name: Bardic Performance (Story)
features_gained.description_es: Gana actuación bárdica con un subconjunto de actuaciones basadas en narración oral en lugar de música.
features_gained.description_en: Gains bardic performance with a subset of oral-storytelling performances instead of music.

features_gained.name: Lore of the Told (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Bonificación de perspicacia escalable a verificaciones de Conocimiento (todas) cuando narra historias relevantes.
features_gained.description_en: Scaling insight bonus to Knowledge checks (all) when telling relevant stories.

features_gained.name: Captivating Story (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel alto puede atrapar a un objetivo dentro de un relato (similar a Maze), incapacitándolo mientras el narrador mantiene la historia activa.
features_gained.description_en: At high levels can trap a target within a tale (similar to Maze), incapacitating them while the storyteller keeps the story active.

spirit_dancer.name: Spirit Dancer
spirit_dancer.description_es: Puede cambiar de espíritu durante el combate como acción libre. A nivel alto canaliza dos espíritus simultáneamente. Rotación táctica de espíritus.
spirit_dancer.description_en: Can switch spirits during combat as a free action. At high levels channels two spirits simultaneously. Tactical rotation of spirits.

features_gained.name: Spirit Dance (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Puede cambiar de espíritu canalizado como acción libre una vez por ronda. Tiene un número de rondas de danza iguales a 3 + mod CARs.
features_gained.description_en: Can switch the channeled spirit as a free action once per round. Has a number of dance rounds equal to 3 + CHA mod.

features_gained.name: Dual Spirit (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 12, puede canalizar dos espíritus simultáneamente durante la danza, obteniendo los beneficios de ambos.
features_gained.description_en: At level 12, can channel two spirits simultaneously during the dance, gaining the benefits of both.

fey_trickster.name: Fey Trickster
fey_trickster.description_es: Lanzador divino feérico con lista de druida/explorador. Gana Woodland Stride, ilusiones sociales y transformación feérica permanente a nivel alto.
fey_trickster.description_en: Fey divine caster with druid/ranger spell list. Gains Woodland Stride, social illusions, and permanent fey transformation at high levels.

features_gained.name: Woodland Stride (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Se mueve por terreno natural sin penalizadores ni daño de espinas o plantas mágicas.
features_gained.description_en: Moves through natural terrain without penalties or damage from thorns or magical plants.

features_gained.name: Fey Tricks (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Puede lanzar una serie de conjuros ilusorios como poderes mágicos de forma espontánea usando sus niveles de hipnotizador.
features_gained.description_en: Can cast a set of illusion spells as spell-like abilities spontaneously using their mesmerist levels.

features_gained.name: Fey Form
features_gained.description_es: A nivel alto se transforma permanentemente en un ser feérico, obteniendo el subtipo Hada y visión en la oscuridad.
features_gained.description_en: At high levels permanently transforms into a fey being, gaining the Fey subtype and darkvision.

cult_master.name: Cult Master
cult_master.description_es: Líder carismático de cultos. Mirada fanática, curación psicológica de seguidores y transferencia de conciencia a seguidores a nivel máximo.
cult_master.description_en: Charismatic cult leader. Fanatical gaze, psychological healing of followers, and consciousness transfer to followers at capstone.

features_gained.name: Fanaticism (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Sus trucos de hipnotizador pueden hacer que los seguidores realicen acciones de autosacrificio sin hacer tiradas de Voluntad adicionales.
features_gained.description_en: Their mesmerist tricks can make followers perform self-sacrificing actions without making additional Will saves.

features_gained.name: Disciple's Aura (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Los seguidores bajo su influencia proporcionan escudo emocional, dando al maestro bonificaciones de moral basadas en cuántos seguidores tiene activos.
features_gained.description_en: Followers under their influence provide emotional shielding, granting the master morale bonuses based on how many active followers they have.

features_gained.name: Body Jump (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 20, puede transferir su conciencia al cuerpo de un seguidor como mente en blanco.
features_gained.description_en: At level 20, can transfer their consciousness to a follower's body as a mind swap.

battle_host.name: Battle Host
battle_host.description_es: Canaliza toda la magia a través de un único objeto vinculado (arma/armadura/escudo). Invoca guerreros espirituales y otorga capacidades sobrehumanas.
battle_host.description_en: Channels all magic through a single bonded object (weapon/armor/shield). Summons spirit warriors and grants superhuman capabilities.

features_gained.name: Panoply Bond (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Un único objeto (arma, armadura o escudo) sirve como todo su sistema de implementos. Todo el foco mental se concentra en él.
features_gained.description_en: A single object (weapon, armor, or shield) serves as their entire implement system. All mental focus concentrates on it.

features_gained.name: Heroic Splendor (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Puede gastar foco para otorgar a aliados capacidades sobrehumanas temporales (vuelo, visión, fuerza).
features_gained.description_en: Can spend focus to grant allies temporary superhuman abilities (flight, vision, strength).

features_gained.name: Ghost Warrior (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Invoca guerreros espectrales vinculados al objeto para ayudar en combate.
features_gained.description_en: Summons spectral warriors bonded to the object to help in combat.

necroccultist.name: Necroccultist
necroccultist.description_es: Especialista en necromancia. Consume restos de criaturas para información, invoca enjambres de espíritus dañinos y drena niveles negativos.
necroccultist.description_en: Necromancy specialist. Consumes creature remains for information, summons harmful spirit swarms, and drains negative levels.

features_gained.name: Death Knell (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Consumiendo restos de una criatura muerta, obtiene memorias o conocimientos del difunto (como Leer Magia pero para información biográfica).
features_gained.description_en: By consuming remains of a dead creature, gains memories or knowledge from the deceased (like Read Magic but for biographical information).

features_gained.name: Ghostly Horde (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Invoca un enjambre de espíritus que causa daño de energía negativa en área.
features_gained.description_en: Summons a spirit swarm that deals area negative energy damage.

features_gained.name: Life Drain (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Puede drenar niveles negativos de enemigos y transferirlos a aliados como puntos de resistencia temporales.
features_gained.description_en: Can drain negative levels from enemies and transfer them to allies as temporary resistance points.

amnesiac.name: Amnesiac
amnesiac.description_es: Psíquico con memoria suprimida. Lista limitada de conjuros conocidos recuperados mediante meditación diaria. Spell Recollection recupera conjuros adicionales como acción rápida.
amnesiac.description_en: Psychic with suppressed memory. Limited known spell list recovered through daily meditation. Spell Recollection recovers additional spells as a swift action.

features_gained.name: Spell Recollection (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Como acción rápida una vez por hora, puede intentar recordar un conjuro de su lista que no tenga preparado. Si tiene éxito (tirada de Concentración), lo añade a su lista disponible hoy.
features_gained.description_en: As a swift action once per hour, can attempt to recall a spell from their list they don't have prepared. On success (Concentration check), adds it to today's available list.

features_gained.name: Fragmented Magic
features_gained.description_es: Número de conjuros conocidos reducido, pero puede recuperar cualquier conjuro de nivel adecuado de la lista completa de psíquico mediante Spell Recollection.
features_gained.description_en: Reduced number of spells known, but can recover any spell of suitable level from the full psychic list via Spell Recollection.

formless_adept.name: Formless Adept
formless_adept.description_es: Se transforma progresivamente en forma etérea (borrosa, gaseosa, incorpórea). Usa CARs para reserva fénica. Bonificaciones de conjuro mientras es informe.
formless_adept.description_en: Progressively transforms into an ethereal form (blurred, gaseous, incorporeal). Uses CHA for the phrenic pool. Spell bonuses while formless.

features_gained.name: Formless (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 puede volverse borroso (20% fallo de conjuro). A nivel 7 gaseoso, a nivel 13 incorpóreo durante rondas/día escalables.
features_gained.description_en: At level 3 can become blurred (20% spell miss chance). At level 7 gaseous, at level 13 incorporeal for scaling rounds/day.

features_gained.name: CHA Phrenic Pool
features_gained.description_es: La reserva fénica usa CARs en lugar de INT para el número de puntos.
features_gained.description_en: The phrenic pool uses CHA instead of INT for point count.

features_gained.name: Formless Magic (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Cuando está en forma gaseosa o incorpórea, ciertos conjuros no requieren componentes físicos.
features_gained.description_en: When in gaseous or incorporeal form, certain spells don't require physical components.

ectoplasmatist.name: Ectoplasmatist
ectoplasmatist.description_es: Se infunde con ectoplasma en lugar de convocar un fantasma. Manifiesta latigazos de ectoplasma como armas, combinando conjuros con ataques de látigo.
ectoplasmatist.description_en: Infuses themself with ectoplasm instead of summoning a phantom. Manifests ectoplasmic lashes as weapons, combining spells with whip attacks.

features_gained.name: Ectoplasmic Lash (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Manifiesta un látigo o tentáculo de ectoplasma como arma natural de 1d6 + ½ nivel con alcance de 3 m. Puede hacer múltiples ataques con él.
features_gained.description_en: Manifests an ectoplasmic whip or tentacle as a natural weapon dealing 1d6 + 1/2 level with 10 ft reach. Can make multiple attacks with it.

features_gained.name: Ectoplasmic Armor (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Bonificación de armadura natural escalable igual a ½ su nivel de espiritista mientras el ectoplasma esté manifestado.
features_gained.description_en: Scaling natural armor bonus equal to 1/2 spiritualist level while the ectoplasm is manifested.

involutionist.name: Involutionist
involutionist.description_es: Crea su fantasma desde su propia alma. Usa componentes verbales/somáticos estándar. El fantasma puede otorgar maleficios de bruja.
involutionist.description_en: Creates their phantom from their own soul. Uses standard verbal/somatic components. The phantom can grant witch hexes.

features_gained.name: Soul Phantom
features_gained.description_es: El fantasma se genera desde la propia alma del espiritista en lugar de vincularse a un espíritu exterior. No puede ser destruido permanentemente mientras el espiritista viva.
features_gained.description_en: The phantom is generated from the spiritualist's own soul instead of being bound to an external spirit. Cannot be permanently destroyed while the spiritualist lives.

features_gained.name: Witch Hexes
features_gained.description_es: El fantasma puede otorgar al espiritista maleficios de bruja en lugar de los poderes de fusión estándar.
features_gained.description_en: The phantom can grant the spiritualist witch hexes instead of the standard fusion powers.

sword_saint.name: Sword Saint
sword_saint.description_es: Maestro del iaijutsu: desenvaine y golpe en un solo movimiento. Iaijutsu Challenge añade daño extra al primer golpe. Sin mecánicas de montura.
sword_saint.description_en: Master of iaijutsu: draw and strike in a single motion. Iaijutsu Challenge adds extra damage on the first hit. No mount mechanics.

features_gained.name: Iaijutsu Challenge (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al inicio del combate, si puede desenvainar su arma, puede designar un objetivo como desafío de iaijutsu. El primer golpe exitoso añade daño extra igual a su nivel.
features_gained.description_en: At the start of combat, if they can draw their weapon, they can designate a target as an iaijutsu challenge. The first successful hit adds extra damage equal to their level.

features_gained.name: Iaijutsu Focus (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede realizar un ataque de oportunidad en el turno del enemigo cuando este se mueve hacia él, atacando mientras desenvaina.
features_gained.description_en: Can make an attack of opportunity on the enemy's turn when they move toward them, attacking while drawing the weapon.

features_gained.name: Certain Strike (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede declarar Certain Strike antes de atacar para relanzar el dado de daño y quedarse con el mejor resultado.
features_gained.description_en: Can declare Certain Strike before attacking to reroll the damage die and keep the better result.

warrior_of_the_holy_land.name: Warrior of the Holy Land
warrior_of_the_holy_land.description_es: Samurái sin montura dedicado a defender tierras sagradas. Gana poderes divinos similares al inquisidor; su poder viene de la tierra y el deber.
warrior_of_the_holy_land.description_en: Mountless samurai dedicated to defending holy lands. Gains divine powers similar to the inquisitor; their power comes from the land and duty.

features_gained.name: Holy Judgment (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Gana la capacidad Juicio del Inquisidor con un número de usos por día igual a ½ nivel de samurái. Puede activar 1 juicio por uso.
features_gained.description_en: Gains the Inquisitor's Judgment ability with uses per day equal to 1/2 samurai level. Can activate 1 judgment per use.

features_gained.name: Blessed (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Gana bonificador de competencia a salvaciones igual al modificador de SAB cuando defiende tierras designadas como sagradas.
features_gained.description_en: Gains a competence bonus on saves equal to WIS modifier when defending lands designated as holy.

poisoner.name: Poisoner
poisoner.description_es: Sacrifica cuatro poderes ki por maestría avanzada en venenos. Puede crear venenos con sus manos, inmunidad a propios venenos, venenos de efecto instantáneo.
poisoner.description_en: Sacrifices four ki powers for advanced poison mastery. Can create poisons with their hands, immunity to own poisons, instant-effect poisons.

features_gained.name: Poison Touch (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Puede crear un veneno de toque una vez por día que aplica daño de atributo. El número de usos y la potencia escalan con el nivel.
features_gained.description_en: Can create a touch poison once per day that deals ability damage. Uses and potency scale with level.

features_gained.name: Poison Immunity (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 8, inmune a todos los venenos propios. A nivel 12, inmune a todos los venenos.
features_gained.description_en: At level 8, immune to own poisons. At level 12, immune to all poisons.

features_gained.name: Instant Poison (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Puede aplicar venenos en armas como acción rápida en lugar de estándar.
features_gained.description_en: Can apply poisons to weapons as a swift action instead of a standard action.

deadly_courtesan.name: Deadly Courtesan
