deadly_courtesan.description_es: Ninja social infiltrada en altas esferas. Sacrifica progresión de ataque furtivo por talentos de intriga social. Elimina objetivos sin levantar sospechas.
deadly_courtesan.description_en: Social ninja infiltrating high society. Sacrifices sneak attack progression for social intrigue talents. Eliminates targets without raising suspicion.

features_gained.name: Social Graces (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Gana bonificaciones a habilidades sociales escalables cuando se infiltra en un grupo o institución durante tiempo.
features_gained.description_en: Gains scaling bonuses to social skills when infiltrating a group or institution over time.

features_gained.name: Courtly Killer (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede aplicar ataque furtivo a víctimas que hayan consumido veneno de su preparación, aunque estén alertas.
features_gained.description_en: Can apply sneak attack to victims who have consumed poison of their making, even if alert.

iron_tyrant.name: Iron Tyrant
iron_tyrant.description_es: Especializado en armadura completa y terror. Capacidades basadas en armadura: Spellsurge, Armor of Damnation. Sin curación negativa pero con defensa aplastante.
iron_tyrant.description_en: Specialized in full plate and terror. Armor-based abilities: Spellsurge, Armor of Damnation. No negative channeling but with crushing defense.

features_gained.name: Armor of Damnation (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Su armadura otorga bonificación de escudo adicional contra criaturas del bien igual a ½ su nivel de antipaladín.
features_gained.description_en: Their armor grants an additional shield bonus against good creatures equal to 1/2 antipaladin level.

features_gained.name: Spellsurge (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Puede lanzar conjuros de contacto a través de ataques de armadura cargada (como embestidas o atropellos) como acción gratuita.
features_gained.description_en: Can cast touch spells through charged armor attacks (like bull rushes or overruns) as a free action.

features_gained.name: Heavy Dominance (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: No sufre penalizadores de velocidad por armadura pesada. La CA de armadura de su armadura pesada aumenta +2.
features_gained.description_en: Does not suffer speed penalties from heavy armor. The armor AC of their heavy armor increases by +2.

dread_vanguard.name: Dread Vanguard
dread_vanguard.description_es: Portador de estandarte oscuro. Irradia miedo en área. Su presencia debilita la voluntad de los aliados del bien. Líder de ejércitos del mal.
dread_vanguard.description_en: Bearer of the dark standard. Radiates fear in an area. Their presence weakens the will of good-aligned enemies. Leader of evil armies.

features_gained.name: Dread Banner (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Puede enarbolar un estandarte oscuro que irradia Aura de Miedo en radio igual a 9 m × la mitad de su nivel.
features_gained.description_en: Can raise a dark standard that radiates Aura of Fear in a radius of 30 ft × half their level.

features_gained.name: Terrifying Charge (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Al cargar bajo su estandarte, todos los enemigos en 9 m deben superar una tirada de Voluntad o quedar asustados durante 1d4 rondas.
features_gained.description_en: When charging beneath their standard, all enemies within 30 ft must make a Will save or become frightened for 1d4 rounds.

adaptive_shifter.name: Adaptive Shifter
adaptive_shifter.description_es: Sus aspectos animales evolucionan con el nivel. Puede cambiar las habilidades de su aspecto activo entre encuentros. Mayor versatilidad táctica.
adaptive_shifter.description_en: Their animal aspects evolve with level. Can change the abilities of their active aspect between encounters. Greater tactical versatility.

features_gained.name: Adaptive Aspect (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Una vez por día puede recalibrar las habilidades de su aspecto activo, eligiendo qué capacidades activa de entre las disponibles para ese aspecto.
features_gained.description_en: Once per day can recalibrate the abilities of their active aspect, choosing which capabilities to activate from those available for that aspect.

features_gained.name: Improved Aspect Evolution
features_gained.description_es: Los aspectos del cambiante adaptable evolucionan más rápido, obteniendo la mejora de nivel más alto a niveles impares.
features_gained.description_en: The adaptive shifter's aspects evolve faster, gaining the higher-level improvement at odd levels.

wild_effigy.name: Wild Effigy
wild_effigy.description_es: Se transforma en formas de enjambre o agrupaciones de criaturas. Resistencias basadas en constituyentes. Ataques de área en forma de enjambre.
wild_effigy.description_en: Transforms into swarm forms or creature clusters. Resistances based on constituents. Area attacks in swarm form.

features_gained.name: Swarm Form (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Puede tomar una forma de enjambre que otorga resistencia a daño físico no mágico, inmunidad a efectos de flanqueo y ataques de área de enjambre.
features_gained.description_en: Can take a swarm form that grants resistance to nonmagical physical damage, immunity to flanking effects, and swarm area attacks.

features_gained.name: Effigy Aspect (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Sus aspectos animales se manifiestan como cualidades del enjambre (enjambre de ratas para rapidez, abejas para veneno, etc.).
features_gained.description_en: Their animal aspects manifest as swarm qualities (rat swarm for speed, bee swarm for poison, etc.).

brute.name: Brute
brute.description_es: Su identidad de vigilante es una forma monstruosa. Gana poderes tipo furia en lugar de talentos sociales. Doble vida literalmente bestial.
brute.description_en: Their vigilante identity is a monstrous form. Gains rage-like powers instead of social talents. A literal beastly double life.

features_gained.name: Monster Form (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Su identidad de vigilante es una forma física monstruosa (hombre bestia). Gana bonificadores de FUE y naturalmente, y garras o mordiscos como arma natural.
features_gained.description_en: Their vigilante identity is a monstrous physical form (beastman). Gains STR bonuses and natural armor, plus claws or bite as natural weapons.

features_gained.name: Brute Talents
features_gained.description_es: En lugar de talentos sociales gana poderes de furia: puede seleccionar poderes de furia de bárbaro como talentos de bruto.
features_gained.description_en: Instead of social talents gains rage powers: can select barbarian rage powers as brute talents.

wildsoul.name: Wildsoul
wildsoul.description_es: Incorpora el sistema de Enfoque Animal del Cazador. Aplica enfoques animales en ambas identidades.
wildsoul.description_en: Incorporates the Hunter's Animal Focus system. Applies animal foci in both identities.

features_gained.name: Animal Focus (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Obtiene la capacidad Animal Focus del cazador a nivel 2. Puede tener 1 enfoque activo (2 a nivel 8) aplicado a sí mismo en cualquier identidad.
features_gained.description_en: Gains the hunter's Animal Focus ability at level 2. Can have 1 active focus (2 at level 8) applied to themself in either identity.

features_gained.name: Wild Talents
features_gained.description_es: Algunos talentos de vigilante se reemplazan por capacidades adicionales de enfoque animal.
features_gained.description_en: Some vigilante talents are replaced with additional animal focus capabilities.

scaled_fist.name: Scaled Fist
scaled_fist.description_es: Monje de dragón que usa Carisma en lugar de Sabiduría para CA y ki. Dragon Style automático. Mecánicas dracónicas: terror, aliento ki, resistencias.
scaled_fist.description_en: Draconic monk that uses Charisma instead of Wisdom for AC and ki. Automatic Dragon Style. Draconic mechanics: fear, ki breath, resistances.

features_gained.name: CHA-based AC Bonus
features_gained.description_es: Usa CARs en lugar de SAB para la bonificación de CA cuando está sin armadura.
features_gained.description_en: Uses CHA instead of WIS for the AC bonus when unarmored.

features_gained.name: CHA-based Ki Pool
features_gained.description_es: La reserva ki se basa en CARs en lugar de SAB.
features_gained.description_en: The ki pool is based on CHA instead of WIS.

features_gained.name: Dragon Ferocity (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede gastar 1 punto de ki para infundir terror dracónico: el objetivo debe superar Voluntad o quedarse asustado 1d4+1 rondas.
features_gained.description_en: Can spend 1 ki point to infuse draconic terror: target must succeed on a Will save or be frightened for 1d4+1 rounds.

features_gained.name: Dragon Style (bonus feat)
features_gained.description_es: Obtiene Dragon Style de forma automática a nivel 1 sin requisitos previos.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Dragon Style automatically at level 1 without prerequisites.

zen_archer.name: Zen Archer
zen_archer.description_es: El arco es su camino de meditación marcial. Flurry of Blows con arcos, Perfect Strike para elegir mejor dado, y ki para alcance extendido.
zen_archer.description_en: The bow is their path of martial meditation. Flurry of Blows with bows, Perfect Strike to pick the better die, and ki for extended range.

features_gained.name: Flurry of Blows (archery)
features_gained.description_es: Puede usar Lluvia de Golpes con arco corto o largo, arco compuesto, y arco de monje.
features_gained.description_en: Can use Flurry of Blows with shortbow, longbow, composite bow, and monk bow.

features_gained.name: Perfect Strike (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Una vez por turno puede relanzar el dado de ataque con el arco; si tiene éxito en ambos, elige el resultado. También puede relanzar el daño.
features_gained.description_en: Once per turn can reroll the bow's attack die; if both succeed, choose the result. Can also reroll damage.

features_gained.name: Ki Archery (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Gastando 1 ki puede aumentar el alcance del arco en 30 pies.
features_gained.description_en: By spending 1 ki can increase the bow's range by 30 feet.

features_gained.name: Bonus Feats (archery)
features_gained.description_es: Los dones adicionales de monje deben ser dones de arco (Point-Blank Shot, Precise Shot, etc.).
features_gained.description_en: The monk bonus feats must be archery feats (Point-Blank Shot, Precise Shot, etc.).

scout_unchained_rogue.name: Scout
scout_unchained_rogue.description_es: Aplica ataque furtivo en carga si se ha movido 10+ pies. A nivel 8 aplica ataque furtivo cualquier round con movimiento de 10+ pies.
scout_unchained_rogue.description_en: Applies sneak attack on a charge if moved 10+ feet. At level 8 applies sneak attack any round with 10+ feet of movement.

features_gained.name: Scout's Charge (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al cargar (habiendo movido 10+ pies antes), aplica ataque furtivo al objetivo como si estuviera flanqueado.
features_gained.description_en: When charging (having moved 10+ feet first), applies sneak attack to the target as if it were flanked.

features_gained.name: Skirmisher (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 8, cualquier round en que se mueva 10+ pies aplica ataque furtivo en su primer ataque de ese round.
features_gained.description_en: At level 8, any round they move 10+ feet they apply sneak attack on their first attack that round.

thug.name: Thug
thug.description_es: Pícaro de fuerza bruta. Ataque furtivo aplica Staggered. Frightening usa Intimidar como parte de ataque. Brutal Beating penaliza permanentemente a asustados.
thug.description_en: Brute-force rogue. Sneak attack applies Staggered. Frightening uses Intimidate as part of an attack. Brutal Beating permanently penalizes frightened targets.

features_gained.name: Frightening (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede usar Intimidar para asustar a un enemigo como parte de una acción estándar de ataque (en lugar de acción estándar separada).
features_gained.description_en: Can use Intimidate to frighten an enemy as part of a standard attack action (instead of a separate standard action).

features_gained.name: Brutal Beating (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Cuando aplica ataque furtivo, el objetivo asustado queda Staggered (aturdido leve) durante 1d4+1 rondas en lugar del efecto normal de ataque furtivo.
features_gained.description_en: When applying sneak attack, the frightened target becomes Staggered for 1d4+1 rounds instead of the normal sneak attack effect.

titan_mauler_unchained.name: Titan Mauler
titan_mauler_unchained.description_es: Puede blandir armas gigantescas con penalizador reducido. Titanic Rage aumenta tamaño durante furia. Énfasis en daño bruto sobre defensa.
titan_mauler_unchained.description_en: Can wield gigantic weapons with reduced penalty. Titanic Rage increases size during rage. Emphasis on raw damage over defense.

features_gained.name: Big Game Hunter (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: +1 a tiradas de daño cuerpo a cuerpo contra criaturas de categoría de tamaño mayor.
features_gained.description_en: +1 to melee damage rolls against creatures of a larger size category.

features_gained.name: Massive Weapons (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede blandir armas de una categoría mayor con penalizador –2 (en lugar de –4). A nivel 3 puede hacerlo sin penalizador.
features_gained.description_en: Can wield weapons one size category larger with a –2 penalty (instead of –4). At level 3 can do so without penalty.

features_gained.name: Titanic Rage (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Durante la furia puede aumentar su tamaño una categoría (como Agrandar Persona). Esto cancela otros efectos de tamaño menores.
features_gained.description_en: While raging can increase size by one category (as Enlarge Person). This overrides other smaller size effects.

elemental_kin.name: Elemental Kin
elemental_kin.description_es: Solo para enanos. Reemplaza Trap Sense por resistencia elemental. Poderes de furia con temática de fuego, tierra, agua o aire según herencia enana.
elemental_kin.description_en: Dwarves only. Replaces Trap Sense with elemental resistance. Rage powers themed around fire, earth, water, or air based on dwarven heritage.

features_gained.name: Elemental Resistance (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Resistencia 5 a un elemento (fuego, frío, electricidad o ácido) según el linaje elemental enano del personaje. Escala a 10 a nivel 8.
features_gained.description_en: Resistance 5 to an element (fire, cold, electricity, or acid) based on the character's dwarven elemental lineage. Scales to 10 at level 8.

features_gained.name: Elemental Rage Powers
features_gained.description_es: Los poderes de furia disponibles incluyen poderes elementales únicos (ráfaga de llamas, terreno dificultoso de tierra, etc.) basados en el elemento elegido.
features_gained.description_en: Available rage powers include unique elemental powers (flame burst, earth difficult terrain, etc.) based on the chosen element.

monster_knight.name: Monster Knight
monster_knight.description_es: Convocador desencadenado que renuncia completamente a su magia por convertirse en caballero montado en su eidolón. Combina sistema de Caballero (Desafío + Orden) con montura eidolón. Sin conjuros, máximo potencial de carga montada.
monster_knight.description_en: Unchained summoner who gives up all magic to become a knight mounted on their eidolon. Combines the Cavalier system (Challenge + Order) with an eidolon mount. No spells, maximum mounted charge potential.

features_gained.name: Challenge (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: 1/día a nivel 1, +1/día cada 3 niveles (máx 7/día a nivel 19). Daño extra igual al nivel en ataques cuerpo a cuerpo contra el objetivo. A niveles 7/13/19 gana +1/+2/+3 a ataque vs el objetivo.
features_gained.description_en: 1/day at level 1, +1/day every 3 levels (max 7/day at level 19). Extra damage equal to level on melee attacks against the target. At levels 7/13/19 gains +1/+2/+3 to attacks vs. the target.

features_gained.name: Eidolon Mount (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Eidolón modificado con evolución de montura de nivel 1. Cura naturalmente 3 PG × DG / día. Debe usar forma cuadrúpeda o serpentina. Puede renunciar a todos los ataques del eidolón para obtener la evolución Grande gratis.
features_gained.description_en: Modified eidolon with Mount evolution at level 1. Naturally heals 3 HP × HD / day. Must use quadruped or serpentine form. Can forgo all eidolon attacks to get Large evolution free.

features_gained.name: Life Link (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Sin cambios respecto al convocador desencadenado base.
features_gained.description_en: Unchanged from the base unchained summoner.

features_gained.name: Order (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Obtiene la Orden del Caballero: edictos, beneficios de desafío de orden, bonificaciones de habilidad. Habilidades adicionales de orden a niveles 2, 8 y 15.
features_gained.description_en: Gains the Cavalier's Order: edicts, order challenge benefits, skill bonuses. Additional order abilities at levels 2, 8, and 15.

features_gained.name: Focused Charge (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: +4 a tiradas de ataque en carga montada (en lugar de +2). No sufre penalizador a CA después de cargar mientras está montado.
features_gained.description_en: +4 to attack rolls on mounted charge (instead of +2). No AC penalty after charging while mounted.

features_gained.name: Monster Tactics (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Don de combate o trabajo en equipo adicional a niveles 5, 12 y 17. El eidolón montura obtiene automáticamente cualquier don de trabajo en equipo que aprenda el caballero, ignorando requisitos.
features_gained.description_en: Additional combat or teamwork feat at levels 5, 12, and 17. The mount eidolon automatically gains any teamwork feat the knight learns, ignoring prerequisites.

features_gained.name: Mascot (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Con el eidolón consciente y visible, todos los aliados en 18 m reciben +2 moral a salvaciones contra miedo y +1 moral a ataques en carga.
features_gained.description_en: With the eidolon conscious and visible, all allies within 60 ft gain +2 morale to saves against fear and +1 morale to charge attacks.

features_gained.name: Mighty Charge (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Duplica el rango de amenaza en carga montada. Tras ataque exitoso puede hacer una maniobra gratuita (empuje/desarmar/destrozar/derribar) sin provocar AoO.
features_gained.description_en: Doubles threat range on mounted charge. After a successful hit, can make a free maneuver (bull rush/disarm/sunder/trip) without provoking AoO.

features_gained.name: Supreme Charge (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Carga montada: doble daño (triple con lanza). Con Spirited Charge: triple (cuádruple con lanza). Crítico confirmado en carga: objetivo aturdido 1d4 rondas (Voluntad CD 10+BAB base = tambaleante).
features_gained.description_en: Mounted charge: double damage (triple with a lance). With Spirited Charge: triple (quadruple with a lance). Confirmed crit on charge: target stunned 1d4 rounds (Will DC 10+base BAB = staggered).

shadow_caller.name: Shadow Caller
shadow_caller.description_es: Convoca criaturas del Plano de Sombra en lugar de los planos estándar. Su eidolón tiene subtipo Sombra con resistencia a energía negativa y visión en penumbra mejorada.
shadow_caller.description_en: Summons creatures from the Shadow Plane instead of standard planes. Their eidolon has the Shadow subtype with negative energy resistance and improved low-light vision.

features_gained.name: Shadow Conjuration
features_gained.description_es: La lista de Summon Monster se reemplaza por criaturas de sombra equivalentes. Las criaturas convocadas tienen el subtipo Sombra y resistencia a daño de energía negativa.
features_gained.description_en: The Summon Monster list is replaced with equivalent shadow creatures. Summoned creatures have the Shadow subtype and negative energy damage resistance.

features_gained.name: Shadow Eidolon
features_gained.description_es: El eidolón tiene el subtipo Sombra: resistencia a frío 5, visión en la oscuridad, y puede ocultarse en áreas de penumbra (Sigilo como si fueran oscuras).
features_gained.description_en: The eidolon has the Shadow subtype: cold resistance 5, darkvision, and can hide in dim-light areas (Stealth as if they were dark).

order_of_the_flame.name: Order of the Flame
order_of_the_flame.description_es: Los miembros de la Orden de la Llama buscan la gloria personal a cualquier costo. Cuanto más peligroso es el desafío, más grande es la recompensa. Se lanzan al combate con imprudencia, ganando poder a medida que derrotan enemigos, pero volviéndose cada vez más vulnerables.
order_of_the_flame.description_en: Members of the Order of the Flame seek personal glory at any cost. The more dangerous the challenge, the greater the reward. They rush into combat recklessly, gaining power as they fell enemies, but becoming increasingly vulnerable.

features_gained.name: Desafío Glorioso
features_gained.description_es: Cuando reduces a 0 PG o menos al objetivo de tu Desafío, puedes emitir un Desafío Glorioso contra otro oponente en un radio de 15 pies como acción inmediata. Este desafío no gasta un uso diario. Cada desafío consecutivo impone −2 a la CA acumulativo, pero otorga +2×N al daño c.a.c. contra el objetivo (N = número de desafíos gloriosos consecutivos).
features_gained.description_en: When you reduce the target of your Challenge to 0 HP, you may issue a Glorious Challenge against another opponent within 15 feet as an immediate action. This does not expend a daily use. Each consecutive challenge imposes a cumulative −2 AC penalty but grants +2×N melee damage (N = consecutive glorious challenges).

features_gained.name: Embestida Imprudente
features_gained.description_es: Al tirar iniciativa, si obtienes 11 o más en el dado, puedes moverte hasta tu velocidad base como acción inmediata. No estás desprevenido durante este movimiento. El movimiento realizado se resta de tu movimiento en tu primer turno.
features_gained.description_en: When rolling initiative, if you roll 11 or higher on the die, you may move up to your base speed as an immediate action. You are not flat-footed during this movement. Distance moved is subtracted from your first turn movement.

features_gained.name: Éxito Intimidante
features_gained.description_es: Al confirmar un golpe crítico con arma c.a.c., puedes intentar Intimidar como acción inmediata para atemorizar a todos los enemigos en 15 pies que puedan verte. Solo una vez por combate.
features_gained.description_en: When you confirm a critical hit with a melee weapon, you may attempt Intimidate as an immediate action to demoralize all enemies within 15 feet who can see you. Once per combat only.

features_gained.name: Fogata Gloriosa
features_gained.description_es: Acción estándar. Durante un número de rondas igual a tu modificador de CAR (mín. 1): velocidad +10 pies, ignoras terreno difícil al cargar, +4 a tiradas de ataque (en lugar de +2). Una vez por combate.
features_gained.description_en: Standard action. For a number of rounds equal to your CHA modifier (min 1): speed +10 ft, ignore difficult terrain while charging, +4 to attack rolls (instead of +2). Once per combat.

wild_rager.name: Wild Rager
wild_rager.description_es: Bárbaro cuya furia se descontrola: gana ataque extra arriesgado y puede entrar en confusión al matar enemigos, sacrificando esquiva sobrenatural por agresividad ciega.
wild_rager.description_en: A barbarian whose rage spirals out of control, gaining a reckless extra attack and risking confusion when felling enemies, trading uncanny dodge for blind aggression.

features_gained.name: Wild Fighting (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: En ataques completos durante furia, gana un ataque adicional con su BAB más alto, pero sufre -2 a tiradas de ataque y -4 a CA hasta su próximo turno.
features_gained.description_en: On full-attack actions while raging, gains one extra attack at her highest BAB, but suffers -2 on attack rolls and -4 to AC until her next turn.

features_gained.name: Uncontrolled Rage (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al reducir un enemigo a 0 PG durante furia, debe superar una salvación de Voluntad o quedar confusa, atacando a la criatura más cercana.
features_gained.description_en: When reducing a foe to 0 HP during rage, must succeed a Will save or become confused, attacking the nearest creature.

drunken_brute.name: Drunken Brute
drunken_brute.description_es: Bárbaro que canaliza su furia mediante el alcohol, sacrificando velocidad por la capacidad de prolongar su furia bebiendo en combate.
drunken_brute.description_en: A barbarian who channels rage through alcohol, sacrificing speed for the ability to extend rage by drinking mid-combat.

features_gained.name: Raging Drunk (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Durante la furia puede consumir una poción o bebida alcohólica como acción de movimiento sin provocar ataques de oportunidad. Mantiene la furia ese asalto sin gastar uno de sus rondas diarias, pero al terminar queda mareada 1 asalto adicional por cada bebida.
features_gained.description_en: While raging she can drink a potion or alcoholic beverage as a move action without provoking. Sustains rage that round without spending a daily round, but each drink leaves her nauseated for 1 round when rage ends.

savage_barbarian.name: Savage Barbarian
savage_barbarian.description_es: Bárbaro que prospera sin armadura, ganando bonificaciones defensivas y de coraje cuando lucha desnudo, en lugar de detectar trampas y RD convencional.
savage_barbarian.description_en: A barbarian who thrives without armor, gaining defensive and courage bonuses while fighting naked instead of trap sense and conventional DR.

features_gained.name: Naked Courage (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, sin armadura (escudos permitidos), gana +1 de bono de esquiva a CA y +1 de bono de moral en salvaciones contra miedo. Aumenta +1 cada 6 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, while wearing no armor (shields allowed), gains a +1 dodge bonus to AC and +1 morale bonus on saves vs fear. Increases by +1 every 6 levels.

features_gained.name: Natural Toughness (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7, sin armadura, gana +1 de bono de armadura natural a CA. Aumenta +1 cada 3 niveles más allá del 7.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level, while unarmored, gains +1 natural armor bonus to AC. Increases by +1 every 3 levels beyond 7th.

archer_fighter.name: Archer
archer_fighter.description_es: Guerrero especializado en arcos: cambia coraje, entrenamiento de armadura y armas por bonos al combate a distancia y trucos con el arco.
archer_fighter.description_en: A bow specialist fighter who trades bravery, armor and weapon training for ranged combat bonuses and bow trick shots.

features_gained.name: Hawkeye (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2, +1 a Avistar y el incremento de alcance de sus arcos aumenta 1.5 m. Mejora cada 4 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level, +1 on Perception checks and bow range increment increases by 5 ft. Improves every 4 levels.

features_gained.name: Trick Shot (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, puede ejecutar maniobras (desarmar, fintar, romper, etc.) con el arco a 9 m con -4. Gana opciones adicionales cada 4 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, can perform maneuvers (disarm, feint, sunder, etc.) with the bow at 30 ft with -4. Gains additional options every 4 levels.

features_gained.name: Expert Archer (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5, +1 a tiradas de ataque y daño con arcos. Aumenta +1 cada 4 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level, +1 to attack and damage rolls with bows. Increases +1 every 4 levels.

mobile_fighter.name: Mobile Fighter
mobile_fighter.description_es: Guerrero ágil que se basa en moverse para atacar: cambia coraje, entrenamiento y maestría por velocidad y combos de movimiento-ataque.
mobile_fighter.description_en: An agile fighter who relies on mobility, trading bravery, training and mastery for speed and move-and-attack combos.

features_gained.name: Agility (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2, +1 a salvaciones contra efectos de paralizar, ralentizar o entorpecer. Aumenta +1 cada 4 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level, +1 on saves vs paralyzed, slowed, or entangled effects. Increases +1 every 4 levels.

features_gained.name: Leaping Attack (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5, si se ha movido al menos 1.5 m antes de atacar, +1 a tiradas de ataque y daño. Aumenta +1 cada 4 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level, if he moved at least 5 ft before attacking, +1 to attack and damage rolls. Increases +1 every 4 levels.

features_gained.name: Rapid Attack (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11, puede combinar una acción de movimiento con un ataque completo, sacrificando el ataque de mayor BAB.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level, can combine a move action with a full-attack, forgoing the highest-BAB attack.

features_gained.name: Whirlwind Blitz (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 20, puede ejecutar ataque completo o usar Ataque Torbellino como acción estándar.
features_gained.description_en: At 20th level, may perform a full-attack or use the Whirlwind Attack feat as a standard action.

sohei.name: Sohei
sohei.description_es: Monje guerrero monástico montado: cambia muchas habilidades clásicas del monje por iniciativa superior, montura, mejoras de arma con ki y entrenamiento marcial.
sohei.description_en: A martial monastic warrior on horseback who trades many classic monk abilities for superior initiative, a mount, ki weapon enhancement, and weapon training.

features_gained.name: Devoted Guardian (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1, puede actuar en la ronda de sorpresa aunque no esté consciente; bono a iniciativa igual a la mitad del nivel de monje.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level, can act in the surprise round even if unaware; initiative bonus equal to half monk level.

features_gained.name: Monastic Mount (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4, gasta 1 punto de ki para otorgar a su montura PG temporales (2× nivel) durante 1 hora/nivel.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, spends 1 ki point to grant his mount temporary HP (2× level) for 1 hour/level.

features_gained.name: Weapon Training (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 6, elige un grupo de armas (arcos, ballestas, armas de monje, armas de asta, lanzas o arrojadizas), ganando bono al ataque y daño.
features_gained.description_en: At 6th level, chooses a weapon group (bows, crossbows, monk, polearms, spears, or thrown), gaining attack and damage bonuses.

undead_scourge.name: Undead Scourge
undead_scourge.description_es: Paladín focalizado en aniquilar no-muertos: su golpe del mal escala de manera especial contra muertos vivientes.
undead_scourge.description_en: A paladin focused on annihilating undead: her smite evil scales specially against undead.

features_gained.name: Smite Evil (Undead)
features_gained.description_es: Su golpe del mal añade +2 al daño por nivel de paladín contra no-muertos malignos.
features_gained.description_en: Her smite evil adds +2 damage per paladin level against evil undead.

features_gained.name: Aura of Life (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 8, emite un aura de vida de 3 m: los no-muertos en ella reciben -4 a salvaciones contra energía positiva.
features_gained.description_en: At 8th level, emits a 10-ft aura of life: undead within it take -4 on Will saves vs positive energy.

guide.name: Guide
guide.description_es: Explorador adaptable que abandona el enemigo predilecto por una capacidad para marcar a cualquier enemigo y compartir su maestría del terreno con el grupo.
guide.description_en: An adaptable scout who trades favored enemy for the ability to mark any enemy and share his terrain mastery with the party.

features_gained.name: Ranger's Focus (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1, como acción rápida, designa a un enemigo y gana +2 a tiradas de ataque y daño contra él. Aumenta +2 a nivel 5 y cada 5 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level, as a swift action, designates a foe and gains +2 to attack and damage rolls against it. Increases by +2 at 5th and every 5 levels.

features_gained.name: Terrain Bond (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4, los aliados a la vista en su terreno predilecto ganan +2 a iniciativa y a Avistar, Sigilo y Supervivencia.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, allies within line of sight in his favored terrain gain +2 on initiative, Perception, Stealth, and Survival.

skirmisher.name: Skirmisher
skirmisher.description_es: Explorador sin magia que sustituye toda su lista de conjuros por trucos de cazador tácticos usables varias veces al día.
skirmisher.description_en: A non-magical ranger who replaces his entire spell list with tactical hunter's tricks usable several times per day.

features_gained.name: Hunter's Tricks (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5, aprende un truco de cazador, ganando trucos adicionales a nivel 7 y cada 2 niveles. Puede usarlos un total de veces al día igual a la mitad de su nivel de explorador + su modificador de Sabiduría.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level, learns one hunter's trick, gaining additional tricks at 7th and every 2 levels. Usable a number of times per day equal to half his ranger level + his Wisdom modifier.

beastmaster.name: Beastmaster
beastmaster.description_es: Explorador centrado en sus compañeros animales, capaz de mantener varios a la vez dividiendo su nivel efectivo de druida.
beastmaster.description_en: A ranger focused on his animal companions, able to maintain several at once by dividing his effective druid level among them.

features_gained.name: Animal Companion (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4, gana un compañero animal con nivel efectivo de druida igual a nivel de explorador -3. Puede mantener varios compañeros dividiendo su nivel efectivo entre ellos.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, gains an animal companion with effective druid level equal to ranger level -3. Can maintain multiple companions by dividing his effective level among them.

chirurgeon.name: Chirurgeon
chirurgeon.description_es: Alquimista médico que prioriza la curación y la anatomía sobre los venenos, sacrificando todas las habilidades venenosas a cambio de extractos curativos infundidos y mejor uso de la habilidad Sanar.
chirurgeon.description_en: A medical alchemist who prioritizes healing and anatomy over poisons, trading all poison abilities for infused cure extracts and superior Heal-skill use.

features_gained.name: Curativo Infundido (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Los extractos de cure (curar heridas) actúan automáticamente como infusiones y pueden ser usados por no alquimistas.
features_gained.description_en: Cure extracts automatically act as infusions and can be used by non-alchemists.

features_gained.name: Anestésico (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Gana Soltura en Habilidad (Sanar) como dote extra; los usos peligrosos de Sanar solo causan el daño mínimo.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Skill Focus (Heal) as a bonus feat; dangerous Heal uses deal only minimum damage.

features_gained.name: Poder Sobre la Muerte (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Añade aliento de vida (breath of life) como extracto de nivel 4 y puede usarlo con la capacidad de infusión.
features_gained.description_en: Adds breath of life as a 4th-level extract usable with the infusion ability.

beastmorph.name: Beastmorph
beastmorph.description_es: Alquimista que estudia la anatomía monstruosa para imitar sus capacidades a través del mutágeno, ganando rasgos animales a costa de la maestría con venenos y la alquimia rápida.
beastmorph.description_en: An alchemist who studies monstrous anatomy to mimic their traits through mutagens, gaining beast-like features at the cost of poison mastery and swift alchemy.

features_gained.name: Mutágeno Bestial (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Mientras tiene activo su mutágeno, gana apariencia animal y una capacidad de la lista de alter self.
features_gained.description_en: While the mutagen is active, gains an animalistic appearance plus one ability from alter self.

features_gained.name: Mutágeno Bestial Mejorado (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 6 obtiene dos capacidades de la lista de beast shape I mientras esté en mutágeno.
features_gained.description_en: At 6th level, gains two abilities from beast shape I while in mutagen form.

features_gained.name: Mutágeno Bestial Mayor (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 10 obtiene tres capacidades de beast shape II.
features_gained.description_en: At 10th level, gains three abilities from beast shape II.

features_gained.name: Mutágeno Bestial Grandioso (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 14 obtiene cuatro capacidades de beast shape III.
features_gained.description_en: At 14th level, gains four abilities from beast shape III.

mindchemist.name: Mindchemist
mindchemist.description_es: Alquimista intelectual que reemplaza el mutágeno físico por un cognatógeno mental, sacrificando la mejora corporal a cambio de un intelecto formidable y memoria perfecta.
mindchemist.description_en: An intellectual alchemist who swaps the physical mutagen for a mental cognatogen, trading bodily prowess for formidable intellect and perfect recall.

features_gained.name: Cognatógeno (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Crea un cognatógeno que potencia atributos mentales (Int/Sab/Car) en lugar del mutágeno físico estándar.
features_gained.description_en: Creates a cognatogen that boosts mental scores (Int/Wis/Cha) instead of the standard physical mutagen.

features_gained.name: Memoria Perfecta (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al hacer una tirada de Conocimiento, suma el modificador de Inteligencia una segunda vez al resultado.
features_gained.description_en: On any Knowledge check, may add the Intelligence modifier to the check a second time.

features_gained.name: Dotes Adicionales / Idiomas
features_gained.description_es: Puede tomar Soltura en Habilidad (habilidades mentales) o aprender tres idiomas en lugar de descubrimientos.
features_gained.description_en: May take Skill Focus in mental skills or learn three languages in place of discoveries.

preservationist.name: Preservationist
preservationist.description_es: Alquimista que preserva criaturas vivas en frascos para liberarlas como aliados invocados, intercambiando toda la maestría con venenos por una progresión de aliados embotellados.
preservationist.description_en: An alchemist who preserves living creatures in bottles to release them as summoned allies, trading poison mastery for a bottled-ally progression.

features_gained.name: Aliado Embotellado (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Al abrir el frasco, el espécimen cobra vida tamaño normal y sirve como una criatura invocada por convocar aliado natural; progresa de I a IX entre niveles 2 y 18.
features_gained.description_en: Opening the bottle animates the specimen full-size as a creature summoned by summon nature's ally; progresses from I to IX between levels 2 and 18.

internal_alchemist.name: Internal Alchemist
internal_alchemist.description_es: Alquimista que busca la auto-perfección y la longevidad mediante medicina, dieta y control corporal, intercambiando bombas rápidas y veneno rápido por dominio del aliento y resistencia a enfermedades.
internal_alchemist.description_en: An alchemist who pursues self-perfection and longevity through medicine, diet, and bodily control, trading throw anything and swift poisoning for breath mastery and disease resistance.

features_gained.name: Maestría del Aliento (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede contener la respiración un número de minutos igual a su Constitución sin preparación, o 1 hora por punto con preparación; puede entrar en animación suspendida.
features_gained.description_en: Can hold breath for Constitution score in minutes without preparation, or 1 hour per Con point with preparation; can enter suspended animation.

features_gained.name: Resistencia a Enfermedad (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 3 obtiene un bono a salvaciones contra enfermedad igual a su resistencia a veneno; se vuelve inmune a enfermedad al obtener inmunidad a veneno.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level gains a save bonus against disease equal to poison resistance; becomes immune to disease upon gaining poison immunity.

features_gained.name: Esquiva Sobrenatural (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 6 no puede ser pillado desprevenido y conserva su modificador de Destreza incluso ante invisibles.
features_gained.description_en: At 6th level cannot be caught flat-footed and retains Dex bonus to AC even against invisible attackers.

blighted_myrmidon.name: Blighted Myrmidon
blighted_myrmidon.description_es: Antipaladín corruptor de la naturaleza que reemplaza castigar el bien por castigar a la naturaleza, drenando la vida de animales, plantas y fey en lugar de servir al mal genérico.
blighted_myrmidon.description_en: A nature-corrupting antipaladin that swaps smite good for smite nature, draining the life of animals, plants, and fey rather than serving generic evil.

features_gained.name: Castigar Naturaleza (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Funciona como castigar el bien pero apunta a animales, plantas, sabandijas, elementales, fey y clases con vínculo natural.
features_gained.description_en: Functions like smite good but targets animals, plants, vermin, elementals, fey, and nature-themed classes.

features_gained.name: Aura de Decadencia (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Aura de 10 pies que daña a criaturas naturales mientras sana al mirmidón.
features_gained.description_en: 10-foot aura that damages natural creatures while healing the myrmidon.

features_gained.name: Toque Enervante (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Reduce a la mitad la curación recibida por la criatura tocada durante un tiempo prolongado.
features_gained.description_en: Halves all healing the touched creature receives for an extended duration.

fearmonger.name: Fearmonger
fearmonger.description_es: Antipaladín que se alimenta del terror ajeno, reemplazando el toque de corrupción por una capacidad que cura al fallar las víctimas las salvaciones contra miedo.
fearmonger.description_en: An antipaladin who feeds on the terror of others, replacing touch of corruption with an ability that heals when victims fail saves against fear effects.

features_gained.name: Alimentarse del Miedo (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Cuando un enemigo falla una salvación contra un efecto de miedo, el fearmonger sana 1 punto por cada 2 niveles; con vida llena, gana puntos de golpe temporales.
features_gained.description_en: When a foe fails a save against a fear effect, the fearmonger heals 1 hp per 2 antipaladin levels; at full HP gains temporary HP instead.

features_gained.name: Crueldades de Miedo (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Las crueldades disponibles se restringen a temáticas de miedo: shaken, frightened, dazed y panicked.
features_gained.description_en: Available cruelties are restricted to fear-themed conditions: shaken, frightened, dazed, and panicked.

insinuator.name: Insinuator
insinuator.source: Pathfinder Player Companion: Agents of Evil
insinuator.description_es: Antipaladín mercenario que invoca diariamente a un exterior maligno distinto para tomar prestado su poder, reemplazando casi todas las capacidades clásicas de antipaladín por la versatilidad de la Invocación.
insinuator.description_en: A mercenary antipaladin who daily invokes a different evil outsider to borrow its power, replacing almost every classic antipaladin feature with the versatility of Invocation.

features_gained.name: Invocación (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Mediante meditación diaria contacta a un exterior maligno y toma prestados sus poderes; los rasgos de clase del día dependen del exterior elegido.
features_gained.description_en: Through daily meditation contacts an evil outsider and borrows its powers; the day's class features depend on the chosen outsider.

features_gained.name: Castigar Insolencia (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Castiga a criaturas opuestas al alineamiento del exterior invocado en lugar de simplemente las criaturas buenas.
features_gained.description_en: Smites creatures opposed to the alignment of the invoked outsider rather than simply good creatures.

features_gained.name: Vínculo Ambicioso (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Recibe un arma o sirviente exterior cuyas capacidades cambian para coincidir con la invocación diaria.
features_gained.description_en: Receives a weapon or outsider servant whose abilities change to match the daily invocation.

knight_of_the_sepulcher.name: Knight of the Sepulcher
knight_of_the_sepulcher.description_es: Antipaladín que se transforma progresivamente en no-muerto, sacrificando dádivas fiéndicas, auras y crueldades a cambio de inmunidades, fortificación y una conversión final al tipo no-muerto.
knight_of_the_sepulcher.description_en: An antipaladin who progressively transforms into an undead, sacrificing fiendish boons, auras, and cruelties for immunities, fortification, and a final conversion to the undead type.

features_gained.name: Resiliencia Sepulcral (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Es curado por energía negativa y dañado por la positiva; resistencia a efectos mentales, de muerte y veneno.
features_gained.description_en: Healed by negative energy and harmed by positive; resistance to mind-affecting, death effects, and poison.

features_gained.name: Fortificación (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Fortificación 25-75% contra críticos y ataques furtivos según el nivel.
features_gained.description_en: 25-75% fortification against critical hits and sneak attacks, scaling with level.

features_gained.name: Reducción de Daño y Visión Oscura (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Visión en la oscuridad de 60 pies y RD 5/contundente y bueno (10 al nivel 20).
features_gained.description_en: Darkvision 60 ft. and DR 5/bludgeoning and good (10 at 20th level).

features_gained.name: Convertirse en No-Muerto (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 20 se convierte en no-muerto, usando Carisma en vez de Constitución para PG y salvaciones.
features_gained.description_en: At 20th level becomes undead, using Charisma instead of Constitution for HP and saves.

tyrant.name: Tyrant
tyrant.description_es: Antipaladín lawful evil manipulador que opera como cerebro estratégico, capaz de colaborar con buenos para usarlos en sus fines; cambia Cabalgar por Diplomacia y restringe su dádiva fiéndica al alineamiento legal-malvado.
tyrant.description_en: A lawful evil manipulative antipaladin who operates as a strategic mastermind, willing to work with good-aligned creatures to exploit them; trades Ride for Diplomacy and restricts his fiendish boon to lawful evil options.

features_gained.name: Código del Tirano
features_gained.description_es: Debe mantenerse legal-malvado; solo puede actuar bien si sirve a sus propias ambiciones oscuras y exige lealtad absoluta de sus subordinados.
features_gained.description_en: Must remain lawful evil; may perform good acts only if they serve his dark ambitions, and demands absolute loyalty from his underlings.

features_gained.name: Diplomacia como Habilidad de Clase
features_gained.description_es: Reemplaza Cabalgar por Diplomacia, enfatizando la manipulación social.
features_gained.description_en: Replaces Ride with Diplomacy, emphasizing social manipulation.

features_gained.name: Dádiva Diabólica (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Su sirviente fiéndico debe ser un animal fiéndico o una criatura con los subtipos legal y maligno.
features_gained.description_en: His fiendish servant must be a fiendish animal or a creature with the lawful and evil subtypes.

blood_arcanist.name: Blood Arcanist
blood_arcanist.description_es: Arcanista que canaliza un linaje de hechicero, ganando los poderes y arcana de un linaje completo a cambio de varios exploits arcanos y de la supremacía mágica.
blood_arcanist.description_en: An arcanist who channels a sorcerer bloodline, gaining the full bloodline arcana and powers of one bloodline at the cost of several arcanist exploits and magical supremacy.

features_gained.name: Linaje (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Selecciona un linaje de hechicero al nivel 1; usa su nivel de arcanista como nivel de hechicero para los arcana y poderes del linaje.
features_gained.description_en: Selects a sorcerer bloodline at 1st level; uses arcanist level as sorcerer level for bloodline arcana and powers.

features_gained.name: Restricción de Linaje
features_gained.description_es: No puede tomar el exploit de desarrollo de linaje, y todo linaje obtenido por multiclase debe coincidir con el original.
features_gained.description_en: Cannot take the bloodline development exploit; any additional bloodline from multiclassing must match the original.

eldritch_font.name: Eldritch Font
eldritch_font.description_es: Arcanista que es un manantial puro de magia, ganando ranuras de hechizo extra y la capacidad de sobrecargar sus conjuros con un Surge Sobrenatural a costa de fatiga y de varios exploits.
eldritch_font.description_en: An arcanist who is a raw magical wellspring, gaining bonus spell slots and the ability to surge spells with Eldritch Surge at the cost of fatigue and several exploits.

features_gained.name: Fuente de Poder (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Gana ranuras de hechizo adicionales por nivel pero reduce los hechizos preparados en uno por nivel.
features_gained.description_en: Gains bonus spell slots per arcanist level, but reduces prepared spells by one per level.

features_gained.name: Surge Sobrenatural (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Como acción rápida, añade +2 al nivel de lanzador y CD de un conjuro, quedando fatigada o exhausta tras hacerlo.
features_gained.description_en: As a swift action, add +2 to caster level and DC of a spell, becoming fatigued or exhausted afterward.

features_gained.name: Surge Mejorado (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 7 puede repetir tiradas de ataque o de daño de hechizos cuando usa surge.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level, may reroll attack or damage rolls for spells when using surge.

features_gained.name: Surge Mayor (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 13 obliga a una criatura a repetir su salvación contra su hechizo y tomar el peor resultado.
features_gained.description_en: At 13th level, forces a creature to reroll its save against her spell and take the worse result.

occultist_arcanist.name: Occultist (Arcanist)
occultist_arcanist.description_es: Arcanista que pacta con entidades extraplanares para obtener poder y conocimiento, especializándose en convocaciones y contacto planar a cambio de exploits y supremacía mágica.
occultist_arcanist.description_en: An arcanist who bargains with extraplanar entities for power and knowledge, specializing in summoning and planar contact at the cost of exploits and magical supremacy.

features_gained.name: Foco del Conjurador (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Gasta puntos de reserva arcana para lanzar convocar monstruo como acción estándar con duración 1 minuto/nivel; el nivel del conjuro aumenta cada 2 niveles hasta IX.
features_gained.description_en: Spend arcane reservoir points to cast summon monster as a standard action with 1 min/level duration; the spell level increases every 2 levels up to IX.

features_gained.name: Hechizos Planares
features_gained.description_es: Añade los hechizos de planar ally a su lista y trata plane shift como hechizo arcanista de nivel 5.
features_gained.description_en: Adds the planar ally spells to her list and treats plane shift as a 5th-level arcanist spell.

features_gained.name: Contacto Planar (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 7 puede lanzar augury una vez al día y contact other plane una vez por semana.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level may cast augury once per day and contact other plane once per week.

school_savant.name: School Savant
school_savant.description_es: Arcanista que se especializa en una escuela de magia al estilo de un mago especialista, ganando capacidades de escuela arcana y un conjuro extra a cambio de dos escuelas opuestas.
school_savant.description_en: An arcanist who specializes in one school of magic like a wizard specialist, gaining arcane school abilities and a bonus prepared spell at the cost of two opposition schools.

features_gained.name: Foco de Escuela
features_gained.description_es: Selecciona una escuela de magia y gana las habilidades de escuela arcana del mago para esa escuela.
features_gained.description_en: Selects one school of magic and gains the wizard arcane school abilities for that school.

features_gained.name: Preparación Ampliada
features_gained.description_es: Prepara un conjuro adicional por día de cada nivel que pueda lanzar, pero debe pertenecer a la escuela elegida.
features_gained.description_en: Prepares one additional spell per day at each castable level, but it must come from the chosen school.

features_gained.name: Escuelas Opuestas
features_gained.description_es: Selecciona dos escuelas opuestas; los hechizos de esas escuelas ocupan dos ranuras al prepararse y aplican -4 al elaborar objetos relacionados.
features_gained.description_en: Selects two opposition schools; their spells take up two prepared slots and incur -4 on crafting items requiring those schools.

unlettered_arcanist.name: Unlettered Arcanist
unlettered_arcanist.description_es: Arcanista que almacena sus hechizos en un familiar al estilo de la bruja en lugar de un grimorio, usando además la lista de hechizos de bruja.
unlettered_arcanist.description_en: An arcanist who stores spells inside a witch-style familiar instead of a spellbook and uses the witch spell list.

features_gained.name: Familiar (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Recibe un familiar como una bruja que almacena sus hechizos; su nivel de arcanista cuenta como nivel de bruja para las capacidades del familiar.
features_gained.description_en: Receives a witch-style familiar that stores her spells; arcanist level counts as witch level for familiar abilities.

features_gained.name: Lista de Hechizos de Bruja
features_gained.description_es: Usa la lista de hechizos de bruja en lugar de la de mago/hechicero.
features_gained.description_en: Uses the witch spell list instead of the wizard/sorcerer spell list.

armored_hulk.name: Armored Hulk
armored_hulk.description_es: Bárbaro que abraza la armadura pesada por encima de la velocidad, sacrificando movimiento rápido y esquiva sobrenatural a cambio de estabilidad, mejor velocidad con armadura y resistencia a críticos.
armored_hulk.description_en: A barbarian who embraces heavy armor over speed, trading fast movement and uncanny dodge for stability, better armored speed, and crit resilience.

features_gained.name: Postura Indomable (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: +1 a maniobras de combate y CMD contra arrollar y a salvaciones de Reflejos contra ataques de pisotear.
features_gained.description_en: +1 on combat maneuvers and CMD against overrun, and on Reflex saves against trample attacks.

features_gained.name: Rapidez Acorazada (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 2 se mueve 5 pies más rápido en armadura mediana o pesada.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level moves 5 ft. faster in medium or heavy armor.

features_gained.name: Resiliencia de Acero (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 3 gana un bono a la CA contra confirmaciones de crítico mientras lleve armadura pesada, +1 cada 3 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level gains an AC bonus against critical confirmations while wearing heavy armor, +1 every 3 levels.

features_gained.name: Rapidez Acorazada Mejorada (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 5 incrementa su velocidad terrestre +10 pies con cualquier armadura.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level increases land speed by +10 ft. while wearing any armor.

brutal_pugilist.name: Brutal Pugilist
brutal_pugilist.description_es: Bárbaro pendenciero especializado en lucha sin armas y presas, intercambiando esquiva sobrenatural y sentido de trampas por habilidad para forcejear y maniobras de combate.
brutal_pugilist.description_en: A brawling barbarian who specializes in unarmed combat and grappling, trading uncanny dodge and trap sense for grapple prowess and combat maneuvers.

features_gained.name: Presa Salvaje (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al estar apresado solo sufre la mitad de las penalizaciones a Destreza, ataque y maniobras; puede hacer ataques de oportunidad contra quien intente apresarlo.
features_gained.description_en: When grappled, takes only half the penalties to Dex, attack, and CMB; may make attacks of opportunity against creatures attempting to grapple her.

features_gained.name: Pit Fighter (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 3 selecciona maniobras de combate y gana un bono de inspiración +1 al CMB o CMD (+2 sin armadura), añadiendo otra maniobra cada 3 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level selects combat maneuvers and gains a +1 insight bonus to CMB or CMD (+2 unarmored), adding another maneuver every 3 levels.

features_gained.name: Presa Salvaje Mejorada (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 5 ignora todas las penalizaciones por estar apresado y se considera una categoría de tamaño mayor para ser apresada.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level ignores all penalties from being grappled and counts as one size larger for being grappled.

mounted_fury.name: Mounted Fury
mounted_fury.description_es: Bárbaro de tribus jinetes que sacrifica movimiento rápido y esquiva sobrenatural a cambio de aumentar la velocidad de su montura y obtener una bestia bestial como aliada animal.
mounted_fury.description_en: A barbarian from horse-riding tribes who sacrifices fast movement and uncanny dodge to boost his mount's speed and gain a bestial animal companion mount.

features_gained.name: Jinete Veloz (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: La velocidad de cualquier montura que cabalgue se incrementa en 10 pies.
features_gained.description_en: The speed of any mount the barbarian rides is increased by 10 ft.

features_gained.name: Montura Bestial (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 5 gana una montura tipo compañero animal de druida (nivel de bárbaro -4); cuando entra en furia montado, la montura gana +2 moral a Fuerza.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level gains a mount that functions as a druid's animal companion (barbarian level -4); when she rages while mounted, the mount gains +2 morale Strength.

superstitious.name: Superstitious
superstitious.description_es: Bárbaro desconfiado de la magia que reemplaza el sentido de trampas y la reducción de daño por intuición sobrenatural y sentidos cada vez más agudos.
superstitious.description_en: A barbarian distrustful of magic who replaces trap sense and damage reduction with supernatural intuition and increasingly keen senses.

features_gained.name: Sexto Sentido (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 3 gana +1 a iniciativa y +1 de inspiración a la CA durante asaltos de sorpresa, +1 cada 3 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level gains +1 initiative and +1 insight to AC during surprise rounds, +1 per three additional levels.

features_gained.name: Sentidos Agudos (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Adquiere visión nocturna (7), visión en la oscuridad 60 ft (10), olfato (13), percepción ciega 30 ft (16) y vista ciega 30 ft (19).
features_gained.description_en: Gains low-light vision (7), darkvision 60 ft (10), scent (13), blindsense 30 ft (16), and blindsight 30 ft (19).

urban_barbarian.name: Urban Barbarian
urban_barbarian.description_es: Bárbaro adaptado a la ciudad que sustituye el movimiento rápido y la furia tradicional por bonos en multitudes y una furia controlada que reparte sus bonos entre atributos elegidos.
urban_barbarian.description_en: A city-bred barbarian who swaps fast movement and standard rage for crowd-fighting bonuses and a controlled rage that distributes its bonuses among chosen abilities.
features_removed: Class skills: Handle Animal, Knowledge (nature), Survival

features_gained.name: Control de Multitudes (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: +1 a las tiradas de ataque y +1 de esquiva a la CA cuando hay dos o más enemigos adyacentes; mejora Intimidar contra multitudes.
features_gained.description_en: +1 attack and +1 dodge AC when adjacent to two or more enemies; improves Intimidate against crowds.

features_gained.name: Furia Controlada (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: En lugar de la furia normal, asigna sus bonos morales (+4/+6/+8) a Fuerza, Destreza o Constitución como elija; sin penalizaciones a CA ni a Voluntad y conserva habilidades mentales.
features_gained.description_en: Instead of the standard rage, assigns her morale bonuses (+4/+6/+8) to Str, Dex, or Con as chosen; takes no penalties to AC or Will and keeps mental skills.

features_gained.name: Habilidades Urbanas
features_gained.description_es: Añade Diplomacia, Conocimiento (local), Conocimiento (nobleza), Lingüística y Profesión como habilidades de clase.
features_gained.description_en: Adds Diplomacy, Knowledge (local), Knowledge (nobility), Linguistics, and Profession as class skills.

arcane_duelist.name: Arcane Duelist
arcane_duelist.description_es: Bardo guerrero que combina hechizos con esgrima, sacrificando saberes bárdicos y muchas interpretaciones por dotes marciales, vínculo arcano con su arma y mejora mágica de la hoja.
arcane_duelist.description_en: A martial bard who blends spells with swordplay, trading bardic lore and many performances for combat feats, an arcane bond with his weapon, and magical blade enhancement.

features_gained.name: Golpe Arcano
features_gained.description_es: Recibe Golpe Arcano como dote bonus al nivel 1 para infundir hechizos en sus ataques con arma.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Arcane Strike as a bonus feat at 1st level to infuse spells into weapon attacks.

features_gained.name: Grito de Arenga
features_gained.description_es: Usa la interpretación para reanimar aliados; sustituye sus tiradas de Voluntad contra miedo por su tirada de Intimidar.
features_gained.description_en: Uses performance to rally allies; substitutes his Intimidate check for their Will saves against fear.

features_gained.name: Vínculo Arcano (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 5 forma un vínculo de mago con un arma para componentes somáticos.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level forms a wizard-style arcane bond with a weapon for somatic components.

features_gained.name: Sed de Hoja (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 6 usa interpretación para añadir bonos +1 a +5 (o propiedades especiales) a las armas de los aliados.
features_gained.description_en: At 6th level uses performance to grant +1 to +5 enhancement bonuses (or special properties) to allies' weapons.

features_gained.name: Armadura Arcana (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Recibe competencia con armadura mediana (10) y pesada (16) sin probabilidad de fallo arcano para los hechizos de bardo.
features_gained.description_en: Gains medium (10) and heavy (16) armor proficiency with no arcane spell failure for bard spells.

sandman.name: Sandman
sandman.description_es: Bardo embaucador que cambia inspirar valor y muchas interpretaciones clásicas por la habilidad de robar conjuros con el contacto, ataque furtivo y canciones que adormecen.
sandman.description_en: A trickster bard who swaps inspire courage and many classic performances for the ability to steal spells with a touch, sneak attack, and sleep-inducing songs.

features_gained.name: Robar Conjuro (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Mediante interpretación y un ataque de contacto puede robar un hechizo preparado o conocido de otra criatura.
features_gained.description_en: Through performance and a touch attack, may steal a prepared spell or spell known from another creature.

features_gained.name: Maestro del Engaño (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Bono a Engañar, Juego de Manos y Sigilo igual a la mitad del nivel.
features_gained.description_en: Bonus to Bluff, Sleight of Hand, and Stealth equal to half his level.

features_gained.name: Hechizo Furtivo (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Sus conjuros aumentan su CD contra enemigos desprevenidos.
features_gained.description_en: His spells gain a higher save DC against flat-footed targets.

features_gained.name: Ataque Furtivo (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: +1d6 de daño contra blancos a los que flanquea o que pierden su bono de Destreza, aumentando con el nivel.
features_gained.description_en: +1d6 damage against targets he flanks or that lose their Dex bonus, scaling with level.

features_gained.name: Canción del Sueño (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 6 reemplaza Sugestión con una interpretación que deja inconscientes a los enemigos.
features_gained.description_en: At 6th level replaces Suggestion with a performance that puts foes to sleep.

dawnflower_dervish.name: Dawnflower Dervish
dawnflower_dervish.name_es: Derviche de la Flor del Alba
dawnflower_dervish.description_es: Bardo bailarín devoto de Sarenrae que canaliza la magia mediante una danza giratoria con cimitarra; sus interpretaciones solo le afectan a él pero con bonificaciones dobles.
dawnflower_dervish.description_en: A spinning, scimitar-wielding bard devoted to Sarenrae whose performances affect only herself but at double the normal bonuses.

features_gained.name: Danza de Batalla (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Las interpretaciones le otorgan el doble de bonos pero solo a sí mismo; comienza como acción de movimiento (rápida al nivel 10).
features_gained.description_en: Performances grant her double the normal bonuses, but only to herself; starts as a move action (swift at 10th).

features_gained.name: Danza del Derviche
features_gained.description_es: Recibe la dote Danza del Derviche como bono, ganando competencia y beneficios con la cimitarra.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Dervish Dance as a bonus feat, granting scimitar proficiency and benefits.

features_gained.name: Lanzador Giratorio (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 5 gana +4 de Concentración para lanzar a la defensiva durante la danza.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level gains +4 to Concentration for defensive casting while dancing.

features_gained.name: Remolino Meditativo (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 8, mientras baila puede acelerar conjuros de cure como acción de movimiento, una vez al día más una por cada 2 niveles tras el 8º.
features_gained.description_en: At 8th level, while dancing she may quicken cure spells as a move action, once per day plus one per two levels after 8th.

dirge_bard.name: Dirge Bard
dirge_bard.description_es: Bardo lúgubre que comulga con los muertos, intercambiando experiencia versátil y maestría de saberes por defensas contra necromancia, capacidades sobre no-muertos y animación de cadáveres.
dirge_bard.description_en: A mournful bard who communes with the dead, trading versatile performance and lore mastery for defenses against necromancy, undead-affecting abilities, and corpse animation.

features_gained.name: Ojos Atormentados (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 2 gana +4 a salvaciones contra miedo, drenado de energía, efectos de muerte y necromancia.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level gains +4 on saves against fear, energy drain, death effects, and necromancy.

features_gained.name: Secretos de la Tumba (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Bono a Conocimiento (religión) para identificar no-muertos; puede afectar a no-muertos con conjuros mentales y añade hechizos de necromancia.
features_gained.description_en: Bonus to Knowledge (religion) to identify undead; can affect undead with mind-affecting spells and adds necromancy spells.

features_gained.name: Estribillo Acechante (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 5 usa Interpretar (teclado o percusión) en vez de Intimidar para acobardar; los efectos de miedo aplican -2 adicional a las salvaciones, escalando.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level uses Perform (keyboard/percussion) instead of Intimidate to demoralize; fear effects gain an extra -2 to saves, scaling.

features_gained.name: Danza de los Muertos (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 10 anima esqueletos o zombis durante su interpretación bárdica sin componentes ni descriptor maligno; cesan al terminar la actuación.
features_gained.description_en: At 10th level animates skeletons or zombies during bardic performance without components or evil descriptor; they cease when the performance ends.

detective.name: Detective
detective.description_es: Bardo investigador que reemplaza Inspirar Valor y experiencia versátil por trabajo en equipo, intuición arcana, ojo para el detalle y capacidad de descubrir mentiras y enemigos invisibles.
detective.description_en: An investigative bard who swaps inspire courage and versatile performance for teamwork, arcane insight, an eye for detail, and the ability to expose lies and hidden foes.

features_gained.name: Trabajo en Equipo Cuidadoso
features_gained.description_es: Tras 3 asaltos de interpretación, los aliados a 30 pies ganan bonos a iniciativa, Avistar, Inutilizar Mecanismo, Reflejos y CA contra trampas.
features_gained.description_en: After 3 rounds of performance, allies within 30 ft. gain bonuses to initiative, Perception, Disable Device, Reflex, and AC against traps.

features_gained.name: Ojo para el Detalle (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Suma la mitad de su nivel a Conocimiento (local), Avistar, Averiguar Intenciones y Diplomacia para recopilar información.
features_gained.description_en: Adds half his level to Knowledge (local), Perception, Sense Motive, and Diplomacy for gathering information.

features_gained.name: Intuición Arcana (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 2 puede localizar e inutilizar trampas mágicas y obtiene +4 contra ilusiones y para penetrar protecciones de adivinación.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level can locate and disable magical traps and gains +4 against illusions and to penetrate divination protections.

features_gained.name: Confesión Verdadera (Sb)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 9, tras 3 asaltos de interpretación, una criatura debe superar Voluntad o revelar mentiras, encantamientos o compulsiones.
features_gained.description_en: At 9th level, after 3 rounds of performance, a creature must save Will or reveal lies, enchantments, or compulsions.

features_gained.name: Investigación Arcana
features_gained.description_es: Añade hechizos de divinación e investigación a su lista bárdica.
features_gained.description_en: Adds investigation-themed divination spells to the bard list.

blood_conduit.name: Blood Conduit
blood_conduit.description_es: Un bloodrager que canaliza magia arcana mediante el contacto físico, entregando hechizos de toque a través de maniobras de combate. Sacrifica movilidad y voluntad por sinergia entre maniobras y conjuros.
blood_conduit.description_en: A bloodrager who channels arcane magic through physical contact, delivering touch spells via combat maneuvers. Trades movement and will for synergy between maneuvers and spellcasting.

features_gained.name: Contact Specialist (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1 obtiene un dote extra de combate (Improved Bull Rush, Grapple, Reposition, Trip, o Unarmed Strike) sin cumplir requisitos.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level, gains a bonus combat feat from Improved Bull Rush, Grapple, Reposition, Trip, or Unarmed Strike without meeting prerequisites.

features_gained.name: Spell Conduit (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5, con armadura ligera o ninguna, puede entregar conjuros de toque como acción rápida tras éxito en una maniobra de combate o golpe sin armas, sin tirada de toque adicional.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level, in light or no armor, can deliver touch spells as a swift action after succeeding on a combat maneuver or unarmed strike, without an additional touch attack.

features_gained.name: Reflexive Conduit (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 14, cuando un enemigo intenta una maniobra contra él puede lanzar un conjuro de toque como acción inmediata, usando su tirada de maniobra en lugar de la de toque.
features_gained.description_en: At 14th level, when an enemy attempts a combat maneuver against him, he may cast a touch spell as an immediate action, using his maneuver check instead of a touch attack.

crossblooded_rager.name: Crossblooded Rager
crossblooded_rager.description_es: Manifiesta dos linajes simultáneamente, ganando poderes de ambos a costa de una notable penalización a las salvaciones de Voluntad. Mayor versatilidad por menor fortaleza mental.
crossblooded_rager.description_en: Manifests two bloodlines at once, gaining powers from both at the cost of a steep penalty to Will saves. Greater versatility for reduced mental fortitude.
features_removed: Bonus to Will saves during bloodrage

features_gained.name: Two Bloodlines
features_gained.description_es: Selecciona dos linajes de bloodrager y obtiene los dotes y conjuros de linaje de ambos.
features_gained.description_en: Selects two bloodrager bloodlines and gains the bonus feats and bloodline spells of both.

features_gained.name: Combined Bloodline Powers
features_gained.description_es: Cada vez que gana un poder de linaje puede elegirlo de cualquiera de los dos linajes; opcionalmente sustituye un poder superior por uno inferior no aprendido.
features_gained.description_en: When gaining a bloodline power, may choose from either bloodline; may also swap a higher power for a lower one not yet learned.

features_gained.name: Conflicting Bloodlines
features_gained.description_es: Sufre una penalización de –2 a todas las salvaciones de Voluntad permanente, y bonificadores morales reducidos durante el bloodrage.
features_gained.description_en: Suffers a permanent –2 penalty to all Will saves, and reduced morale bonuses while bloodraging.

metamagic_rager.name: Metamagic Rager
metamagic_rager.description_es: Sacrifica rondas de bloodrage para aplicar dotes metamágicos a sus conjuros sin aumentar el nivel del espacio. Cambia esquiva mejorada por flexibilidad arcana.
metamagic_rager.description_en: Sacrifices bloodrage rounds to apply metamagic feats to spells without increasing slot level. Trades improved uncanny dodge for arcane flexibility.

features_gained.name: Meta-Rage (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5, gasta rondas de bloodrage iguales al doble del nivel ajustado del conjuro (mín. 2) para aplicar un dote metamágico conocido sin aumentar el nivel del espacio. Funciona incluso fuera del bloodrage.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level, spends bloodrage rounds equal to twice the adjusted spell level (min 2) to apply a known metamagic feat without raising slot level. Works even when not bloodraging.

features_gained.name: Metamagic Bloodline Feats
features_gained.description_es: Al elegir dotes de linaje, puede escoger dotes metamágicos en su lugar.
features_gained.description_en: When selecting bloodline feats, may choose metamagic feats instead.

rageshaper.name: Rageshaper
rageshaper.description_es: Vuelca su poder arcano en transformaciones físicas, fusionando magia de polimorfismo con combate bestial. Pierde algunas defensas a cambio de formas mejoradas.
rageshaper.description_en: Pours arcane power into physical transformations, blending polymorph magic with bestial combat. Trades some defenses for empowered shapes.

features_gained.name: Bestial Aspect (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4, sus ataques naturales otorgados por conjuros de polimorfismo aumentan un escalón de dado; a nivel 9 añade 10 pies a velocidades de movimiento concedidas por la forma.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, natural attacks from polymorph spells increase one die step; at 9th, adds 10 ft to movement speeds granted by altered forms.

features_gained.name: Furious Transformation (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5 puede lanzar conjuros de transmutación/polimorfismo de su lista durante el bloodrage con duración extendida; los conjuros del descriptor de su linaje se extienden automáticamente sin tirada de concentración.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level, can cast transmutation/polymorph spells from the bloodrager list while raging with extended duration; spells matching the bloodline are automatically extended without a concentration check.

spelleater.name: Spelleater
spelleater.description_es: Sacrifica defensas y reducción de daño por curación sostenida durante el bloodrage y la capacidad de consumir espacios de conjuro para sanar.
spelleater.description_en: Trades defenses and damage reduction for sustained fast healing while raging and the ability to consume spell slots for healing.

features_gained.name: Blood of Life (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2 obtiene curación rápida 1 mientras está en bloodrage, aumentando cada 3 niveles hasta 6 a nivel 19. Las mejoras de DR se añaden a su DR efectiva.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level, gains fast healing 1 while bloodraging, increasing every 3 levels to a max of 6 at 19th. Improvements to damage reduction add to his effective DR.

features_gained.name: Spell Eating (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5, como acción rápida puede consumir un espacio de conjuro de bloodrager sin usar para curar 1d8 puntos de daño por nivel del espacio.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level, as a swift action may consume an unused bloodrager spell slot to heal 1d8 damage per level of the slot.

snakebite_striker.name: Snakebite Striker
snakebite_striker.description_es: Cambia versatilidad marcial por daño furtivo y maniobras astutas, golpeando a enemigos desprevenidos con velocidad y engaño.
snakebite_striker.description_en: Trades martial versatility for sneak attack damage and cunning maneuvers, striking flat-footed foes with speed and deception.

features_gained.name: Sneak Attack (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1, +1d6 de daño furtivo, aumentando a niveles 6, 10, 12 y 20. Se acumula con otras fuentes de ataque furtivo.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level, +1d6 sneak attack, increasing at 6th, 10th, 12th, and 20th. Stacks with sneak attack from other sources.

features_gained.name: Snake Feint (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 combina movimiento con un finta. A nivel 11 trata su casilla y una adyacente como puntos de origen para el flanqueo; a nivel 15 añade otra casilla.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, combines movement with a feint. At 11th, designates her square and one adjacent square as flanking origins; at 15th, adds an additional square.

features_gained.name: Opportunist (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11 hace un ataque de oportunidad extra por asalto cuando un aliado daña a un enemigo en cuerpo a cuerpo. A nivel 19 son dos por asalto.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level, gains one extra attack of opportunity per round when an ally damages a foe in melee. At 19th, two per round.

shield_champion.name: Shield Champion
