shield_champion.description_es: Convierte su escudo en arma arrojadiza que rebota para atacar varios enemigos, sacrificando entrenamiento de maniobras por dominio del escudo.
shield_champion.description_en: Turns the shield into a thrown weapon that ricochets between foes, sacrificing maneuver training for shield mastery.

features_gained.name: Throw Shield (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 puede arrojar escudos pesados o ligeros como armas con alcance mejorado; a niveles superiores aplica maniobras y dotes a esos lanzamientos.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, can throw a heavy or light shield as a weapon with extended range; at higher levels, applies combat maneuvers and feats to thrown shields.

features_gained.name: Returning Shield (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5 los escudos arrojados rebotan y vuelven a la mano; mejoras posteriores permiten múltiples rebotes y tratar el punto de rebote como origen para flanqueo.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level, thrown shields ricochet back; later improvements allow multiple ricochets and treat the ricochet point as the attack origin for flanking.

features_gained.name: Champion Defense (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 15, una vez al día, al ser reducido a 0 PG puede intentar una salvación de Fortaleza para reducir el daño a la mitad; dos veces al día a nivel 19.
features_gained.description_en: At 15th level, once per day when reduced to 0 HP, may attempt a Fortitude save to halve the damage; twice per day at 19th.

mutagenic_mauler.name: Mutagenic Mauler
mutagenic_mauler.description_es: Usa alquimia para potenciar su cuerpo, ganando mutágenos y rasgos bestiales a costa de su flexibilidad marcial y bonificación a CA.
mutagenic_mauler.description_en: Uses alchemy to enhance the body, gaining mutagens and beast-like traits at the cost of martial flexibility and AC bonus.

features_gained.name: Mutagen (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1 prepara y bebe mutágenos como un alquimista. Otorga +2 al daño a nivel 6, +3 a nivel 11 y +4 a nivel 16; gana descubrimientos a niveles 10 y 12.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level, brews and imbibes mutagens as an alchemist. Grants +2 damage at 6th, +3 at 11th, +4 at 16th; gains alchemist discoveries at 10th and 12th.

features_gained.name: Beastmorph (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4, mientras esté bajo los efectos del mutágeno, gana visión en penumbra, +10 a velocidad y visión en la oscuridad de 30 pies; mejoras a niveles 13 y 18.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, while under a mutagen, gains low-light vision, +10 ft speed, and 30-ft darkvision; improvements at 13th and 18th.

wild_child.name: Wild Child
wild_child.description_es: Forja vínculo con un compañero animal y aprende trucos de cazador, sacrificando varios dotes de combate adicionales por sinergia con la bestia.
wild_child.description_en: Bonds with an animal companion and learns hunter tricks, trading several bonus combat feats for synergy with the beast.

features_gained.name: Animal Companion (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1 obtiene un compañero animal de la lista del druida, usando el nivel de brawler como nivel de druida efectivo.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level, gains a druid-list animal companion, using brawler level as effective druid level.

features_gained.name: Hunter's Tricks (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede gastar usos de flexibilidad marcial para activar trucos de hostigador del ranger (no a distancia) sin acción adicional.
features_gained.description_en: May expend martial flexibility uses to activate ranger skirmisher tricks (non-ranged) with no action cost.

features_gained.name: Maneuver Training (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Cuando entrena una maniobra de combate, su compañero animal aprende un truco relacionado sin contar contra su límite.
features_gained.description_en: When training a combat maneuver, the animal companion learns a related trick without counting against its trick limit.

features_gained.name: Wild Tricks (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5 y cada 6 niveles después gana trucos de cazador (no a distancia), usables 1/2 nivel + Con por día.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level and every 6 levels thereafter, gains hunter tricks (non-ranged), usable 1/2 level + Con modifier per day.

strangler.name: Strangler
strangler.description_es: Especialista en presa que mata por estrangulación, ganando daño furtivo en grapple y técnicas mortales contra inmovilizados a cambio de varias capacidades estándar del brawler.
strangler.description_en: Grapple specialist who kills by choking, gaining sneak damage on grapple and lethal techniques against pinned foes in exchange for several standard brawler features.

features_gained.name: Strangle (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Inflige +1d6 de daño furtivo cuando tiene éxito en una tirada de presa para dañar o inmovilizar; aumenta a niveles 2, 8 y 15.
features_gained.description_en: Deals +1d6 sneak damage when succeeding on a grapple check to damage or pin; increases at 2nd, 8th, and 15th.

features_gained.name: Practiced Strangler (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2 ignora penalizadores de Destreza al estar agarrado; a nivel 9 puede hacer ataques de oportunidad y mantiene su bonificador de Destreza estando inmovilizado.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level, ignores Dex penalties while grappled; at 9th, can make attacks of opportunity and keeps Dex bonus while pinned.

features_gained.name: Sleeper Hold (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 puede dejar inconsciente a un enemigo inmovilizado mediante una tirada de presa; usos extra a niveles 10 y 16.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, may render a pinned foe unconscious via grapple check; extra uses at 10th and 16th.

features_gained.name: Neckbreaker (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 16 puede matar al instante a un enemigo inmovilizado como acción estándar (acción de movimiento a nivel 20), permitiendo una salvación de Fortaleza.
features_gained.description_en: At 16th level, may instantly kill a pinned foe as a standard action (move action at 20th), allowing a Fortitude save.

gendarme.name: Gendarme
gendarme.description_es: Cavalier centrado en la carga montada devastadora, sacrificando táctica de equipo por más dotes de combate y un poder de carga aniquilador.
gendarme.description_en: Cavalier focused on devastating mounted charges, trading team tactics for more combat feats and an obliterating charge.

features_gained.name: Bonus Feats
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1, 5 y cada 3 niveles después gana un dote extra elegido entre Improved Bull Rush, Mounted Combat, Power Attack, Ride-by Attack, Spirited Charge, Spring Attack y Unseat.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st, 5th, and every 3 levels thereafter, gains a bonus feat from Improved Bull Rush, Mounted Combat, Power Attack, Ride-by Attack, Spirited Charge, Spring Attack, and Unseat.

features_gained.name: Transfixing Charge (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 20, los ataques de carga montada infligen daño triple (cuádruple con lanza), incluyendo bonos. Los críticos confirmados en carga montada infligen daño máximo de arma.
features_gained.description_en: At 20th level, mounted charge attacks deal triple damage (quadruple with a lance), including bonuses. Confirmed criticals on mounted charges deal maximum weapon damage.

honor_guard.name: Honor Guard
honor_guard.description_es: Cavalier protector que sacrifica su propia capacidad de carga y desafío ofensivo para escudar a un aliado designado.
honor_guard.description_en: Protective cavalier who trades offensive charge and challenge in order to shield a designated ally.

features_gained.name: Sworn Defense (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al desafiar designa a un aliado como su tutelado: mientras esté adyacente, sufre –1 a CA y el aliado gana +1 de bono por esquiva a CA.
features_gained.description_en: When issuing a challenge, designates one ally as ward; while adjacent, takes –1 AC and the ward gains +1 dodge bonus to AC.

features_gained.name: Intercept (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 obtiene Bodyguard sin requisitos; al usar ayudar a otro para mejorar la CA de un aliado concede +1 adicional.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, gains Bodyguard without prerequisites; aid another to boost an ally's AC grants an extra +1.

features_gained.name: Warding Charge (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11, como acción inmediata puede moverse hasta su velocidad y atacar cuando el objetivo de su desafío ataca a su tutelado.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level, as an immediate action may move up to its speed and make a melee attack when its challenged target attacks its ward.

features_gained.name: Defensive Challenge (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 12, el objetivo del desafío sufre –2 a tiradas de ataque contra cualquiera salvo el cavalier mientras esté en su área amenazada.
features_gained.description_en: At 12th level, the challenge target suffers –2 to attack rolls against anyone other than the cavalier while in his threatened area.

musketeer.name: Musketeer
musketeer.description_es: Cavalier con un arma de fuego personal en lugar de montura, especializado en pistolas y mosquetes como símbolo de su orden.
musketeer.description_en: Cavalier with a personal firearm instead of a mount, specializing in pistols and muskets as the symbol of his order.

features_gained.name: Gifted Firearm (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1 recibe una pistola o mosquete que no puede vender y obtiene Gunsmithing. A nivel 8 puede concentrarse 1 minuto para ganar bonos como Improved Critical, reducir misfire (11), doblar incremento de alcance (17) y una andanada (20).
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level, receives a bound pistol or musket and gains Gunsmithing. At 8th, may focus for 1 minute to gain Improved Critical, reduced misfire (11th), doubled range increment (17th), and a flurry of gunfire (20th).

features_gained.name: Swift Powder (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 gana Rapid Reload como dote extra; a nivel 14 puede recargar como acción gratuita al emitir un desafío.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, gains Rapid Reload as a bonus feat; at 14th, may reload as a free action when issuing a challenge.

strategist.name: Strategist
strategist.description_es: Cavalier centrado en el liderazgo táctico, capaz de enseñar dotes de equipo a sus aliados y anular las tácticas enemigas a niveles altos.
strategist.description_en: Cavalier focused on tactical leadership, able to teach teamwork feats to allies and cancel enemy tactics at high levels.

features_gained.name: Tactician (Ex, mejorado)
features_gained.description_es: Versión mejorada de Tactician: 1/día a nivel 1 más uno extra a nivel 5 y cada 4 niveles después (máx. 5/día a nivel 17).
features_gained.description_en: Enhanced Tactician: usable 1/day at 1st, plus an extra use at 5th and every 4 levels thereafter (max 5/day at 17th).

features_gained.name: Drill Instructor (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Gasta un uso de desafío y 10 minutos para conceder a hasta cuatro aliados un dote de equipo que conozca, sin requisitos, durante 10 min + 1 min por cada 2 niveles mientras permanezca visible y audible.
features_gained.description_en: Expends one challenge use and 10 minutes to grant up to four allies a teamwork feat he knows, ignoring prerequisites, for 10 min + 1 min per 2 levels while he remains visible and audible.

features_gained.name: Tactical Advantage (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Le permite moverse hasta su velocidad antes o después de usar tactician.
features_gained.description_en: Lets him move up to his speed before or after using the tactician ability.

features_gained.name: Strategic Supremacy (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 18 puede cancelar un dote de equipo enemigo a 30 pies en lugar de conceder uno a un aliado.
features_gained.description_en: At 18th level, may cancel one enemy teamwork feat within 30 feet instead of granting an ally a feat.

evangelist.name: Evangelist
evangelist.description_es: Sacerdote predicador que renuncia a parte de su canalización y armadura para inspirar a sus aliados con sermones casi mágicos.
evangelist.description_en: Preaching priest who gives up some channeling and armor to inspire allies with near-magical sermons.

features_gained.name: Public Speaker
features_gained.description_es: Perform pasa a ser habilidad de clase; recibe un bono a la proyección de voz igual a su nivel + Carisma para reducir CDs auditivas.
features_gained.description_en: Perform becomes a class skill; gains a voice projection bonus equal to class level + Cha modifier to reduce hearing DCs.

features_gained.name: Single-Minded
features_gained.description_es: Sólo selecciona un dominio en lugar de los dos habituales.
features_gained.description_en: Selects only one domain instead of the standard two.

features_gained.name: Sermonic Performance (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Funciona como interpretación bárdica usando Perform (oratoria): countersong, fascinate e inspire courage a nivel 1; inspire greatness a 9; inspire heroics a 15.
features_gained.description_en: Functions like bardic performance using Perform (oratory): countersong, fascinate, and inspire courage at 1st; inspire greatness at 9th; inspire heroics at 15th.

features_gained.name: Spontaneous Casting (modificado)
features_gained.description_es: Puede convertir conjuros preparados en command, enthrall, tongues, suggestion, greater command, geas/quest, mass suggestion, sympathy y demand.
features_gained.description_en: May convert prepared spells into command, enthrall, tongues, suggestion, greater command, geas/quest, mass suggestion, sympathy, and demand.

merciful_healer.name: Merciful Healer
merciful_healer.description_es: Clérigo dedicado por entero a la sanación: renuncia a su segundo dominio y a dañar no muertos por una canalización curativa muy mejorada.
merciful_healer.description_en: Cleric wholly dedicated to healing: gives up the second domain and harming undead in exchange for a vastly improved healing channel.

features_gained.name: Willing Healer
features_gained.description_es: Debe escoger el dominio Healing y sólo puede canalizar energía positiva.
features_gained.description_en: Must select the Healing domain and may only channel positive energy.

features_gained.name: Combat Medic (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: No provoca ataques de oportunidad al usar Heal para estabilizar criaturas o lanzar conjuros curativos.
features_gained.description_en: No attacks of opportunity when using Heal to stabilize creatures or casting healing spells.

features_gained.name: Merciful Healing (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A niveles 3, 6, 9 y 12, su canalización elimina condiciones cada vez peores (fatigado, asustado, mareado, ciego, paralizado, etc.) sobre los curados.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd, 6th, 9th, and 12th levels, channeling removes progressively worse conditions (fatigued, shaken, dazed, blinded, paralyzed, etc.) on those healed.

features_gained.name: True Healer (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 8, puede repetir los 1 en tiradas de curación o aplicar los beneficios de Merciful Healing antes de tirar.
features_gained.description_en: At 8th level, may reroll 1s on healing rolls or apply Merciful Healing benefits before rolling.

separatist.name: Separatist
separatist.description_es: Clérigo herético que rechaza parte de la doctrina oficial de su deidad para acceder a un dominio prohibido, aunque debilitado.
separatist.description_en: Heretical cleric who rejects part of his deity's doctrine to access a forbidden domain, albeit weakened.

features_gained.name: Forbidden Rites
features_gained.description_es: Selecciona un dominio aprobado por la deidad y un segundo dominio fuera de la lista oficial. El segundo dominio funciona a 2 niveles menos para efectos, CDs y usos diarios; las habilidades como bono se obtienen normalmente.
features_gained.description_en: Selects one deity-approved domain plus a second domain not on the deity's list. The second domain functions at 2 levels lower for effects, DCs, and daily uses; skill bonuses are gained normally.

undead_lord.name: Undead Lord
undead_lord.description_es: Clérigo nigromántico devoto de la muerte: cambia su selección de dominios por un compañero no muerto y poderosas habilidades para mandar y sanar muertos vivientes.
undead_lord.description_en: Necromantic cleric devoted to death: trades domain choice for an undead companion and powerful abilities to command and heal undead.

features_gained.name: Death Magic
features_gained.description_es: Debe elegir el dominio Death y el subdominio Undead, sustituyendo el sistema dual de dominios.
features_gained.description_en: Must select the Death domain and Undead subdomain, replacing the standard dual-domain ability.

features_gained.name: Corpse Companion (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Mediante un ritual de 8 horas anima un esqueleto o zombi único cuyos DG no exceden su nivel; obedece sin chequeos de control y no cuenta para los límites de mando habituales.
features_gained.description_en: Through an 8-hour ritual, animates a single skeleton or zombie whose HD don't exceed her level; obeys without control checks and doesn't count against normal undead control limits.

features_gained.name: Bonus Feats
features_gained.description_es: Obtiene Command Undead como dote extra. A nivel 10 elige otro entre Channel Smite, Extra Channel, Skeleton Summoner o Undead Master.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Command Undead as a bonus feat. At 10th level, selects another from Channel Smite, Extra Channel, Skeleton Summoner, or Undead Master.

features_gained.name: Unlife Healer (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 8, los conjuros y habilidades curativas que afectan a no muertos curan un 50% adicional. A nivel 16 curan automáticamente el daño máximo más ese 50%.
features_gained.description_en: At 8th level, healing spells and abilities that target undead heal 50% more. At 16th, they automatically heal maximum damage plus the 50% bonus.

theologian.name: Theologian
theologian.description_es: Especialista intensamente focalizado en un único aspecto de su deidad. Renuncia al segundo dominio para potenciar el suyo y modificarlo con metamagia.
theologian.description_en: Intensely focused specialist on a single aspect of his deity. Gives up the second domain to empower the chosen one and modify it with metamagic.

features_gained.name: Focused Domain
features_gained.description_es: Selecciona un solo dominio cuyos poderes funcionan como si tuviera 2 niveles más de clérigo. Puede preparar conjuros del dominio en espacios normales pero no lanzarlos espontáneamente.
features_gained.description_en: Selects a single domain whose powers function as if his cleric level were 2 higher. May prepare domain spells in normal slots but cannot spontaneously cast domain spells.

features_gained.name: Domain Secret (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5 modifica permanentemente un conjuro de dominio con un dote metamágico (Bouncing, Disruptive, Ectoplasmic, Enlarge, Extend, Focused, Intensified, Silent o Still) sin aumentar el nivel ni necesitar el dote. Conjuros adicionales a niveles 10, 15 y 20.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level, permanently modifies a domain spell with one metamagic feat (Bouncing, Disruptive, Ectoplasmic, Enlarge, Extend, Focused, Intensified, Silent, or Still) without raising slot level or owning the feat. Additional spells at 10th, 15th, and 20th.

aquatic_druid.name: Aquatic Druid
aquatic_druid.description_es: Druida pastor de lagos y mares; intercambia dominio del bosque por adaptaciones acuáticas, velocidad de natación y formas marinas.
aquatic_druid.description_en: Druid shepherd of lakes and seas; trades woodland mastery for aquatic adaptations, swim speed, and marine forms.

features_gained.name: Wild Empathy (Modified)
features_gained.description_es: Funciona sólo con criaturas acuáticas, aunque también afecta a criaturas con Inteligencia 2 o menos en contextos acuáticos.
features_gained.description_en: Functions only on aquatic creatures, though it also affects any creature with Int 2 or lower in aquatic contexts.

features_gained.name: Aquatic Adaptation
features_gained.description_es: Bono de perspicacia igual a la mitad del nivel a Iniciativa, Knowledge (geography), Perception, Stealth, Survival y Swim en terreno acuático; no puede ser rastreado allí.
features_gained.description_en: Insight bonus equal to half level on Initiative, Knowledge (geography), Perception, Stealth, Survival, and Swim in aquatic terrain; cannot be tracked there.

features_gained.name: Natural Swimmer
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 obtiene velocidad de natación igual a la mitad de su velocidad terrestre.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, gains a swim speed equal to half its land speed.

features_gained.name: Resist Ocean's Fury
features_gained.description_es: +4 a salvaciones contra conjuros de tipo agua y habilidades de criaturas acuáticas.
features_gained.description_en: +4 on saves against water-type spells and abilities of aquatic creatures.

features_gained.name: Seaborn
features_gained.description_es: Gana el subtipo acuático, el rasgo anfibio y velocidad de natación igual a la terrestre; resistencia al frío.
features_gained.description_en: Gains the aquatic subtype, amphibious trait, and swim speed equal to land speed; resists cold effects.

features_gained.name: Deep Diver
features_gained.description_es: Reducción de daño igual a la mitad de su nivel y protección contra presa/aplastar conjuros; inmune al daño por presión.
features_gained.description_en: Damage reduction equal to half its level plus protection against grappling/crushing spells; immune to pressure damage.

cave_druid.name: Cave Druid
cave_druid.description_es: Druida del subsuelo, especialista en cuevas y oozes. Sacrifica capacidades del bosque por adaptaciones subterráneas y formas alternativas.
cave_druid.description_en: Underground druid specializing in caves and oozes. Trades woodland abilities for subterranean adaptations and alternate forms.

features_gained.name: Cavesense
features_gained.description_es: Knowledge (dungeoneering) es habilidad de clase y obtiene +2 a Knowledge (dungeoneering) y Survival.
features_gained.description_en: Knowledge (dungeoneering) becomes a class skill, with +2 to Knowledge (dungeoneering) and Survival.

features_gained.name: Nature Bond (Modified)
features_gained.description_es: Permite seleccionar el dominio Darkness; los dominios Air y Weather están prohibidos.
features_gained.description_en: Allows the Darkness domain; Air and Weather domains are prohibited.

features_gained.name: Wild Empathy (Modified)
features_gained.description_es: Puede influir en oozes en lugar de bestias mágicas, con –4.
features_gained.description_en: Can influence oozes instead of magical beasts, with a –4 penalty.

features_gained.name: Tunnelrunner (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2 atraviesa escombros y pasajes estrechos a velocidad normal sin penalizaciones.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level, moves through rubble and narrow passages at normal speed without penalty.

features_gained.name: Lightfoot (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 no puede ser detectado mediante tremorsense.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, cannot be detected via tremorsense.

features_gained.name: Resist Subterranean Corruption
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4, +2 a salvaciones contra habilidades de oozes y aberraciones.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, +2 on saves against ooze and aberration abilities.

features_gained.name: Wild Shape (Modified)
features_gained.description_es: Obtiene Wild Shape a nivel 6 (2 niveles tarde) y no puede asumir formas vegetales; a niveles superiores puede transformarse en oozes.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Wild Shape at 6th level (2 levels late) and cannot assume plant forms; at higher levels, may shift into oozes.

menhir_savant.name: Menhir Savant
menhir_savant.description_es: Druida que estudia los nodos mágicos y las líneas ley a través de menhires y piedras erguidas, ganando habilidades espirituales y planares.
menhir_savant.description_en: Druid who studies magical nodes and ley lines through menhirs and standing stones, gaining spiritual and planar abilities.

features_gained.name: Spirit Sense (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Detecta no muertos, fey, exteriores y criaturas en los planos astral, etéreo o incorpóreas, similar a detect undead pero con varios tipos a la vez.
features_gained.description_en: Detects undead, fey, outsiders, and creatures on the astral, ethereal, or incorporeal planes, similar to detect undead but covering multiple types at once.

features_gained.name: Place Magic (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Como acción gratuita, aumenta su nivel de lanzador en +1 durante un asalto. Usos diarios igual a 3 + Sabiduría.
features_gained.description_en: As a free action, increases caster level by +1 for one round. Uses per day equal to 3 + Wisdom modifier.

features_gained.name: Walk the Lines (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 9 puede lanzar transport via plants un número de veces al día igual a su Sabiduría.
features_gained.description_en: At 9th level, may cast transport via plants a number of times per day equal to her Wisdom modifier.

features_gained.name: Empty Body (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 13, como acción estándar se vuelve etérea durante asaltos al día iguales a su nivel de druida.
features_gained.description_en: At 13th level, as a standard action becomes ethereal for a number of rounds per day equal to her druid level.

storm_druid.name: Storm Druid
storm_druid.description_es: Druida del cielo y las tempestades. Cambia compañero animal y rasgos del bosque por dominio del viento, sonido y clima.
storm_druid.description_en: Druid of sky and storm. Trades animal companion and woodland traits for mastery of wind, sound, and weather.

features_gained.name: Spontaneous Domain Casting
features_gained.description_es: Puede convertir conjuros preparados en conjuros de dominio no preparados de igual o menor nivel.
features_gained.description_en: Can convert prepared spells into unprepared domain spells of equal or lower level.

features_gained.name: Nature Bond (Restricted)
features_gained.description_es: Debe escoger los dominios Air o Weather, o los subdominios Cloud, Storm o Wind, en lugar de un compañero animal.
features_gained.description_en: Must select the Air or Weather domain, or Cloud, Storm, or Wind subdomains, instead of an animal companion.

features_gained.name: Windwalker
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2 trata las penalizaciones por viento como un escalón menos severas.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level, treats wind penalties as one step less severe.

features_gained.name: Stormvoice
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 reduce la CD para oírlo en su nivel de druida.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, reduces the Perception DC to hear him by his druid level.

features_gained.name: Eyes of the Storm
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 ve a través de 10 pies de obstrucción mágica, +5 pies cada 4 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, sees through 10 ft of magical obstruction, +5 ft per 4 levels.

features_gained.name: Windlord
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 9 selecciona un dominio o subdominio adicional.
features_gained.description_en: At 9th level, selects an additional domain or subdomain.

features_gained.name: Storm Lord
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 13 inmunidad a efectos de viento y a quedar ensordecido, +2 a salvaciones contra sónico.
features_gained.description_en: At 13th level, immunity to wind effects and deafness, +2 on sonic saves.

mooncaller.name: Mooncaller
mooncaller.description_es: Druida ligado a los ciclos lunares. Cambia versatilidad primaria por defensas nocturnas y protección contra cambia formas y efectos mentales.
mooncaller.description_en: Druid bound to lunar cycles. Trades primal versatility for nocturnal defenses and protection against shapechangers and mental effects.

features_gained.name: Night Sight
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2 obtiene visión en penumbra; si ya la tiene, gana 30 pies de visión en la oscuridad o amplía 30 pies la que tuviera.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level, gains low-light vision; if already possessed, gains 30 ft darkvision instead, or extends existing darkvision by 30 ft.

features_gained.name: Resist Call of the Wild
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4, +4 a salvaciones contra confusion, daze, feeblemind, insanity y +4 contra habilidades de cambia formas.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, +4 on saves against confusion, daze, feeblemind, insanity, and +4 vs shapechanger abilities.

features_gained.name: Purity of Body
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 9 inmune a todas las enfermedades, incluyendo las sobrenaturales y mágicas.
features_gained.description_en: At 9th level, immune to all diseases, including supernatural and magical varieties.

features_gained.name: Wolfsbane
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 13 obtiene RD 3/plata, aumentando a 4/plata a 16 y 5/plata a 19.
features_gained.description_en: At 13th level, gains DR 3/silver, increasing to 4/silver at 16 and 5/silver at 19.

lore_warden.name: Lore Warden
lore_warden.description_es: Un guerrero erudito que cambia armadura pesada y escudos por destreza intelectual y técnicas de combate basadas en el conocimiento. Renuncia al entrenamiento de armadura a cambio de bonos a habilidades, hazañas de Combat Expertise y Secretos de Espada.
lore_warden.description_en: A scholarly fighter who trades heavy armor and shields for intellectual prowess and knowledge-based combat techniques. Gives up armor training in exchange for skill bonuses, Combat Expertise feats and Sword Secrets.

features_gained.name: Scholastic (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Recibe 2 rangos de habilidad adicionales por nivel que deben gastarse en habilidades basadas en Inteligencia. Todas las Artesanías, Conocimientos, Lingüística y Saber Mágico son habilidades de clase.
features_gained.description_en: Gains 2 bonus skill ranks per level that must be spent on Intelligence-based skills. All Craft, Knowledge, Linguistics and Spellcraft skills are class skills.

features_gained.name: Skill Over Strength (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Califica para dotes de Combat Expertise a nivel 2; gana Combat Expertise como dote adicional a nivel 6; trata su BAB como 2 puntos mayor para Combat Expertise a nivel 10.
features_gained.description_en: Qualifies for Combat Expertise feats at 2nd level; gains Combat Expertise as a bonus feat at 6th level; treats BAB as 2 points higher for Combat Expertise at 10th level.

features_gained.name: Sword Secrets (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 obtiene un secreto de espada y otro adicional cada 4 niveles. Incluye técnicas como Exploit Weakness, Hair's Breadth, Know Thy Enemy, Maneuver Training y Swift Assessment.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level gains one sword secret, plus an additional secret every 4 levels thereafter. Includes techniques such as Exploit Weakness, Hair's Breadth, Know Thy Enemy, Maneuver Training and Swift Assessment.

features_gained.name: Exploit Weakness (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Suma un tercio del nivel a las tiradas de confirmación de crítico; a nivel 11 ignora 5 puntos de RD/dureza tras confirmar un crítico; a nivel 19 confirma automáticamente un crítico por asalto.
features_gained.description_en: Adds one-third class level to critical confirmation rolls; at 11th level ignores 5 points of DR/hardness after confirming a crit; at 19th level auto-confirms one critical hit per round.

polearm_master.name: Polearm Master
polearm_master.description_es: Especialista en lanzas y armas de asta que sacrifica entrenamiento general de armas y armaduras para dominar el alcance, las maniobras defensivas y los ataques de oportunidad con armas de asta.
polearm_master.description_en: A specialist in spears and polearms who sacrifices general weapon and armor training to master reach, defensive maneuvers and attacks of opportunity with polearm weapons.

features_gained.name: Pole Fighting (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2, puede acortar el agarre de su arma de asta como acción inmediata para atacar a objetivos adyacentes con un penalizador, mitigando la principal debilidad de las armas con alcance.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level can shorten his grip on a polearm as an immediate action to attack adjacent targets at a penalty, mitigating the main weakness of reach weapons.

features_gained.name: Steadfast Pike (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 obtiene un bono de competencia en ataques preparados y AdO realizados con lanzas y armas de asta.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level gains a bonus on readied attacks and attacks of opportunity made with spears and polearms.

features_gained.name: Polearm Training (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5, gana bono al ataque y daño con lanzas y armas de asta, aumentando cada 4 niveles. Funciona como entrenamiento de arma del grupo de armas de asta.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level gains bonus on attack and damage rolls with spears and polearms, increasing every 4 levels. Functions as weapon training for the polearm weapon group.

features_gained.name: Flexible Flanker (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 9 puede elegir cualquier casilla adyacente al enemigo como su posición a efectos de flanqueo, aprovechando el alcance de su arma.
features_gained.description_en: At 9th level can choose any square adjacent to an enemy as his position for flanking purposes, exploiting his weapon's reach.

features_gained.name: Sweeping Fend (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 13 puede usar lanzas y armas de asta para realizar maniobras de embestida (bull rush) y derribo (trip).
features_gained.description_en: At 13th level can use spears and polearms to perform bull rush and trip combat maneuvers.

features_gained.name: Step Aside (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 17, cuando un enemigo se acerca, puede dar un paso de 5 pies como acción inmediata para mantener el alcance.
features_gained.description_en: At 17th level, when an enemy approaches he can take a 5-foot step as an immediate action to maintain reach.

features_gained.name: Polearm Parry (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 19 concede a aliados adyacentes un bono de escudo a la CA y RD contra ataques entrantes mientras empuñe su arma de asta.
features_gained.description_en: At 19th level grants adjacent allies a shield bonus to AC and DR against incoming attacks while wielding his polearm.

weapon_master_fighter.name: Weapon Master
weapon_master_fighter.description_es: Devoto a una sola arma elegida, sacrifica el entrenamiento general de armas y armaduras para alcanzar maestría sin igual con su arma predilecta, incluyendo críticos devastadores y reroll de ataques.
weapon_master_fighter.description_en: Devoted to a single chosen weapon, sacrifices general weapon and armor training to attain unmatched mastery with his favored weapon, including devastating crits and attack rerolls.

features_gained.name: Weapon Guard (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2 obtiene +1 a CMD contra intentos de desarmar y romper con su arma elegida; +1 adicional cada 4 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level gains +1 to CMD against disarm and sunder attempts with his chosen weapon; +1 more every 4 levels.

features_gained.name: Weapon Training (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 obtiene +1 al ataque y daño con su arma elegida, mejorando +1 cada 4 niveles. Solo aplica a esa arma específica.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level gains +1 on attack and damage rolls with his chosen weapon, improving by +1 every 4 levels. Only applies to that specific weapon.

features_gained.name: Reliable Strike (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5, una vez al día como acción inmediata puede repetir un ataque, confirmación de crítico, miss chance o daño con su arma elegida; +1 uso cada 5 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level, once per day as an immediate action can reroll an attack roll, critical confirmation, miss chance check or damage roll with his chosen weapon; +1 use per 5 levels.

features_gained.name: Mirror Move (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 9 obtiene su bono de Weapon Training como bono de perspicacia a la CA cuando es atacado con su arma elegida.
features_gained.description_en: At 9th level gains his Weapon Training bonus as an insight bonus to AC when attacked by his chosen weapon.

features_gained.name: Deadly Critical (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 13, una vez al día puede aumentar el multiplicador de crítico de su arma en +1 al confirmar un crítico; +1 uso cada 3 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 13th level, once per day can increase his weapon's damage multiplier by +1 when confirming a critical hit; +1 use per 3 levels.

features_gained.name: Critical Specialist (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 17, los CD de salvación contra los efectos de crítico de su arma elegida aumentan en +4.
features_gained.description_en: At 17th level, save DCs against critical hit effects of his chosen weapon increase by +4.

features_gained.name: Unstoppable Strike (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 19, una vez al día puede declarar un ataque como ataque de toque que ignora la reducción de daño y la dureza.
features_gained.description_en: At 19th level, once per day can make one attack as a touch attack ignoring damage reduction and hardness.

dragoon.name: Dragoon
dragoon.description_es: Guerrero montado especialista en lanza de caballero, que cambia parte de su entrenamiento general por dotes de monta, técnicas de lanza y habilidades especiales como portar estandartes que inspiran a sus aliados.
dragoon.description_en: A mounted warrior specialized with the lance who trades part of his general training for mounted feats, lance techniques and special abilities like carrying banners that inspire allies.

features_gained.name: Skilled Rider (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1 recibe Combate Montado y Skill Focus (Cabalgar) como dotes adicionales gratuitas.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level gains Mounted Combat and Skill Focus (Ride) as bonus feats.

features_gained.name: Spear Training (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5 obtiene entrenamiento mejorado con lanzas: +1 al ataque y +2 al daño, aumentando cada 4 niveles más allá del 5º.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level gains enhanced training with spears: +1 attack and +2 damage, increasing every 4 levels beyond 5th.

features_gained.name: Spinning Lance (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7 puede alternar ataques entre la punta perforante de su lanza con alcance y el extremo trasero contra enemigos cercanos.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level can alternate attacks between the piercing head of his lance with reach, and the butt end against close enemies.

features_gained.name: Banner (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 9 puede colocar un estandarte en su lanza que otorga bonos a salvaciones contra miedo y al ataque a aliados que lo vean, escalando con el nivel.
features_gained.description_en: At 9th level can mount a banner on his lance that grants allies who see it bonuses on saves vs. fear and on attack rolls, scaling with level.

features_gained.name: Piercing Lance (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11, en una carga montada puede realizar dos ataques contra oponentes montados; la CD de Cabalgar para negar el impacto aumenta.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level can make two attacks against mounted opponents during a charge; the Ride DC to negate hits increases.

features_gained.name: Leaping Lance (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 15 ignora el penalizador de armadura en Acrobacias mientras va montado; los bonos de carga se duplican al saltar 10 pies.
features_gained.description_en: At 15th level ignores armor penalty on Acrobatics while mounted; charge bonuses are doubled when jumping 10 feet.

features_gained.name: Weapon Mastery (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 20 debe elegir la lanza de caballero (lance) como su arma de maestría.
features_gained.description_en: At 20th level must select the lance as his mastered weapon.

mutation_warrior.name: Mutation Warrior
mutation_warrior.description_es: Guerrero que sacrifica el entrenamiento de armadura para dominar mutágenos alquímicos, ganando potencia física monstruosa y descubrimientos de alquimista a costa de control mental temporal.
mutation_warrior.description_en: A fighter who sacrifices armor training to master alchemical mutagens, gaining monstrous physical power and alchemist discoveries at the cost of temporary mental impairment.

features_gained.name: Mutagen (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 puede crear y consumir un mutágeno como la habilidad del alquimista, usando su nivel de guerrero como nivel de alquimista para potenciar atributos físicos a costa de mentales.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level can create and consume a mutagen as the alchemist ability, using his fighter level as alchemist level to boost physical stats at the cost of mental ones.

features_gained.name: Mutagen Discovery (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7 y cada 4 niveles después selecciona un descubrimiento de alquimista relacionado con mutágenos: feral mutagen, grand mutagen, infuse mutagen, preserve organs, tentáculo, brazo vestigial, alas, etc.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level and every 4 levels thereafter selects a mutagen-related alchemist discovery: feral mutagen, grand mutagen, infuse mutagen, preserve organs, tentacle, vestigial arm, wings, etc.

musket_master.name: Musket Master
musket_master.description_es: Pistolero especializado en armas de fuego a dos manos como el mosquete, sacrificando movilidad por alcance, daño extra y velocidad de recarga superior con armas largas.
musket_master.description_en: A gunslinger specialized in two-handed firearms like the musket, trading mobility for greater range, extra damage and superior reload speed with long arms.

features_gained.name: Two-Handed Firearm Proficiency
features_gained.description_es: Solo gana competencia con armas de fuego a dos manos. Debe tomar Exotic Weapon Proficiency por separado para armas de fuego a una mano.
features_gained.description_en: Only gains proficiency with two-handed firearms. Must take Exotic Weapon Proficiency separately for one-handed firearms.

features_gained.name: Steady Aim (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1, como acción de movimiento gastando 1 punto de garra (grit), aumenta el incremento de alcance de armas de fuego a dos manos en 10 pies.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level, as a move action spending 1 grit point, increases the range increment of two-handed firearms by 10 feet.

features_gained.name: Fast Musket (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, gastando 1 punto de garra puede recargar armas de fuego a dos manos a la velocidad de las armas a una mano.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, spending 1 grit point can reload two-handed firearms at the speed of one-handed firearms.

features_gained.name: Rapid Reloader
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1 obtiene la dote Rapid Reload (mosquetes) automáticamente como dote adicional.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level automatically gains the Rapid Reload (muskets) feat as a bonus feat.

features_gained.name: Musket Training (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5 añade su modificador de Destreza al daño de armas de fuego a dos manos; el valor de fallo aumenta solo en 2 (no 4); +1 daño cada 4 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level adds his Dexterity modifier to two-handed firearm damage; misfire value increases by only 2 (not 4); +1 damage per 4 levels.

bolt_ace.name: Bolt Ace
bolt_ace.description_es: Pistolero que renuncia totalmente a las armas de fuego para especializarse en ballestas, conservando el sistema de garra (grit) y hazañas pero adaptadas para tiro con virote.
bolt_ace.description_en: A gunslinger who entirely forgoes firearms to specialize in crossbows, retaining the grit and deeds system but adapted for bolt shooting.

features_gained.name: Crossbow Maven (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Recibe competencia con todas las ballestas en lugar de armas de fuego, y comienza con una ballesta obra magistral en lugar de un arma de fuego maltrecha.
features_gained.description_en: Gains proficiency with all crossbows instead of firearms, and begins with a masterwork crossbow instead of a battered firearm.

features_gained.name: Modified Grit (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Recupera puntos de garra (grit) con críticos y golpes letales realizados con ballestas en lugar de armas de fuego.
features_gained.description_en: Regains grit points from critical hits and killing blows with crossbows instead of firearms.

features_gained.name: Crossbow Deeds (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Reemplaza las hazañas estándar con: Sharp Shoot, Vigilant Loading, Shooter's Resolve, Distracting Shot, Vigilant Shooter, Inexplicable Reload y Pinning Shot, todas adaptadas para ballesta.
features_gained.description_en: Replaces standard deeds with: Sharp Shoot, Vigilant Loading, Shooter's Resolve, Distracting Shot, Vigilant Shooter, Inexplicable Reload and Pinning Shot, all adapted for crossbow use.

features_gained.name: Crossbow Training (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5 elige un tipo de ballesta y suma su modificador de Destreza al daño con esa ballesta; aumenta el multiplicador de crítico según el tipo.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level chooses a crossbow type and adds Dexterity modifier to damage with that crossbow; increases critical multiplier based on type.

techslinger.name: Techslinger
techslinger.description_es: Pistolero especializado en armas de fuego tecnológicas, capaz de gestionar cargas eléctricas, evitar fallos en armas envejecidas y manejar armamento pesado avanzado.
techslinger.description_en: A gunslinger specialized in technological firearms, able to manage charges, prevent timeworn glitches and wield advanced heavy weaponry.

features_gained.name: Covet Charge (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1 puede gastar 1 punto de garra para usar 1 carga menos al disparar un arma tecnológica (mínimo 0).
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level can spend 1 grit point to use 1 fewer charge when firing a technological weapon (minimum 0).

features_gained.name: Reliable (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1 puede gastar 1 punto de garra como acción gratuita para evitar que un arma de fuego envejecida (timeworn) sufra un fallo.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level can spend 1 grit point as a free action to prevent a timeworn firearm from glitching.

features_gained.name: Technic Training (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5 elige tipos avanzados de armas de fuego tecnológicas; añade Destreza al daño e ignora fallos en versiones envejecidas. Selecciones adicionales a nivel 9, 13 y 17.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level selects specific advanced tech firearm types; gains Dex modifier to damage and ignores glitches on timeworn versions. Additional selections at 9th, 13th and 17th levels.

features_gained.name: Charge Recycling (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11 puede otorgar cargas temporales a armas de fuego tecnológicas usando puntos de garra; aumenta a 2 cargas a nivel 15 y 3 a nivel 19.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level can grant temporary charges to technological firearms using grit points; scales to 2 charges at 15th level and 3 at 19th level.

features_gained.name: Heavy Weaponry Deeds (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11 trata las armas pesadas tecnológicas como armas de fuego para efectos de hazañas mientras tenga puntos de garra.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level treats heavy technological weapons as firearms for deed purposes while holding grit points.

features_gained.name: Bonus Feats
features_gained.description_es: Puede seleccionar la dote Tecnólogo (Technologist) como dote adicional, normalmente no disponible para pistoleros.
features_gained.description_en: Can select Technologist as a bonus feat, normally unavailable to gunslingers.

gun_tank.name: Gun Tank
gun_tank.description_es: Pistolero blindado que renuncia a la agilidad para usar armadura pesada y escudos, especializándose en resistir críticos, ataques furtivos y desviar balas con su armadura.
gun_tank.description_en: An armored gunslinger who trades agility for heavy armor and shield use, specializing in resisting critical hits, sneak attacks and deflecting bullets with armor.

features_gained.name: Armor Proficiency
features_gained.description_es: Recibe competencia con todos los tipos de armadura y todos los escudos, incluidos escudos de torre.
features_gained.description_en: Gains proficiency with all armor types and all shields, including tower shields.

features_gained.name: Gun Tank's Resolve (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Cuando lleva armadura media o pesada y sufre un crítico o ataque furtivo, puede gastar 1 punto de garra como acción inmediata para intentar negar el daño extra. Comienza con 25% (nivel 1), 50% (nivel 10), 75% (nivel 15).
features_gained.description_en: When wearing medium or heavy armor and subject to a critical or sneak attack, can spend 1 grit point as an immediate action to negate the extra damage. Starts at 25% (1st), 50% (10th), 75% (15th).

features_gained.name: Bullet Deflection (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2, su armadura media o pesada otorga un bono de deflexión contra ataques de armas de fuego y armas de salpicadura igual a la mitad del bono de armadura más la bonificación de mejora.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level, his medium or heavy armor grants a deflection bonus against firearm and splash weapon attacks equal to half the armor's bonus plus its enhancement bonus.

features_gained.name: Armor Training (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 y cada 4 niveles después, reduce el penalizador de armadura en 1 y aumenta el bono máximo de Destreza en 1 (máximo -4 / +4).
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level and every 4 levels thereafter, reduces armor check penalty by 1 and increases max Dex bonus by 1 (max -4 / +4).

features_gained.name: Gun Tank's Resilience (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 15, mientras tenga al menos 1 punto de garra, en salvaciones de Fortaleza exitosas contra efectos de medio daño no recibe daño alguno; +2 a salvaciones contra miedo y mente.
features_gained.description_en: At 15th level, while holding at least 1 grit point, on successful Fortitude saves against half-damage effects takes no damage; +2 on saves against fear and mind-affecting effects.

maverick_gunslinger.name: Maverick
maverick_gunslinger.description_es: Pistolero rebelde y carismático que combina apuestas, peleas a puños y trucos vistosos con su arma, intercambiando movilidad y disparos elegantes por hazañas sociales y de intimidación.
maverick_gunslinger.description_en: A roguish and charismatic gunslinger who combines gambling, fistfighting and showy gunplay, trading mobility and clean shots for social and intimidation deeds.

features_gained.name: Stacked Deck (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1, gastando 1 punto de garra al hacer un chequeo de Engañar, Profesión (jugador) o Juego de Manos, lanza 1d6 y suma el resultado. En 6 natural puede repetir hasta su modificador de Sabiduría veces.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level, spending 1 grit point on a Bluff, Profession (gambler) or Sleight of Hand check, rolls 1d6 and adds it. On a natural 6 can reroll up to her Wisdom modifier times.

features_gained.name: Fist Fighter (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, mientras tenga al menos 1 punto de garra, gana los beneficios de la dote Improved Unarmed Strike.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, while holding at least 1 grit point, gains the benefits of Improved Unarmed Strike.

features_gained.name: Gun Twirl (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 obtiene la dote Dazzling Display y puede usarla con cualquier arma de fuego aunque no tenga Weapon Focus en ella, mientras tenga al menos 1 punto de garra.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level gains Dazzling Display and can use it with any firearm even without Weapon Focus, while holding at least 1 grit point.

packmaster.name: Packmaster
packmaster.description_es: Cazador que en lugar de un único compañero animal mantiene una manada de varios compañeros más débiles individualmente, expandiendo dotes de equipo y enfoques entre todos ellos.
packmaster.description_en: A hunter who instead of a single animal companion maintains a pack of several individually weaker companions, expanding teamwork feats and animal foci across all of them.

features_gained.name: Pack Bond (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede tener más de un compañero animal, pero debe dividir su nivel efectivo de druida entre ellos para determinar las estadísticas de cada uno.
features_gained.description_en: Can have more than one animal companion but must divide her effective druid level among them to determine each one's statistics.

features_gained.name: Pack Focus (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Versión modificada de animal focus que permite aplicar un aspecto a un compañero sin contar contra el límite diario de minutos.
features_gained.description_en: Modified animal focus that allows applying one aspect to a companion without counting against the daily minute limit.

features_gained.name: Expanded Teamwork Feats (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A partir del nivel 3, en lugar de ganar nuevas dotes de equipo, aumenta el número de compañeros que se benefician de precise companion, woodland stride y dotes de equipo existentes.
features_gained.description_en: Starting at 3rd level, instead of gaining new teamwork feats, increases the number of companions that benefit from precise companion, woodland stride and existing teamwork feats.

features_gained.name: Second Pack Focus (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 8 puede asignar aspectos de manera flexible entre múltiples compañeros con diferentes opciones.
features_gained.description_en: At 8th level can flexibly assign aspects across multiple companions with different options.

features_gained.name: Master of the Pack (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 20 obtiene rastreo a velocidad completa y mantiene un animal focus permanente diariamente.
features_gained.description_en: At 20th level gains full-speed tracking and maintains one permanent animal focus daily.

verminous_hunter.name: Verminous Hunter
verminous_hunter.description_es: Cazador macabro que se vincula con criaturas alimañas (insectos gigantes y bichos) en lugar de animales, recibiendo enfoques temáticos de bichos y la capacidad de atravesar enjambres sin daño.
verminous_hunter.description_en: A macabre hunter who bonds with vermin (giant insects and bugs) instead of animals, gaining bug-themed foci and the ability to traverse swarms unharmed.

features_gained.name: Vermin Companion (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1 selecciona una alimaña en lugar de un compañero animal. Las hunter tactics permiten otorgar dotes de equipo a este compañero alimaña sin mente.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level selects a vermin instead of an animal companion. Hunter tactics allows granting teamwork feats to this mindless vermin companion.

features_gained.name: Vermin Empathy (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Otorga empatía salvaje restringida exclusivamente a influir en alimañas, excluyendo animales y bestias mágicas.
features_gained.description_en: Grants wild empathy restricted to influencing vermin only, excluding animals and magical beasts.

features_gained.name: Vermin Focus (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Reemplaza animal focus con 16 opciones de alimañas (hormiga, escarabajo, ciempiés, cucaracha, cangrejo, pulga, mosca, sanguijuela, mantis, polilla, fásmido, escorpión, araña, avispa, gusano), cada una con bonos distintos a niveles 1, 8 y 15.
features_gained.description_en: Replaces animal focus with 16 vermin options (ant, beetle, centipede, cockroach, crab, flea, fly, leech, mantis, moth, phasmid, scorpion, spider, wasp, worm), each with distinct bonuses at levels 1, 8 and 15.

features_gained.name: Swarm Stride (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5 atraviesa enjambres de alimañas sin recibir daño e ignora las habilidades de distracción de los enjambres, salvo que ataque activamente al enjambre.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level traverses vermin swarms without taking damage and ignores swarm distraction abilities, unless actively attacking the swarm.

primal_companion_hunter.name: Primal Companion Hunter
primal_companion_hunter.description_es: Cazador que renuncia a los enfoques animales para imbuir a su compañero animal con poder primigenio, otorgándole evoluciones similares a las de un eidolón durante períodos limitados.
primal_companion_hunter.description_en: A hunter who forgoes animal foci to imbue his animal companion with primal power, granting it eidolon-like evolutions for limited periods.

features_gained.name: Primal Transformation (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1, como acción rápida, activa habilidades primigenias en su compañero, otorgándole 2 puntos de evolución (4 a nivel 8, 6 a nivel 15) usables como las de un eidolón. Dura 1 minuto/nivel al día. Si el compañero muere, las evoluciones se aplican al cazador.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level, as a swift action, activates primal abilities in his companion, granting 2 evolution points (4 at 8th, 6 at 15th) usable like an eidolon's. Lasts 1 min/level per day. If the companion dies, evolutions apply to the hunter instead.

features_gained.name: Primal Surge (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 8, una vez al día como acción rápida, otorga a su compañero una evolución de hasta 4 puntos. La evolución cambia cada uso y activa automáticamente Primal Transformation si es necesario.
features_gained.description_en: At 8th level, once per day as a swift action, grants his companion one evolution worth up to 4 points. The evolution changes each use and auto-activates Primal Transformation if needed.

features_gained.name: Primal Master (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 20 activa el aspecto primigenio del compañero como acción gratuita. Al usar Primal Surge, otorga dos evoluciones en lugar de una.
features_gained.description_en: At 20th level activates the companion's primal aspect as a free action. When using Primal Surge, grants two evolutions instead of one.

urban_hunter.name: Urban Hunter
urban_hunter.description_es: Cazador adaptado al entorno urbano que reemplaza habilidades silvestres por sociales, mantiene un compañero de aspecto inocuo y se especializa en captura no letal y combate informado de sus presas humanoides.
urban_hunter.description_en: A hunter adapted to urban environments who replaces wilderness skills with social ones, keeps an innocuous-looking companion and specializes in nonlethal capture and informed combat against humanoid prey.

features_gained.name: Urban Class Skills
features_gained.description_es: Diplomacia, Conocimiento (local) y Averiguar Intenciones reemplazan a las habilidades silvestres eliminadas.
features_gained.description_en: Diplomacy, Knowledge (local) and Sense Motive replace the removed wilderness skills.

features_gained.name: Urban Animal Companion (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Limitado a animales domesticados o nativos de ciudad (perro, caballo, tejón, ave, etc.). Parece inofensivo en entornos urbanos, requiriendo Averiguar Intenciones para reconocerlo como amenaza.
features_gained.description_en: Limited to domesticated or city-native animals (dog, horse, badger, bird, etc.). Appears harmless in urban settings, requiring Sense Motive to recognize as a threat.

features_gained.name: Captor (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 no recibe penalizadores al causar daño no letal y obtiene dotes de combate adicionales (Improved Bull Rush, Dirty Trick, Disarm, Grapple, Trip y mejoradas) a niveles 3, 6, 9, 12, 15 y 18.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level takes no penalties when dealing nonlethal damage and gains bonus combat feats (Improved Bull Rush, Dirty Trick, Disarm, Grapple, Trip variants) at 3rd, 6th, 9th, 12th, 15th and 18th levels.

features_gained.name: Animal Insight (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5, tanto el cazador como su compañero reciben bono de perspicacia a Averiguar Intenciones y +2 contra ilusiones y efectos mentales mientras estén a 30 pies uno del otro.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level, both hunter and companion gain insight bonus on Sense Motive and +2 vs. illusions and mind-affecting effects while within 30 feet of each other.

features_gained.name: Frightful Ferocity (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 17, ambos pueden usar Intimidar como acción rápida para desmoralizar oponentes.
features_gained.description_en: At 17th level, both can use Intimidate as a swift action to demoralize opponents.

forester.name: Forester
forester.description_es: Cazador solitario que renuncia a su compañero animal para aplicar el animal focus a sí mismo, ganando terrenos favoritos del explorador, dotes de combate adicionales, evasión y la capacidad de tactician.
forester.description_en: A solitary hunter who forgoes his animal companion to apply animal focus to himself, gaining ranger-like favored terrains, bonus combat feats, evasion and the tactician ability.

features_gained.name: Animal Focus (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Reemplaza el compañero animal: en lugar de vincularse con una criatura, el forestal aplica los beneficios del animal focus a sí mismo.
features_gained.description_en: Replaces animal companion: instead of bonding with a creature, the forester applies animal focus benefits to himself.

features_gained.name: Favored Terrain (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Obtiene la habilidad de terreno favorito del explorador. Desde nivel 5 gana terrenos cada 4 niveles y suma la mitad de su bono al daño contra criaturas nativas de su terreno.
features_gained.description_en: Gains the ranger's favored terrain ability. From 5th level gains terrains every 4 levels and adds half his bonus to damage against creatures native to his terrain.

features_gained.name: Bonus Combat Feats (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Recibe dotes de combate adicionales a niveles 2, 7, 13 y 19 en lugar de la habilidad precise companion.
features_gained.description_en: Gains bonus combat feats at 2nd, 7th, 13th and 19th levels in place of the precise companion ability.

features_gained.name: Tactician (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Otorga una dote de equipo a aliados cercanos durante 3+ asaltos como acción estándar. Los usos aumentan a niveles 3, 7 y cada 5 niveles después.
features_gained.description_en: Grants one teamwork feat to nearby allies for 3+ rounds as a standard action. Uses increase at 3rd, 7th and every 5 levels thereafter.

features_gained.name: Evasion / Improved Evasion (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 obtiene evasión; a nivel 11 evasión mejorada (mitad del daño en salvación fallida).
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level gains evasion; at 11th level improved evasion (half damage on failed save).

features_gained.name: Camouflage / Hide in Plain Sight (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7 puede esconderse mediante Sigilo en sus terrenos favoritos sin cobertura ni ocultación; a nivel 14 puede usar Sigilo siendo observado en esos terrenos.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level can hide via Stealth in favored terrains without cover or concealment; at 14th can use Stealth while observed in those terrains.

features_gained.name: Breath of Life (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 10, aptitud sobrenatural una vez al día.
features_gained.description_en: At 10th level, once-daily spell-like ability.

preacher.name: Preacher
preacher.description_es: Inquisidor que renuncia a las tácticas de equipo solitarias para inspirar a aliados con sermones que les permiten repetir tiradas de ataque, defenderse mejor o evitar ataques peligrosos.
preacher.description_en: An inquisitor who forgoes solo tactics to inspire allies with sermons that let them reroll attacks, defend better or avoid dangerous strikes.

features_gained.name: Determination (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, una vez al día como acción gratuita crea uno de tres efectos: Aggression (repetir su propia tirada de ataque antes de revelar el resultado), Defense (+4 perspicacia a CA contra un ataque) o Warning (un aliado provoca que el atacante repita la tirada). Usos extra renunciando a dotes de equipo a niveles 3, 6, 9, 12, 15, 18.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, once per day as a free action creates one of three effects: Aggression (reroll her own attack before results revealed), Defense (+4 insight to AC vs. one attack) or Warning (ally forces attacker to reroll). Extra uses by forgoing teamwork feats at 3, 6, 9, 12, 15, 18.

infiltrator.name: Infiltrator
infiltrator.description_es: Inquisidor especialista en infiltrarse en organizaciones enemigas, sacrificando habilidades de detección y rastreo por engaño mágico, capacidad de fingir alineamientos y resistencia a la verdad mágica.
infiltrator.description_en: An inquisitor specialist at infiltrating enemy organizations, sacrificing detection and tracking abilities for magical deception, the ability to feign alignments and resistance to truth-magic.

features_gained.name: Misdirection (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1, cada día al preparar conjuros elige un alineamiento; aparenta tener ese alineamiento ante magias de detección y otros efectos divinatorios.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level, each day when preparing spells chooses an alignment; appears to have that alignment to detection magic and other divination effects.

features_gained.name: Guileful Lore (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Añade su modificador de Sabiduría a chequeos de Engañar y Diplomacia, ganando aptitud para el subterfugio social.
features_gained.description_en: Adds her Wisdom modifier to Bluff and Diplomacy checks, gaining aptitude for social subterfuge.

features_gained.name: Forbidden Lore (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede lanzar conjuros de un alineamiento opuesto al suyo o al de su deidad sin penalización, esencial para mantener la fachada.
features_gained.description_en: Can cast spells of an alignment opposed to her or her deity without penalty, essential for maintaining cover.

features_gained.name: Necessary Lies (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Otorga bonos a salvaciones contra magia que revele la verdad, incluyendo detect lies y zone of truth.
features_gained.description_en: Grants bonuses on saves against truth-revealing magic, including detect lies and zone of truth.

sin_eater.name: Sin Eater
sin_eater.description_es: Inquisidor sombrío que renuncia a su dominio para devorar ritualmente los pecados de enemigos caídos, curándose con su muerte y obteniendo conocimiento de sus almas.
sin_eater.description_en: A grim inquisitor who forgoes her domain to ritually devour the sins of fallen enemies, healing herself from their deaths and gleaning knowledge from their souls.

features_gained.name: Eat Sin (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1, ritual que permite consumir los pecados de un enemigo recién matado para curar 1d8 + nivel (máx +5), escalando a 4d8 + nivel (máx +20). A nivel 8 puede aceptar niveles negativos temporales para impedir que el caído se levante como no muerto.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level, ritual to consume the sins of a freshly slain enemy to heal 1d8 + level (max +5), scaling to 4d8 + level (max +20). At 8th level can accept temporary negative levels to prevent the slain from rising as undead.

features_gained.name: Speak with Dead (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 6, dentro de los 10 minutos posteriores a comer los pecados, puede preguntar a los restos del alma del enemigo como con speak with dead, NL = nivel de inquisidor.
features_gained.description_en: At 6th level, within 10 minutes of eating an enemy's sins can question the remnants of their soul as per speak with dead, CL = inquisitor level.

features_gained.name: Burden of Sin (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 14, como acción de asalto completo puede transferir aflicciones, condiciones o efectos de conjuros dañinos de otra criatura a sí misma. Uso reiterable.
features_gained.description_en: At 14th level, as a full-round action can transfer afflictions, conditions or harmful spell effects from another creature onto herself. Repeatable.

exorcist.name: Exorcist
exorcist.description_es: Inquisidor especialista en expulsar entidades poseedoras y exteriores intrusos, cambiando segundos y terceros juicios por veredictos específicos contra la posesión.
exorcist.description_en: An inquisitor specialist at expelling possessing entities and intruding outsiders, trading second and third judgments for specific verdicts against possession.

features_gained.name: Verdict of Exorcism (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 8 permite que el juicio aturda al objetivo durante 1 asalto y expulse forzosamente a entidades poseedoras de cuerpos (Voluntad niega).
features_gained.description_en: At 8th level allows judgment to daze a target for 1 round and forcibly expel possessing entities from bodies (Will negates).

features_gained.name: Verdict of Exile (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 16 usa el juicio para aturdir y lanzar dismissal sobre criaturas poseídas o exteriores (Voluntad niega).
features_gained.description_en: At 16th level uses judgment to daze and cast dismissal on possessed creatures or outsiders (Will negates).

features_gained.name: Closed Mind (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 17 se vuelve inmune a efectos de compulsión y a intentos de posesión, incluyendo magic jar.
features_gained.description_en: At 17th level becomes immune to compulsion effects and possession attempts, including magic jar.

features_gained.name: Verdict of Anathema (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 20, juicio que afecta a todos los enemigos en 10 pies con el efecto de Verdict of Exorcism simultáneamente.
features_gained.description_en: At 20th level, judgment that affects all enemies within 10 feet with the Verdict of Exorcism effect simultaneously.

monster_tactician.name: Monster Tactician
monster_tactician.description_es: Inquisidor que reemplaza sus juicios por la habilidad de invocar monstruos como aptitud sobrenatural, otorgándoles dotes de equipo y luchando coordinadamente con criaturas convocadas.
monster_tactician.description_en: An inquisitor who replaces her judgments with the ability to summon monsters as a spell-like ability, granting them teamwork feats and fighting in coordination with summoned creatures.

features_gained.name: Summon Monster (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Lanza summon monster I como aptitud sobrenatural 3 + Sabiduría veces al día, como acción estándar; criaturas duran 1 minuto/nivel. El nivel del conjuro aumenta cada 2 niveles (máx IX a nivel 17). Solo una invocación activa a la vez.
features_gained.description_en: Casts summon monster I as a spell-like ability 3 + Wis modifier times/day as a standard action; creatures last 1 minute/level. Spell level increases every 2 levels (max IX at 17th). Only one active summoning at a time.

features_gained.name: Summon Tactics (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5 aplica una dote de equipo elegida a todas las criaturas invocadas; +1 dote disponible a nivel 8 y 16. A nivel 20, las criaturas invocadas se tratan como si conocieran todas sus dotes de equipo.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level applies one chosen teamwork feat to all summoned creatures; +1 selectable feat at 8th and 16th. At 20th level, summoned creatures are treated as knowing all the monster tactician's teamwork feats.

cipher_investigator.name: Cipher
cipher_investigator.description_es: Investigador espía especializado en pasar desapercibido y resistir adivinación, cambiando habilidades sociales y resistencia al veneno por sigilo, evasión e invisibilidad psicológica.
cipher_investigator.description_en: A spy investigator specialized in going unnoticed and resisting divination, trading social skills and poison resistance for stealth, evasion and psychological invisibility.
features_removed: Bluff, Diplomacy, Intimidate, Perform class skills

features_gained.name: Unassuming (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Recibe Disfrazarse, Escapismo, Conocimiento (local), Juego de Manos y Sigilo como habilidades de clase. Puede usar inspiración en estas sin gastar usos.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Disguise, Escape Artist, Knowledge (local), Sleight of Hand and Stealth as class skills. Can use inspiration on these without expending uses.

features_gained.name: Inattention Blindness (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Las criaturas que normalmente lo notarían deben superar un chequeo de Percepción o ignorar al cifrado dentro de un radio que escala con el nivel.
features_gained.description_en: Creatures that would normally notice him must succeed at a Perception check or ignore the cipher within a range that scales with level.

features_gained.name: Null Aura (Su, Sp)
features_gained.description_es: +4 a salvaciones contra adivinación; el escrutinio (scrying) requiere conocimiento de primera mano. A nivel 9 obtiene nondetection constante.
features_gained.description_en: +4 on saves against divination; scrying requires firsthand knowledge. At 9th level gains constant nondetection.

features_gained.name: Evasion / Improved Evasion (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Obtiene evasión a nivel 3 y evasión mejorada a nivel 11.
features_gained.description_en: Gains evasion at 3rd level and improved evasion at 11th level.

features_gained.name: Tenuous Threat (Su)
features_gained.description_es: El primer impacto exitoso del día contra un oponente no estudiado provoca una salvación de Voluntad o aplica el efecto de studied strike.
features_gained.description_en: The first successful hit per day against a non-studied opponent triggers a Will save or applies the studied strike effect.

features_gained.name: Hide in Plain Sight (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7 puede usar Sigilo siendo observado, siempre que el observador esté dentro del rango de Inattention Blindness.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level can use Stealth while observed, as long as the observer is within Inattention Blindness range.

mastermind_investigator.name: Mastermind
mastermind_investigator.description_es: Investigador manipulador entre bastidores que prepara aliados con sus rangos de habilidad, defiende contra ataques y rechaza adivinación mental.
mastermind_investigator.description_en: A behind-the-scenes manipulator investigator who prepares allies with his skill ranks, defends against attacks and rejects mind-reading divination.

features_gained.name: Mastermind's Inspiration (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Permite usar inspiración en chequeos de Diplomacia e Intimidar sin gastar usos, pero impide usarla para Lingüística o Saber Mágico.
features_gained.description_en: Allows using inspiration on Diplomacy and Intimidate checks without expending uses, but prevents using it for Linguistics or Spellcraft.

features_gained.name: A Quiet Word (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Tras 10 minutos preparando a un aliado, este puede usar los rangos de habilidad del mente maestra en un chequeo de Diplomacia o Intimidar dentro de 24 horas. Usos crecen con el nivel; a nivel 12 expande a más habilidades.
features_gained.description_en: After 10 minutes preparing an ally, that ally can use the mastermind's skill ranks for one Diplomacy or Intimidate check within 24 hours. Uses scale with level; at 12th expands to more skills.

features_gained.name: Mastermind Defense (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4, como acción inmediata gasta dos usos de inspiración para tirar el dado de inspiración como penalizador a un ataque entrante (1 uso si tiene combat inspiration).
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, as an immediate action expends two inspiration uses to roll the inspiration die as a penalty to an incoming attack (1 use if he has combat inspiration).

features_gained.name: Impregnable Mind (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 9 obtiene inmunidad a adivinaciones que permitan salvación y puede pensar en cualquier idioma que conozca para impedir lectura de pensamientos a menos que los oponentes conozcan todos sus idiomas.
features_gained.description_en: At 9th level gains immunity to divination effects allowing saves and can think in any language he speaks to prevent mind-reading unless opponents know all his languages.

psychic_detective.name: Psychic Detective
psychic_detective.description_es: Investigador con afinidad psíquica que reemplaza su alquimia por lanzamiento de conjuros psíquicos, ganando resistencias mentales y un toque de las amplificaciones frénicas del psíquico.
psychic_detective.description_en: An investigator with psychic affinity who replaces his alchemy with psychic spellcasting, gaining mental resistances and a touch of the psychic's phrenic amplifications.

features_gained.name: Spells
features_gained.description_es: Lanza conjuros psíquicos de la lista del psíquico (hasta 6º nivel) más conjuros de detective: detect alignment, find traps, calm spirit, daylight, modify memory, banishment, moment of prescience y greater scrying. Usa Inteligencia para lanzamiento.
features_gained.description_en: Casts psychic spells from the psychic class list (up to 6th level) plus detective spells: detect alignment, find traps, calm spirit, daylight, modify memory, banishment, moment of prescience and greater scrying. Uses Intelligence for casting.

features_gained.name: Psychic Meddler (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Bono a salvaciones contra efectos psíquicos: +1 a nivel 2, escalando hasta +6 a nivel 17. A nivel 5, suma la mitad del bono a chequeos de disipar contra efectos psíquicos.
features_gained.description_en: Save bonus against psychic effects: +1 at 2nd, scaling to +6 at 17th. At 5th level, adds half this bonus to dispel checks against psychic effects.

features_gained.name: Phrenic Dabbler (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 recibe un fondo común de puntos frénicos igual a la mitad del nivel y una amplificación frénica, imitando habilidades del psíquico. No puede elegir descubrimientos de alquimista pero puede tomar Expanded Phrenic Pool como descubrimiento.
