features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level gains a phrenic point pool equal to half class level and one phrenic amplification, mimicking psychic features. Cannot choose alchemist discoveries but may take Expanded Phrenic Pool as a discovery.

cult_hunter.name: Cult Hunter
cult_hunter.description_es: Investigador especializado en perseguir cultos heréticos y entidades extraplanares, sacrificando trampas y resistencia al veneno por estudio de cultos, defensas contra emboscadas y compulsiones.
cult_hunter.description_en: An investigator specialized in hunting heretical cults and extraplanar entities, trading traps and poison resistance for cult study, ambush defenses and compulsion resistance.

features_gained.name: Sense Madness (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1 añade un bono igual a la mitad del nivel de clase (mín +1) a chequeos de Averiguar Intenciones para detectar locura.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level adds a bonus equal to half class level (min +1) on Sense Motive checks to detect insanity.

features_gained.name: Purify Mind and Body (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2 otorga bonos a salvaciones contra compulsiones y venenos; a nivel 11 puede repetir las fallidas.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level grants bonuses on saves vs. compulsions and poisons; at 11th can reroll failures.

features_gained.name: Student of the Beyond (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2, bono en chequeos de Conocimiento y Saber Mágico relacionados con fenómenos planares.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level, bonus on Knowledge and Spellcraft checks related to planar phenomena.

features_gained.name: Ambush Defense (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, bono de perspicacia a CA y salvaciones de Reflejos durante asaltos sorpresa.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, insight bonus to AC and Reflex saves during surprise rounds.

features_gained.name: Cultic Study (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 estudia deidades/religiones específicas para ganar bonos en múltiples chequeos de habilidad relacionados.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level studies specific deities/religions for bonuses on multiple related skill checks.

features_gained.name: Summoning Sense (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7 obtiene esquiva sobrenatural (uncanny dodge) contra criaturas convocadas.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level gains uncanny dodge against summoned creatures.

features_gained.name: Extraplanar Expulsion (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 13, aptitud sobrenatural de disipación de magia sacrificando extractos.
features_gained.description_en: At 13th level, spell-like dispel ability by sacrificing extracts.

cryptid_scholar.name: Cryptid Scholar
cryptid_scholar.description_es: Investigador erudito en monstruos esquivos y críptidos, cuya habilidad para identificar criaturas inspira directamente a sus aliados con bonos defensivos y daño extra.
cryptid_scholar.description_en: An investigator scholar of elusive monsters and cryptids whose monster identification skill directly inspires allies with defensive bonuses and extra damage.

features_gained.name: Intuitive Monster Lore (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Añade su modificador de Sabiduría a chequeos de Conocimiento para identificar habilidades de criaturas. A nivel 5 puede tomar 10 incluso amenazado o distraído.
features_gained.description_en: Adds his Wisdom modifier to Knowledge checks for identifying creature abilities. At 5th level can take 10 even when threatened or distracted.

features_gained.name: Opportune Advice (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4, tras identificar habilidades de un monstruo, otorga a aliados cercanos +1 perspicacia a CA y salvaciones contra habilidades extraordinarias, sobrenaturales y semejantes a conjuros de ese tipo de criatura. Escala a +5 a nivel 20.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, after identifying a monster's abilities, grants nearby allies +1 insight to AC and saves vs. extraordinary, supernatural and spell-like abilities from that creature type. Scales to +5 at 20th.

features_gained.name: Knowledgeable Strike (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 puede terminar opportune advice para otorgar a los aliados daño extra en sus ataques. Comienza en 1d6 y aumenta a 5d6 a nivel 20. Daño basado en precisión sujeto a inmunidades a ataque furtivo.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level can end opportune advice to grant allies extra damage on attacks. Starts at 1d6 and increases to 5d6 at 20th level. Precision damage subject to sneak attack immunities.

kinetic_chirurgeon.name: Kinetic Chirurgeon
kinetic_chirurgeon.description_es: Cinético sanador que cambia infusiones y metacinesia destructivas por una versión expandida de kinetic healer, mercedes de paladín aplicables a curación y mayor capacidad de tampón interno.
kinetic_chirurgeon.description_en: A healer kineticist who trades destructive infusions and metakinesis for an expanded kinetic healer, paladin mercies applied to healing and greater internal buffer capacity.

features_gained.name: Kinetic Chirurgery (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Debe elegir éter o agua como elemento principal. A nivel 1 obtiene kinetic healer como aptitud salvaje gratuita. A partir de nivel 3 (cada 2 niveles) elige una merced de paladín que puede aplicar al curar.
features_gained.description_en: Must choose aether or water as primary element. At 1st level gains kinetic healer as a bonus wild talent. From 3rd level (every 2 levels) selects a paladin mercy applicable when healing.

features_gained.name: Metahealer (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Reemplaza metacinesia: a nivel 5 tira un dado adicional al curar; nivel 9 puede revivir aliados muertos en el último asalto; nivel 11 dos dados extra; nivel 13 puede usar kinetic healer en sí mismo como acción rápida; nivel 17 cura dos objetivos a la vez o tres dados extra.
features_gained.description_en: Replaces metakinesis: at 5th rolls one extra die when healing; 9th can revive allies dead within 1 round; 11th two extra dice; 13th can use kinetic healer on himself as a swift action; 17th heals two targets at once or three extra dice.

features_gained.name: Healing Buffer (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Su tampón interno tiene el doble del tamaño máximo habitual cuando acepta quemado para usar kinetic healer.
features_gained.description_en: His internal buffer has double the usual maximum size when accepting burn for kinetic healer.

elemental_ascetic.name: Elemental Ascetic
elemental_ascetic.description_es: Cinético monástico que combina disciplina marcial con poderes elementales, usa Sabiduría en lugar de Constitución, ataca con flurry of blows imbuido de elementos y gana CA sin armadura.
elemental_ascetic.description_en: A monastic kineticist who combines martial discipline with elemental powers, uses Wisdom instead of Constitution, attacks with element-imbued flurry of blows and gains unarmored AC.

features_gained.name: Elemental Flurry (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1 obtiene Improved Unarmed Strike y la infusión de forma kinetic fist gratis (cuesta 0 quemado en lugar de 1). Permite flurry of blows con kinetic fist, restringido a ataques de puño y sin armadura.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level gains Improved Unarmed Strike bonus feat and the kinetic fist form infusion at 0 burn (instead of 1). Enables flurry of blows with kinetic fist, restricted to fist attacks while unarmored.

features_gained.name: Elemental Wisdom (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Sustituye Sabiduría por Constitución para determinar CD, duraciones y chequeos de concentración de aptitudes salvajes.
features_gained.description_en: Substitutes Wisdom for Constitution when determining wild talent DCs, durations and concentration checks.

features_gained.name: AC Bonus (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2 añade su bono de Sabiduría a la CA y CMD sin armadura, +1 cada 4 niveles más allá del 2º.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level adds his Wisdom bonus to AC and CMD when unarmored, +1 per 4 levels beyond 2nd.

features_gained.name: Powerful Fist (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A niveles 5, 9 y 13 acepta quemado adicional para aumentar la progresión de dados de daño de kinetic fist (d6 → d8 → d10 → d12).
features_gained.description_en: At 5th, 9th and 13th levels accepts additional burn to increase kinetic fist damage dice progression (d6 → d8 → d10 → d12).

dark_elementalist.name: Dark Elementalist
dark_elementalist.description_es: Cinético maligno que sacrifica su tampón interno y usa Inteligencia en lugar de Constitución, alimentando su poder con almas cosechadas de criaturas sintientes recién muertas.
dark_elementalist.description_en: An evil kineticist who sacrifices his internal buffer and uses Intelligence instead of Constitution, fueling his power with souls harvested from recently slain sentient creatures.

features_gained.name: Dark Studies
features_gained.description_es: Salvación de Voluntad alta (2 + 1/2 nivel); Reflejos y Fortaleza pasan a 1/3 nivel. Todos los Conocimientos como habilidades de clase. Usa Inteligencia en lugar de Constitución para daño, CD y efectos relacionados de aptitudes salvajes.
features_gained.description_en: Will save becomes 2 + 1/2 level; Reflex and Fortitude become 1/3 level. All Knowledge skills as class skills. Uses Intelligence instead of Constitution for wild talent damage, DCs and related effects.

features_gained.name: Soul Power
features_gained.description_es: No puede aceptar más de 3 puntos de quemado totales. Puede cosechar almas de criaturas sintientes (CR ≥ nivel) muertas en el último minuto, reduciendo en 1 su quemado actual. Usos diarios = mod. de Inteligencia. Las almas cosechadas no pueden resucitarse normalmente; a niveles 6/11/16 escalan los castigos.
features_gained.description_en: Cannot accept more than 3 burn total. Can harvest souls from sentient creatures (CR ≥ character level) dead within the past minute, reducing current burn by 1. Daily uses = Int modifier. Harvested souls cannot be normally resurrected; at 6th/11th/16th increasing penalties apply.

features_gained.name: Modified Elemental Overflow
features_gained.description_es: Recibe bonos de elemental overflow basados en almas cosechadas en el día en lugar de quemado actual. No gana bonos de tamaño ni resistencia a críticos/ataque furtivo.
features_gained.description_en: Gains elemental overflow bonuses based on souls harvested that day instead of current burn. Does not gain size bonuses or critical/sneak attack resistance.

blood_kineticist.name: Blood Kineticist
blood_kineticist.description_es: Cinético de agua que manipula la sangre dentro de las criaturas, sacrificando infusiones y aptitudes utilitarias por habilidades hemomanticas como provocar sangrado, dolor y vampirismo.
blood_kineticist.description_en: A water kineticist who manipulates blood within creatures, trading infusions and utility talents for hemomantic abilities like inflicting bleed, pain and vampirism.

features_gained.name: Blood Focus / Wrack (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Debe elegir agua como elemento principal; las infusiones solo funcionan en objetivos con sangre. Wrack manipula la sangre causando la mitad del daño del blast (sin tipo, ignora RD); cuesta 0 quemado.
features_gained.description_en: Must choose water as primary element; infusions only work on targets with blood. Wrack manipulates blood dealing half blast damage (untyped, ignores DR); costs 0 burn.

features_gained.name: Bleeding Infusion
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5, infusión que causa 1 punto de daño por sangrado por dado del blast. Costo de quemado 2.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level, infusion causing 1 bleed damage per blast die. 2-burn cost.

features_gained.name: Blood Tell (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 6, aprende información a partir de muestras de sangre mediante blood biography; 0 quemado (1 quemado para acción estándar).
features_gained.description_en: At 6th level, learns information from blood samples via blood biography; 0 burn (1 burn for standard action).

features_gained.name: Blood Blast / Blood Throw
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 8, blast compuesto físico contundente por 2 quemado; reemplaza inicialmente el blast simple de frío. También gana foe throw para blasts de agua/sangre.
features_gained.description_en: At 8th level, bludgeoning physical composite blast for 2 burn; initially replaces the cold simple blast. Also gains foe throw infusion for water/blood blasts.

features_gained.name: Gut-Wrenching Infusion
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 9, infusión que causa la condición sickened si falla la salvación; costo 3 quemado.
features_gained.description_en: At 9th level, infusion that sickens target on a failed save; 3-burn cost.

features_gained.name: Vampiric Infusion
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11, infusión que activa kinetic healer al impactar exitosamente; costo 3 quemado.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level, infusion that triggers kinetic healer on a successful hit; 3-burn cost.

features_gained.name: Blood Mastery (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 20 deja de envejecer y se vuelve inmune a sangrado, veneno, enfermedad y a las condiciones sickened y nauseated.
features_gained.description_en: At 20th level stops aging and becomes immune to bleed, poison, disease and the sickened and nauseated conditions.

elemental_annihilator.name: Elemental Annihilator
elemental_annihilator.description_es: Cinético guerrero puro que renuncia casi por completo a las aptitudes utilitarias y a las infusiones a cambio de devastadores ataques cuerpo a cuerpo o a distancia, dotes de combate y devastación masiva final.
elemental_annihilator.description_en: A pure warrior kineticist who nearly entirely forgoes utility talents and infusions in exchange for devastating melee or ranged strikes, combat feats and massive endgame devastation.

features_gained.name: Devastating Infusion
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1, ataque cuerpo a cuerpo o a distancia que causa 1d8 + modificador de Constitución de daño; compatible con Vital Strike.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level, melee or ranged attack dealing 1d8 + Constitution modifier damage; compatible with Vital Strike.

features_gained.name: Dampened Versatility
features_gained.description_es: No puede adquirir aptitudes salvajes utilitarias en ningún momento.
features_gained.description_en: Cannot acquire utility wild talents at any point.

features_gained.name: Bonus Combat Feats
features_gained.description_es: Gana dotes de combate adicionales a niveles 2, 8, 10, 14 y 18 de una lista que incluye Power Attack, Weapon Specialization y Two-Weapon Fighting.
features_gained.description_en: Gains bonus combat feats at levels 2, 8, 10, 14 and 18 from a list including Power Attack, Weapon Specialization and Two-Weapon Fighting.

features_gained.name: Increased Range
features_gained.description_es: Obtiene automáticamente las infusiones extended range (nivel 3) y extreme range (nivel 9).
features_gained.description_en: Automatically gains the extended range (3rd) and extreme range (9th) infusions.

features_gained.name: Ever-Present Threat
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 amenaza a todos los enemigos dentro de su alcance natural; puede formar la infusión devastadora cuerpo a cuerpo como ataque de oportunidad.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level threatens all enemies within natural reach; can form melee devastating infusion as an attack of opportunity.

features_gained.name: Blast Training
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5, +1 al ataque y daño con devastating infusion, aumentando cada 4 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level, +1 on attack and damage rolls with devastating infusion, increasing every 4 levels.

features_gained.name: Flurry of Devastation
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 6 puede realizar acciones de ataque completo con múltiples infusiones devastadoras, hasta 120 pies de distancia.
features_gained.description_en: At 6th level can perform full-attack actions with multiple devastating infusions, up to 120 feet away.

features_gained.name: Omnicide
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 20 desencadena un blast compuesto físico único que causa 50d6+50 de daño total a través de cinco tipos de daño.
features_gained.description_en: At 20th level unleashes a unique physical composite blast dealing 50d6+50 total damage across five damage types.

kensai.name: Kensai
kensai.description_es: Maestro espadachin que renuncia a la armadura para canalizar su pool arcano en un solo arma elegida, ganando defensa basada en Destreza y golpes precisos sobrenaturales.
kensai.description_en: A weapon-master who eschews armor to channel his arcane pool through a single chosen weapon, gaining Dexterity-based defense and supernaturally precise strikes.

features_gained.name: Canny Defense (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Anade el bono de Inteligencia a la CA al empunar el arma elegida sin armadura.
features_gained.description_en: Adds Intelligence bonus to AC when wielding the chosen weapon without armor.

features_gained.name: Weapon Focus (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Gana Soltura con un Arma con su arma elegida como dote extra a nivel 1.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Weapon Focus with chosen weapon as a bonus feat at 1st level.

features_gained.name: Perfect Strike (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Gasta puntos de pool arcano para maximizar el dano del arma elegida.
features_gained.description_en: Spends arcane pool points to maximize chosen weapon's damage.

features_gained.name: Iaijutsu (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Anade Inteligencia a la iniciativa y puede hacer ataques de oportunidad estando desprevenido.
features_gained.description_en: Adds Intelligence to initiative and may make attacks of opportunity while flat-footed.

features_gained.name: Critical Perfection (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Anade el modificador de Inteligencia a las tiradas de confirmacion de critico con el arma elegida.
features_gained.description_en: Adds Intelligence modifier to critical confirmation rolls with chosen weapon.

features_gained.name: Iaijutsu Master (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Sus tiradas de iniciativa siempre son un 20 natural y nunca esta sorprendido.
features_gained.description_en: Initiative rolls are always natural 20 and is never surprised.

bladebound.name: Bladebound
bladebound.description_es: Magus vinculado a una hoja inteligente y sintiente llamada Hoja Negra, que crece en poder pero exige fuerza de voluntad para dominarla.
bladebound.description_en: A magus bonded to a sentient, intelligent weapon called a Black Blade, which grows in power but demands willpower to master.

features_gained.name: Black Blade (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Recibe una hoja inteligente que actua como vinculo arcano y gana poder con los niveles.
features_gained.description_en: Gains a sentient blade that serves as arcane bond and grows in power with levels.

features_gained.name: Black Blade Strike (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Gasta puntos de pool arcano para anadir dano extra al ataque de la hoja.
features_gained.description_en: Spends arcane pool points to add extra damage to the blade's strike.

features_gained.name: Energy Attunement (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5, la Hoja Negra puede convertir el dano del arma a un tipo de energia.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level, the Black Blade can convert weapon damage to an energy type.

features_gained.name: Teleport Blade (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 9 puede teleportar su Hoja Negra a su mano desde cualquier distancia.
features_gained.description_en: At 9th level can teleport his Black Blade to hand from any distance.

features_gained.name: Life Drinker (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 19, la Hoja Negra otorga niveles negativos al impactar.
features_gained.description_en: At 19th level, the Black Blade bestows negative levels on hit.

myrmidarch.name: Myrmidarch
myrmidarch.description_es: Magus marcial enfocado en armas a distancia y entrenamiento de combatiente, capaz de canalizar conjuros a traves de armas a distancia a costa de menos magia.
myrmidarch.description_en: A martial-focused magus emphasizing ranged weapons and fighter training, able to channel spells through ranged weapons at the cost of fewer spells.

features_gained.name: Diminished Spellcasting
features_gained.description_es: Lanza un conjuro menos por dia de cada nivel que un magus normal.
features_gained.description_en: Casts one fewer spell per day of each level than a normal magus.

features_gained.name: Ranged Spellstrike (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 puede entregar conjuros de toque a traves de armas a distancia.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level can deliver touch spells through ranged weapons.

features_gained.name: Weapon Training (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 6 gana entrenamiento de combatiente con un grupo de armas, ampliandose cada 6 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 6th level gains fighter weapon training with a weapon group, expanding every 6 levels.

features_gained.name: Fighter Training (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7 sus niveles de magus cuentan como niveles de combatiente para requisitos de dotes.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level his magus levels count as fighter levels for feat prerequisites.

features_gained.name: Armor Training (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 8 reduce las penalizaciones por armadura como un combatiente.
features_gained.description_en: At 8th level reduces armor penalties like a fighter.

features_gained.name: Armor Mastery (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 20 obtiene RD 5/- al llevar armadura.
features_gained.description_en: At 20th level gains DR 5/- while wearing armor.

staff_magus.name: Staff Magus
staff_magus.description_es: Magus que se especializa en el baston como arma y foco magico, defendiendose con el y canalizando bastones magicos.
staff_magus.description_en: A magus specializing in the quarterstaff as both weapon and magical focus, defending with it and channeling magic staves.

features_gained.name: Quarterstaff Master (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Recibe Soltura con el Arma (baston) y puede lanzar conjuros con armadura ligera sin fallo magico.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Weapon Focus (quarterstaff) and can cast spells with light armor without arcane spell failure.

features_gained.name: Quarterstaff Defense (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7 obtiene un bono de escudo a la CA igual al bono de potenciacion del baston.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level gains a shield bonus to AC equal to the quarterstaff's enhancement bonus.

features_gained.name: Staff Weapon (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 10 puede empunar bastones magicos como armas y restaurar sus cargas con puntos del pool arcano.
features_gained.description_en: At 10th level can wield magical staves as weapons and restore their charges with arcane pool points.

skirnir.name: Skirnir
skirnir.description_es: Magus chelaxiano que vincula su pool arcano a un escudo, lanzando conjuros y combatiendo con un escudo magico animado.
skirnir.description_en: A Chelaxian magus who bonds his arcane pool to a shield, casting spells and fighting with an animated magical shield.

features_gained.name: Diminished Spellcasting
features_gained.description_es: Lanza un conjuro menos por dia de cada nivel que un magus normal.
features_gained.description_en: Casts one fewer spell per day of each level than a normal magus.

features_gained.name: Sorcerous Shield (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Competente con todos los escudos y no sufre fallo magico arcano por usarlos.
features_gained.description_en: Proficient with all shields and suffers no arcane spell failure for using them.

features_gained.name: Arcane Bond (Shield)
features_gained.description_es: Se vincula a un escudo en lugar de un familiar y puede aplicarle propiedades magicas.
features_gained.description_en: Bonds with a shield instead of a familiar and can apply magical properties to it.

features_gained.name: Spellshield (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7 puede almacenar conjuros en su escudo, liberandolos al golpear con el.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level can store spells in his shield, releasing them when bashing with it.

features_gained.name: Greater Spellshield (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 16 puede activar conjuros almacenados como accion inmediata al ser impactado.
features_gained.description_en: At 16th level can trigger stored spells as an immediate action when struck.

kami_medium.name: Kami Medium
kami_medium.description_es: Medium tianse que canaliza espiritus kami de la naturaleza en lugar de leyendas, atado por tabues naturales y guiado por familiares de origami.
kami_medium.description_en: A Tian medium who channels nature kami spirits instead of legends, bound by natural taboos and guided by origami familiars.

features_gained.name: Kami Channeler (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Canaliza espiritus de la naturaleza atados a localizaciones especificas en lugar de leyendas.
features_gained.description_en: Channels nature spirits bound to specific locations instead of legendary spirits.

features_gained.name: Natural Taboo (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Recibe el tabu del hierofante: debe reverenciar la naturaleza y evitar armaduras de metal.
features_gained.description_en: Gains a hierophant taboo requiring reverence of nature and avoiding metal armor.

features_gained.name: Ofuda (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Usa pergaminos de oraciones cargados psiquicamente como componentes para conjuros.
features_gained.description_en: Uses psychically charged prayer scrolls as spell components.

features_gained.name: Shikigami (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 crea un familiar de origami animal que alberga un kami menor.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level creates an origami animal familiar housing a minor kami.

features_gained.name: Ask the Kami (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 13 puede usar Comunion con la naturaleza para consultar a los kami locales.
features_gained.description_en: At 13th level can use commune with nature to consult local kami.

relic_channeler.name: Relic Channeler
relic_channeler.description_es: Medium que vincula sus espiritus a reliquias fisicas tangibles, ganando bonos permanentes a costa de la flexibilidad del medium estandar.
relic_channeler.description_en: A medium who binds his spirits to tangible physical relics, gaining permanent bonuses at the cost of standard medium flexibility.

features_gained.name: Relics (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Comienza con una reliquia por cada una de las seis leyendas espirituales que canaliza.
features_gained.description_en: Begins with one relic for each of the six spirit legends he channels.

features_gained.name: Powerful Bond (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Otorga selecciones mejoradas de dotes y habilidades a traves de los poderes espirituales.
features_gained.description_en: Grants enhanced feat and skill selections across spirit powers.

features_gained.name: Object Reading (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 obtiene la habilidad lectura de objetos del occultist usando su nivel de medium.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level gains the occultist's object reading using medium level.

features_gained.name: Apport Relic (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5 puede invocar sus reliquias una vez al dia desde cualquier distancia cercana.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level can summon his relics once daily from short distances.

features_gained.name: Connection Specialty (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7 obtiene canalizacion de conexion con requisitos de familiaridad.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level gains connection channel with familiarity requirements.

reanimated_medium.name: Reanimated Medium
reanimated_medium.description_es: Alma errante que ha regresado para poseer su propio cuerpo revivido, sin tabues pero limitada por mecanicas de influencia invertidas.
reanimated_medium.description_en: A departed soul who has returned to possess its own revived body, free of taboos but limited by inverted influence mechanics.

features_gained.name: Channel Self (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Posee su propio cuerpo revivido, ganando hasta 6 puntos de influencia diarios con mecanicas invertidas.
features_gained.description_en: Possesses his own revived body, gaining up to 6 influence points daily with inverted mechanics.

features_gained.name: Ease Passage (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Solo recibe 1 nivel negativo en lugar de 2 al ser objetivo de Resucitar a los muertos.
features_gained.description_en: Takes only 1 negative level instead of 2 from raise dead.

features_gained.name: Lingering Spirit (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Su espiritu persiste 1 asalto tras la muerte si gasta 1 influencia, permitiendo ser curado.
features_gained.description_en: His spirit persists 1 round post-death if 1 influence is spent, allowing healing.

features_gained.name: Spirit Warding (Su)
features_gained.description_es: +4 a salvaciones contra posesion y efectos de muerte; inmunidad a nivel 18.
features_gained.description_en: +4 bonus on saves against possession and death effects; immunity at 18th level.

features_gained.name: Living Legend (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Sus aliados pueden hacer seances para canalizarlo y acceder a sus habilidades.
features_gained.description_en: Allies can perform seances to channel the medium and access his abilities.

spirit_eater.name: Spirit Eater
spirit_eater.description_es: Medium que devora los espiritus de incorporeos derrotados para ganar bonos temporales y puntos de golpe.
spirit_eater.description_en: A medium who consumes the spirits of defeated incorporeal creatures to gain temporary bonuses and hit points.

features_gained.name: Ectoplasmic Strikes (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, sus ataques se tratan como si tuvieran la propiedad toque fantasmal.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, his attacks are treated as having the ghost touch property.

features_gained.name: Consume Spirit (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7 absorbe criaturas incorporeas derrotadas para bonos a ataques, salvaciones o habilidades, mas PG temporales.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level absorbs defeated incorporeal creatures for bonuses to attack, saves or skills, plus temporary HP.

voice_of_the_void.name: Voice of the Void
voice_of_the_void.description_es: Medium que canaliza entidades alienigenas del Lejano Universo, ganando poder superior pero sufriendo penalizaciones a Sabiduria y confusion.
voice_of_the_void.description_en: A medium who channels alien entities from the Dark Tapestry, gaining superior power but suffering Wisdom penalties and confusion.

features_gained.name: Emissary (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Reemplaza el espiritu estandar con entidades alienigenas que ofrecen mayor poder pero penalizan salvaciones de Voluntad y Sabiduria.
features_gained.description_en: Replaces standard spirit with alien entities offering greater power but penalties to Will saves and Wisdom.

features_gained.name: Surge of the Void (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Permite oleadas de espiritu adicionales sin influencia aceptando 1 asalto de confusion.
features_gained.description_en: Allows additional spirit surges without influence by accepting 1 round of confusion.

features_gained.name: Blasphemy (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Tabues alienigenas modificados: -1 a chequeos de Carisma pero aumenta el dado de oleada de espiritu de 1d6 a 1d8.
features_gained.description_en: Modified alien taboos imposing -1 Cha check penalty but increasing spirit surge die from 1d6 to 1d8.

features_gained.name: Void Channeler (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 inflige dano del vacio en area de 30 pies; criaturas mas debiles tambien quedan confusas.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level deals void damage in a 30-foot area; weaker creatures are also confused.

vexing_daredevil.name: Vexing Daredevil
vexing_daredevil.description_es: Mesmerista acrobatico que combina fintas hipnoticas con maniobras de combate desconcertantes para confundir y dominar a sus oponentes.
vexing_daredevil.description_en: An acrobatic mesmerist who combines hypnotic feinting with bewildering combat maneuvers to confound and dominate opponents.

features_gained.name: Acrobatics & Martial Proficiency
features_gained.description_es: Anade Acrobacias como habilidad de clase y obtiene competencia con armas marciales.
features_gained.description_en: Adds Acrobatics as class skill and gains martial weapon proficiency.

features_gained.name: Dazzling Feint (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, finta con multiples opciones de combate que se expanden cada 4 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, feints with multiple combat options that expand every 4 levels.

features_gained.name: Bonus Feats
features_gained.description_es: Recibe Finta Mejorada, Finta Mayor, Finta Mesmerica Mayor como dotes extra.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Improved Feint, Greater Feint, and Greater Mesmerizing Feint as bonus feats.

features_gained.name: Shimmering Body (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11 puede otorgarse ocultacion como habilidad similar a conjuro.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level can grant himself concealment as a spell-like ability.

projectionist.name: Projectionist
projectionist.description_es: Mesmerista que proyecta su consciencia en objetos a distancia, espiando y atacando desde anfitriones inanimados.
projectionist.description_en: A mesmerist who projects his consciousness into distant objects, spying and attacking from inanimate hosts.

features_gained.name: Mandatory Possession Spells
features_gained.description_es: Aprende automaticamente entrar en imagen, posesion menor de objeto, posesion al cabalgar y posesion de objeto.
features_gained.description_en: Automatically learns enter image, lesser object possession, riding possession, and object possession.

features_gained.name: Implant Consciousness (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Crea un vinculo psiquico con un objeto con su semejanza para proyectar su consciencia a cualquier distancia.
features_gained.description_en: Creates a psychic link with an object bearing his likeness to project consciousness any distance.

features_gained.name: Hidden Presence (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Recibe la dote Presencia Oculta sin requisitos cuando posee objetos o criaturas.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Hidden Presence feat without prerequisites when possessing objects or creatures.

eyebiter.name: Eyebiter
eyebiter.description_es: Mesmerista enfocado en la mirada que arranca uno de sus ojos como familiar volador, lanzando ataques oculares cegadores.
eyebiter.description_en: A gaze-focused mesmerist who plucks out an eye as a flying familiar, casting blinding ocular attacks.

features_gained.name: Eyeball Familiar (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Un ojo sintiente que se separa y vuela independientemente con maniobrabilidad perfecta.
features_gained.description_en: A sentient eye that detaches and flies independently with perfect maneuverability.

features_gained.name: Ocular Occlusion (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Ataque de toque o a distancia con cuatro efectos progresivos: vision nublada, ceguera, horror sin ojos y enfermedad magica.
features_gained.description_en: Touch or ranged attack with four progressive effects: clouded vision, blindness, eyeless horror, and spellblight.

features_gained.name: Staring Eye (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Puede ver a traves del ojo familiar o usar ataques de mirada gastando trucos mesmericos.
features_gained.description_en: Can see through eyeball familiar or use gaze attacks by spending mesmerist tricks.

features_gained.name: Omnivisual (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11 obtiene vision en todas direcciones y no puede ser flanqueado mientras el ojo este cerca.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level gains all-around vision and cannot be flanked while the eyeball is nearby.

enigma.name: Enigma
enigma.description_es: Mesmerista sigiloso e indetectable que se desvanece psiquicamente y traspasa aflicciones mediante ataques furtivos.
enigma.description_en: A stealthy, undetectable mesmerist who psychically vanishes and transfers afflictions through sneak attacks.

features_gained.name: Solipsism (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Efecto de invisibilidad/ocultacion psiquica integrado con la mirada hipnotica.
features_gained.description_en: Psychic invisibility/concealment integrated with hypnotic stare.

features_gained.name: Veiled Steps (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Bono a Sigilo igual a 1/4 del nivel de mesmerista (minimo +1).
features_gained.description_en: Stealth bonus equal to 1/4 mesmerist level (minimum +1).

features_gained.name: Enigmatic Stare (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Penalizacion -4 a Avistar para detectarlo (-6 a nivel 8).
features_gained.description_en: -4 Perception penalty to notice him (-6 at 8th level).

features_gained.name: Sneak Attack
features_gained.description_es: Dano de ataque furtivo estilo picaro: +1d6 a nivel 5, +1d6 cada 4 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: Rogue-style sneak attack: +1d6 at 5th level, +1d6 every 4 levels.

features_gained.name: Transfer Affliction (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Transfiere condiciones daninas a una criatura tocada con tirada de Voluntad.
features_gained.description_en: Transfers harmful conditions to a touched creature via Will save.

dreamstalker.name: Dreamstalker
dreamstalker.description_es: Mesmerista que caza dentro de los suenos, mezclando trucos hipnoticos con embrujos de bruja relacionados al sueno y la pesadilla.
dreamstalker.description_en: A mesmerist who hunts within dreams, mixing hypnotic tricks with witch hexes related to sleep and nightmare.

features_gained.name: Dreams of Pain (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Su mirada dolorosa inflige dano no letal en lugar de letal.
features_gained.description_en: His painful stare deals nonlethal damage instead of lethal.

features_gained.name: Somnomancer (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Acceso a embrujos de bruja (sopor, pesadilla, vision, sopor eterno) y conjuros de sueno.
features_gained.description_en: Access to witch hexes (slumber, nightmare, vision, eternal slumber) and sleep spells.

features_gained.name: Sleepless (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Inmune a efectos de sueno y bono basado en Carisma a salvaciones contra fatiga/agotamiento.
features_gained.description_en: Immune to sleep effects and Cha-based bonus to saves vs fatigue/exhaustion.

features_gained.name: Dreamwalker (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Trata los paisajes oniricos como terreno favorecido y a las criaturas de sueno como enemigos predilectos.
features_gained.description_en: Treats dreamscapes as favored terrain and dream creatures as favored enemies.

features_gained.name: Touch of Night (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Curacion modificada que elimina condiciones de sueno/fatiga en lugar de emociones.
features_gained.description_en: Modified healing removing sleep/fatigue conditions instead of emotions.

drunken_master.name: Drunken Master
drunken_master.description_es: Monje que bebe alcohol para canalizar ki temporal y golpes mas devastadores, intercambiando claridad mental por fuerza inebriada.
drunken_master.description_en: A monk who drinks alcohol to channel temporary ki and more devastating strikes, trading mental clarity for inebriated strength.

features_gained.name: Drunken Ki (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, beber una jarra de alcohol fuerte le otorga un punto de ki temporal.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, drinking a tankard of strong alcohol grants one temporary ki point.

features_gained.name: Drunken Strength (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Gasta ki para infligir 1d6-4d6 de dano extra en ataques cuerpo a cuerpo, escalando con el nivel.
features_gained.description_en: Spends ki to inflict 1d6-4d6 extra damage on melee attacks, scaling with level.

features_gained.name: Drunken Courage (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11 es inmune al miedo mientras tenga puntos de ki ebrio.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level immune to fear while possessing drunken ki points.

features_gained.name: Drunken Resilience (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Reduccion de dano 1/- a nivel 13, escalando hasta 3/- a nivel 19 mientras tenga ki ebrio.
features_gained.description_en: DR 1/- at 13th, scaling to 3/- at 19th while possessing drunken ki.

features_gained.name: Firewater Breath (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 19 gasta 4 puntos de ki para exhalar un cono de fuego de 30 pies que inflige 20d6.
features_gained.description_en: At 19th level spends 4 ki to breathe a 30-foot cone of fire dealing 20d6.

hungry_ghost_monk.name: Hungry Ghost Monk
hungry_ghost_monk.description_es: Monje que roba ki y vida de sus enemigos al golpearlos, sacrificando defensas mentales por sustento vital.
hungry_ghost_monk.description_en: A monk who steals ki and life from his enemies upon striking them, sacrificing mental defenses for vital sustenance.

features_gained.name: Punishing Kick
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1 obtiene Patada Castigadora como dote extra incluso sin requisitos.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level gains Punishing Kick as a bonus feat even without prerequisites.

features_gained.name: Steal Ki (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5 recupera puntos de ki al confirmar criticos o reducir enemigos a 0 PG.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level replenishes ki points on confirmed critical hits or reducing enemies to 0 HP.

features_gained.name: Life Funnel (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7 cura PG iguales a su nivel de monje al confirmar criticos o derrotar enemigos vivos.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level heals HP equal to monk level on confirmed criticals or defeating living enemies.

features_gained.name: Life from a Stone (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11 puede robar ki/vida de cualquier tipo de criatura, no solo seres vivos.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level can steal ki/life from any creature type, not just living beings.

features_gained.name: Sipping Demon (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 13 gana 1 PG temporal cada vez que impacta un enemigo en cuerpo a cuerpo.
features_gained.description_en: At 13th level gains 1 temporary HP each time he hits an enemy in melee.

monk_of_the_four_winds.name: Monk of the Four Winds
monk_of_the_four_winds.description_es: Monje elemental que canaliza energias primordiales en sus golpes y aprende a manipular el tiempo, asumiendo un aspecto espiritual al alcanzar la maestria.
monk_of_the_four_winds.description_en: An elemental monk who channels primal energies through his strikes and learns to manipulate time, assuming a spirit aspect at mastery.

features_gained.name: Elemental Fist
features_gained.description_es: Recibe Puno Elemental como dote extra a nivel 1, con dano que escala cada cinco niveles.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Elemental Fist as bonus feat at 1st level, with scaling damage every five levels.

features_gained.name: Slow Time (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 12 gasta 6 puntos de ki para realizar tres acciones estandar en su turno.
features_gained.description_en: At 12th level spends 6 ki points for three standard actions per turn.

features_gained.name: Aspect Master (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 17 elige un aspecto espiritual (Carpa, Ki-Rin, Mono, Oni, Buho, Tigre) con habilidades unicas.
features_gained.description_en: At 17th level chooses a spirit aspect (Carp, Ki-Rin, Monkey, Oni, Owl, Tiger) with unique abilities.

features_gained.name: Immortality (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 20 deja de envejecer y se reencarna espontaneamente tras morir.
features_gained.description_en: At 20th level ceases aging and spontaneously reincarnates after death.

tetori.name: Tetori
tetori.description_es: Monje luchador especializado en presa y sumision, sacrificando movilidad por dominio total del agarre y bloqueo de polimorfias.
tetori.description_en: A grappling-specialized monk wrestler who sacrifices mobility for total mastery of grappling and polymorph negation.
features_removed: Tongue of the Sun and Moon (9)

features_gained.name: Graceful Grappler (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Tecnicas de presa elegantes: no provoca AdO al iniciar presa y mantiene Destreza en CA al apresar.
features_gained.description_en: Graceful grappling: doesn't provoke AoO when initiating grapple and keeps Dex in AC while grappling.

features_gained.name: Counter Grapple (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Respuestas defensivas para evitar y revertir intentos de presa enemigos.
features_gained.description_en: Defensive responses to evade and reverse enemy grapple attempts.

features_gained.name: Break Free (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Maniobras especiales para escapar de presas con bonos a chequeos de presa para liberarse.
features_gained.description_en: Special maneuvers to escape grapples with bonuses to break-free grapple checks.

features_gained.name: Inescapable Grasp (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Sus presas ignoran libertad de movimiento y otras protecciones de escape.
features_gained.description_en: His grapples ignore freedom of movement and other escape protections.

features_gained.name: Form Lock (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Niega cambios de forma y polimorfias en criaturas apresadas.
features_gained.description_en: Negates shapechange and polymorph effects on grappled creatures.

frozen_shadow.name: Frozen Shadow
frozen_shadow.description_es: Ninja de un clan septentrional especializado en supervivencia, rastreo y deteccion de ilusiones, cazando a sus victimas a traves de cualquier terreno.
frozen_shadow.description_en: A ninja of a northern clan specialized in survival, tracking, and illusion detection, hunting victims through any terrain.

features_gained.name: Survival class skill
features_gained.description_es: Anade Supervivencia como habilidad de clase en lugar de Diplomacia.
features_gained.description_en: Adds Survival as class skill instead of Diplomacy.

features_gained.name: Hardy Killer (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Gasta 1 punto de ki para los beneficios de soportar elementos; mecanicas de salto modificadas.
features_gained.description_en: Spends 1 ki point for endure elements benefits; altered jumping mechanics.

features_gained.name: Track Victim (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Bono a Supervivencia rastreando y a Avistar para ver disfraces; +2 Voluntad contra ilusiones de criaturas.
features_gained.description_en: Bonus to Survival tracking and Perception vs disguises; +2 Will saves vs creature illusions.

features_gained.name: Swift Tracker (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Rastrea a velocidad normal sin penalizacion; +4 a salvaciones de Voluntad contra ilusiones.
features_gained.description_en: Tracks at normal speed without penalty; +4 Will saves vs illusions.

hunting_serpent.name: Hunting Serpent
hunting_serpent.description_es: Ninja asesino implacable que marca a sus victimas para la muerte y las persigue sin descanso a traves de cualquier obstaculo.
hunting_serpent.description_en: A relentless ninja assassin who marks victims for death and pursues them tirelessly through any obstacle.

features_gained.name: Survival class skill
features_gained.description_es: Gana Supervivencia como habilidad de clase en lugar de Conocimiento (nobleza).
features_gained.description_en: Gains Survival as a class skill instead of Knowledge (nobility).

features_gained.name: Relentless Pursuit (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Bono a Diplomacia (recopilar informacion) y Supervivencia (rastrear), aumentando cada 3 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: Bonus to Diplomacy (gather information) and Survival (tracking), increasing every 3 levels.

features_gained.name: Death Mark (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Accion rapida para marcar objetivos de ataque furtivo, ganando bonos a ataque, dano y rastreo.
features_gained.description_en: Swift action to mark sneak attack targets, gaining bonuses to attack, damage, and tracking.

features_gained.name: Certain Demise (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: El dano de ataque furtivo se aplica al primer ataque de cada asalto contra blancos marcados.
features_gained.description_en: Sneak attack damage applies to the first attack each round against marked targets.

mask_of_the_living_god.name: Mask of the Living God
mask_of_the_living_god.description_es: Ninja al servicio de Razmir disfrazado de campesino comun, silenciando a herejes con magia divina y miradas amenazadoras.
mask_of_the_living_god.description_en: A Razmiran ninja disguised as a common peasant, silencing heretics with divine magic and intimidating gazes.

features_gained.name: Mask (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Mascara especial que debe llevarse para activar la mayoria de sus habilidades de clase.
features_gained.description_en: Special mask that must be worn for most class abilities to function.

features_gained.name: Undercover Faith (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Adopta una identidad mundana similar al talento muchos disfraces del vigilante.
features_gained.description_en: Adopts a mundane identity similar to vigilante's many guises talent.

features_gained.name: Expurgate (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Gasta ki para silenciar enemigos via efecto lengua trabada (nivel 2) o enmudecerlos 1d4 asaltos (nivel 6).
features_gained.description_en: Spends ki to silence foes via fumbletongue (2nd level) or mute them 1d4 rounds (6th level).

features_gained.name: Stern Gaze (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Bono moral a Intimidar y Sentir Motivacion igual a la mitad del nivel de ninja.
features_gained.description_en: Morale bonus on Intimidate and Sense Motive equal to half ninja level.

features_gained.name: Bola/Sap/Whip Proficiency
features_gained.description_es: Competente con bolas, cachiporras y latigos.
features_gained.description_en: Proficient with bolas, saps, and whips.

gunpowder_bombardier.name: Gunpowder Bombardier
gunpowder_bombardier.description_es: Ninja que combina sigilo con explosivos de polvora, sembrando bombas demoradas y enriqueciendo sus explosiones con condiciones daninas.
gunpowder_bombardier.description_en: A ninja combining stealth with gunpowder explosives, planting delayed bombs and enriching blasts with debilitating conditions.

features_gained.name: Gunpowder Bomb (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2 gasta ki para lanzar bombas explosivas que infligen 1d6 contundente en area de 10 pies.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level spends ki to throw explosive bombs dealing 1d6 bludgeoning in a 10-foot burst.

features_gained.name: Explosive Impairment (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 anade condiciones (deslumbrado, ensordecido, enredado, asustado) gastando ki extra.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level adds conditions (dazzled, deafened, entangled, shaken) by spending extra ki.

features_gained.name: Delayed Explosive (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 8 planta bombas que detonan tras un numero de asaltos hasta su nivel de ninja.
features_gained.description_en: At 8th level plants bombs that detonate after a number of rounds up to ninja level.

petal_ninja.name: Petal Ninja
petal_ninja.description_es: Ninja ghoran de un clan secreto que crea explosiones de petalos florales y se transforma en una nube insustancial de polen.
petal_ninja.description_en: A ghoran ninja of a secretive clan who creates bursts of flower petals and transforms into an insubstantial cloud of pollen.

features_gained.name: Heal class skill
features_gained.description_es: Anade Curar como habilidad de clase.
features_gained.description_en: Adds Heal as class skill.

features_gained.name: Blossom Shower (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2 crea un estallido de petalos en area de 15 pies que provoca varios efectos (ocultacion, deslumbrado, enfermo, fascinado, vacilante o nauseabundo).
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level creates a 15-foot burst of petals causing varied effects (concealment, dazzled, sickened, fascinated, staggered, nauseated).

features_gained.name: Burst of Blossoms (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 se transforma en una nube insustancial de flores hasta 1 asalto, ganando +4 a Sigilo.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level transforms into an insubstantial cloud of blossoms for up to 1 round, gaining +4 Stealth.

features_gained.name: Sundial (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 6 ajusta la luz ambiente en 30 pies gastando ki, durando 1 minuto.
features_gained.description_en: At 6th level adjusts ambient light within 30 feet by spending ki, lasting 1 minute.

geomancer.name: Geomancer
geomancer.description_es: Occultist que extrae poder de los terrenos naturales, almacenando foco mental en la tierra y otorgando bonos de dominio.
geomancer.description_en: An occultist who draws power from natural terrains, storing mental focus in the land and granting dominion bonuses.

features_gained.name: Geomantic Focus (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Almacena foco mental en el terreno en lugar de en implementos.
features_gained.description_en: Stores mental focus in terrain instead of in implements.

features_gained.name: Geomancy (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Otorga conjuros dependientes del terreno donde se encuentre.
features_gained.description_en: Grants spells dependent on the terrain he occupies.

features_gained.name: Survivalist (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Bono a chequeos de Supervivencia basado en el foco mental invertido.
features_gained.description_en: Bonus to Survival checks based on mental focus invested.

features_gained.name: Terrain Stride (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Aumento de velocidad de movimiento al recorrer terrenos elegidos.
features_gained.description_en: Increased movement speed in chosen terrains.

features_gained.name: Dominion (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Bonos morales a aliados en su area de dominio territorial.
features_gained.description_en: Morale bonuses to allies within his territorial dominion.

features_gained.name: Wall of Terrain (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Habilidad similar a conjuro para crear muros del terreno circundante.
features_gained.description_en: Spell-like ability to create walls from surrounding terrain.

reliquarian.name: Reliquarian
reliquarian.description_es: Occultist devoto que canaliza el poder divino a traves de reliquias sagradas, lanzando conjuros divinos y accediendo a un dominio de su deidad.
reliquarian.description_en: A devout occultist who channels divine power through sacred relics, casting divine spells and accessing a domain of his deity.

features_gained.name: Divine Spellcasting
features_gained.description_es: Sus conjuros usan componentes verbal y somatico en lugar de pensamiento y emocion.
features_gained.description_en: His spells use verbal/somatic components instead of thought/emotion.

features_gained.name: Wisdom-based Focus
features_gained.description_es: Sabiduria reemplaza a Inteligencia para foco mental y conjuros.
features_gained.description_en: Wisdom replaces Intelligence for mental focus and spellcasting.

features_gained.name: Domain (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Acceso a un dominio de su deidad con sus poderes y conjuros.
features_gained.description_en: Access to one domain from his deity with its powers and spells.

features_gained.name: Sacred Implements (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Reliquias religiosas que sirven como focos divinos en lugar de implementos estandar.
features_gained.description_en: Religious relics that serve as divine focuses instead of standard implements.

features_gained.name: Orisons
features_gained.description_es: Obtiene oraciones (conjuros divinos de nivel 0) al elegir escuelas de implemento.
features_gained.description_en: Gains orisons (0-level divine spells) when selecting implement schools.

features_gained.name: Favored Weapon Proficiency
features_gained.description_es: Anade el arma favorita de su deidad a sus competencias.
features_gained.description_en: Adds his deity's favored weapon to his proficiencies.

silksworn.name: Silksworn
silksworn.description_es: Occultist cortesano que canaliza poder arcano a traves de prendas opulentas y joyas, ganando acceso a mas escuelas de implementos.
silksworn.description_en: A courtly occultist who channels arcane power through opulent garments and jewelry, gaining access to more implement schools.

features_gained.name: Arcane Spellcasting
features_gained.description_es: Lanza conjuros arcanos con componentes verbal y somatico en lugar de psiquicos.
features_gained.description_en: Casts arcane spells with verbal and somatic components instead of psychic.

features_gained.name: Ostentatious Implements (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Sus implementos son prendas o joyas magicas valoradas en al menos 10 po en huecos especificos.
features_gained.description_en: His implements are ostentatious garments or magical items worth at least 10 gp in specific slots.

features_gained.name: Bluff & Knowledge (Nobility) class skills
features_gained.description_es: Anade Enganar y Conocimiento (nobleza) como habilidades de clase.
features_gained.description_en: Adds Bluff and Knowledge (nobility) as class skills.

features_gained.name: Enhanced Mental Focus
features_gained.description_es: Foco mental igual a nivel + Inteligencia + Carisma.
features_gained.description_en: Mental focus equals occultist level + Intelligence + Charisma modifier.

features_gained.name: Four Implement Schools (1)
features_gained.description_es: Acceso a cuatro escuelas de implemento desde nivel 1 en lugar de dos.
features_gained.description_en: Access to four implement schools at 1st level instead of two.

features_gained.name: Silksworn Eloquence (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 8 obtiene bonos sociales y poderes de elocuencia magica.
features_gained.description_en: At 8th level gains social bonuses and magical eloquence powers.

panoply_savant.name: Panoply Savant
panoply_savant.description_es: Occultist que se especializa en una panoplia tematica de implementos, combinando sus poderes para efectos sinergicos.
panoply_savant.description_en: An occultist who specializes in a thematic panoply of implements, combining their powers for synergistic effects.

features_gained.name: Panoply Focus (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Gana 1 punto adicional de foco mental diario, invertible solo en implementos de su panoplia.
features_gained.description_en: Gains 1 additional mental focus point per day, investable only in panoply implements.

features_gained.name: Implement Specialist (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Usa su nivel de lanzador con objetos magicos relacionados con su panoplia y restaura cargas meditando.
features_gained.description_en: Uses caster level with panoply-related magic items and restores charges through meditation.

features_gained.name: Panoptic Harmony (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Trata su nivel de lanzador como 2 mas alto al alternar entre implementos diferentes de la panoplia.
features_gained.description_en: Treats caster level as 2 higher when alternating between different panoply implements.

features_gained.name: Panoptic Call (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Invoca objetos asociados a su panoplia como accion estandar usando foco mental.
features_gained.description_en: Summons panoply-associated items as a standard action using mental focus.

features_gained.name: Combined Powers (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Gasta 2 puntos de foco mental extra para usar un segundo poder de foco de otro implemento simultaneamente.
features_gained.description_en: Spends 2 extra mental focus to use a second focus power from a different implement simultaneously.

haunt_collector.name: Haunt Collector
haunt_collector.description_es: Occultist que captura espiritus poseidos en sus implementos, canalizando embrujos y comulgando con los muertos derrotados.
haunt_collector.description_en: An occultist who captures possessed spirits in his implements, channeling haunts and communing with destroyed undead.

features_gained.name: Possessed Possessions (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2 y cada 4 niveles, accede a objetos poseidos por espiritus con bonos de seance.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level and every 4 levels, gains spirit-possessed items with seance boons.

features_gained.name: Hauntist (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5 adquiere la habilidad canalizador de embrujos del medium con nivel efectivo igual a su nivel -2.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level gains the medium's haunt channeler with effective level equal to occultist level -2.

features_gained.name: Spirit Speaker (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 8 realiza seances para comulgar con muertos vivientes destruidos o embrujos neutralizados una vez al dia.
features_gained.description_en: At 8th level conducts seances to commune with destroyed undead or neutralized haunts once daily.

features_gained.name: Extricate Haunt (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 8 extrae temporalmente espiritus de implementos para crear fenomenos que entregan conjuros.
features_gained.description_en: At 8th level temporarily extracts spirits from implements to create spell-delivering phenomena.

zen_archer_monk.name: Zen Archer
zen_archer_monk.description_es: Monje que dedica su entrenamiento al arco, lanzando ataques de raudal con flechas guiadas por su sabiduria y ki.
zen_archer_monk.description_en: A monk who dedicates his training to the bow, unleashing flurry attacks with arrows guided by his wisdom and ki.
features_removed: Tongue of the Sun and Moon (17)

features_gained.name: Bow Proficiencies
features_gained.description_es: Competente con arcos largos, arcos cortos y sus variantes compuestas.
features_gained.description_en: Proficient with longbows, shortbows, and their composite variants.

features_gained.name: Flurry of Blows (Bow)
features_gained.description_es: Raudal de Golpes modificado solo con arcos, requiriendo el uso de Fuerza.
features_gained.description_en: Modified flurry of blows using only bows, requiring Strength use.

features_gained.name: Perfect Strike
features_gained.description_es: Recibe Golpe Perfecto a nivel 1 como dote extra de monje.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Perfect Strike at 1st level as a monk bonus feat.

features_gained.name: Zen Archery (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Usa su modificador de Sabiduria en lugar de Destreza para ataques a distancia con arco.
features_gained.description_en: Uses Wisdom modifier instead of Dexterity for ranged attacks with bow.

features_gained.name: Ki Arrows (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5 puede gastar ki para que sus flechas inflijan dano de su puno desnudo.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level can spend ki so his arrows deal his unarmed strike damage.

features_gained.name: Reflexive Shot (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 9 puede hacer ataques de oportunidad con su arco.
features_gained.description_en: At 9th level can make attacks of opportunity with his bow.

dual_cursed_oracle.name: Dual-Cursed Oracle
dual_cursed_oracle.description_es: Un oráculo marcado por dos maldiciones a la vez, que canaliza la mala fortuna contra sus enemigos a costa de un beneficio reducido de una de sus maldiciones.
dual_cursed_oracle.description_en: An oracle marked by two curses at once, channeling misfortune against enemies at the cost of reduced benefit from one of her curses.

features_gained.name: Oracle's Curse (modificada)
features_gained.description_es: Selecciona dos maldiciones a nivel 1; una permanece estática sin progresar.
features_gained.description_en: Select two curses at 1st level; one remains static and never gains scaling benefits.

features_gained.name: Conjuros Adicionales
features_gained.description_es: Lista fija: ill omen (2), oracle's burden (4), bestow curse (6) que reemplaza los conjuros del misterio.
features_gained.description_en: Fixed list: ill omen (2), oracle's burden (4), bestow curse (6), replacing mystery bonus spells.

features_gained.name: Misfortune (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Acción inmediata para forzar a una criatura a 30 pies a relanzar un d20 y quedarse con el peor resultado; una vez por criatura por día.
features_gained.description_en: Immediate action to force a creature within 30 ft to reroll a d20 and take the worse result; once per creature per day.

features_gained.name: Fortune (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Acción inmediata para relanzar uno de tus propios d20; una vez al día a nivel 5, +1 uso cada 6 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: Immediate action to reroll one of your own d20s; once daily at level 5, +1 use every 6 levels.

possessed_oracle.name: Possessed Oracle
possessed_oracle.description_es: Un oráculo cuya mente comparte hueco con otra entidad, lo que le otorga defensa mental a cambio de una maldición y conjuros fijos.
possessed_oracle.description_en: An oracle whose mind shares space with another entity, granting mental defense at the cost of a fixed curse and bonus spells.

features_gained.name: Forced Curse
features_gained.description_es: Debe elegir la maldición Atormentado (Haunted) o Lenguas (Tongues) a nivel 1.
features_gained.description_en: Must select the Haunted or Tongues curse at 1st level.

features_gained.name: Bonus Spells
features_gained.description_es: Lista fija: ventriloquism, spider climb, screech, sleepwalk, telekinesis, animate objects, divine vessel.
features_gained.description_en: Fixed list: ventriloquism, spider climb, screech, sleepwalk, telekinesis, animate objects, divine vessel.

features_gained.name: Two Minds (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Revelación obligatoria: +2 a salvaciones de Voluntad contra encantamientos; a nivel 7 puede relanzar una salvación de Voluntad fallada al día.
features_gained.description_en: Mandatory revelation: +2 on Will saves vs enchantment; at 7th level may reroll one failed Will save per day.

warsighted.name: Warsighted
warsighted.description_es: Un oráculo marcial cuyas visiones se manifiestan como un dominio cambiante de técnicas de combate en lugar de revelaciones tradicionales.
warsighted.description_en: A martial oracle whose visions manifest as a shifting mastery of combat techniques rather than traditional revelations.

features_gained.name: Martial Flexibility (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Acción de movimiento para obtener un dote de combate por 1 minuto; usos = 3 + 1/2 nivel de oráculo. Escala a múltiples dotes simultáneos a niveles 7, 11 y 15.
features_gained.description_en: Move action to gain one combat feat for 1 minute; uses per day = 3 + 1/2 oracle level. Scales to multiple simultaneous feats at levels 7, 11, and 15.

stargazer.name: Stargazer
stargazer.description_es: Un oráculo cuyas visiones provienen del firmamento, especializado en navegación celestial y conjuros relacionados con las estrellas.
stargazer.description_en: An oracle whose visions come from the firmament, specialized in celestial navigation and star-related spells.

features_gained.name: Class Skills
features_gained.description_es: Añade Conocimiento (naturaleza), Percepción y Supervivencia como habilidades de clase.
features_gained.description_en: Adds Knowledge (nature), Perception, and Survival as class skills.

features_gained.name: Bonus Spells
features_gained.description_es: Lista fija temática: faerie fire (2), glitterdust (4), guiding star (6), wandering star motes (8), meteor swarm (18).
features_gained.description_en: Fixed thematic list: faerie fire (2), glitterdust (4), guiding star (6), wandering star motes (8), meteor swarm (18).

features_gained.name: Guiding Star (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Revelación obligatoria a nivel 1: bonificadores y orientación cuando puede ver las estrellas.
features_gained.description_en: Mandatory revelation at 1st level: bonuses and guidance when she can see the stars.

features_gained.name: Star Chart (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Revelación obligatoria a nivel 7: dominio de la cartografía estelar y orientación.
features_gained.description_en: Mandatory revelation at 7th level: mastery of stellar cartography and guidance.

hospitaler.name: Hospitaler
hospitaler.description_es: Paladín dedicado a la curación, que sacrifica frecuencia de Smite Evil para canalizar energía positiva como un clérigo y crear auras curativas.
hospitaler.description_en: A paladin dedicated to healing, trading Smite Evil frequency for cleric-like channel positive energy and healing auras.

features_gained.name: Smite Evil (modificado)
features_gained.description_es: Solo gana usos adicionales a nivel 7 y cada 6 niveles después, en vez de la progresión estándar.
features_gained.description_en: Only gains additional uses at 7th level and every 6 levels thereafter, instead of standard progression.

features_gained.name: Channel Positive Energy (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 canaliza energía positiva como un clérigo de su nivel de paladín −3, con 3 + Carisma usos al día sin gastar imposición de manos.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level channels positive energy as a cleric of paladin level −3, with 3 + Cha uses per day without expending lay on hands.

features_gained.name: Aura of Healing (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11, gastando un uso de canalizar emite un aura curativa de 30 pies durante varios asaltos: estabiliza, concede inmunidad a sangrado y cura.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level, expend a channel use to emit a 30-ft healing aura for several rounds: stabilizes, grants bleed immunity, heals.

sacred_shield.name: Sacred Shield
sacred_shield.description_es: Paladín defensor que renuncia a Smite Evil ofensivo y a la canalización para proteger a sus aliados con un baluarte de fe y un escudo bendecido.
sacred_shield.description_en: A defensive paladin who trades offensive Smite Evil and channeling to protect allies with a bulwark of faith and a blessed shield.

features_gained.name: Bastion of Good (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Reemplaza Smite Evil: aliados a 10 pies reciben mitad de daño del objetivo y la paladín gana bonificador de deflexión a CA igual a su Carisma (máx +6).
features_gained.description_en: Replaces Smite Evil: allies within 10 ft take half damage from target and the paladin gains deflection AC bonus equal to her Cha (max +6).

features_gained.name: Holy Shield (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4, gastando 2 usos de imposición de manos, otorga su bonificador de escudo a aliados adyacentes; expande a 10 pies a nivel 11 y 20 pies a nivel 20.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, by expending 2 lay on hands uses, grants her shield bonus to adjacent allies; extends to 10 ft at 11 and 20 ft at 20.

features_gained.name: Divine Bond (escudo)
features_gained.description_es: El vínculo divino se aplica al escudo en vez de a un arma o montura, otorgando bonificadores de mejora y propiedades como bashing o spell resistance.
features_gained.description_en: Divine bond applies to her shield instead of a weapon or mount, granting enhancement bonuses and properties like bashing or spell resistance.

features_gained.name: Improved Bastion (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11, el radio de Bastion of Good se extiende a 20 pies.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level, the Bastion of Good radius extends to 20 ft.

features_gained.name: Perfect Bastion (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 20, ella y los aliados cercanos obtienen regeneración 10 contra el objetivo del Bastion of Good.
features_gained.description_en: At 20th level, she and nearby allies gain regeneration 10 against the Bastion of Good target.

warrior_of_the_holy_light.name: Warrior of the Holy Light
warrior_of_the_holy_light.description_es: Paladín que renuncia por completo a la magia divina para canalizar la luz pura de su deidad como un nimbo radiante de poder.
warrior_of_the_holy_light.description_en: A paladin who fully forgoes divine magic to channel her deity's pure radiance as a luminous nimbus of power.

features_gained.name: Power of Faith (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Reemplaza los conjuros: a nivel 4 gana usos extra de imposición de manos y puede crear un nimbo de luz de 30 pies que otorga +1 moral a CA, ataque, daño y salvaciones de miedo durante 1 minuto. Escala a niveles 8, 12, 16 y 20.
features_gained.description_en: Replaces spells: at 4th level gains extra lay on hands uses and can create a 30-ft nimbus of light granting +1 morale to AC, attack, damage and fear saves for 1 minute. Scales at 8, 12, 16, and 20.

features_gained.name: Shining Light (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 14, ráfaga de 30 pies que daña 1d6 por dos niveles a malvados (ciega) y cura 1d6 por dos niveles a buenos. Usos adicionales a niveles 17 y 20.
features_gained.description_en: At 14th level, 30-ft burst dealing 1d6 per two levels to evil (blinds) and healing 1d6 per two levels to good. Extra uses at 17 and 20.

shining_knight.name: Shining Knight
shining_knight.description_es: Paladín montado por excelencia que vincula divinamente con su corcel y carga sin temor a ataques de oportunidad.
shining_knight.description_en: The quintessential mounted paladin who divinely bonds with her steed and charges without fear of attacks of opportunity.

features_gained.name: Skilled Rider (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, no sufre penalizadores de armadura a Cabalgar, y su montura recibe el bonificador de Divine Grace a salvaciones.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, no armor check penalty to Ride, and her mount gains her divine grace bonus to saves.

features_gained.name: Divine Bond (montura)
features_gained.description_es: El vínculo divino se aplica obligatoriamente a una montura.
features_gained.description_en: Divine bond must be made with a mount.

features_gained.name: Knight's Charge
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11, al cargar montada no provoca ataques de oportunidad para ella ni su montura. Si combina con Smite Evil, el objetivo debe superar Voluntad o ser preso del pánico.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level, mounted charges provoke no AoO for her or her mount. If combined with Smite Evil, target must save vs Will or be panicked.

mutation_mind.name: Mutation Mind
mutation_mind.description_es: Psíquico cuyo poder mental deforma físicamente su cuerpo, ganando fuerza y mutaciones bestiales a costa de su intelecto.
mutation_mind.description_en: A psychic whose mental power physically warps her body, gaining strength and bestial mutations at the cost of intellect.

features_gained.name: Physical Mutation (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Acción rápida: gana +4 mejora a Fuerza y −2 a Inteligencia (+6 a nivel 12). Duración igual a niveles psíquicos en minutos al día. Queda fatigada al terminar.
features_gained.description_en: Swift action: gain +4 enhancement to Str and −2 to Int (+6 at level 12). Duration equals psychic levels in minutes per day. Fatigued after.

features_gained.name: Bodily Mutations
features_gained.description_es: Desde nivel 3, en lugar de amplificaciones frénicas puede elegir mutaciones corporales activas durante Physical Mutation: garras, mordisco, visión en la oscuridad, alcance, RD, etc.
features_gained.description_en: From level 3, instead of phrenic amplifications may choose bodily mutations active during Physical Mutation: claws, bite, darkvision, reach, DR, etc.

features_gained.name: Phrenic Empowerment (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7, modificar conjuros aumenta la bonificación a Fuerza en 2 durante asaltos = nivel del conjuro.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level, modifying spells increases Str bonus by 2 for rounds equal to spell level.

features_gained.name: Improved Bodily Mutations
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11, accede a mutaciones avanzadas: forma acuática, aumento de tamaño, curación rápida, vuelo o cargas mejoradas.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level, access advanced mutations: aquatic form, size increase, fast healing, flight, or improved bull rush.

psychic_duelist.name: Psychic Duelist
psychic_duelist.description_es: Psíquico especializado en duelos mentales y en la manifestación de criaturas-pensamiento como armas duraderas.
psychic_duelist.description_en: A psychic specialized in psychic duels and in manifesting thought-form creatures as enduring weapons.

features_gained.name: Instigate Psychic Duel
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 añade instigate psychic duel a su lista de conjuros.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level adds instigate psychic duel to her spell list.

features_gained.name: Manifestation Amplifications
features_gained.description_es: Desde nivel 7, al ganar amplificaciones frénicas puede elegir amplificaciones de manifestación que potencian sus criaturas-pensamiento.
features_gained.description_en: From 7th level, when gaining phrenic amplifications may choose manifestation amplifications that boost her thought-form creatures.

features_gained.name: Thought-Form Persistence
features_gained.description_es: Por 1 punto del depósito frénico, su criatura-pensamiento persiste sin atacar y puede mantenerla con acción rápida; el daño psíquico de retroceso se reduce a la mitad.
features_gained.description_en: For 1 phrenic pool point, her thought-form creature persists without attacking and may be maintained as a swift action; psychic backlash damage halved.

features_gained.name: Offensive Manifestations
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 9 puede usar manifestaciones ofensivas directamente contra enemigos sin entrar en duelo psíquico, sacrificando un conjuro como acción de asalto completo.
features_gained.description_en: At 9th level may use offensive manifestations directly against foes without entering a psychic duel, sacrificing a spell as a full-round action.

terror_weaver.name: Terror Weaver
terror_weaver.source: Pathfinder Player Companion: Blood of the Beast
terror_weaver.description_es: Psíquico medio-orco que domina el miedo y los encantamientos para someter a sus víctimas y atormentarles incluso en sueños.
terror_weaver.description_en: A half-orc psychic who masters fear and charm to dominate victims and torment them even in their dreams.

features_gained.name: Charm Person (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2, lanzar charm person 1/día como aptitud sortílega; puede gastar un espacio de 1+ para usarla otra vez.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level, cast charm person 1/day as SLA; may expend a 1st+ spell slot to cast it again.

features_gained.name: Aura of Doom (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 9, lanzar aura of doom 1/día; los enemigos pasan a aterrados a nivel 11 y a presa del pánico a nivel 19.
