features_gained.description_en: At 9th level, cast aura of doom 1/day; enemies become frightened at 11 and panicked at 19.

features_gained.name: Nightmare Affliction (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 15, tras impactar con un conjuro mental gasta 2 puntos del depósito frénico para infligir nightmare al objetivo cuando duerma.
features_gained.description_en: At 15th level, after a successful mind-affecting spell, spend 2 phrenic pool points to afflict the target with nightmare when it sleeps.

wildepath.name: Wildepath
wildepath.description_es: Psíquico cuya conciencia se extiende al mundo natural, capaz de afectar a animales y plantas y aprender conjuros druídicos.
wildepath.description_en: A psychic whose mind reaches into the natural world, capable of affecting animals and plants and learning druid spells.

features_gained.name: Druidic Spells
features_gained.description_es: Cada nuevo nivel de conjuro disponible, añade un conjuro de la lista de druida a la lista psíquica y a sus conjuros conocidos.
features_gained.description_en: Each time she gains a new spell level, may add one druid spell of that level to the psychic list and to her spells known.

features_gained.name: Wilde Amplification
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11, gastando 2 puntos frénicos un conjuro mental o dependiente del lenguaje afecta plantas y animales como si fueran humanoides que la entienden.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level, spend 2 phrenic points so a mind-affecting or language-dependent spell affects plants and animals as if humanoids who understand her.

features_gained.name: Commune with Nature (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 9, lanza commune with nature 1/día como aptitud sortílega; puede gastar espacios de 5+ para usarla otra vez.
features_gained.description_en: At 9th level, cast commune with nature 1/day as SLA; may expend 5th+ spell slots to cast again.

features_gained.name: Enhanced Telepathy
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 17, su telepatía también funciona con animales y plantas como si tuvieran lenguaje.
features_gained.description_en: At 17th level, her telepathy also works with animals and plants as if they had a language.

esoteric_starseeker.name: Esoteric Starseeker
esoteric_starseeker.description_es: Psíquico que sintoniza con las constelaciones de la Caravana Cósmica, ganando espacios de conjuro adicionales a costa de debilitar una escuela de magia.
esoteric_starseeker.description_en: A psychic who attunes to constellations from the Cosmic Caravan, gaining bonus spell slots at the cost of weakening one school of magic.

features_gained.name: Written in the Stars
features_gained.description_es: Sintoniza con una constelación: gana un espacio adicional de constelación por cada nivel de conjuro que pueda lanzar y prepara conjuros asociados. A nivel 11 puede sintonizar con dos constelaciones a la vez.
features_gained.description_en: Attune to a constellation: gain a bonus constellation spell slot for each spell level she can cast, preparing associated spells. At 11th level may attune to two constellations.

features_gained.name: Weakened School
features_gained.description_es: Al sintonizar debe debilitar una escuela de magia: lanzar conjuros de esa escuela exige una acción de asalto completo adicional, como un metamagic.
features_gained.description_en: When attuning she must weaken one school of magic: casting spells of that school requires an additional full-round action, like metamagic.

features_gained.name: Major Amplifications
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 15 obtiene amplificaciones mayores en lugar de las amplificaciones frénicas estándar.
features_gained.description_en: At 15th level gains major amplifications instead of standard phrenic amplifications.

trapper.name: Trapper
trapper.description_es: Explorador especializado en construir y desarmar trampas mágicas y mundanas, sacrificando sus conjuros divinos por dominio de la trampería.
trapper.description_en: A ranger specialized in building and disarming both magic and mundane traps, trading divine spells for trap mastery.

features_gained.name: Trapfinding
features_gained.description_es: Añade ½ nivel (mín +1) a Percepción para localizar trampas y a Inutilizar Mecanismo; puede desarmar trampas mágicas.
features_gained.description_en: Adds ½ level (min +1) to Perception to find traps and to Disable Device; can disarm magic traps.

features_gained.name: Class Skills
features_gained.description_es: Añade Inutilizar Mecanismo a sus habilidades de clase.
features_gained.description_en: Adds Disable Device to class skills.

features_gained.name: Ranger Trap (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5 aprende snare trap más una trampa de explorador, y otra cada 2 niveles. Usos al día = ½ nivel + Sabiduría.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level learns snare trap plus one ranger trap, and one more every 2 levels. Uses per day = ½ level + Wis.

features_gained.name: Launch Trap (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 10 puede acoplar trampas mágicas a proyectiles para colocarlas a distancia o atacar directamente con CD reducida.
features_gained.description_en: At 10th level can attach magical traps to projectiles for ranged placement or direct attacks at reduced DC.

falconer.name: Falconer
falconer.description_es: Explorador acompañado por un ave de presa entrenada, especializado en ataques en picado desde gran altura.
falconer.description_en: A ranger accompanied by a trained bird of prey, specialized in diving attacks from great heights.

features_gained.name: Feathered Companion (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1 obtiene un ave de presa como compañera animal con la mitad de PG normales, además del truco Roam o Distract gratis.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level gains a bird of prey companion with half normal HP, plus the Roam or Distract trick free.

features_gained.name: Hunter's Bond (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 su compañera emplumada gana puntos de golpe completos en lugar de la mitad.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level her feathered companion gains full hit points instead of half.

features_gained.name: Swoop for the Kill (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 6 obtiene el truco Swooping Charge: el ave se lanza desde altura infligiendo 2d4 de daño y aturdiendo al objetivo.
features_gained.description_en: At 6th level gains Swooping Charge trick: bird dives from above dealing 2d4 damage and staggering target.

freebooter.name: Freebooter
freebooter.source: Pathfinder Player Companion: Pirates of the Inner Sea
freebooter.description_es: Explorador inspirador, sin enemigo predilecto, que designa un objetivo común para que su tripulación o aliados lo abatan en grupo.
freebooter.description_en: An inspiring ranger with no favored enemy who designates a common target for his crew or allies to bring down together.

features_gained.name: Freebooter's Bane (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1, acción de movimiento para designar un enemigo: él y aliados a 30 pies obtienen +1 a ataque y daño contra el objetivo. El bono crece a niveles 5, 10, 15 y 20.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level, move action to designate an enemy: he and allies within 30 ft gain +1 attack and damage vs target. Bonus increases at 5, 10, 15, 20.

features_gained.name: Freebooter's Bond (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4, acción de movimiento: aliados a 30 pies ganan +2 adicional a ataque al flanquear con él o con aliados afectados.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, move action: allies within 30 ft gain +2 additional attack when flanking with him or affected allies.

features_gained.name: Fast Swimmer (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7, nada a la mitad de su velocidad como acción de movimiento o a velocidad completa como asalto completo, con +2 a Nadar.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level, swim half speed as move action or full speed as full-round action, with +2 to Swim.

wild_hunter.name: Wild Hunter
wild_hunter.description_es: Explorador que adopta la esencia de las bestias en lugar de odiar a un enemigo concreto, ganando aspectos animales y compartiéndolos con sus aliados.
wild_hunter.description_en: A ranger who takes on beast aspects instead of hating one foe, gaining animal focuses and sharing them with allies.

features_gained.name: Animal Focus (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Adopta el aspecto de un animal ganando una bonificación o capacidad especial. Uso = 1 minuto al día por nivel, en incrementos de 1 minuto.
features_gained.description_en: Takes on an animal aspect for a bonus or special ability. Usable for 1 min/day per level in 1-minute increments.

features_gained.name: Shared Focus (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7 comparte su aspecto animal actual con una criatura vinculada (compañera animal automáticamente o aliado vinculado mediante acción rápida).
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level shares his current animal focus with a bonded creature (animal companion automatically or bonded ally as swift action).

acrobat.name: Acrobat
acrobat.description_es: Pícaro especializado en agilidad y acrobacias, capaz de moverse sin penalizadores con armadura ligera y de repetir comprobaciones de movimiento.
acrobat.description_en: A rogue specialized in agility and acrobatics, able to move unhindered in light armor and to retry movement checks.

features_gained.name: Expert Acrobat (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Sin penalizadores de armadura a Acrobacias, Trepar, Volar, Juego de Manos y Sigilo con armadura ligera; sin armadura, +2 a Acrobacias y Volar.
features_gained.description_en: No armor check penalty to Acrobatics, Climb, Fly, Sleight of Hand, Stealth in light armor; without armor, +2 to Acrobatics and Fly.

features_gained.name: Second Chance (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, repite una comprobación de Acrobacias, Trepar o Volar con −5 al día, +1 uso cada 3 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, reroll an Acrobatics, Climb or Fly check at −5 once per day, +1 use every 3 levels.

burglar.name: Burglar
burglar.description_es: Pícaro infiltrador especializado en desactivar trampas con cuidado y desviar la atención de los testigos de su sigilo.
burglar.description_en: A break-in specialist rogue focused on carefully disarming traps and distracting witnesses to her stealth.

features_gained.name: Careful Disarm (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4, al desarmar una trampa con Inutilizar Mecanismo no la activa salvo que falle por 10 o más; si la activa gana doble bonificador de Trap Sense.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, when disarming a trap she does not spring it unless she fails by 10+; if sprung, gains double Trap Sense bonus.

features_gained.name: Distraction (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 8, al ser detectada usando Sigilo realiza una comprobación de Engañar opuesta a Averiguar Intenciones del observador para que ignore la detección.
features_gained.description_en: At 8th level, when detected via Stealth makes a Bluff check opposed by the observer's Sense Motive to dismiss the detection.

investigator_rogue.name: Investigator
investigator_rogue.description_es: Pícaro especializado en recopilar información y descubrir mentiras durante una sola comprobación de Diplomacia.
investigator_rogue.description_en: A rogue focused on gathering information and detecting falsehoods within a single Diplomacy check.

features_gained.name: Follow Up (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Lanza dos veces cualquier comprobación de Diplomacia para reunir información y obtiene la información de ambos resultados; detecta discrepancias falsas.
features_gained.description_en: Roll twice on any Diplomacy check to gather information and receive info from both results; detects false discrepancies.

poisoner_rogue.name: Poisoner
poisoner_rogue.description_es: Pícaro especialista en venenos: nunca se envenena por accidente y puede modificar el método de aplicación de cualquier veneno.
poisoner_rogue.description_en: A rogue specialized in poisons: never accidentally poisons herself and can modify any poison's delivery method.

features_gained.name: Poison Use
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1, no se envenena accidentalmente al aplicar veneno a un arma.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level, never accidentally poisons herself when applying poison to a weapon.

features_gained.name: Master Poisoner (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, modifica el tipo de aplicación de un veneno (contacto, ingerido, inhalado o inyección) con 1 hora de Artesanía (alquimia), y +½ nivel a comprobaciones de Artesanía con venenos.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, modify a poison's delivery (contact, ingested, inhaled, injury) with 1 hour of Craft (alchemy), and +½ level to poison Craft checks.

swashbuckler_rogue.name: Swashbuckler
swashbuckler_rogue.description_es: Pícaro de estilo intrépido y elegante con destreza en armas marciales y resistencia mental al miedo.
swashbuckler_rogue.description_en: A daring, dashing rogue with martial weapon training and mental resilience against fear.

features_gained.name: Martial Training (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1 obtiene competencia con un arma marcial elegida y puede tomar el talento Combat Trick dos veces.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level gains proficiency with one martial weapon and may take the Combat Trick rogue talent twice.

features_gained.name: Daring (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, +1 moral a Acrobacias y a salvaciones contra miedo, +1 cada 3 niveles después.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, +1 morale to Acrobatics and saves vs fear, +1 every 3 levels thereafter.

yojimbo.name: Yojimbo
yojimbo.description_es: Guardaespaldas leal de Minkai que protege a un solo señor designándolo como pupilo, sacrificando montura y maestría con el arco montado por especialización en armadura y defensa de aliados.
yojimbo.description_en: Loyal Minkai bodyguard who protects a single master by designating them as ward, trading mount and mounted archer for armor mastery and ally defense.

features_gained.name: Defensa Resuelta (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Designa un aliado adyacente como pupilo durante un desafío; aplica las habilidades de resolución al pupilo en vez de a sí mismo.
features_gained.description_en: Designate an adjacent ally as ward during challenge; apply resolve abilities to the ward instead of self.

features_gained.name: Maestría con Armadura (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Elige un tipo de armadura; gana entrenamiento con armadura usando el nivel de samurái como nivel de guerrero.
features_gained.description_en: Choose one armor type; gain armor training counting samurai level as fighter level.

features_gained.name: Interceptar (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Gana Guardaespaldas como dote de bonificación; aumenta el bono a la CA de Ayudar a otro en +1.
features_gained.description_en: Gain Bodyguard feat as bonus; aid another AC bonus increases by +1.

warrior_poet.name: Warrior Poet
warrior_poet.description_es: Combatiente artístico que renuncia a armadura, montura y estandarte por gracia carismática, finura con la katana y movilidad de bailarín en combate.
warrior_poet.description_en: Artful combatant who trades armor, mount, and banner for charismatic grace, katana finesse, and dancer-like battlefield mobility.

features_gained.name: Gracia del Bailarín (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Sin armadura ni escudo, suma su mod. de Carisma (máx. nivel) a la CA; se pierde si está desprevenido.
features_gained.description_en: When unarmored and shieldless, adds Charisma modifier (max samurai level) to AC; lost if flat-footed.

features_gained.name: Floritura (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Selecciona maniobras de entre ocho opciones a niveles 1, 3, 5, 9, 13, 17, 20 (Vital Strike, velocidad, finta mejorada, etc.).
features_gained.description_en: Selects from eight combat maneuvers at levels 1, 3, 5, 9, 13, 17, 20 (Vital Strike, speed, improved feint, etc.).

features_gained.name: Guerrero Grácil (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Gana Finura con armas y la aplica a glaives, katanas y naginatas.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Weapon Finesse and applies it to glaives, katanas, and naginatas.

features_gained.name: Desafío del Hostigador (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Suma su nivel al daño solo en el primer ataque exitoso por turno contra el objetivo desafiado.
features_gained.description_en: Adds samurai level to damage only on the first successful attack per round against the challenged target.

features_gained.name: Golpe Grácil (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al usar Finura con armas en cuerpo a cuerpo, suma la mitad de su nivel al daño (4º nivel).
features_gained.description_en: When using Weapon Finesse for melee attacks, adds half samurai level to damage (4th).

features_gained.name: Danza de Batalla (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Gana Ataque en Salto, mejorado y mayor a niveles 6, 12 y 18 sin requisitos previos.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Spring Attack (6th), Improved Spring Attack (12th), and Greater Spring Attack (18th) as bonus feats without prerequisites.

ironbound_sword.name: Ironbound Sword
ironbound_sword.description_es: Samurái compasivo que prefiere subyugar antes que matar; renuncia al estandarte por golpes no letales letalmente eficaces.
ironbound_sword.description_en: Merciful samurai who prefers to subdue rather than kill; trades banner abilities for devastating nonlethal techniques.

features_gained.name: Combatiente Misericordioso (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Inflige daño no letal sin la penalización de –4 estándar; +2 a maniobras de combate tras impactos no letales.
features_gained.description_en: Deals nonlethal damage without the –4 penalty; +2 on combat maneuvers after successful nonlethal hits.

features_gained.name: Nocaut Subyugante (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Una vez al día (más usos a niveles 10 y 15), un ataque que fuerza una salvación de Fortaleza o inconsciencia 1d6 asaltos.
features_gained.description_en: Once daily (more at 10th and 15th), an attack forces a Fortitude save or unconsciousness for 1d6 rounds.

features_gained.name: Inversión de Hoja (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: En defensa total, gasta un AdO para contrarrestar un ataque cuerpo a cuerpo y desarmar al atacante.
features_gained.description_en: While in full defense, spends an AoO to counter incoming melee attacks and free-disarm the attacker.

brawling_blademaster.name: Brawling Blademaster
brawling_blademaster.description_es: Combina golpes desarmados y de espada con igual destreza; renuncia a la montura y al estandarte por estilo dual y agilidad.
brawling_blademaster.description_en: Mixes unarmed strikes and bladework equally; trades mount and banner for dual-wielding style and agility.

features_gained.name: Mano Vacía (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Recibe Golpe Desarmado Mejorado de bonificación; nivel de samurái cuenta como nivel de monje para daño desarmado.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Improved Unarmed Strike as bonus feat; samurai level counts as monk level for unarmed damage.

features_gained.name: Ágil (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al 2º nivel, gana la habilidad de clase ágil del pistolero usando su nivel como nivel de pistolero.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level, gains the gunslinger's nimble class feature using samurai level as gunslinger level.

features_gained.name: Maestría Dual (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Recibe Combate con Dos Armas como dote de bonificación al 3er nivel sin requisitos de Destreza.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Two-Weapon Fighting at 3rd level regardless of Dexterity prerequisites.

features_gained.name: Flujo Armonioso (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Elimina la penalización de –2 al usar arma a una mano y golpe desarmado contra el desafiado (4º).
features_gained.description_en: Eliminates the –2 penalty when using a one-handed weapon plus unarmed strike against challenge target (4th).

features_gained.name: Claridad Perfecta (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al 5º nivel, deja de sufrir la penalización de CA durante el desafío.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level, no longer takes AC penalty during challenge.

features_gained.name: Foco Superior (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al 14º nivel, +2 a tiradas de salvación durante el desafío.
features_gained.description_en: At 14th level, +2 bonus on saving throws during challenge.

ward_speaker.name: Ward Speaker
ward_speaker.description_es: Samurái que extrae poder de rituales en santuarios kami, sustituyendo Determinación por bendiciones diarias de cinco kami distintos.
ward_speaker.description_en: Samurai who draws power from kami shrine rituals, replacing Resolve with daily fortunes from five different kami types.

features_gained.name: Propiciación (Ex, Su, Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Ritual diario en un santuario kami que concede fortunas (1/día +1 cada 3 niveles, máx. 7); cada uso permite una nueva tirada o un beneficio de uno de cinco kami.
features_gained.description_en: Daily ritual at kami shrines granting fortunes (1/day +1 per 3 levels, max 7); each use grants a reroll or specific kami benefit.

features_gained.name: Postura Resiliente (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al 11º nivel, gasta usos de propiciación en lugar de determinación para repetir salvaciones durante una posición de honor.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level, expends propitiation uses instead of resolve to reroll saving throws during honorable stands.

animist.name: Animist
animist.description_es: Chamán que se especializa en tratar con espíritus de toda clase, sustituyendo magia espiritual y embrujos por exorcismos y dominación de espíritus.
animist.description_en: Shaman who specializes in dealing with spirits of all kinds, replacing spirit magic and hexes with exorcism and spirit domination.

features_gained.name: Magia Espiritual del Animista (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Sustituye su magia espiritual por una lista temática (de hablar con animales a aprisionar alma).
features_gained.description_en: Replaces standard spirit magic with thematically aligned spells from speak with animals (1st) through soul bind (9th).

features_gained.name: Resolver Condición (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Tirada de Diplomacia (DC 15-30) para persuadir a espíritus de condiciones a abandonar al objetivo.
features_gained.description_en: Diplomacy check (DC 15-30) to persuade condition spirits to depart targets.

features_gained.name: Exorcismo (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Acción completa de toque para terminar posesión o dominación (DC 10 + 1/2 nivel + Sab).
features_gained.description_en: Full-round touch action to end possession or domination effects (DC 10 + half level + Wis).

features_gained.name: Dominar Espíritu (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Lanza tarro mágico o poseer objeto 1/día usando al familiar como vasija; usos extra a niveles 14 y 18.
features_gained.description_en: Cast magic jar or possess object once daily using familiar as vessel; more uses at 14th, 18th.

features_gained.name: Contacto con el Mundo Espiritual (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Sus armas funcionan como toque etéreo para interactuar con entidades incorpóreas (rondas/día = nivel).
features_gained.description_en: Weapons function as ghost touch to interact with incorporeal entities (rounds/day equal to level).

features_gained.name: Etéreo (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Lanza eterealidad 1/día al 18º nivel.
features_gained.description_en: Casts etherealness once daily at 18th level.

possessed_shaman.name: Possessed Shaman
possessed_shaman.description_es: Chamán cuyo cuerpo aloja múltiples espíritus que le otorgan habilidades; sacrifica magia espiritual y un embrujo a cambio de pericias compartidas.
possessed_shaman.description_en: Shaman whose body hosts multiple spirits granting skills; trades spirit magic and a hex for shared skill expertise.

features_gained.name: Habilidad Compartida (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Elige dos habilidades de la misma característica; las trata con rangos = nivel y usa Sabiduría como mod.
features_gained.description_en: Selects two skills of the same ability; treats them as having ranks equal to shaman level using Wisdom modifier.

features_gained.name: Vasija Atestada (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Al fallar una salvación de encantamiento o compulsión, los espíritus internos otorgan una nueva tirada al final del turno.
features_gained.description_en: On failed charm/compulsion saves, inner spirits grant a second save at end of turn.

features_gained.name: Habilidades Errantes (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Al elegir su espíritu errante diario, elige una habilidad con rangos = nivel y mod. de Sab; cambia con el espíritu (6º).
features_gained.description_en: Upon selecting daily wandering spirit, picks one skill with ranks equal to level and Wis mod; changes with the spirit (6th).

speaker_for_the_past.name: Speaker for the Past
speaker_for_the_past.description_es: Chamán historiador que renuncia al familiar y al espíritu errante para acceder a misterios y revelaciones de los oráculos de ancestros y tiempo.
speaker_for_the_past.description_en: Historian shaman who trades familiar and wandering spirit for access to oracle ancestor and time mysteries' revelations.

features_gained.name: Misterios del Pasado (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Gana Lingüística, Conoc. (historia), local, Percepción y UMD como habilidades de clase; añade hechizos de ancestro y tiempo a su lista. Prepara hechizos meditando 1 hora.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Linguistics, Knowledge (history, local), Perception, UMD as class skills; adds ancestor and time mystery spells to spell list. Prepares spells via 1 hour of contemplation.

features_gained.name: Revelaciones del Pasado (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A niveles 4, 6, 12, 14 y 20 elige una revelación de los misterios de ancestro o tiempo, usando Sabiduría como característica.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th, 6th, 12th, 14th, and 20th levels selects a revelation from ancestor or time mysteries, using Wisdom as ability.

witch_doctor.name: Witch Doctor
witch_doctor.description_es: Chamán no-malvado que canaliza energía positiva y desbarata maldiciones, sacrificando varios embrujos por canalización clerical y contrahechizos.
witch_doctor.description_en: Non-evil shaman who channels positive energy and undoes curses, trading several hexes for cleric-style channel and counterspelling.

features_gained.name: Canalizar Energía (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Como un clérigo, canaliza energía positiva (nivel efectivo = nivel –3) 3 + Car veces al día (4º).
features_gained.description_en: As a cleric, channels positive energy (effective level = shaman level –3) 3 + Cha times/day (4th).

features_gained.name: Contramaldición (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Sacrifica un hechizo espiritual preparado de 3.º+ para lanzar disipar magia o eliminar maldición espontáneamente (8º).
features_gained.description_en: Sacrifices a prepared 3rd+ spirit magic spell to spontaneously cast dispel magic or remove curse (8th).

features_gained.name: Embrujo Contrahechizo (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Acción preparada para contrarrestar como disipar magia (1d20 + nivel vs DC 11 + NL); no contra el mismo lanzador en 24 h (10º).
features_gained.description_en: Readied counterspell using dispel magic (1d20 + level vs DC 11 + CL); not vs same caster within 24h (10th).

visionary.name: Visionary
visionary.description_es: Chamán especializado en adivinación; intercambia espíritu y embrujo errantes por hechizos de visión y respuestas casi infalibles.
visionary.description_en: Divination-focused shaman who trades wandering spirit and hex for vision spells and near-infallible answers.

features_gained.name: Adivino Diligente (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Recibe la dote Adivino Diligente como bonificación al 4º nivel sin requisitos.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Diviner's Delving as a bonus feat at 4th level regardless of prerequisites.

features_gained.name: Discernir Pericia Mágica (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Tras 2 rondas de detectar magia o alineamiento, identifica linajes, dominios, embrujos, escuelas o misterios.
features_gained.description_en: After 2 rounds of detect magic or alignment-detection, identifies bloodlines, domains, hexes, schools, or mysteries.

features_gained.name: Magia Espiritual de Visión (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Añade nueve hechizos de adivinación (1.º-9.º) a su magia espiritual.
features_gained.description_en: Adds nine divination spells (1st-9th) to spirit magic list.

features_gained.name: Adivinación Mejorada (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Augurio y adivinación dan respuestas correctas el 90%; prepara escudriñar como hechizo de 4.º (6º).
features_gained.description_en: Augury and divination give 90% accurate answers; prepares scrying as 4th-level spell (6th).

features_gained.name: Espíritu Errante (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Al 12º nivel, vincula con un espíritu adicional cuya magia se suma a la del visión y del espíritu original.
features_gained.description_en: At 12th level, bonds with an additional spirit whose magic adds to vision and original spirit magic.

oozemorph.name: Oozemorph
oozemorph.description_es: Cambiaformas cuyo cuerpo natural es un cieno protoplásmico; cambia formas animales por habilidades de limo (compresión, escurrimiento y RD).
oozemorph.description_en: Shifter whose true form is a protoplasmic ooze; trades animal aspects for ooze abilities (compression, fluid body, and DR).

features_gained.name: Compresión (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Se exprime por espacios estrechos según las reglas universales de monstruos.
features_gained.description_en: Squeezes through tight spaces per universal monster rules.

features_gained.name: Cuerpo Fluídico (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Su forma base es un cieno: tipo limo, inmune a críticos y flanqueo; usa una transformación humanoide a voluntad (alterar el yo).
features_gained.description_en: Base form is protoplasmic ooze: ooze type, immune to crits and flanking; humanoid transform at-will (alter self).

features_gained.name: Armas Mórficas (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Crea armas naturales (1d6, tipo variable); ataques adicionales a niveles 6 y 15.
features_gained.description_en: Creates natural weapons (1d6, variable type); extra attacks at 6th and 15th levels.

features_gained.name: Empatía con Limos (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Empatía salvaje modificada que solo afecta a limos de baja Inteligencia.
features_gained.description_en: Modified wild empathy that only influences low-Int oozes.

features_gained.name: Reducción de Daño (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: RD 4/cortante al 2º, +2 cada 4 niveles (máx. 14/cortante al 20º).
features_gained.description_en: DR 4/slashing at 2nd, +2 every 4 levels (max DR 14/slashing at 20th).

features_gained.name: Limo Adherente (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Velocidad de trepar 10 pies en su forma natural (4º).
features_gained.description_en: 10-foot climb speed in natural form (4th).

weretouched.name: Weretouched
weretouched.description_es: Cambiaformas con sangre licantrópica; restringido a un único aspecto animal a cambio de RD/plata y forma híbrida.
weretouched.description_en: Shifter with lycanthropic blood; restricted to a single animal aspect in exchange for DR/silver and hybrid form.

features_gained.name: Aspecto de Licántropo (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Solo un aspecto animal; al 5º gana RD = 1/2 nivel hasta 10/plata al 20º e inmunidad a la maldición.
features_gained.description_en: Single animal aspect; at 5th gains DR = half level up to 10/silver at 20th and immunity to lycanthropy curse.

features_gained.name: Empatía Licantrópica (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Empatía salvaje con +4, pero solo con su tipo animal elegido.
features_gained.description_en: Wild empathy with +4 bonus, only with chosen animal type.

features_gained.name: Forma Salvaje Licantrópica (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Forma salvaje limitada al animal elegido; permite forma híbrida con +2 Fue, +2 CA natural y todos los ataques naturales.
features_gained.description_en: Wild shape limited to chosen animal; hybrid form grants +2 Str, +2 natural armor, and all major-form natural attacks.

elementalist_shifter.name: Elementalist Shifter
elementalist_shifter.description_es: Cambiaformas vinculado a los elementos; cambia formas animales por aspectos elementales y la capacidad de combinarlos.
elementalist_shifter.description_en: Shifter bound to the elements; trades animal forms for elemental aspects and the ability to combine them.

features_gained.name: Aspecto Elemental (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Elige un aspecto elemental (Aire, Tierra, Fuego o Agua) al 1º; aspectos extra a niveles 5, 10 y 15.
features_gained.description_en: Chooses one elemental aspect (Air, Earth, Fire, or Water) at 1st; more at 5th, 10th, and 15th.

features_gained.name: Habla Elemental (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Lenguas con elementales coincidentes mientras está en forma elemental.
features_gained.description_en: Tongues with matching elementals while in elemental form.

features_gained.name: Golpe Elemental (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Acción rápida: imbuye su ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con 1d6 daño elemental (+1d6 cada 4, máx. 6d6).
features_gained.description_en: Swift action: charges melee attack with 1d6 elemental damage (+1d6 per 4 levels, max 6d6).

features_gained.name: Forma Elemental (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Forma salvaje funciona como cuerpo elemental I-IV según su aspecto.
features_gained.description_en: Wild Shape functions as elemental body spells based on chosen aspect.

features_gained.name: Omnielementalista (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Combina dos aspectos elementales simultáneamente (9º) ganando habilidades sinérgicas como tormenta de cenizas o vapor.
features_gained.description_en: Combines two elemental aspects simultaneously (9th), gaining synergies like ash storm or steam cloud.

feyform_shifter.name: Feyform Shifter
feyform_shifter.description_es: Cambiaformas con sangre feérica; sustituye sus aspectos animales por una forma feérica con RD/hierro frío y resistencia al encantamiento.
feyform_shifter.description_en: Shifter with fey blood; replaces animal aspects with a fey form granting DR/cold iron and enchantment resistance.

features_gained.name: Aspecto Feérico (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Forma feérica como acción rápida: visión con poca luz, RD 1/hierro frío y ocultación; mejora a niveles 5, 10, 15, 20.
features_gained.description_en: Swift-action fey form: low-light vision, DR 1/cold iron, and concealment; improves at 5, 10, 15, 20.

features_gained.name: Forma Feérica (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Usa forma salvaje para convertirse en una criatura feérica mediante forma feérica I-IV (4º).
features_gained.description_en: Uses wild shape to become a fey creature via fey form I-IV spells (4th).

features_gained.name: Cambiaformas Feérico (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Gana un segundo aspecto (animal) y combina aspecto feérico con un aspecto animal (9º).
features_gained.description_en: Gains second (animal) aspect and combines fey aspect with one animal aspect (9th).

features_gained.name: Cambiaformas Feérico Mayor (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Tercer aspecto; combina el aspecto feérico con dos aspectos animales (14º).
features_gained.description_en: Third aspect; combines fey aspect with two animal aspects (14th).

features_gained.name: Aspecto Final (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Cuarto aspecto; usa todas las formas menores y mayores con aspecto feérico a voluntad (20º).
features_gained.description_en: Fourth aspect; uses all minor and major forms with fey aspect at will (20th).

battle_scion.name: Battle Scion
battle_scion.description_es: Skald de cuna noble que canjea poderes de furia y conocimiento bárdico amplio por dotes de combate/equipo y la capacidad de imponer geas a aliados.
battle_scion.description_en: Noble-born skald who trades rage powers and broad bardic knowledge for combat/teamwork feats and the ability to impose geas-like quests on allies.

features_gained.name: Presencia Cortés (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: +½ nivel a Intimidar; ventaja en duelos verbales; conoc. bárdico limitado a Geografía, Historia, Local y Nobleza.
features_gained.description_en: +½ level to Intimidate; bonus in verbal duels; bardic knowledge limited to Geography, History, Local, Nobility.

features_gained.name: Pericia de Batalla (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al ganar poderes de furia, puede tomar dotes de combate o de equipo; puede otorgarlas a aliados con furia inspirada (2 rondas/asalto).
features_gained.description_en: When gaining rage powers, may select combat/teamwork feats; can grant them to inspired-rage allies (2 rounds/round).

features_gained.name: Canto de Misión (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Gasta 4 rondas de canto airado para vincular a objetivos voluntarios a una misión noble (geas); múltiples al 14º.
features_gained.description_en: Spends 4 raging-song rounds to bind willing targets to a noble quest (geas-like); multiple at 14th.

features_gained.name: Vástago Que Vuelve (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Al morir entra en sueño cataléptico 3 días y vuelve a la vida como levantar muertos al 20º.
features_gained.description_en: Upon death, enters deathlike sleep for 3 days then returns as raise dead at 20th.

spell_warrior.name: Spell Warrior
spell_warrior.description_es: Skald especializado en contrahechizos y en infundir las armas aliadas con poder mágico, sustituyendo Furia Inspirada por Canto del Arma.
spell_warrior.description_en: Skald specialized in counterspelling and enchanting allied weapons, replacing Inspired Rage with Weapon Song.

features_gained.name: Contrahechizo Mejorado (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Recibe Contrahechizo Mejorado como dote bonificada al 1º.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Improved Counterspell as bonus feat at 1st.

features_gained.name: Canto del Arma (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Otorga +1 de mejora a las armas aliadas (+1 cada 5 niveles, máx. +5); puede gastar puntos por propiedades especiales.
features_gained.description_en: Grants allies' weapons +1 enhancement (+1 per 5 levels, max +5); may spend bonus on special abilities.

features_gained.name: Contrahechizo Mayor (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Al 5º gasta 2 espacios de cualquier escuela; al 11º basta uno; al 17º gana Parar Conjuro.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th spends two spell slots regardless of school; one slot at 11th; gains Parry Spell at 17th.

features_gained.name: Canto de Manipulación Arcana (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Al 10º contrahechiza como acción inmediata mientras canta, gastando rondas iguales al nivel del hechizo.
features_gained.description_en: At 10th counterspells as immediate action while singing, costing rounds equal to spell's level.

features_gained.name: Sabotaje de Conjuro (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Al 20º, los contrahechizos exitosos infligen 1d6 por nivel del conjuro al lanzador (mitad si Voluntad).
features_gained.description_en: At 20th, successful counterspells deal 1d6 per spell level to opponent (half on Will save).

herald_of_the_horn.name: Herald of the Horn
herald_of_the_horn.description_es: Skald cuya magia se canaliza a través de un cuerno mágico; sacrifica Escribir Pergaminos y usos de Lore Conjural por trompetazos sónicos.
herald_of_the_horn.description_en: Skald whose magic flows through a magical horn; trades Scribe Scroll and spell-kenning uses for sonic horn blasts.

features_gained.name: Vínculo Arcano (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Vincula con un cuerno como un hechicero; debe sostenerlo para lanzar sus hechizos de skald.
features_gained.description_en: Bonds with a horn like a sorcerer; must hold it to cast skald spells.

features_gained.name: Réplica Estimulante (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Al iniciar canto airado, gasta 4 rondas para que los aliados a 60 pies repitan salvaciones contra encantamiento o miedo con +2.
features_gained.description_en: When starting raging song, expends 4 rounds to grant allies within 60 ft a new save vs enchantment/fear with +2.

features_gained.name: Llamada del Cuerno (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Hechizos sónicos lanzados por el cuerno tienen +1 a la DC (+1 más a niveles 13 y 19).
features_gained.description_en: Sonic descriptor spells through the horn gain +1 DC (+1 more at 13th and 19th).

features_gained.name: Estallido Demoledor (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Una vez al día crea una onda de choque como cuerno de detonación (DC 10 + ½ nivel + Car); 2/día como mayor al 17º.
features_gained.description_en: Once daily creates shock wave as horn of blasting (DC 10 + ½ level + Cha); 2/day as greater horn at 17th.

fated_champion.name: Fated Champion
fated_champion.description_es: Skald vidente que cambia versado y verso de fatalidad por presciencia, intuición en iniciativa y rerolls en momentos críticos.
fated_champion.description_en: Seer-skald who trades well-versed and dirge of doom for foresight, initiative insight, and clutch rerolls.

features_gained.name: Vigilante del Tejido (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Bono de intuición a iniciativa = ½ nivel de skald, percibiendo eventos venideros (2º).
features_gained.description_en: Insight bonus to initiative equal to ½ skald level, perceiving impending events (2nd).

features_gained.name: Vidente Lejano (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Modifica Lore Conjural: hechizos de adivinación cuestan 1 nivel menos y los de daño 1 nivel más (5º).
features_gained.description_en: Modifies spell kenning: divination spells cost one level less, damage spells one level more (5th).

features_gained.name: Escudo de la Presciencia (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Mientras canta, inmune a miedo y los aliados ganan +5 a salvaciones de miedo (10º).
features_gained.description_en: While using raging song, immune to fear and allies gain +5 vs fear (10th).

features_gained.name: Hoy No (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Acción inmediata: gasta 10 rondas de canto para forzar una repetición de salvación o ataque enemigo (20º).
features_gained.description_en: Immediate action: expends 10 raging-song rounds to force reroll of a save or enemy attack (20th).

urban_skald.name: Urban Skald
urban_skald.source: Pathfinder Player Companion: Heroes of the Street
urban_skald.description_es: Skald de calles que sustituye armadura media y canto de marcha por una furia controlada y mofas humillantes a sus enemigos.
urban_skald.description_en: Street skald who trades medium armor and song of marching for controlled rage and humiliating mockery of foes.

features_gained.name: Furia Inspirada Controlada (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Otorga +2 moral (escala a +4 al 8º y +6 al 16º) a Fue, Des o Con sin penalización de CA.
features_gained.description_en: Grants +2 morale (scaling to +4 at 8th, +6 at 16th) to Str, Dex, or Con without AC penalty.

features_gained.name: Mofa Enfurecedora (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Objetivo a 30 pies con salvación o –2 CA/ataque, sin habilidades mentales y necesidad de concentración (3º).
features_gained.description_en: Target within 30 ft saves or suffers –2 AC/attacks, can't use mental skills, needs concentration to cast (3rd).

features_gained.name: Difamación Humillante (Su)
features_gained.description_es: El objetivo no puede usar bonos de moral, dotes de equipo, ni ser ayudado; salva contra todo hechizo (10º).
features_gained.description_en: Primary target loses morale bonuses, teamwork feats, treats no creatures as allies; saves vs all spells (10th).

features_gained.name: Detrás de la Multitud (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: +1 esquiva a CA junto a 2+ aliados (escala a +2 al 9º, +3 al 15º).
features_gained.description_en: +1 dodge AC adjacent to 2+ allies (scales to +2 at 9th, +3 at 15th).

stygian_slayer.name: Stygian Slayer
stygian_slayer.description_es: Asesino entrenado en magia de sombras; sacrifica armaduras pesadas y talentos por invisibilidad innata, uso arcano de pergaminos y forma de niebla sombría.
stygian_slayer.description_en: Slayer trained in shadow magic; trades heavy armor and talents for innate invisibility, arcane scroll use, and shadowy mist form.

features_gained.name: Invisibilidad (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Lanza invisibilidad 1/día, +1 cada 4 niveles (4º).
features_gained.description_en: Casts invisibility 1/day, +1 per 4 levels (4th).

features_gained.name: Uso de Conjuros
features_gained.description_es: Activa objetos arcanos como lanzador de conjuros con acceso a oscuridad, ocultar mente, modificar memoria y otros (7º).
features_gained.description_en: Activates arcane spell-completion items with access to darkness, nondetection, modify memory, and others (7th).

features_gained.name: Forma de Niebla Sombría (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Se convierte en niebla oscura (forma gaseosa + oscuridad) min/día = nivel (10º).
features_gained.description_en: Becomes inky mist (gaseous form + fog cloud) for minutes/day equal to level (10th).

vanguard.name: Vanguard
vanguard.description_es: Asesino comandante de batalla que renuncia a Rastreo y Acechador por dotes de equipo, iniciativa y la capacidad de compartir su objetivo estudiado.
vanguard.description_en: Battlefield commander slayer who trades Track and Stalker for teamwork feats, initiative, and shared studied target.

features_gained.name: Vigía (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Suma ½ nivel (mín. 1) a tiradas de iniciativa.
features_gained.description_en: Adds ½ level (min 1) to initiative checks.

features_gained.name: Táctico (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Recibe una dote de equipo; comparte una con aliados a 30 pies durante 3+ rondas 1/día.
features_gained.description_en: Gains bonus teamwork feat; shares one with allies within 30 ft for 3+ rounds 1/day.

features_gained.name: Vínculo de Vanguardia (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Comparte la mitad del bono de objetivo estudiado con aliados cercanos durante rondas = mod. Int.
features_gained.description_en: Shares half studied-target bonus with nearby allies for rounds equal to Int modifier.

features_gained.name: Siempre Listo (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Nunca está desprevenido; siempre actúa en asaltos de sorpresa (aunque desprevenido hasta actuar).
features_gained.description_en: Never considered unaware; always acts in surprise rounds (flat-footed until acting).

ankous_shadow.name: Ankou's Shadow
ankous_shadow.source: Pathfinder Player Companion: Legacy of the First World
ankous_shadow.description_es: Asesino que crea duplicados sombríos de sí mismo; cambia objetivo estudiado y acechador por imágenes sombrías que flanquean y atacan.
ankous_shadow.description_en: Slayer who creates shadowy duplicates; trades studied target and stalker for shadow images that flank and attack.

features_gained.name: Doble Sombrío (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Crea duplicados como imágenes en espejo; al 5º dos que se mueven aparte y flanquean; al 10º tres que pueden atacar; al 15º cuatro.
features_gained.description_en: Creates duplicates like mirror images; at 5th two move separately and flank; at 10th three can attack; at 15th four.

features_gained.name: Visión de Ankou (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Acción rápida para ver invisibilidad min/nivel/día (7º).
features_gained.description_en: Swift-action see invisibility for 1 min/level/day (7th).

features_gained.name: Presa Sombría (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Designa una presa si tiene un doble sombrío activo, sin requerir objetivo estudiado.
features_gained.description_en: Quarry designation requires a shadow double present but doesn't require the target be studied.

features_gained.name: Sombras Liberadas (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Al 20º, todos sus dobles actúan independientemente 1 minuto como acción estándar.
features_gained.description_en: At 20th, all shadow doubles act independently for 1 minute as a standard action.

deliverer.name: Deliverer
deliverer.description_es: Asesino divino que persigue a los enemigos del alineamiento de su deidad; cambia talentos por celo determinado y daño divino contra opuestos.
deliverer.description_en: Divine slayer who hunts foes opposed to their deity; trades talents for determined zeal and divine damage against opposites.

features_gained.name: Competencia con Arma Favorita
features_gained.description_es: Gana competencia con el arma favorita de su deidad además de las del asesino.
features_gained.description_en: Gains proficiency with deity's favored weapon in addition to standard slayer proficiencies.

features_gained.name: Celo Determinado (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Contra enemigos cuyo alineamiento difiere ≥2 pasos: +2 a Voluntad y beneficio de Diehard hasta el siguiente turno (2º).
features_gained.description_en: Vs foes whose alignment differs ≥2 steps: +2 vs their Will effects and Diehard until end of next turn (2nd).

features_gained.name: Verdadero Creyente (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Contra enemigos opuestos no queda atontado por PG negativos ni pierde 1 PG por asalto (6º).
features_gained.description_en: Vs alignment-opposed foes isn't staggered at negative HP nor loses 1 HP per round (6th).

features_gained.name: Anatema Divino (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Acción libre: declara un objetivo estudiado opuesto como anatema; sus ataques infligen +2d6 daño divino (10º).
features_gained.description_en: Free action: declares an alignment-opposed studied target as anathema; attacks deal +2d6 divine damage (10th).

cleaner.name: Cleaner
cleaner.description_es: Asesino especializado en encubrir crímenes y borrar pruebas; sacrifica Rastreo y Acechador por engaño, alteración de la escena y misdirection a voluntad.
cleaner.description_en: Slayer specialized in covering up crimes and erasing evidence; trades Track and Stalker for deceit, scene-altering, and at-will misdirection.

features_gained.name: Engañoso (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Recibe la dote Engañoso de bonificación al 1º.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Deceitful bonus feat at 1st.

features_gained.name: Sin Dejar Rastro (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Tras estudiar una zona (1 min por cuadrado de 10 pies), usa Disfraz o Sigilo para alterar/ocultar pruebas con +4 (4º).
features_gained.description_en: After studying a location (1 min per 10-ft square), uses Disguise or Stealth to alter/conceal evidence with +4 (4th).

features_gained.name: Despistar (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Al 7º lanza desorientación sobre sí mismo a voluntad, hasta disipar como acción estándar.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th casts misdirection on himself at will, lasts until dismissed as standard action.

tattooed_sorcerer.name: Tattooed Sorcerer
tattooed_sorcerer.description_es: Hechicero varisiano cuyos tatuajes mágicos sirven como conducto de magia y de su familiar; gana un familiar tatuaje a cambio de poderes de linaje.
tattooed_sorcerer.description_en: Varisian sorcerer whose magical tattoos serve as both spell focus and familiar vessel, trading bloodline powers for tattoo magic and a familiar.

features_gained.name: Familiar Tattoo (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Obtiene un familiar como con vínculo arcano de mago; el familiar puede transformarse en un tatuaje sobre su piel.
features_gained.description_en: Gains a familiar as a wizard's arcane bond; the familiar can transform into a tattoo carried on her flesh.

features_gained.name: Varisian Tattoo (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1, obtiene el dote Tatuaje Varisiano sin requisitos, eligiendo una escuela de magia mejorada.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level gains Varisian Tattoo as a bonus feat ignoring prerequisites, picking an enhanced school.

features_gained.name: Bloodline Tattoos (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Sus conjuros de linaje se manifiestan como tatuajes y reciben el bono de Tatuaje Varisiano sin importar la escuela.
features_gained.description_en: Bloodline spells manifest as tattoos and gain the Varisian Tattoo bonus regardless of school.

features_gained.name: Create Spell Tattoo (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Desde nivel 7, crea un tatuaje de conjuro al día como acción estándar; 2/día a nivel 11 y 3/día a nivel 15.
features_gained.description_en: From 7th level, creates one spell tattoo per day as a standard action; twice at 11th and three times at 15th.

features_gained.name: Enhanced Varisian Tattoo (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 9, convierte un conjuro conocido en una habilidad mágica usable 1/día con +2 al nivel de lanzador.
features_gained.description_en: At 9th level, converts one known spell into a spell-like ability usable once per day at +2 caster level.

seeker_sorcerer.name: Seeker
seeker_sorcerer.description_es: Hechicero erudito de la Sociedad Pathfinder, especializado en trampas y secretos mágicos antiguos a costa de poderes menores de linaje.
seeker_sorcerer.description_en: Pathfinder Society scholar specializing in traps and ancient magical secrets at the cost of minor bloodline powers.

features_gained.name: Tinkering (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Inutilizar Mecanismo es habilidad de clase; añade la mitad del nivel a Percepción para localizar trampas y a Inutilizar Mecanismo, pudiendo usarlo en trampas mágicas.
features_gained.description_en: Disable Device is a class skill; adds half class level to Perception to find traps and to Disable Device, including magical traps.

features_gained.name: Seeker Lore (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, +4 a tiradas de concentración, de nivel de lanzador contra RC y a Conocimiento (arcano) y Saber Mágico relativos a su linaje.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, +4 to concentration, caster level checks vs SR, and Knowledge (arcana)/Spellcraft tied to bloodline spells.

features_gained.name: Seeker Magic (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 15, reduce en 1 el coste de nivel de los dotes metamagia aplicados a sus conjuros de linaje.
features_gained.description_en: At 15th level, reduces metamagic level adjustment by 1 when applied to bloodline bonus spells.

eldritch_scrapper.name: Eldritch Scrapper
eldritch_scrapper.description_es: Hechicero callejero que aprende a luchar improvisando dotes de combate como un peleador, sacrificando varios poderes de linaje.
eldritch_scrapper.description_en: Street-fighting sorcerer who improvises combat feats like a brawler, sacrificing several bloodline powers.

features_gained.name: Martial Flexibility (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Gana la flexibilidad marcial del peleador usando su nivel de hechicero; Golpe Arcano y Lanzar en Combate cuentan como dotes elegibles.
features_gained.description_en: Gains the brawler's martial flexibility using sorcerer level; Arcane Strike and Combat Casting are valid choices.

features_gained.name: Improved Martial Flexibility (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 9 puede activar dos dotes simultáneos (uno como acción de movimiento o ambos como acción estándar).
features_gained.description_en: At 9th level she may activate two feats at once (one as a move action or both as a standard action).

features_gained.name: Greater Martial Flexibility (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 15 puede activar tres dotes a la vez (uno como acción rápida, dos de movimiento, o los tres como estándar).
features_gained.description_en: At 15th level she may activate three feats at once (one swift, two move, or all three as a standard action).

features_gained.name: Bloodline Weapons
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, si su poder inicial de linaje otorgaría ataques naturales (mordiscos o garras), puede sustituir el poder de nivel 3 por él.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, if her initial bloodline power would grant natural attacks she may substitute it for her 3rd-level bloodline power.

sorcerer_of_sleep.name: Sorcerer of Sleep
sorcerer_of_sleep.description_es: Hechicera vinculada al pesh y al opio que canaliza su magia mediante el toque del soñador; pierde Eschew Materials y arcano del linaje.
sorcerer_of_sleep.description_en: Sorcerer bound to pesh and opium that channels magic through a dreamer's touch; loses Eschew Materials and bloodline arcana.

features_gained.name: Pesh Expert
features_gained.description_es: Suma la mitad de su nivel a Tasar, Artesanía (alquimia), Curar y Conocimiento (local) para asuntos de drogas.
features_gained.description_en: Adds half class level to Appraise, Craft (alchemy), Heal and Knowledge (local) checks involving pesh and other drugs.

features_gained.name: Sahir-Afiyun
features_gained.description_es: Gana este dote como gratuito a nivel 1 sin requisitos, y suma cuatro dotes ligados al pesh a sus dotes de linaje.
features_gained.description_en: Gains the Sahir-Afiyun feat at 1st level ignoring prerequisites and adds four pesh feats to her bloodline feat options.

features_gained.name: Pesh Touch (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Toque de combate, 3 + Car/día, que aplica +2 a Fuerza, fatiga, o –2 a salvaciones contra ilusiones y mente durante rondas iguales a la mitad del nivel.
features_gained.description_en: Touch attack 3 + Cha/day inflicting either +2 Strength, fatigue, or –2 saves vs illusion/mind-affecting for rounds equal to half class level.

stone_warder.name: Stone Warder
stone_warder.description_es: Hechicero ligado a linajes de tierra que graba runas defensivas en la piedra; no puede lanzar conjuros con descriptor de aire, frío, electricidad, fuego o agua.
stone_warder.description_en: Earth-bloodline sorcerer who carves defensive runes into stone but cannot cast spells with the air, cold, electricity, fire, or water descriptor.

features_gained.name: Blood of the Earth
features_gained.description_es: Debe elegir un linaje vinculado a la tierra: deep earth, draconic (cobre), elemental (tierra), orco o shaitan.
features_gained.description_en: Must choose an earth-themed bloodline: deep earth, draconic (copper), elemental (earth), orc, or shaitan.

features_gained.name: Power of Stone (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Gana +1 al nivel de lanzador (más a niveles altos) en colinas, montañas o subterráneo, pero no puede lanzar conjuros de aire, frío, electricidad, fuego o agua.
features_gained.description_en: +1 caster level (more at higher levels) in hills, mountains, or underground, but cannot cast air, cold, electricity, fire, or water spells.

features_gained.name: Rune of Warding (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Crea runas-trampa que almacenan un conjuro y se activan al pisarlas, 3 + Car/día; duran rondas o minutos por nivel sobre piedra.
features_gained.description_en: Creates trap runes storing a spell that triggers when stepped on, 3 + Cha/day; lasts rounds or minutes per level on stone.

fractured_mind.name: Fractured Mind
fractured_mind.description_es: Espiritista cuya conexión con su fantasma se basa en una emoción intensa; lanza conjuros con Carisma en lugar de Sabiduría.
fractured_mind.description_en: Spiritualist whose phantom bond is rooted in raw emotion, casting spells with Charisma instead of Wisdom.

features_gained.name: Emotional Spellcasting
features_gained.description_es: Usa Carisma en lugar de Sabiduría para conjuros, niveles, CDs de salvación y conjuros adicionales.
features_gained.description_en: Uses Charisma instead of Wisdom for spell access, save DCs, and bonus spells per day.

features_gained.name: Emotional Power (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Niveles 5, 7, 9 y 16 conceden habilidades mágicas según el enfoque emocional del fantasma (ira, fervor, desesperación, miedo, odio, celos o celo).
features_gained.description_en: Gains spell-like abilities at 5th, 7th, 9th and 16th tied to the phantom's emotional focus (anger, dedication, despair, fear, hatred, jealousy or zeal).

haunted_spiritualist.name: Haunted
haunted_spiritualist.description_es: Espiritista atormentado por un fantasma dominante; puede ceder el control de su cuerpo para fortalecer al fantasma a costa de quedar nauseado.
haunted_spiritualist.description_en: Spiritualist tormented by a dominant phantom that can usurp her body to grow stronger while she remains nauseated.

features_gained.name: Usurp Manifestation (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Desde nivel 3, como acción inmediata el fantasma aumenta una categoría de tamaño y +2 a CA natural mientras la espiritista queda nauseada; 3 + nivel rondas/día.
features_gained.description_en: From 3rd level, as an immediate action the phantom grows one size and gains +2 natural armor while the spiritualist is nauseated; 3 + level rounds/day.

features_gained.name: Usurp Spell (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 8, el fantasma puede consumir un espacio de conjuro como acción rápida para lanzar conjuros de toque sobre sí mismo.
features_gained.description_en: At 8th level the phantom may burn a spell slot as a swift action to cast touch spells on itself.

features_gained.name: Teleplasmic Surge (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 13, el fantasma gana +2 de moral a ataques, salvaciones y pruebas de habilidad cuando usurpa.
features_gained.description_en: At 13th level the phantom gains +2 morale on attacks, saves, and skill checks while usurping.

features_gained.name: Ferocious Phantom (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 18, el fantasma adquiere RD 10/cortante y RC igual a 11 + nivel.
features_gained.description_en: At 18th level the phantom gains DR 10/slashing and SR equal to 11 + class level.

features_gained.name: Usurped Bond (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 17, las rondas diarias de Usurp Manifestation pasan a 3 + el doble de su nivel.
features_gained.description_en: At 17th level usurp manifestation rounds become 3 + twice her class level per day.

onmyoji.name: Onmyoji
onmyoji.description_es: Espiritista místico oriental cuyo fantasma reside en su mente; lanza conjuros divinos usando ofudas como foco sagrado.
onmyoji.description_en: Eastern mystic spiritualist whose phantom dwells in her mind; casts divine spells using ofuda paper talismans as a holy focus.

features_gained.name: Divine Spellcasting
features_gained.description_es: Sus conjuros usan componentes verbales y somáticos en lugar de pensamiento y emoción, con un ofuda como foco divino.
features_gained.description_en: Spells use verbal and somatic components instead of thought and emotion, with an ofuda serving as divine focus.

features_gained.name: Spiritual Resistance (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Mientras el fantasma esté confinado, +2 a salvaciones contra capacidades sobrenaturales y mágicas de hadas, exteriores y no muertos incorpóreos; aumenta cada 6 niveles hasta +5.
features_gained.description_en: While the phantom is confined, +2 on saves vs spell-like and supernatural abilities of fey, outsiders and incorporeal undead; +1 every 6 levels (max +5).

features_gained.name: Divine Teachings (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 y cada 3 niveles, añade un conjuro de clérigo a sus conjuros conocidos, lanzable solo con el fantasma confinado.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level and every 3 levels thereafter, adds a cleric spell to her known spells, castable only while the phantom is confined.

phantom_blade.name: Phantom Blade
phantom_blade.description_es: Espiritista que canaliza a su fantasma en un arma ectoplasmática inteligente similar a la hoja negra del magus; combina conjuros y combate marcial.
phantom_blade.description_en: Spiritualist who manifests her phantom as a sentient ectoplasmic weapon akin to a magus's black blade, blending spells and martial combat.

features_gained.name: Phantom Weapon
features_gained.description_es: Manifiesta un arma ectoplasmática senciente (similar a la hoja negra del magus) con progresión propia.
features_gained.description_en: Manifests an ectoplasmic sentient weapon (akin to a magus's black blade) with its own progression.

features_gained.name: Weapon and Armor Proficiency
features_gained.description_es: Gana competencia con armas sencillas y marciales y con armaduras ligeras y medias.
features_gained.description_en: Gains proficiency with all simple and martial weapons and with light and medium armor.

features_gained.name: Spell Combat (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Puede lanzar conjuros y empuñar el arma fantasma a la vez con las reglas del combate mágico del magus.
features_gained.description_en: May cast spells while wielding her phantom weapon using magus spell combat rules.

features_gained.name: Spellstrike (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2, entrega conjuros mediante el arma fantasma como el spellstrike del magus.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level, delivers spells through the phantom weapon like a magus's spellstrike.

features_gained.name: Spirit of War (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 y cada 5 niveles, gana un dote de combate adicional, contando su nivel como BAB y nivel de guerrero para requisitos.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level and every 5 levels thereafter, gains a bonus combat feat, treating spiritualist level as BAB and fighter level for prerequisites.

features_gained.name: Etheric Focus (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4, como acción rápida se centra para lanzar conjuros con componentes de pensamiento; pasa a acción libre a nivel 12.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, centers herself as a swift action to aid casting thought-component spells; becomes a free action at 12th.

geist_channeler.name: Geist Channeler
geist_channeler.description_es: Espiritista cuyo fantasma se manifiesta exclusivamente en forma incorpórea y ataca como un poltergeist; renuncia al enfoque emocional.
geist_channeler.description_en: Spiritualist whose phantom manifests only in incorporeal form and attacks like a poltergeist, forgoing the emotional focus.

features_gained.name: Geistform Phantom
features_gained.description_es: El fantasma carece de Fuerza, ataca con un golpe incorpóreo de 1d8 (hasta 2d10 a nivel 20) y solo daña a otros incorpóreos hasta poder infundirse de ectoplasma.
features_gained.description_en: The phantom lacks Strength, attacks with a 1d8 incorporeal slam (up to 2d10 at 20th), and can only harm incorporeal foes until it briefly infuses with ectoplasm.

features_gained.name: Emotionless
features_gained.description_es: Recibe rangos de Conocimiento (arcano) y (religión) iguales a sus DG, dote Voluntad de Hierro, y poderes especiales: Toque inquietante, Maña del poltergeist, Protección espectral y Posesión maligna.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Knowledge (arcana/religion) ranks equal to its HD, Iron Will as a bonus feat, plus Unnerving Touch, Poltergeist's Knack, Spectral Protection, and Malevolent Possession.

features_gained.name: Spiritual Manifestation
features_gained.description_es: Su Bonded Manifestation manifiesta al fantasma únicamente en forma incorpórea.
features_gained.description_en: Bonded manifestation manifests the phantom only in incorporeal form.

wild_caller.name: Wild Caller
wild_caller.source: Pathfinder Player Companion: Heroes of the Wild
wild_caller.description_es: Invocador cuyo eidolón es una planta extraplanar y que llama aliados de la naturaleza en lugar de monstruos.
wild_caller.description_en: Summoner whose eidolon is an extraplanar plant and who calls nature's allies instead of monsters.

features_gained.name: Plant Eidolon
features_gained.description_es: Su eidolón es una criatura planta extraplanar con una de cuatro formas base (cactus, conífera, hongo o árbol), cada una con evoluciones libres propias.
features_gained.description_en: His eidolon is an extraplanar plant creature with one of four base forms (cactus, conifer, mushroom, or tree), each with free evolutions.

features_gained.name: Summon Nature's Ally (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Reemplaza convocar monstruo: lanza convocar aliado de la naturaleza 3 + Car/día con duración de 1 minuto por nivel.
features_gained.description_en: Replaces summon monster; casts summon nature's ally 3 + Cha/day with 1 minute per level duration.

features_gained.name: Fey Friend (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 10, +4 a Engañar, Diplomacia y Averiguar Intenciones contra hadas.
features_gained.description_en: At 10th level, +4 on Bluff, Diplomacy, and Sense Motive checks against fey.

broodmaster.name: Broodmaster
broodmaster.description_es: Invocador que llama una camada de eidolones más pequeños en lugar de uno solo, repartiendo sus puntos de evolución entre todos.
broodmaster.description_en: Summoner who calls a brood of smaller eidolons instead of one, splitting evolution points among them.

features_gained.name: Eidolon Brood
features_gained.description_es: Convoca varios eidolones; cada uno tiene su forma base y evoluciones libres, pero comparten BAB y salvaciones y reparten DG, dotes, evoluciones y ataques naturales.
features_gained.description_en: Summons multiple eidolons; each has its own base form and free evolutions but they share BAB and saves and divide HD, feats, evolutions, and natural attacks.

features_gained.name: Brood Link (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Como Vínculo Vital, pero solo puede sacrificar PG para proteger a un eidolón a la vez.
features_gained.description_en: Like life link, but only one eidolon at a time can be protected by HP transfer.

features_gained.name: Brood Senses, Shield Ally, Maker's Call, Transposition (modified)
features_gained.name_en: Brood Senses, Shield Ally, Maker's Call, Transposition (modified)
features_gained.description_es: Estas habilidades funcionan con un solo eidolón de la camada cada vez.
features_gained.description_en: These abilities apply only to one eidolon of the brood at a time.

features_gained.name: Larger Brood
features_gained.description_es: A niveles 8 y 13 puede gastar puntos de evolución para convocar eidolones más grandes o más numerosos.
features_gained.description_en: At 8th and 13th level, may spend evolution points to summon larger or additional eidolons.

features_gained.name: Brood Bond (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 14, transfiere daño solo a un eidolón cada vez.
features_gained.description_en: At 14th level, transfers damage to one eidolon at a time.

naturalist_summoner.name: Naturalist
naturalist_summoner.description_es: Invocador que comparte enfoques animales del cazador con su eidolón en lugar de protegerlo con escudo aliado.
naturalist_summoner.description_en: Summoner who shares hunter animal foci with his eidolon instead of using shield ally.

features_gained.name: Nature's Call (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1, lanza convocar aliado de la naturaleza I como habilidad mágica 3 + Car/día (animales, bestias mágicas o sabandijas).
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level, casts summon nature's ally I 3 + Cha/day (animals, magical beasts, or vermin only).

features_gained.name: Animal Focus (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4, como acción rápida aplica un enfoque animal del cazador a su eidolón usando nivel –2.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, as a swift action applies a hunter's animal focus to his eidolon using summoner level –2.

features_gained.name: Second Animal Focus (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 10, aplica dos enfoques animales distintos al eidolón a la vez.
features_gained.description_en: At 10th level, applies two different animal foci to the eidolon simultaneously.

features_gained.name: Shared Focus (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 14, gana sobre sí mismo uno de los enfoques activos en su eidolón.
features_gained.description_en: At 14th level, gains the same animal focus benefits as one of those active on his eidolon.

features_gained.name: Third Animal Focus (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 18, aplica tres enfoques animales distintos a la vez.
features_gained.description_en: At 18th level, applies three different animal foci at once.

spirit_summoner.name: Spirit Summoner
spirit_summoner.description_es: Invocador vinculado a un espíritu de chamán; gana habilidades del espíritu y embrujos a costa de varias habilidades estándar.
spirit_summoner.description_en: Summoner bound to a shaman spirit, gaining its abilities and hexes at the cost of several standard summoner features.

features_gained.name: Spirit (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Selecciona un espíritu de chamán y gana su habilidad de espíritu; añade los conjuros del espíritu a sus conjuros conocidos hasta nivel 6.
features_gained.description_en: Selects one shaman spirit and gains its spirit ability; spirit spells become spells known up to 6th level.

features_gained.name: Greater Spirit (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 9, obtiene la habilidad de espíritu mayor del espíritu elegido.
features_gained.description_en: At 9th level, gains the greater spirit ability of the chosen spirit.

features_gained.name: True Spirit (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 17, obtiene la habilidad de espíritu verdadero.
features_gained.description_en: At 17th level, gains the true spirit ability.

features_gained.name: Hex
features_gained.description_es: A niveles 6, 8, 10 y 16 escoge un embrujo de chamán acorde a su espíritu, usando Sabiduría para las CDs.
features_gained.description_en: At 6th, 8th, 10th and 16th levels selects a shaman hex appropriate to his spirit, using Wisdom for hex DCs.

features_gained.name: Eidolon (Altered)
features_gained.description_es: La forma del eidolón debe ser apropiada al espíritu elegido; las alteraciones permanentes que la cambien quedan prohibidas.
features_gained.description_en: The eidolon's form must match the chosen spirit; permanent changes inappropriate to it are forbidden.

evolutionist.name: Evolutionist
evolutionist.description_es: Invocador que reconfigura el cuerpo de su eidolón mediante rituales arcanos, sacrificando varias habilidades de apoyo.
evolutionist.description_en: Summoner who reshapes his eidolon's body through arcane rituals, trading several support abilities.

features_gained.name: Mutate Eidolon (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 6, mediante un ritual de 24 h y 200 po por nivel, reasigna las evoluciones del eidolón como si subiera de nivel.
features_gained.description_en: At 6th level, via a 24-hour ritual costing 200 gp per level, reassigns the eidolon's evolutions as if it had gained a level.

features_gained.name: Evolve Base Form (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 8, al subir de nivel puede cambiar la forma base del eidolón a otra hasta el siguiente ascenso.
features_gained.description_en: At 8th level, on each level-up may change the eidolon's base form, fixed until the next level-up.

features_gained.name: Transmogrify (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 12, lanza transmogrify 1/día sin componentes materiales, con tiempo de lanzamiento de 1 minuto.
features_gained.description_en: At 12th level, casts transmogrify once per day with no material components and a 1-minute casting time.

mouser.name: Mouser
mouser.description_es: Espadachín pequeño y ágil que se cuela bajo los pies de enemigos más grandes para hostigarlos.
mouser.description_en: Small, nimble swashbuckler who slips into the spaces of larger foes to harry them.

features_gained.name: Underfoot Assault (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Cuando un enemigo más grande adyacente falla un ataque cuerpo a cuerpo, gasta 1 punto de gallardía para entrar 5 pies en su espacio sin provocar AdO; el enemigo sufre –4 al ataque.
features_gained.description_en: When a larger adjacent foe misses her in melee, spends 1 panache to move 5 feet into the foe's space without provoking AoO; the foe suffers –4 to attacks.

features_gained.name: Quick Steal (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, al impactar a un enemigo más grande con arma perforante ligera puede gastar 1 gallardía como acción rápida para hacer una maniobra de robo sin AdO.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, on a hit against a larger foe with a light/one-handed piercing weapon, may spend 1 panache as a swift action to steal without AoO.

features_gained.name: Hamstring (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7, con 1 gallardía y un golpe a un enemigo mayor, intenta una maniobra de truco sucio (acción rápida) que solo puede dejar tambaleante al objetivo.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level, with 1 panache and a hit on a larger foe, attempts a swift dirty trick that can only stagger the target.

features_gained.name: Cat's Charge (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11, al cargar a un enemigo mayor con gallardía disponible, puede terminar la carga en cualquier casilla a su alcance.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level, when charging a larger foe with panache available, may end her charge in any space she can reach.

picaroon.name: Picaroon
picaroon.description_es: Espadachín que combina pistola y sable, ganando gallardía con disparos y golpes mortales.
picaroon.description_en: Pistol-and-rapier swashbuckler who earns panache with both gunshots and killing blows.

features_gained.name: Weapon Proficiency
features_gained.description_es: Gana competencia con todas las armas sencillas, marciales y armas de fuego de una mano.
features_gained.description_en: Gains proficiency with all simple and martial weapons plus one-handed firearms.

features_gained.name: Two-Weapon Finesse
features_gained.description_es: Recibe los beneficios de Finta con Arma y Combate con Dos Armas mientras blande arma perforante y pistola.
features_gained.description_en: Gains the benefits of Weapon Finesse and Two-Weapon Fighting while wielding a piercing melee weapon and a one-handed firearm.

features_gained.name: Melee Shooter (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1, gasta 1 gallardía como acción rápida para evitar AdO con su primer disparo a distancia mientras blanda ambas armas.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level, spend 1 panache as a swift action to avoid AoO on the first ranged attack when wielding both melee piercing weapon and firearm.

features_gained.name: Quick Clear (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, acción estándar y 1 gallardía para retirar la condición de Rota de una pistola encasquillada.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, a standard action and 1 panache removes the broken condition from a one-handed firearm.

features_gained.name: Gun Feint (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7, puede fintar con armas de fuego, ganando +5 al fintar gastando 1 gallardía durante un ataque completo.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level, may feint with firearms, gaining +5 by spending 1 panache during a full attack.

features_gained.name: Lightning Reload (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11, gasta 1 gallardía para recargar un cañón como acción rápida (libre con Recarga Rápida).
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level, spends 1 panache to reload a barrel as a swift action (free with Rapid Reload).

whirling_dervish.name: Whirling Dervish
whirling_dervish.description_es: Espadachín devoto de Sarenrae que blande la cimitarra como arma perforante; restringe cómo gana gallardía a actos de misericordia.
