whirling_dervish.description_en: Sarenrae-devoted swashbuckler who wields the scimitar as a piercing finesse weapon and earns panache through merciful deeds.

features_gained.name: Dervish Finesse (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Trata las cimitarras como armas perforantes a una mano para Finta con Arma y habilidades relacionadas si no usa otra arma o escudo en la otra mano.
features_gained.description_en: Treats scimitars as one-handed piercing weapons for Weapon Finesse and related abilities while no off-hand weapon or shield is wielded.

features_gained.name: Dawnflower's Mercy (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Solo gana gallardía por derribar exteriores malignos o no muertos, por hacer daño no letal, o por hacer rendirse a un malvado de DG significativos.
features_gained.description_en: Only gains panache from killing evil outsiders/undead, dealing nonlethal damage, or causing a notable evildoer to surrender.

features_gained.name: Dervish Dance (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4, aplica Destreza en lugar de Fuerza al daño con armas de finta; cuenta como tener el dote Dervish Dance.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, applies Dex instead of Str to damage with finesse weapons; counts as having the Dervish Dance feat.

features_gained.name: Whirlwind Dance (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7, gasta 1 gallardía como acción de asalto completo para moverse hasta su velocidad y atacar a varios enemigos a su alcance.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level, spends 1 panache as a full-round action to move up to her speed and make full-attack attacks against different creatures within reach.

features_gained.name: Dance of Dawn (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11, en luz tenue o más brillante, tras impactar gasta 1 gallardía para cegar al objetivo 1 ronda (Fortaleza niega).
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level, in dim light or brighter, after a hit spends 1 panache to potentially blind the target for 1 round (Fortitude negates).

features_gained.name: Dance of Mercy (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 19, tras confirmar un crítico con perforante, gasta 1 gallardía para infligir daño no letal igual a los PG actuales del objetivo +1 y paralizarlo 1 hora (Fortaleza niega).
features_gained.description_en: At 19th level, after confirming a piercing crit, spends 1 panache to deal nonlethal damage equal to the target's current HP +1 and paralyze it for 1 hour (Fortitude negates).

flying_blade.name: Flying Blade
flying_blade.description_es: Espadachín especializado en lanzar dagas y estrellas de filo, aplicando hazañas de gallardía a distancia.
flying_blade.description_en: Swashbuckler specializing in thrown daggers and starknives, applying panache deeds at range.

features_gained.name: Subtle Throw (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Lanza dagas o estrellas de filo sin provocar AdO gastando gallardía.
features_gained.description_en: Throws daggers or starknives without provoking AoO by spending panache.

features_gained.name: Disrupting Counter (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Gasta gallardía para hacer un AdO contra un atacante cuerpo a cuerpo, imponiendo –4 a sus ataques si impacta.
features_gained.description_en: Spends panache for an AoO against a melee attacker, imposing –4 to its attacks if it hits.

features_gained.name: Precise Throw (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Aplica precise strike a sus dagas y estrellas de filo arrojadas hasta 60 pies; ignora penalizadores de alcance gastando gallardía.
features_gained.description_en: Applies precise strike to thrown daggers and starknives within 60 ft; ignores range penalties by spending panache.

features_gained.name: Targeted Throw (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Apunta partes específicas del cuerpo con sus dagas y estrellas de filo arrojadas a 60 pies.
features_gained.description_en: Targets individual body parts with thrown daggers/starknives within 60 ft.

features_gained.name: Bleeding Wound (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Inflige daño por sangrado con sus dagas y estrellas de filo arrojadas a 60 pies.
features_gained.description_en: Deals bleed damage with thrown daggers/starknives within 60 ft.

features_gained.name: Perfect Throw (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Concentra su potencial de ataque en un solo lanzamiento con dagas/estrellas de filo a 60 pies.
features_gained.description_en: Pools attack potential into one ranged dagger/starknife attack within 60 ft.

features_gained.name: Flying Blade Training/Mastery (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Bonos crecientes a ataque y daño con dagas/estrellas, Crítico Mejorado, +5 al alcance por incremento, confirmación automática y multiplicador de crítico aumentado.
features_gained.description_en: Stacking attack/damage bonuses with daggers/starknives, Improved Critical, +5 ft range increments, automatic crit confirmation, and increased crit multipliers.

rondelero_swashbuckler.name: Rondelero Swashbuckler
rondelero_swashbuckler.description_es: Espadachín de tradición taldana que combina falcata y broquel; alterna ataques entre ambas armas y desarma con la rodela.
rondelero_swashbuckler.description_en: Taldan-trained swashbuckler combining falcata and buckler, alternating attacks between both weapons and disarming with the buckler.

features_gained.name: Falcata Emphasis (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Competencia con falcatas; las trata como armas perforantes a una mano para Finta con Arma y habilidades relacionadas.
features_gained.description_en: Proficiency with falcatas; treats them as one-handed piercing weapons for Weapon Finesse and related abilities.

features_gained.name: Buckler Bash (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2, golpea con su broquel como escudo ligero; trata el broquel como arma perforante a una mano para Finta.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level, shield bashes with the buckler as if a light shield; treats the buckler as a one-handed piercing weapon for finesse.

features_gained.name: Shield Catch (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, +4 a maniobras de desarmar con el broquel mientras tenga gallardía.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, +4 on disarm combat maneuver checks with buckler while she has panache.

features_gained.name: Rondelero Flexibility (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 6, alterna ataques con falcata y broquel sin penalizadores de Combate con Dos Armas ni perder bono de CA.
features_gained.description_en: At 6th level, alternates falcata and buckler attacks without two-weapon penalties or losing AC bonus.

features_gained.name: Rondelero Chop (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11, gasta 1 gallardía tras impactar para hacer una maniobra inmediata de Romper sin provocar AdO.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level, spending 1 panache after a melee hit lets her make an immediate sunder without provoking AoO.

features_gained.name: Shattering Chop (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 15, intento de Romper como acción de asalto completo con +4 e ignora la mitad de la dureza mientras tenga gallardía.
features_gained.description_en: At 15th level, full-round sunder attempt at +4 ignoring half the object's hardness while she has panache.

magical_child.name: Magical Child
magical_child.description_es: Vigilante anime cuya identidad heroica se transforma con luz y música; lanza conjuros de invocador y se acompaña de un familiar guía.
magical_child.description_en: Anime-style vigilante whose heroic identity transforms in light and music; casts summoner spells aided by a magical animal guide.
features_removed: Class Skills (Disable Device, Knowledge engineering, Perception, Survival)

features_gained.name: Spellcasting
features_gained.description_es: Lanza conjuros arcanos espontáneos de la lista del invocador unchained, repuestos con una hora de comunión con su guía animal.
features_gained.description_en: Casts spontaneous arcane spells from the unchained summoner list, refreshed by a 1-hour communion with her animal guide.

features_gained.name: Transformation Sequence
features_gained.description_es: Cambia entre identidades en 5 asaltos con luz y música brillantes; pasa a acción estándar con el talento social adecuado.
features_gained.description_en: Changes between identities in 5 rounds with bright light and music; reduces to a standard action with the right social talent.

features_gained.name: Animal Guide
features_gained.description_es: Recibe un familiar mágico que mejora a niveles 3, 5 y 7 con formas superiores y a nivel 9 gana cambiar de forma.
features_gained.description_en: Gains a magical familiar that improves at 3rd, 5th, and 7th levels with stronger forms and gains change shape at 9th.

features_gained.name: Staunch Ally
features_gained.description_es: El familiar usa el Carisma de la niña para CDs de apariencia y cuenta como ella para activarlas; a nivel 20 puede hacer golpes de venganza.
features_gained.description_en: The familiar uses the magical child's Charisma for appearance DCs and counts as her for triggering them; at 20th level it can make vengeance strikes.

warlock_vigilante.name: Warlock
warlock_vigilante.description_es: Vigilante arcano que dispara descargas místicas y prepara conjuros de mago al estilo del magus.
warlock_vigilante.description_en: Arcane vigilante who fires mystic bolts and prepares wizard spells from a spellbook like a magus.
features_removed: Class Skills (Disable Device, Knowledge engineering, Perception, Survival)

features_gained.name: Spellcasting
features_gained.description_es: Prepara conjuros y trucos arcanos como un magus desde un grimorio, eligiendo de la lista de mago/hechicero hasta nivel 6.
features_gained.description_en: Prepares arcane spells and cantrips like a magus from a spellbook, choosing from the wizard/sorcerer list up to 6th level.

features_gained.name: Mystic Bolts
features_gained.description_es: Crea proyectiles mágicos que infligen 1d6 + 1 cada 4 niveles de ácido, frío, electricidad o fuego; añade tipos de daño a niveles altos.
features_gained.description_en: Creates magical bolts dealing 1d6 + 1 per 4 levels of acid, cold, electricity, or fire; gains additional damage types at higher levels.

features_gained.name: Piercing Bolts
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, una de sus descargas por asalto pasa a ser ataque de toque; a nivel 5 todas son ataques de toque.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, one bolt per round becomes a touch attack; at 5th all bolts are touch attacks.

features_gained.name: Modified Skills
features_gained.description_es: Sustituye cuatro habilidades de clase por Conocimiento (arcano) y Saber Mágico, y reduce los rangos a 4 + Int por nivel.
features_gained.description_en: Swaps four class skills for Knowledge (arcana) and Spellcraft and gains 4 + Int skill ranks per level.

features_gained.name: Warlock Talents
features_gained.description_es: Acceso a talentos especiales como Arcane Striker, Elemental Armor, Familiar, Social Simulacrum y Tattoo Chamber.
features_gained.description_en: Access to special talents such as Arcane Striker, Elemental Armor, Familiar, Social Simulacrum and Tattoo Chamber.

zealot_vigilante.name: Zealot
zealot_vigilante.description_es: Vigilante divino que actúa como brazo armado de su deidad; lanza conjuros de inquisidor y manifiesta un aura de alineamiento.
zealot_vigilante.description_en: Divine vigilante acting as his deity's armed hand; casts inquisitor spells and projects a powerful alignment aura.
features_removed: Class Skills (Disable Device, Knowledge engineering, Perform, Sleight of Hand)

features_gained.name: Spellcasting
features_gained.description_es: Lanza conjuros divinos como un inquisidor de la lista de inquisidor.
features_gained.description_en: Casts divine spells as an inquisitor from the inquisitor spell list.

features_gained.name: Aura (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: En su identidad de vigilante manifiesta un aura de alineamiento poderosa correspondiente a su deidad.
features_gained.description_en: In his vigilante identity manifests a powerful alignment aura matching his deity.

features_gained.name: Inquisition (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Selecciona una inquisición ligada a su deidad usando su nivel de vigilante como nivel de inquisidor.
features_gained.description_en: Selects an inquisition tied to his deity using vigilante level as inquisitor level.

features_gained.name: Weapon Proficiency
features_gained.description_es: Competencia con el arma favorita de su deidad; si es golpe sin armas gana Golpe Sin Armas Mejorado.
features_gained.description_en: Proficient with his deity's favored weapon; gains Improved Unarmed Strike if it is unarmed strike.

features_gained.name: Zealot Talents
features_gained.description_es: Acceso a talentos como Channel Energy, Discern Lies, Empower Symbol, Stalwart, Stern Gaze y Zealot Smite.
features_gained.description_en: Access to talents such as Channel Energy, Discern Lies, Empower Symbol, Stalwart, Stern Gaze and Zealot Smite.

cabalist_vigilante.name: Cabalist
cabalist_vigilante.description_es: Vigilante hechicero ligado a la sangre que lanza conjuros de bruja y aterra a quienes sangran ante él.
cabalist_vigilante.description_en: Witch-spell vigilante bound to blood, casting spells from the witch list and terrorizing bleeding foes.
features_removed: Class Skills (Disable Device, Knowledge engineering, Perception, Survival)

features_gained.name: Spellcasting
features_gained.description_es: Prepara conjuros y trucos arcanos como un magus a partir de la lista de bruja hasta nivel 6.
features_gained.description_en: Prepares arcane spells and cantrips like a magus from the witch spell list up to 6th level.

features_gained.name: Spill Blood (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Inflige daño por sangrado igual a su nivel al causar daño perforante o cortante a enemigos desprevenidos, aliados o pillados a contrapié a 30 pies.
features_gained.description_en: Deals bleed damage equal to vigilante level when dealing piercing/slashing damage to unaware, allied, or flat-footed foes within 30 ft.

features_gained.name: Bloodbound Spell (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5, los enemigos que sangran sufren –1 a salvaciones contra sus conjuros (–2 contra nigromancia).
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level, foes taking bleed damage suffer –1 on saves vs his spells (–2 vs necromancy).

features_gained.name: Bloody Horror (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 11, como acción libre desmoraliza a todos los objetivos de un conjuro o área si uno de ellos sangra.
features_gained.description_en: At 11th level, as a free action demoralizes all targets of a spell or area if one of them is bleeding.

features_gained.name: Shadowy Appearance (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 17, 20% de fallo continuo y 1/día invisibilidad mejorada durante 1d6 asaltos.
features_gained.description_en: At 17th level, continuous 20% miss chance and once per day greater invisibility for 1d6 rounds.

avenging_beast.name: Avenging Beast
avenging_beast.description_es: Vigilante con máscara animal que lanza conjuros de cazador y se transforma en su animal totémico.
avenging_beast.description_en: Animal-masked vigilante who casts hunter spells and transforms into her totem beast.
features_removed: Class Skills (Disable Device, Knowledge engineering, Perform, Sleight of Hand)

features_gained.name: Animal Mask (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Una máscara animal sirve de foco de poder para su identidad; el animal elegido es permanente y reemplazarla cuesta 200 po por nivel.
features_gained.description_en: An animal mask serves as the focus of her vigilante identity; the chosen animal is permanent and replacing the mask costs 200 gp per level.

features_gained.name: Spellcasting
features_gained.description_es: Lanza conjuros divinos usando la lista y la progresión del cazador.
features_gained.description_en: Casts divine spells using the hunter's spell list and progression.

features_gained.name: Patron Spells
features_gained.description_es: Selecciona un patrón de bruja y añade sus conjuros adicionales hasta nivel 6 a su lista.
features_gained.description_en: Selects a witch patron and adds its bonus spells up to 6th level to her list.

features_gained.name: Wild Shape (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Desde nivel 5 se transforma en el animal de su máscara como beast shape I; los usos diarios crecen hasta 8/día a nivel 19.
features_gained.description_en: From 5th level transforms into the mask's animal as beast shape I; daily uses scale up to 8/day at 19th.

disenchanter.name: Disenchanter
disenchanter.description_es: Warpriest dedicado a contrarrestar magia hostil; renuncia a canalizar energía a cambio de habilidades de abjuración.
disenchanter.description_en: Warpriest dedicated to countering hostile magic, trading channel energy for abjuration powers.

features_gained.name: Bonus Feats (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Elige dotes de una lista reducida (Gran Fortaleza, Contraconjuro Mejorado, Voluntad de Hierro, Aptitud Mágica) sin requisitos a niveles 1, 6 y 12.
features_gained.description_en: Selects from a restricted list (Great Fortitude, Improved Counterspell, Iron Will, Skill Focus Spellcraft) without prerequisites at 1st, 6th, and 12th levels.

features_gained.name: Mystic Interference (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4, gasta dos fervores para conceder a aliados a 30 pies +1 a salvaciones contra conjuros durante varios asaltos; +1 cada 4 niveles (máx +5).
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, spends two fervor uses to grant allies within 30 ft +1 on saves vs spells for several rounds; +1 every 4 levels (max +5).

features_gained.name: Banish Enchantment (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 6, gasta dos fervores como acción estándar para lanzar disipar magia dirigido a un objetivo a 30 pies.
features_gained.description_en: At 6th level, spends two fervor uses as a standard action to cast targeted dispel magic on a creature within 30 ft.

forgepriest.name: Forgepriest
forgepriest.description_es: Warpriest artesano dedicado a Torag y otros dioses herreros; crea armas y armaduras mágicas y resiste el fuego.
forgepriest.description_en: Smith warpriest devoted to forge gods, crafting magic arms and armor and resisting fire.

features_gained.name: Smith's Spells
features_gained.description_es: Añade conjuros como jury rig, shield, heat metal, shatter, keen edge, fabricate y mage's sword a su lista.
features_gained.description_en: Adds spells like jury rig, shield, heat metal, shatter, keen edge, fabricate, and mage's sword to his list.

features_gained.name: Forge Mastery (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2, +½ nivel a Artesanía para fabricar objetos metálicos, armas y armaduras.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level, adds half class level to Craft checks for metal items, armor and weapons.

features_gained.name: Bonus Feats (Altered)
features_gained.description_es: Puede elegir dotes de creación de objetos junto a dotes de combate al ganar dotes adicionales.
features_gained.description_en: May choose item creation feats alongside combat feats when picking bonus feats.

features_gained.name: Craft Magic Arms and Armor
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 gana Crear Armas y Armaduras Mágicas como dote adicional.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level gains Craft Magic Arms and Armor as a bonus feat.

features_gained.name: Creator's Bond (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4, gasta dos usos de fervor para aumentar en 1 el bono de arma sagrada o armadura sagrada con objetos creados por él.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, spends two fervor uses to add +1 to sacred weapon or sacred armor bonus on items he crafted.

features_gained.name: Heat of the Forge (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 6 obtiene resistencia al fuego 5 (10 a nivel 13).
features_gained.description_en: At 6th level gains fire resistance 5 (10 at 13th).

cult_leader.name: Cult Leader
cult_leader.description_es: Warpriest oculto que lidera una secta clandestina; combina sigilo, ataque furtivo y poderes de seducción.
cult_leader.description_en: Cloaked warpriest who leads a hidden cult, combining stealth, sneak attack, and crowd-charming powers.

features_gained.name: Modified Proficiencies and Skills
features_gained.description_es: Competente con ballesta de mano, estoque, sap y arma favorita de su deidad; añade Engañar, Disfrazarse e Intimidar y gana 4 + Int rangos por nivel.
features_gained.description_en: Proficient with hand crossbow, rapier, sap, and his deity's favored weapon; adds Bluff, Disguise and Intimidate and gains 4 + Int skill ranks per level.

features_gained.name: Well-Hidden (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: +2 a Disfrazarse y Sigilo.
features_gained.description_en: +2 on Disguise and Stealth checks.

features_gained.name: Sneak Attack (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, ataque furtivo de 1d6 que aumenta 1d6 cada 3 niveles y se acumula con otras fuentes.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, 1d6 sneak attack that increases by 1d6 every 3 levels and stacks with other sources.

features_gained.name: Enthrall (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 lanza enthrall gastando dos usos de fervor.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level casts enthrall by expending two fervor uses.

features_gained.name: Hide in Plain Sight (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 12, usa Sigilo aun observado mientras esté a 10 pies de un área de luz tenue (no en su propia sombra).
features_gained.description_en: At 12th level, may use Stealth while observed when within 10 ft of an area of dim light (not in his own shadow).

divine_commander.name: Divine Commander
divine_commander.description_es: Warpriest montado que lidera tropas con dotes de equipo y bendice ejércitos en combate masivo.
divine_commander.description_en: Mounted warpriest who leads troops with teamwork feats and blesses armies in mass combat.

features_gained.name: Mount (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Recibe una montura como compañero animal del druida usando su nivel completo; gana competencia con armadura ligera para la montura.
features_gained.description_en: Gains a loyal mount as a druid's animal companion using his full level; the mount gains light armor proficiency.

features_gained.name: Battle Tactician (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 obtiene un dote de equipo extra y puede otorgarlo a aliados a 30 pies como acción estándar durante 4 + ½ nivel asaltos.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level gains a bonus teamwork feat and may grant it to allies within 30 ft as a standard action for 4 + half level rounds.

features_gained.name: Blessed Mount (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 6, su montura recibe la plantilla acorde al alineamiento de la deidad (celestial, entrópica, infernal o resoluta); las deidades neutrales otorgan RC y resistencia a energía.
features_gained.description_en: At 6th level the mount gains a template matching the deity's alignment (celestial, entropic, fiendish, or resolute); neutral deities grant SR and energy resistance instead.

features_gained.name: Greater Battle Tactician (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 12 gana un segundo dote de equipo y puede compartir ambos como acción rápida.
features_gained.description_en: At 12th level gains a second teamwork feat and can grant both as a swift action.

features_gained.name: Bless Army (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 15 gasta dos fervores para conceder +1 a la OM y DV de su ejército en combate masivo.
features_gained.description_en: At 15th level spends two fervor uses to grant +1 to his army's OM and DV in mass combat.

feral_champion.name: Feral Champion
feral_champion.description_es: Warpriest fiero que renuncia a su arma sagrada para combatir con garras y transformarse en bestia.
feral_champion.description_en: Fierce warpriest who forgoes a sacred weapon to fight with sacred claws and transform into beasts.

features_gained.name: Feral Blessing
features_gained.description_es: Solo puede elegir la bendición Animal y no recibe la segunda bendición.
features_gained.description_en: Must take only the Animal blessing and forgoes the usual second blessing.

features_gained.name: Sacred Claws (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Crece garras como ataques naturales primarios en cada mano que reciben los mismos beneficios que el arma sagrada de un warpriest.
features_gained.description_en: Grows claws as primary natural weapons that gain the same benefits as a warpriest's sacred weapon.

features_gained.name: Wild Shape (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 7, transforma en forma animal usando nivel –3 como nivel de druida; sin formas elementales ni vegetales; usos crecen hasta 4/día a nivel 19.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th level, gains wild shape using warpriest level –3 as druid level; no elemental or plant forms; usage scales up to 4/day at 19th.

gravewalker.name: Gravewalker
gravewalker.description_es: Bruja necromántica que reemplaza a su familiar por una muñeca de hechizos hecha con huesos y tierra de tumba, dominando a los muertos vivientes en un aura de profanación a costa de varios hexs.
gravewalker.description_en: A necromantic witch who replaces her familiar with a spell poppet of bones and grave dirt, dominating undead within an aura of desecration at the cost of several hexes.

features_gained.name: Muñeca de Hechizos (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Vasija macabra de huesos, tierra de tumba y piel humana que funciona como familiar pero ata a un espíritu maligno.
features_gained.description_en: Grisly vessel of bone shards, grave dirt and human skin that functions as her familiar but houses an evil spirit.

features_gained.name: Aura de Profanación (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Aura de 20 pies (que crece 5 pies cada 2 niveles, máx. 70) que aumenta en +1 la CD para canalizar energía negativa y la resistencia al rechazo de muertos vivientes.
features_gained.description_en: 20-ft aura (expanding 5 ft every 2 levels, max 70) that grants +1 to negative energy channel DC and undead turn resistance.

features_gained.name: Esclavo Óseo (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Domina muertos vivientes dentro de su aura mediante salvación de Voluntad, controlando hasta 1 DG por nivel de lanzador.
features_gained.description_en: Dominates undead within her aura via Will save, controlling up to 1 HD per caster level.

features_gained.name: Entregar Hechizos de Toque (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 3 puede apuñalar la muñeca como acción de asalto completo para entregar un hechizo de toque como toque a distancia contra cualquier objetivo en su aura.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level she may stab the poppet as a full-round action to deliver a touch spell as a ranged touch against any target within her aura.

features_gained.name: Poseer Muerto Viviente (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Toma control directo de un muerto viviente esclavo dentro del aura usando las mecánicas de prisión de almas, con la muñeca como receptáculo.
features_gained.description_en: Takes direct control of one bonethralled undead within her aura using magic jar mechanics, with the poppet as the soul receptacle.

sea_witch.name: Sea Witch
sea_witch.description_es: Bruja vinculada al océano que reemplaza su primer hex por empatía con criaturas marinas y obtiene una lista de hechizos de patrón centrada en agua y clima.
sea_witch.description_en: A witch bound to the ocean who replaces her 1st-level hex with sea creature empathy and gains a patron spell list focused on water and weather.

features_gained.name: Conocer Dirección (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Puede lanzar conocer dirección a voluntad cuando se encuentra cerca de una masa de agua de al menos 1 milla de diámetro.
features_gained.description_en: Can cast know direction at will while near a body of water of at least 1 mile diameter.

features_gained.name: Empatía con Criaturas Marinas (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Influye en animales acuáticos y criaturas costeras como un druida; el nivel de bruja cuenta como nivel de druida y se acumula con niveles reales de druida.
features_gained.description_en: Influences water-dwelling animals and coastal creatures like a druid; witch levels count as druid levels and stack with actual druid levels.

features_gained.name: Hechizos de Patrón Acuático
features_gained.description_es: Reemplaza los hechizos otorgados por su patrón con una lista temática de agua y clima en los niveles 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16 y 18.
features_gained.description_en: Replaces standard patron spells with a water- and weather-themed list at levels 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16 and 18.

white_haired_witch.name: White-Haired Witch
white_haired_witch.source: Pathfinder Player Companion: Dragon Empires Primer
white_haired_witch.description_es: Bruja marcial cuyo cabello prensil sirve como ataque natural primario capaz de presa, derribo y estrangulamiento, sacrificando hexs mayores y grandes a cambio de talentos de pícaro.
white_haired_witch.description_en: A martial witch whose prehensile hair serves as a primary natural attack capable of grappling, tripping and strangling, trading major and grand hexes for rogue talents.

features_gained.name: Cabello Blanco (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Su cabello prensil es un ataque natural primario (1d4 + mod. Inteligencia, alcance 5 pies). Puede iniciar presa como acción libre usando Inteligencia. El alcance aumenta en 5 pies cada 4 niveles (máx. 30 a nivel 20).
features_gained.description_en: Her prehensile hair is a primary natural attack (1d4 + Int mod, 5-ft reach). She may initiate a grapple as a free action using Int. Reach grows by 5 ft every 4 levels (max 30 ft at 20th).

features_gained.name: Constreñir (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 2, su cabello inflige daño igual a un ataque cuando logra agarrar al oponente, como acción rápida.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level her hair deals damage equal to an attack when grappling an opponent, as a swift action.

features_gained.name: Derribo (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 4, un golpe exitoso del cabello permite intentar una maniobra de derribo como acción rápida.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level a successful hair strike allows a trip combat maneuver as a swift action.

features_gained.name: Tirar (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 6, un golpe exitoso del cabello le permite tirar del oponente 5 pies hacia ella como acción rápida.
features_gained.description_en: At 6th level a successful hair strike pulls the opponent 5 feet closer as a swift action.

features_gained.name: Estrangular (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Al nivel 8, un oponente apresado por su cabello no puede hablar ni lanzar conjuros con componentes verbales.
features_gained.description_en: At 8th level a foe grappled by her hair cannot speak or cast spells with verbal components.

features_gained.name: Talentos de Pícaro
features_gained.description_es: A los niveles 10, 12 y cada 2 niveles después gana un talento de pícaro; en los niveles 18 y 20 puede elegir talentos avanzados.
features_gained.description_en: At 10th, 12th and every 2 levels thereafter she gains a rogue talent; at 18th and 20th she may choose advanced rogue talents.

ley_line_guardian.name: Ley Line Guardian
ley_line_guardian.description_es: Bruja que canaliza líneas ley en lugar de un familiar, lanzando hechizos de forma espontánea como un hechicero a costa del hex de nivel 1 y 8.
ley_line_guardian.description_en: A witch who channels ley lines rather than a familiar, casting spells spontaneously like a sorcerer at the cost of her 1st- and 8th-level hexes.

features_gained.name: Potenciada por Líneas Ley
features_gained.description_es: Lanza conjuros espontáneamente con la misma cantidad de huecos y conjuros conocidos que un hechicero. Los hechizos extra del patrón se añaden a sus conjuros conocidos en los niveles correspondientes.
features_gained.description_en: Casts spells spontaneously with sorcerer spell slots and spells known. Patron bonus spells are added to her spells known at the appropriate levels.

features_gained.name: Surgir del Conducto (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Como acción rápida, aumenta el nivel de lanzador del próximo conjuro en 1d4-1 (1d4 a nivel 8); requiere salvación de Fortaleza o queda atascada durante minutos iguales al nivel del conjuro. Usable 3 + mod. Carisma veces al día.
features_gained.description_en: As a swift action she boosts her next spell's caster level by 1d4-1 (1d4 at 8th); a failed Fortitude save staggers her for minutes equal to the spell level. Usable 3 + Cha mod times per day.

havocker.name: Havocker
havocker.source: Pathfinder Player Companion: Magic Tactics Toolbox
havocker.description_es: Bruja elementalista que reemplaza a su familiar y casi todos sus hexs por foco elemental y explosión cinética de cineticista, sacrificando conjuros para alimentar infusiones.
havocker.description_en: An elementalist witch who trades her familiar and nearly all hexes for a kineticist's elemental focus and kinetic blast, burning prepared spells to fuel infusions.

features_gained.name: Patrón Elemental
features_gained.description_es: Elige un elemento de cineticista en lugar de un patrón normal y obtiene foco elemental y explosión cinética; sus niveles de bruja cuentan como niveles de cineticista para esas habilidades.
features_gained.description_en: Chooses a kineticist element instead of a normal patron, gaining elemental focus and kinetic blast; her witch levels count as kineticist levels for those abilities.

features_gained.name: Quema de Conjuros
features_gained.description_es: Sacrifica un conjuro de bruja preparado para aplicar una infusión a su explosión cinética; el nivel del conjuro debe igualar o superar el de la infusión y no puede aceptar quemadura adicional así.
features_gained.description_en: Sacrifices a prepared witch spell to apply an infusion to her kinetic blast; spell level must meet or exceed the infusion level and she cannot take extra burn this way.

features_gained.name: Infusión
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2 y cada 4 niveles obtiene una infusión de talento salvaje basada en su foco elemental, funcionando como la habilidad de cineticista del mismo nombre.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level and every 4 levels she gains an infusion wild talent based on her elemental focus, functioning as the kineticist ability of the same name.

scrollmaster.name: Scrollmaster
scrollmaster.description_es: Mago que empuña sus pergaminos como armas y escudos mágicos, sacrificando vínculo arcano y un dote de bonificación a cambio de combate con pergaminos.
scrollmaster.description_en: A wizard who wields his scrolls as magical blades and shields, trading arcane bond and a bonus feat for scroll combat.

features_gained.name: Hoja de Pergamino (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Empuña un pergamino como espada corta con bono de mejora igual al hechizo más alto que contiene. A nivel 3 puede cambiar el bono por alcance; a nivel 5 puede añadir propiedades como afilada, escarcha o descarga reduciendo el bono.
features_gained.description_en: Wields a scroll as a short sword with an enhancement bonus equal to the highest spell it contains. At 3rd level he can trade the bonus for reach; at 5th he may add properties like keen, frost or shock by reducing the bonus.

features_gained.name: Escudo de Pergamino (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Empuña un pergamino como escudo ligero de madera con +1 a CA más bono de mejora. A nivel 5 puede añadir propiedades como toque etéreo o fortificación reduciendo el bono.
features_gained.description_en: Wields a scroll as a light wooden shield with +1 shield bonus plus enhancement. At 5th level he may add properties like ghost touch or fortification by reducing the bonus.

features_gained.name: Lectura de Pergaminos Mejorada (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 10 lanza conjuros de pergaminos descifrados usando su propia Inteligencia, dotes y nivel de lanzador en lugar de los del pergamino.
features_gained.description_en: At 10th level he casts spells from deciphered scrolls using his own Intelligence, feats and caster level instead of the scroll's.

siege_mage.name: Siege Mage
siege_mage.description_es: Mago especializado en apoyar y manipular máquinas de asedio a distancia, sacrificando vínculo arcano, escuela y trucos a cambio de pericia con artillería.
siege_mage.description_en: A wizard specialized in supporting and remotely operating siege engines, trading arcane bond, school and most cantrips for siege-engine mastery.

features_gained.name: Ingeniero de Asedio
features_gained.description_es: Recibe el dote de combate Ingeniero de Asedio sin necesidad de cumplir requisitos.
features_gained.description_en: Gains the Siege Engineer combat feat without meeting prerequisites.

features_gained.name: Vínculo con Máquina de Asedio (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Se vincula con una máquina de asedio a 30 pies para apuntarla y dispararla a distancia. A nivel 10 puede recargarla sin tripulación. Usos diarios iguales al modificador de Inteligencia (mín. 1).
features_gained.description_en: Bonds with a siege engine within 30 ft to remotely aim and fire it. At 10th level he can reload it without a crew. Usable a number of times per day equal to Int mod (min 1).

features_gained.name: Empoderar Máquina de Asedio (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Como acción rápida sacrifica un conjuro preparado para añadir su nivel al ataque y 3 veces su nivel al daño del próximo disparo de la máquina.
features_gained.description_en: As a swift action he sacrifices a prepared spell to grant the next siege engine attack a bonus to attack equal to spell level and damage equal to 3x spell level.

features_gained.name: Escuela de Asedio
features_gained.description_es: Renuncia a tres escuelas de magia a nivel 1; preparar conjuros de oposición cuesta dos huecos y crear objetos mágicos con esos conjuros sufre -4. Recibe detectar magia y leer magia como trucos.
features_gained.description_en: Forsakes three schools at 1st level; preparing opposition spells costs two slots and crafting items with them takes -4. Gains detect magic and read magic as cantrips.

spirit_binder.name: Spirit Binder
spirit_binder.description_es: Mago cuyo familiar alberga el alma de un ser querido fallecido, sacrificando Escribir Pergaminos y dotes de bono a cambio de un familiar empoderado.
spirit_binder.description_en: A wizard whose familiar houses the soul of a departed loved one, trading Scribe Scroll and wizard bonus feats for an empowered companion.

features_gained.name: Familiar Vinculado al Alma (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: El familiar conserva la personalidad del difunto; puede ser de cualquier alineamiento y usa la clase favorita del ser querido para BAB y salvaciones.
features_gained.description_en: The familiar retains the deceased's personality; it may be any alignment and uses the loved one's favored class for BAB and saves.

features_gained.name: Sin Necromancia Opuesta
features_gained.description_es: Un vinculador de espíritus no puede elegir la escuela de Necromancia como escuela de oposición.
features_gained.description_en: A spirit binder cannot choose Necromancy as an opposition school.

features_gained.name: Talentos Perdidos (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: En los niveles 1, 5 y cada 5 niveles después, el familiar gana un dote de bono para el que cumpla los requisitos.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st, 5th and every 5 levels thereafter, the familiar gains a bonus feat for which it qualifies.

arcane_bomber.name: Arcane Bomber
arcane_bomber.description_es: Mago que mezcla magia con bombas alquímicas, intercambiando vínculo arcano, trucos y escuela por bombas potenciadas con conjuros.
arcane_bomber.description_en: A wizard who blends magic with alchemical bombs, exchanging arcane bond, cantrips and school for spell-fueled bombs.

features_gained.name: Bomba (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1 elige un tipo de energía (ácido, frío, fuego o eléctrico) y lanza bombas como un alquimista; el daño se acumula con niveles reales de alquimista.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level he picks an energy type (acid, cold, fire or electricity) and throws bombs as an alchemist; damage stacks with actual alchemist levels.

features_gained.name: Bombas de Estallido Mágico (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Como acción rápida, sacrifica un conjuro preparado para añadir su nivel como bono al ataque y daño de la próxima bomba lanzada en ese turno.
features_gained.description_en: As a swift action, sacrifices a prepared spell to grant the next bomb thrown that turn a bonus to attack and damage equal to the spell's level.

features_gained.name: Escuela de la Bomba
features_gained.description_es: Debe elegir cuatro escuelas de oposición; preparar conjuros de esas escuelas cuesta dos huecos y crear objetos mágicos con ellas sufre -4.
features_gained.description_en: Must select four opposition schools; preparing spells from them costs two slots and crafting items with them takes -4.

spell_sage.name: Spell Sage
spell_sage.description_es: Mago erudito que estudia hechizos de otras tradiciones y enfoca su poder mágico, sacrificando vínculo arcano y escuela por flexibilidad sin igual.
spell_sage.description_en: A scholarly wizard who studies spells of other traditions and focuses his magical power, sacrificing arcane bond and school for unmatched flexibility.

features_gained.name: Conjuros Enfocados (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Una vez al día (dos a nivel 8, tres a nivel 16) puede aumentar su nivel de lanzador en +4 para un solo conjuro.
features_gained.description_en: Once per day (twice at 8th, thrice at 16th) he may increase his caster level by +4 for a single spell.

features_gained.name: Estudio de Conjuros (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2, gastando 1 asalto completo por nivel del conjuro y dos conjuros preparados de igual o mayor nivel, lanza un conjuro de la lista de bardo, clérigo o druida como conjuro de mago. Gana usos extra a niveles 6, 11 y 16.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level, by spending 1 full round per spell level and two prepared spells of equal or higher level, he casts a bard, cleric or druid spell as a wizard spell. Extra uses at 6th, 11th and 16th.

savage_technologist.name: Savage Technologist
savage_technologist.description_es: Bárbaro que combina su furia con armas de fuego primitivas, alterando la furia para favorecer la Destreza y disparando entre golpes. Adaptable al bárbaro desencadenado.
savage_technologist.description_en: A barbarian who fuses his rage with primitive firearms, altering rage to favor Dexterity and shooting between strikes. Adaptable to the unchained barbarian.

features_gained.name: Furia Alterada
features_gained.description_es: Su furia otorga bonos morales a Fuerza y Destreza en vez de Fuerza y Constitución, sin penalización a CA.
features_gained.description_en: His rage grants morale bonuses to Strength and Dexterity instead of Strength and Constitution, with no AC penalty.

features_gained.name: Espada y Pistola (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2, mientras está furioso con un arma de fuego de una mano y un arma cuerpo a cuerpo, puede atacar a distancia sin provocar AdO y obtiene los beneficios de Combate con Dos Armas.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level, while raging with a one-handed firearm and a melee weapon, he may make ranged attacks without provoking AoO and gains Two-Weapon Fighting benefits.

features_gained.name: Magnetismo Primal (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 añade su modificador de Fuerza a Diplomacia con culturas tribales y puede gastar 2 asaltos de furia para un bono igual a la mitad de su nivel.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level adds his Strength modifier to Diplomacy with tribal cultures and may spend 2 rounds of rage for a bonus equal to half his level.

features_gained.name: Tirador Certero (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 5 añade su modificador de Destreza al daño con armas de fuego mientras está enfurecido.
features_gained.description_en: At 5th level adds his Dexterity modifier to firearm damage rolls while raging.

spirit_summoner_unchained.name: Spirit Summoner
spirit_summoner_unchained.description_es: Convocadora que vincula su eidolon a un espíritu de chamán y obtiene hexes, sacrificando convocar monstruo, aspecto y varias habilidades del eidolon.
spirit_summoner_unchained.description_en: A summoner who binds her eidolon to a shaman spirit and gains hexes, trading summon monster, aspect and several eidolon abilities.

features_gained.name: Espíritu (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Se vincula con un espíritu de chamán y gana sus habilidades y conjuros asociados.
features_gained.description_en: Bonds with a shaman spirit and gains its abilities and associated spells.

features_gained.name: Eidolon Modificado
features_gained.description_es: La forma de su eidolon debe ajustarse al tema del espíritu elegido.
features_gained.description_en: Her eidolon's form must align with the theme of the chosen spirit.

features_gained.name: Hex
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 6 elige un hex de chamán, con selecciones adicionales a niveles 8, 10 y 16.
features_gained.description_en: At 6th level she chooses a shaman hex, with additional selections at 8th, 10th and 16th.

martial_artist_unchained.name: Martial Artist
martial_artist_unchained.description_es: Monje sin orientación mística cuyo entrenamiento físico reemplaza al ki y a las habilidades sobrenaturales. Funciona como variante laica del monje desencadenado.
martial_artist_unchained.description_en: A monk without mystical orientation whose physical training replaces ki and supernatural abilities. Works as a secular variant of the unchained monk.

features_gained.name: Puntos de Dolor (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 gana +1 al confirmar críticos y aumenta la CD de Puño Aturdidor y palma temblorosa.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level gains +1 to confirm criticals and raises the DC of Stunning Fist and quivering palm.

features_gained.name: Maestro del Arte Marcial (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 usa su nivel de monje como nivel de guerrero para los requisitos de dotes de guerrero referidos a ataques desarmados.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level uses his monk level as fighter level for fighter feat prerequisites involving unarmed strikes.

features_gained.name: Explotar Debilidad (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4, como acción rápida puede analizar a un enemigo para encontrar puntos débiles e ignorar parte de su RD o resistencias.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, as a swift action he may analyze a foe to find weak points and ignore some of its DR or resistances.

features_gained.name: Resistencia Extrema (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Desde nivel 5 obtiene inmunidades crecientes: fatiga, agotamiento, aturdimiento y efectos de muerte.
features_gained.description_en: From 5th level he gains escalating immunities: fatigue, exhaustion, stunning and death effects.

features_gained.name: Resistencia Física (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Desde nivel 7 reduce el daño o drenaje de característica que sufre.
features_gained.description_en: From 7th level he reduces ability damage and drain he takes.

drunken_brute_unchained.name: Drunken Brute
drunken_brute_unchained.description_es: Bárbaro que canaliza su furia bebiendo licor en pleno combate, sacrificando movimiento rápido por una furia ebria que se prolonga al beber.
drunken_brute_unchained.description_en: A barbarian who fuels his rage by drinking liquor mid-combat, trading fast movement for a drunken rage sustained by alcohol.

features_gained.name: Furia Ebria (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Mientras está enfurecido, puede consumir una poción o bebida alcohólica como acción de movimiento sin provocar AdO. El alcohol mantiene la furia ese asalto sin gastar usos diarios, pero al terminar la furia queda mareado 1 asalto además de fatigado.
features_gained.description_en: While raging, he may consume a potion or alcoholic drink as a move action without provoking AoO. Alcohol sustains rage that round without spending a daily use, but when rage ends he is nauseated for 1 round in addition to fatigued.

sensei_unchained.name: Sensei
sensei_unchained.description_es: Monje maestro y mentor que inspira a sus aliados como un bardo, intercambiando lluvia de golpes y movimiento rápido por consejo y sabiduría compartida.
sensei_unchained.description_en: A teaching, mentoring monk who inspires allies like a bard, trading flurry of blows and fast movement for advice and shared wisdom.

features_gained.name: Consejo (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Funciona como interpretación bárdica usando oratoria: inspirar coraje a nivel 1, inspirar competencia a nivel 3 y inspirar grandeza a nivel 9.
features_gained.description_en: Functions as bardic performance via oratory: inspire courage at 1st, inspire competence at 3rd and inspire greatness at 9th.

features_gained.name: Golpe Perspicaz (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2 usa su modificador de Sabiduría en lugar de Fuerza o Destreza para los ataques desarmados, ataques con armas de monje y maniobras.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level uses Wisdom mod in place of Str or Dex for unarmed strikes, monk weapon attacks and combat maneuver checks.

features_gained.name: Sabiduría Mística (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Desde nivel 6 gasta puntos de ki para conceder a un aliado cercano sus propias habilidades de clase; ampliado a niveles 10 y 14.
features_gained.description_en: From 6th level he spends ki points to grant his class abilities to a nearby ally; expanded at 10th and 14th.

synthesist_unchained.name: Synthesist
synthesist_unchained.description_es: Convocadora que se fusiona con su eidolon como una armadura viviente, perdiendo habilidades de vínculo a distancia. Adaptable al desencadenado pese a su recelo oficial.
synthesist_unchained.description_en: A summoner who fuses with her eidolon as living armor, losing her ranged bond abilities. Adaptable to unchained though officially cautioned.

features_gained.name: Eidolon Fusionado (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Se funde con su eidolon, usa sus puntuaciones físicas y conserva las mentales propias; los pg del eidolon son temporales sobre los suyos.
features_gained.description_en: Fuses with the eidolon, uses its physical scores while keeping her mental scores; the eidolon's HP become temporary HP over hers.

features_gained.name: Vínculo Fusionado
features_gained.description_es: Como acción libre puede sacrificar puntos de golpe propios para evitar que los pg temporales del eidolon caigan a 0.
features_gained.description_en: As a free action she may sacrifice her own HP to keep the eidolon's temporary HP from reaching 0.

features_gained.name: Fusión Escudada (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4, +2 escudo a CA y +2 circunstancial a salvaciones mientras está fusionada.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level, +2 shield to AC and +2 circumstance to saves while fused.

features_gained.name: Salto del Hacedor (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 6 lanza puerta dimensional como habilidad mágica mientras está fusionada.
features_gained.description_en: At 6th level she casts dimension door as a spell-like ability while fused.

features_gained.name: Formas Divididas
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 16 se separa en dos criaturas como acción rápida durante un número limitado de asaltos al día.
features_gained.description_en: At 16th level she splits into two creatures as a swift action for a limited number of rounds per day.

poisoner_unchained.name: Poisoner
poisoner_unchained.description_es: Pícara experta en venenos que renuncia a descubrir y sentir trampas para manipular tóxicos sin riesgo.
poisoner_unchained.description_en: A rogue expert in toxins who trades trapfinding and trap sense to handle poisons without risk.

features_gained.name: Uso de Veneno
features_gained.description_es: Está entrenada en el uso de venenos y nunca se envenena por accidente al aplicarlos a una hoja.
features_gained.description_en: Trained in the use of poison and cannot accidentally poison herself when applying it to a blade.

features_gained.name: Maestra Envenenadora
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 puede modificar tipos de veneno mediante Oficio (alquimia) y obtiene un bono igual a la mitad de su nivel a pruebas de habilidad relacionadas con venenos.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level she may transmute poison types via Craft (alchemy) and gains a bonus equal to half her rogue level on poison-related skill checks.

maneuver_master_unchained.name: Maneuver Master
maneuver_master_unchained.description_es: Monje especializado en maniobras de combate que reemplaza la lluvia de golpes por una lluvia de maniobras versátil.
maneuver_master_unchained.description_en: A monk specialized in combat maneuvers, replacing flurry of blows with a versatile flurry of maneuvers.

features_gained.name: Lluvia de Maniobras (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Como parte de un ataque completo, realiza una maniobra de combate adicional sin penalización.
features_gained.description_en: As part of a full-attack action, performs one extra combat maneuver without penalty.

features_gained.name: Defensa de Maniobras (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Las criaturas que intenten contra él maniobras para las que él tenga el dote Mejorado provocan un AdO suyo.
features_gained.description_en: Creatures attempting maneuvers against him for which he has the Improved feat provoke an AoO from him.

features_gained.name: Maniobra Confiable
features_gained.description_es: Por 1 punto de ki tira dos veces la maniobra de combate y elige el mejor resultado.
features_gained.description_en: For 1 ki point he rolls a combat maneuver check twice and uses the better result.

features_gained.name: Maniobra Meditativa
features_gained.description_es: Como acción rápida añade su modificador de Sabiduría a una tirada de maniobra.
features_gained.description_en: As a swift action adds his Wisdom modifier to a combat maneuver check.

features_gained.name: Maniobra Barredora
features_gained.description_es: Como acción estándar realiza dos maniobras de combate.
features_gained.description_en: As a standard action performs two combat maneuvers.

features_gained.name: Maniobra Torbellino
features_gained.description_es: Una vez al día puede intentar una maniobra contra todos los enemigos a los que amenaza.
features_gained.description_en: Once per day he may attempt one maneuver against every foe he threatens.

superstitious_unchained.name: Superstitious
superstitious_unchained.description_es: Bárbaro receloso de la magia que cambia su sentido de las trampas y RD por sentidos sobrehumanos. Compatible con el bárbaro desencadenado.
superstitious_unchained.description_en: A barbarian wary of magic who trades trap sense and DR for superhuman senses. Compatible with the unchained barbarian.

features_gained.name: Sexto Sentido (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3, +1 a iniciativa y +1 perspicacia a CA en asaltos de sorpresa, aumentando +1 cada 3 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level, +1 to initiative and +1 insight to AC during surprise rounds, +1 every 3 levels thereafter.

features_gained.name: Sentidos Agudos (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A los niveles 7, 10, 13, 16 y 19 obtiene en orden visión con poca luz, visión en la oscuridad de 60 pies, olfato, sentir vibraciones 30 pies y vista ciega 30 pies.
features_gained.description_en: At 7th, 10th, 13th, 16th and 19th levels he gains low-light vision, darkvision 60 ft, scent, blindsense 30 ft and blindsight 30 ft.

swashbuckler_unchained_rogue.name: Swashbuckler
swashbuckler_unchained_rogue.description_es: Pícara intrépida y elegante que cambia descubrir y sentir trampas por entrenamiento marcial y audacia frente al miedo.
swashbuckler_unchained_rogue.description_en: A daring, dashing rogue who trades trapfinding and trap sense for martial training and daring boldness.

features_gained.name: Entrenamiento Marcial
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1 elige un arma marcial para añadirla a sus competencias y puede tomar el talento truco de combate hasta dos veces.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level she chooses one martial weapon to add to her proficiencies and may take the combat trick rogue talent up to twice.

features_gained.name: Audacia
features_gained.description_es: Desde nivel 3, +1 moral a Acrobacias y a salvaciones contra miedo, +1 cada 3 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: From 3rd level, +1 morale bonus on Acrobatics and on saves vs fear, +1 every 3 levels.

master_of_many_styles_unchained.name: Master of Many Styles
master_of_many_styles_unchained.description_es: Monje que renuncia a la lluvia de golpes para adoptar y combinar varios dotes de estilo simultáneamente.
master_of_many_styles_unchained.description_en: A monk who forsakes flurry of blows to adopt and combine multiple style feats at once.

features_gained.name: Dote de Bono (Estilo)
features_gained.description_es: Obtiene dotes de estilo o Puño Elemental a nivel 1, 2 y cada 4 niveles. Desde nivel 6 puede elegir un hueco de estilo comodín.
features_gained.description_en: Gains style feats or Elemental Fist at levels 1, 2 and every 4 levels. From 6th level he may instead choose a wildcard style slot.

features_gained.name: Fusión de Estilos
features_gained.description_es: Mantiene activas dos posturas de estilo a la vez (nivel 1). A nivel 8 fusiona tres estilos con bonos al ataque; a nivel 15 fusiona cuatro como acción libre.
features_gained.description_en: Maintains two style stances active at once (level 1). At 8th he fuses three styles with attack bonuses; at 15th he fuses four as a free action.

features_gained.name: Estilo Perfecto
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 20 mantiene cinco posturas de estilo simultáneamente y puede cambiarlas como acción libre.
features_gained.description_en: At 20th level he maintains five style stances at once and may change them as a free action.

acrobat_unchained_rogue.name: Acrobat
acrobat_unchained_rogue.description_es: Pícara ágil que se especializa en saltos y movimientos acrobáticos, intercambiando descubrir trampas por bonos a habilidades físicas.
acrobat_unchained_rogue.description_en: A nimble rogue specialized in tumbling and acrobatic motion, trading trapfinding for bonuses on physical skills.

features_gained.name: Acróbata Experta (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1 ignora la penalización por armadura en Acrobacias, Trepar, Volar, Juego de Manos y Sigilo cuando viste armadura ligera, y obtiene +2 a Acrobacias y Volar sin armadura.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level she ignores armor check penalties on Acrobatics, Climb, Fly, Sleight of Hand and Stealth in light armor, and gains +2 to Acrobatics and Fly when unarmored.

features_gained.name: Segunda Oportunidad (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 puede repetir una prueba de Acrobacias, Trepar o Volar con -5; usable una vez por día y aumentando un uso cada 3 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level she may reroll an Acrobatics, Climb or Fly check at -5; once per day, plus one extra use every 3 levels.

sniper_unchained_rogue.name: Sniper
sniper_unchained_rogue.description_es: Pícara experta en arco y ballesta que extiende su ataque furtivo a distancia, sacrificando descubrir y sentir trampas.
sniper_unchained_rogue.description_en: A bow- and crossbow-focused rogue who extends her sneak attack at range, trading trapfinding and trap sense.

features_gained.name: Precisión
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 1 reduce a la mitad las penalizaciones por incremento de alcance al disparar arcos o ballestas.
features_gained.description_en: At 1st level she halves all range increment penalties when making ranged attacks with a bow or crossbow.

features_gained.name: Alcance Mortal
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 amplía 10 pies el alcance de su ataque furtivo y otros 10 cada 3 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level she extends sneak attack range by 10 feet, plus 10 more every 3 levels.

tetori_unchained.name: Tetori
tetori_unchained.description_es: Monje grappler total que renuncia a lluvia de golpes y muchas habilidades sobrenaturales para dominar la presa absoluta.
tetori_unchained.description_en: A grappling-focused monk who forsakes flurry of blows and many supernatural abilities to master absolute grappling.

features_gained.name: Apresador Grácil (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Usa su nivel de monje para los cálculos de presa y obtiene los ataques especiales agarrar y constreñir.
features_gained.description_en: Uses his monk level for grapple calculations and gains the grab and constrict special attacks.

features_gained.name: Contra-presa (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Hace AdO contra criaturas que intenten apresarlo.
features_gained.description_en: Makes AoO against creatures attempting to grapple him.

features_gained.name: Liberarse (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Bonos para escapar de presas y resistir condiciones que lo restringen.
features_gained.description_en: Bonuses to escape grapples and resist restraining conditions.

features_gained.name: Garra Inescapable (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Suprime libertad de movimiento y bonos mágicos a Escapismo de su oponente.
features_gained.description_en: Suppresses freedom of movement and magical bonuses to Escape Artist on his opponent.

features_gained.name: Fijar Forma (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Mediante toque puede negar efectos de polimorfia.
features_gained.description_en: By touch he negates polymorph effects.

features_gained.name: Cuerpo de Hierro (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Activa el efecto del conjuro cuerpo de hierro sobre sí mismo.
features_gained.description_en: Activates iron body upon himself.

invulnerable_rager_unchained.name: Invulnerable Rager
invulnerable_rager_unchained.description_es: Bárbaro que canaliza su furia en una resistencia al daño extraordinaria y resistencia a los elementos, perdiendo esquivar increíble y sentir trampas. Compatible con el bárbaro desencadenado al sustituir las mismas habilidades.
invulnerable_rager_unchained.description_en: A barbarian who channels his rage into extraordinary damage reduction and elemental resilience, losing uncanny dodge and trap sense. Compatible with the unchained barbarian, swapping the same abilities.

features_gained.name: Invulnerabilidad (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 2 obtiene RD/— igual a la mitad de su nivel de bárbaro; esta reducción se duplica contra daño no letal.
features_gained.description_en: At 2nd level gains DR/— equal to half his barbarian level; this DR is doubled against nonlethal damage.

features_gained.name: Resistencia Extrema (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 3 elige climas fríos o cálidos y se vuelve inmune a sus efectos, ganando resistencia 1 al fuego o al frío que aumenta cada 3 niveles.
features_gained.description_en: At 3rd level he picks hot or cold climate, becoming immune to its effects and gaining fire or cold resistance 1 that scales every 3 levels.

knife_master_unchained.name: Knife Master
knife_master_unchained.description_es: Pícaro especializado en hojas ligeras cuyo ataque furtivo con dagas usa d8 en lugar de d6, sacrificando descubrir trampas y sentir trampas. Compatible con el pícaro desencadenado.
knife_master_unchained.description_en: A rogue specialized in light blades whose sneak attack with daggers uses d8s instead of d6s, trading trapfinding and trap sense. Compatible with the unchained rogue.

features_gained.name: Hoja Oculta
features_gained.description_es: Añade la mitad de su nivel de pícaro a las pruebas de Juego de Manos para esconder hojas ligeras.
features_gained.description_en: Adds half her rogue level to Sleight of Hand checks to conceal light blades.

features_gained.name: Puñalada Furtiva
features_gained.description_es: Tira d8 en lugar de d6 para el daño del ataque furtivo con dagas y armas similares; con cualquier otra arma usa d4.
features_gained.description_en: Rolls d8s instead of d6s for sneak attack damage with daggers and similar light blades; uses d4s with all other weapons.

features_gained.name: Sentido de la Hoja
features_gained.description_es: Bono esquiva a CA contra ataques con hojas ligeras, +1 a nivel 3 y aumentando hasta +6 a nivel 18.
features_gained.description_en: Dodge bonus to AC vs light-blade attacks, +1 at 3rd level scaling up to +6 at 18th.

master_summoner_unchained.name: Master Summoner
master_summoner_unchained.description_es: Convocadora con un eidolon menor que compensa con un poder de convocación de monstruos extremadamente frecuente.
master_summoner_unchained.description_en: A summoner with a lesser eidolon who compensates with extremely frequent summon-monster spell-like abilities.

features_gained.name: Eidolon Menor
features_gained.description_es: Su nivel de clase se considera la mitad (mínimo 1) para determinar las habilidades de su eidolon.
features_gained.description_en: Her class level is halved (minimum 1) for determining her eidolon's abilities.

features_gained.name: Maestría en Convocación (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Lanza convocar monstruo I como habilidad mágica varias veces al día con capacidades ampliadas cuando su eidolon no está presente.
features_gained.description_en: Casts summon monster I as a spell-like ability multiple times per day, with expanded summons when her eidolon is not active.

features_gained.name: Aumentar Convocación
features_gained.description_es: Recibe Aumentar Convocación como dote de bono a nivel 2 sin cumplir requisitos.
features_gained.description_en: Gains Augment Summoning as a bonus feat at 2nd level without meeting prerequisites.

broodmaster_unchained.name: Broodmaster
broodmaster_unchained.description_es: Convocador que comanda dos eidolones pequeños en lugar de uno solo, dividiendo estadísticas y vínculos entre ambos.
broodmaster_unchained.description_en: A summoner who commands two Small eidolons instead of one, dividing statistics and bonds between them.

features_gained.name: Camada de Eidolones
features_gained.description_es: Comanda dos eidolones Pequeños cuyas estadísticas base (DG, puntos de habilidad, dotes y bono de armadura) deben dividirse entre los dos.
features_gained.description_en: Commands two Small eidolons whose base statistics (HD, skill points, feats and armor bonus) must be divided between them.

features_gained.name: Vínculo de Camada
features_gained.description_es: Funciona como vínculo vital pero solo puede sacrificar pg para evitar daño a un eidolon de la camada por vez.
features_gained.description_en: Works like life link but he can only sacrifice HP to prevent damage to one eidolon at a time.

features_gained.name: Sentidos Vinculados
features_gained.description_es: Comparte los sentidos solo con un eidolon a la vez.
features_gained.description_en: Shares senses with only one eidolon at a time.

features_gained.name: Camada Mayor
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 8, gastando 4 puntos de evolución, puede tener dos eidolones medianos o cuatro pequeños; a nivel 13, con 6 puntos, puede tener uno enorme.
features_gained.description_en: At 8th level, by spending 4 evolution points, he may have two Medium or four Small eidolons; at 13th, with 6 points, one Huge.

features_gained.name: Lazo de Camada
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 14 puede transferir daño a un eidolon de su camada; reemplaza vínculo vital.
features_gained.description_en: At 14th level he may transfer damage to one eidolon in his brood; replaces life bond.

naturalist_summoner_unchained.name: Naturalist
naturalist_summoner_unchained.description_es: Convocadora ligada a la naturaleza que invoca aliados naturales y aplica enfoques animales a su eidolon, sacrificando aliado escudo y vínculo vital.
naturalist_summoner_unchained.description_en: A nature-bound summoner who calls nature's allies and applies animal aspects to her eidolon, sacrificing shield ally and life bond.

features_gained.name: Llamado de la Naturaleza (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Lanza convocar aliado natural I como habilidad mágica varias veces al día, limitada a animales, bestias mágicas o sabandijas.
features_gained.description_en: Casts summon nature's ally I as a spell-like ability multiple times per day, limited to animals, magical beasts or vermin.

features_gained.name: Enfoque Animal (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 4 aplica un aspecto animal de cazador a su eidolon como acción rápida, otorgándole rasgos físicos del animal elegido.
features_gained.description_en: At 4th level she applies a hunter animal aspect to her eidolon as a swift action, granting it physical traits of the chosen animal.

features_gained.name: Segundo Enfoque Animal (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 10 aplica dos aspectos animales distintos al eidolon simultáneamente.
features_gained.description_en: At 10th level she applies two different animal aspects to her eidolon at once.

features_gained.name: Enfoque Compartido (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 14 ella misma gana los efectos de un aspecto aplicado a su eidolon.
features_gained.description_en: At 14th level she gains the effects of one aspect applied to her eidolon.

features_gained.name: Tercer Enfoque Animal (Su)
features_gained.description_es: A nivel 18 aplica tres aspectos animales distintos al eidolon a la vez.
features_gained.description_en: At 18th level she applies three different animal aspects to her eidolon at once.

order_of_the_chain.name: Order of the Chain
order_of_the_chain.description_es: Hellknights especializados en someter y capturar enemigos vivos, expertos en interrogacion y persecucion de fugitivos.
order_of_the_chain.description_en: Hellknights specialized in subduing and capturing enemies alive, experts in interrogation and pursuing fugitives.

order_of_the_godclaw.name: Order of the Godclaw
order_of_the_godclaw.description_es: Hellknights que veneran cinco deidades legales (Abadar, Asmodeo, Iomedae, Irori, Torag) como aspectos de la ley misma.
order_of_the_godclaw.description_en: Hellknights who venerate five lawful deities (Abadar, Asmodeus, Iomedae, Irori, Torag) as aspects of law itself.

order_of_the_nail.name: Order of the Nail
order_of_the_nail.description_es: Hellknights fronterizos que combaten a barbaros y monstruos del salvajismo, fortificando los limites de la civilizacion.
order_of_the_nail.description_en: Frontier Hellknights who battle barbarians and monsters from the wilds, fortifying the boundaries of civilization.

order_of_the_scourge.name: Order of the Scourge
order_of_the_scourge.description_es: Hellknights que persiguen criminales y administran justicia con dureza implacable en areas urbanas como Cheliax.
order_of_the_scourge.description_en: Hellknights who pursue criminals and administer justice with relentless harshness in urban areas like Cheliax.

order_of_the_gate.name: Order of the Gate
order_of_the_gate.description_es: Hellknights eruditos del destino y los planos, sirvientes de Asmodeo que estudian secretos profeticos y diabolicos.
order_of_the_gate.description_en: Scholarly Hellknights of fate and the planes, servants of Asmodeus who study prophetic and diabolic secrets.

crimson_assassin.name: Crimson Assassin
crimson_assassin.description_es: Reconstruccion oficial de Paizo del Asesino del Mantis Rojo (Adventurer's Guide). Conserva la tematica de devoto sicario de Achaekek pero rediseña progresion y poderes alrededor de la sabre dentada, con nuevas habilidades como Oracion de Ataque, Sudario Rojo, formas de mantis (sangre, muerte) y la sutil capacidad Esfumarse.
crimson_assassin.description_en: Paizo's official redesign of the Red Mantis Assassin from the Adventurer's Guide. Keeps the Achaekek-devoted assassin theme but reworks progression around sawtooth sabre fighting with new features such as Prayer Attack, Red Shroud, escalating Mantis Form variants (Blood/Death) and the Fading defense.
features_removed: Replaces the original Red Mantis Assassin prestige class wholesale (alternate Paizo build)

features_gained.name: Prayer Attack (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 2: accion estandar para fascinar a un objetivo a 9 m sosteniendo el sabre apuntado al suelo (CD 10 + nivel + Car); permite golpe de gracia tras 3 asaltos.
features_gained.description_en: Level 2: standard-action fascinate within 30 ft holding the sawtooth sabre point down (DC 10 + class level + Cha); allows coup de grace after 3 rounds.

features_gained.name: Red Shroud (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 3: invoca una niebla roja Con/dia que da +1 de esquiva a CA y curacion rapida igual al modificador de Constitucion durante 1 asalto/nivel; si muere durante su uso, se desintegra dejando solo el equipo.
features_gained.description_en: Level 3: summons a red mist Con-mod times/day granting +1 dodge AC and fast healing equal to Con mod for 1 round/level; if slain while active, disintegrates leaving only gear.

features_gained.name: Sabre Fighting (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Niveles 1/5/7: gana Especializacion con Arma, Mayor Foco y Mayor Especializacion con sabre dentada sin requisitos de guerrero; trata el sabre como arma ligera para Soltura con Arma.
features_gained.description_en: Levels 1/5/7: gains Weapon Specialization, Greater Weapon Focus and Greater Weapon Specialization with sawtooth sabre without fighter prerequisites; treats sabre as a light weapon for Weapon Finesse.

features_gained.name: Mantis Form (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 6: 1/dia se transforma en mantis gigante rojo sangre (vermin shape II) con agarre, embestida y golpe sorpresivo. A nivel 8 (Blood Mantis) inflige 1d6 sangrado y RD 5/bien; a nivel 10 (Death Mantis) el mordisco aplica 1 nivel negativo y RD 10/bien.
features_gained.description_en: Level 6: 1/day transforms into a blood-red giant mantis (vermin shape II) with grab, lunge and sudden strike. Level 8 (Blood Mantis) adds 1d6 bleed and DR 5/good; level 10 (Death Mantis) bite inflicts 1 negative level and DR 10/good.

features_gained.name: Fading (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 8: como accion inmediata Con/dia, se vuelve etereo al ser atacado o forzado a TS de Reflejos, con 50% de evitar el daño.
features_gained.description_en: Level 8: immediate action Con-mod times/day to become ethereal when attacked or forced to make a Reflex save, with 50% chance to avoid damage.

features_gained.name: Mantis Doom (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 9: usa creeping doom 3/dia (NL = nivel de personaje) invocando enjambres de mantis venenosas en lugar de insectos.
features_gained.description_en: Level 9: uses creeping doom 3/day (CL = character level), summoning swarms of venomous mantises instead of insects.

arcane_savant.name: Arcane Savant
arcane_savant.description_es: Rediseño Paizo del Pathfinder Savant en el Adventurer's Guide, despojado de las referencias especificas a la Sociedad Pathfinder para hacerlo accesible a cualquier estudioso magico. Mantiene la maestria de pergaminos, glifos y simbolos pero añade silenciar items y atunar uno con el propio NL.
arcane_savant.description_en: Paizo's Adventurer's Guide redesign of the Pathfinder Savant, stripped of Pathfinder Society-specific flavor so any arcane scholar can take it. Keeps mastery of scrolls, glyphs and symbols but adds silent item activation and the ability to attune one item to use the savant's caster level.
features_removed: Replaces the original Pathfinder Savant prestige class (Pathfinder Chronicles Campaign Setting)
Pathfinder Society-themed flavor and any Society-restricted abilities

features_gained.name: Adept Activation (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 1: siempre puede tomar 10 en Usar Objeto Magico (excepto activando a ciegas) y no falla automaticamente con un 1 natural.
features_gained.description_en: Level 1: can always take 10 on Use Magic Device (except blind activation) and does not auto-fail on natural 1s.

features_gained.name: Esoteric Magic (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 2+: cada nivel elige un conjuro de cualquier lista de clase y lo trata como propio (subiendo 1 nivel si es necesario).
features_gained.description_en: Level 2+: each level picks a spell from any class list and treats it as on her own list (raising it by 1 level if needed).

features_gained.name: Glyph-Finding / Sigil Master (Ex/Su)
features_gained.description_es: Niveles 2/5: usa Conjuros para detectar trampas magicas escritas como un picaro, y suma su nivel a TS contra simbolos/runas; un exito evita activarlas sin desactivarlas.
features_gained.description_en: Levels 2/5: uses Spellcraft to detect writing-based magical traps like a rogue, and adds class level to saves vs symbols/glyphs; success prevents triggering without disabling.

features_gained.name: Silence Master (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 6: activa items de detonante/completar/palabra de orden silenciosamente con gestos; 3/dia lanza conjuros de hasta 6° nivel como con varilla metamagica de Conjuro Silencioso.
features_gained.description_en: Level 6: silently activates spell-trigger/-completion/command-word items with gestures; 3/day casts spells up to 6th level as if using a silent metamagic rod.

features_gained.name: Dispelling Master (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 7: convierte conjuros preparados en disipar magia (3°+) o disipar magia mayor (6°+); espontaneos los añaden a su lista. Un exito cura PG igual al NL del efecto disipado.
features_gained.description_en: Level 7: converts prepared spells into dispel magic (3rd+) or greater dispel magic (6th+); spontaneous casters add them to spells known. Success heals HP equal to dispelled effect's CL.

features_gained.name: Spellcasting Master (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 9: 3/dia accion rapida para no provocar AdO al lanzar conjuros ese asalto, y los conjuros de concentracion duran rondas iguales a su mejor mod mental tras dejar de concentrarse.
features_gained.description_en: Level 9: 3/day swift action to avoid AoOs from casting that round; concentration spells persist for rounds equal to her highest mental mod after she stops concentrating.

features_gained.name: Item Master (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 10: tras 1 hora de focalizacion, atuna un item magico no de cargas para que use su NL en vez del propio (un solo item a la vez).
features_gained.description_en: Level 10: after 1 hour of focus, attunes one non-charged magic item so it uses her caster level instead of its own (only one at a time).

swordlord.name: Swordlord
swordlord.description_es: Version actualizada de Paizo del Aldori Swordlord en el Adventurer's Guide. Comparte requisitos casi identicos pero usa un BAB completo y se enfoca en duelos publicos, parada defensiva escalable, intimidacion tras criticos (Quebrar Confianza) y deflexion de criticos (Tajo Salvador). Apila niveles con el arquetipo defender.
swordlord.description_en: Paizo's updated Adventurer's Guide take on the Aldori Swordlord.
