Shares nearly identical prerequisites but advances with a full BAB and focuses on public dueling, scaling Defensive Parry, post-critical Intimidate (Shatter Confidence) and crit-deflecting Saving Slash. Levels stack with the defender fighter archetype.
features_removed: Replaces the original Aldori Swordlord prestige class (Pathfinder Companion: Sword and Sorcery / Inner Sea World Guide)

features_gained.name: Deft Strike (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 1: añade su modificador de Destreza (en vez del de Fuerza) al daño con la espada de duelo mientras solo empuñe esa arma.
features_gained.description_en: Level 1: adds Dex bonus (instead of Str) to damage rolls with the dueling sword while wielding only that weapon.

features_gained.name: Display Weapon Prowess (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 2: suma medio nivel de clase a Intimidar con Despliegue Asombroso y a chequeos de combate de actuacion en duelos.
features_gained.description_en: Level 2: adds half class level to Intimidate when using Dazzling Display and to performance combat checks during duels.

features_gained.name: Defensive Parry (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Niveles 3/7: +1 (luego +2) a CA por esquiva durante un ataque completo con la espada de duelo. Apila con niveles del arquetipo defender.
features_gained.description_en: Levels 3/7: +1 (then +2) dodge AC during full attacks with the dueling sword. Stacks with defender archetype levels.

features_gained.name: Adaptive Tactics (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Niveles 4/8: reduce la penalizacion por Pelear Defensivamente o Pericia en Combate en 1 (luego 2), y permite chequeos rapidos de Averiguar Intenciones para bonos condicionales.
features_gained.description_en: Levels 4/8: reduces fighting defensively / Combat Expertise penalty by 1 (then 2), and allows swift Sense Motive checks for conditional bonuses.

features_gained.name: Shatter Confidence (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 5: tras un critico, desarme, reposicion o destrozar, accion rapida para Intimidar y desmoralizar; en agitados ya, suprime sus bonos morales (y a nivel 10 tambien competencia/perspicacia).
features_gained.description_en: Level 5: after a critical hit or successful disarm/reposition/sunder, swift Intimidate to demoralize; against already-shaken targets it also suppresses morale bonuses (and at level 10, competence/insight).

features_gained.name: Saving Slash (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Niveles 6/9: accion inmediata para reducir un critico cuerpo a cuerpo a daño normal con 25% de exito (nivel 6) o 50% (nivel 9, ademas 25% contra criticos a distancia).
features_gained.description_en: Levels 6/9: immediate action to reduce a melee critical to normal damage with 25% chance (level 6) or 50% (level 9, plus 25% vs ranged crits).

features_gained.name: Dexterous Duelist (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 7: conserva su bono de Destreza en Acrobacias y Trepar, y no provoca AdO al levantarse de prono con una mano libre.
features_gained.description_en: Level 7: keeps Dex bonus on Acrobatics and Climb, and doesn't provoke AoOs when standing from prone with a free hand.

champion_of_the_faith.name: Champion of the Faith
champion_of_the_faith.description_es: Sacerdote de guerra dedicado a un único aspecto alineado de su deidad. Pierde las mejoras progresivas del arma sagrada y un don adicional, pero gana Detectar Alineamiento a voluntad, Golpe Smite contra enemigos de alineamiento opuesto, y a nivel 12 puede imbuir su arma con una propiedad especial de alineamiento.
champion_of_the_faith.description_en: Warpriest devoted to one alignment aspect of his deity. Loses progressive sacred weapon enhancements and one bonus feat, but gains Detect Alignment at will, Smite against opposed-alignment foes, and at 12th level can imbue his weapon with an alignment special ability.

features_gained.name: Alineamiento Elegido (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 1. Elige uno de los alineamientos de su deidad: Caos, Mal, Bien o Ley. Debe seleccionar la bendición de ese alineamiento como una de sus dos bendiciones, aunque no esté en la lista de dominios de su deidad. Esto modifica bendiciones.
features_gained.description_en: 1st level. Choose one alignment component shared with your deity: chaos, evil, good, or law. Must select the corresponding alignment blessing as one of his two blessings, even if not on the deity's domain list. This alters blessings.

features_gained.name: Detectar Alineamiento (Sp)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 3. Puede usar detectar [alineamiento opuesto] a voluntad como habilidad mágica. Sustituye el don adicional de nivel 3.
features_gained.description_en: 3rd level. Can use detect [opposed alignment] at will as a spell-like ability. Replaces the 3rd-level bonus feat.

features_gained.name: Arma Sagrada: Alineamiento (Ex)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 4. El arma sagrada del campeón cuenta como su alineamiento elegido a efectos de superar la reducción de daño. Sustituye la mejora de +1 de nivel 4 y los incrementos posteriores del arma sagrada.
features_gained.description_en: 4th level. The champion's sacred weapon counts as his chosen alignment for overcoming damage reduction. Replaces the +1 enhancement at 4th level and all subsequent sacred weapon enhancement increases.

features_gained.name: Golpe Smite (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 4. Acción rápida: elige un objetivo visible de alineamiento opuesto. Suma su mod. CAR a tiradas de ataque y su nivel de sacerdote de guerra al daño. 1/día, +1/día cada 4 niveles tras el 4.° (máx. 5/día al nivel 20). Si el objetivo no es del alineamiento opuesto, el golpe se desperdicia. El efecto dura hasta que el objetivo muere o el campeón descansa.
features_gained.description_en: 4th level. Swift action: choose one visible target of your opposed alignment. Add Charisma bonus to attack rolls and warpriest level to all damage rolls vs that target. 1/day, +1/day per 4 levels beyond 4th (max 5/day at 20th). If the target is not of the opposed alignment, the smite is wasted. Effect lasts until target is dead or champion rests.

features_gained.name: Propiedad de Alineamiento (Su)
features_gained.description_es: Nivel 12. Acción rápida 1/día: imbuye un arma sagrada con la propiedad especial de alineamiento correspondiente (anárquica, impía, sagrada o axiomática). Dura 1 minuto. Gana un uso adicional al nivel 16 y otro al nivel 20 (máx. 3/día).
features_gained.description_en: 12th level. Swift action 1/day: imbue one sacred weapon with the corresponding alignment special ability (anarchic for chaos, unholy for evil, holy for good, axiomatic for law). Lasts 1 minute. +1/day at 16th and 20th levels (max 3/day).
